English: The Ministry of Health advises all residents to boil drinking water before consumption to prevent cholera outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wakazi wote kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kabla ya kuyatumia ili kuzuia mlipuko wa kipindupindu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay kula talinaysaa dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aan la cunin si looga hortago faafitaanka daacuunka.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Afya inashauri wakazi wote kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kabla ya matumizi ili kuzuia mlipuko wa kipindupindu.

English: URGENT: Avoid unnecessary travel to Ebola-affected regions. Report any suspected cases to the nearest health facility immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Epuka kusafiri bila lazima kwenda maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na Ebola. Ripoti visa vyovyote vinavyoshukiwa katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Ka fogow safar aan loo baahnayn oo aad ku tagto gobollada uu saameeyay Ebola. Isla markiiba u sheeg wixii kiisas ah ee laga shakiyo xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: Epuka usafiri usio wa lazima kwenye maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na Ebola. Ripoti kesi zozote zinazoshukiwa kwenye kituo cha afya cha karibu mara moja.

English: Parents are reminded to ensure children under 5 receive polio vaccination before the deadline of March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanakumbushwa kuhakikisha watoto walio chini ya umri wa miaka 5 wanapata chanjo ya polio kabla ya tarehe ya mwisho ya Machi 15.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay hubiyaan in carruurta ka yar 5 sano ay qaataan tallaalka dabaysha ka hor inta aan la gaarin waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Wazazi wamekumbushwa kuhakikisha watoto chini ya miaka 5 wanapata chanjo ya polio kabla ya tarehe ya mwisho ya Machi 15.

English: The Social Health Authority warns the public against fraudsters impersonating SHA officials. Do not share your personal information with unauthorized persons.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inaonya umma dhidi ya wadanganyifu wanaojifanya maafisa wa SHA. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi na watu wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay uga digaysaa dadweynaha khiyaamooyinka sameeya ee iska dhigaya saraakiisha SHA. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed dadka aan la ogolayn.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawaonya umma dhidi ya wadanganyifu wanaojifanya kuwa maafisa wa SHA. Usiambie taarifa zako za kibinafsi na watu wasioidhinishwa.

English: All travelers from yellow fever endemic countries must present valid vaccination certificates at port of entry.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa na homa ya manjano lazima wawasilishe vyeti halali vya chanjo bandarini.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah ee ka imanaya wadamada uu ku badan yahay cudurka qandhada jaalaha ah waa inay keenaan shahaadooyin tallaal oo sax ah marka ay soo galayaan dekedda.
Kiswahili: Wasafiri wote kutoka nchi zinazoathiriwa na homa ya manjano lazima wasitishe vyeti halali vya chanjo kwenye bandari ya kuingia.

English: The county health department announces free malaria screening at all dispensaries this week. Visit your nearest facility.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya afya ya kaunti inatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika zahanati zote wiki hii. Tembelea kituo kilicho karibu nawe.
Somali: Waaxda caafimaadka ee degmadu waxay toddobaadkan ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo duumada ah dhammaan farmashiyaha. Booqo xarunta kuugu dhow.
Kiswahili: Idara ya afya ya kaunti inatangaza ukaguzi wa bure wa malaria katika vituo vyote vya kutolea dawa wiki hii. Tembelea kituo chako cha karibu.

English: Citizens are urged to practice regular handwashing with soap to prevent the spread of infectious diseases.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanahimizwa kunawa mikono mara kwa mara kwa sabuni ili kuzuia kuenea kwa magonjwa ya kuambukiza.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay si joogto ah gacmaha ugu dhaqdaan saabuun si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada faafa.
Kiswahili: Wananchi wamehimizwa kuzoea kunawa mikono mara kwa mara kwa sabuni ili kuzuia kuenea kwa magonjwa ya kuambukiza.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must report suspected measles cases within 24 hours as per Ministry directive.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viripoti visa vinavyoshukiwa vya surua ndani ya saa 24 kulingana na maagizo ya Wizara.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay soo sheegaan kiisaska looga shakisan yahay jadeecada 24 saacadood gudahood sida ku cad tilmaamaha Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima virejeleze kesi zinazoshukiwa za surua ndani ya masaa 24 kama ilivyoagizwa na Wizara.

English: The public is advised to seek immediate medical attention for persistent cough and fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu mara moja kwa dalili za kikohozi na homa zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad oo degdeg ah si ay u helaan calaamadaha qufaca iyo qandhada joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu ya haraka kwa dalili za kikohozi na homa zisizopona.

English: Community health workers will conduct door-to-door vaccination campaigns in all wards starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya kampeni za chanjo ya nyumba kwa nyumba katika wodi zote kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa olole tallaal ah ka sameyn doona dhammaan waaxaha laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya kampeni za chanjo kutoka mlango hadi mlango katika wadi zote kuanzia Jumatatu.

English: Do not consume meat from animals that have died from unknown causes. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usile nyama ya wanyama waliokufa kutokana na sababu zisizojulikana. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha cunin hilibka xoolaha sababo aan la garanayn awgood. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usile nyama kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa kutokana na sababu zisizojulikana. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.

English: All pregnant women are encouraged to attend antenatal clinics at least four times during pregnancy.
Kiswahili2: Wanawake wote wajawazito wanahimizwa kuhudhuria kliniki za ujauzito angalau mara nne wakati wa ujauzito.
Somali: Dhammaan haweenka uurka leh waxaa lagu dhiirigelinayaa inay tagaan xarumaha dhalmada kahor ugu yaraan afar jeer inta ay uurka leeyihiin.
Kiswahili: Wanawake wote wajawazito wahimizwa kuhudhuria vituo vya kliniki ya wajawazito angalau mara nne wakati wa ujauzito.

English: The Ministry cautions against self-medication with antibiotics. Always consult a qualified medical practitioner.
Kiswahili2: Wizara inaonya dhidi ya kujitibu kwa kutumia viuavijasumu. Daima wasiliana na mtaalamu wa matibabu aliyehitimu.
Somali: Wasaaraddu waxay ka digaysaa in qofku iskiis u qaato daawada antibiyootikada. Had iyo jeer la tasho dhakhtar aqoon u leh.
Kiswahili: Wizara inatoa tahadhari dhidi ya kujitibia kwa dawa za kupigana na bakteria. Daima shauriana na mtaalamu wa matibabu.

English: Residents of flood-prone areas must take precautions against waterborne diseases. Use water purification tablets.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wa maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wachukue tahadhari dhidi ya magonjwa yanayosababishwa na maji. Tumia tembe za kusafisha maji.
Somali: Dadka deggan meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay qaataan taxaddarro ka dhan ah cudurrada biyaha ka dhasha. Isticmaal kiniiniyada nadiifinta biyaha.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa maeneo yaliyo hatarini ya mafuriko lazima wachukue tahadhari dhidi ya magonjwa yanayoenezwa kwa maji. Tumia vidonge vya kusafisha maji.

English: All schools must enforce strict hygiene protocols to prevent influenza outbreaks among students.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote lazima zitekeleze taratibu kali za usafi ili kuzuia milipuko ya mafua miongoni mwa wanafunzi.
Somali: Dhammaan iskuulladu waa inay hirgeliyaan hab-raacyada nadaafadda ee adag si looga hortago faafitaanka hargabka ee ardayda.
Kiswahili: Shule zote lazima zitekeleze kanuni kali za usafi ili kuzuia mlipuko wa homa ya kifua kikuu miongoni mwa wanafunzi.

English: The Ministry of Education announces that all schools will reopen on January 8th, 2026. Parents should prepare accordingly.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inatangaza kwamba shule zote zitafunguliwa tena tarehe 8 Januari, 2026. Wazazi wanapaswa kujiandaa ipasavyo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan iskuullada dib loo furi doono Janaayo 8, 2026. Waalidiintu waa inay si waafaqsan isu diyaariyaan.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Elimu inatangaza kwamba shule zote zitafunguliwa Januari 8, 2026. Wazazi wanapaswa kuandaa kulingana na hivyo.

English: All KCSE candidates must verify their examination registration details online before Friday, 5th March.
Kiswahili2: Watahiniwa wote wa KCSE lazima wathibitishe maelezo yao ya usajili wa mtihani mtandaoni kabla ya Ijumaa, tarehe 5 Machi.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda imtixaanka KCSE waa inay si online ah u xaqiijiyaan diiwaan gelinta imtixaanka kahor Jimcaha, 5 Maarso.
Kiswahili: Watahiniwa wote wa KCSE lazima wathibitishe maelezo yao ya usajili wa mtihani mtandaoni kabla ya Ijumaa, Machi 5.

English: Parents are reminded that the deadline for Form One admission confirmation is extended to April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uthibitisho wa kujiunga na kidato cha kwanza imeongezwa hadi Aprili 30.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee xaqiijinta ogolaanshaha Foomka Koowaad la kordhiyo ilaa Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Wazazi wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuthibitisha kuingia Kidato cha Kwanza imeongezwa hadi Aprili 30.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges all teachers to report to their stations by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi walimu wote kuripoti vituoni mwao ifikapo saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan macallimiinta inay iska xaadiriyaan saldhigyadooda 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Huduma ya Walimu inawahimiza walimu wote kuripoti kwenye vituo vyao saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.

English: NOTICE: All boarding schools must submit updated student health records to the county education office by end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote za bweni lazima ziwasilishe rekodi mpya za afya ya wanafunzi kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyada hoyga ah waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka ardayda ee la cusbooneysiiyay u soo gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Shule zote za bweni lazima ziwasilishe rekodi za afya za wanafunzi zilizosasishwa kwenye ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.

English: Students are advised to avoid examination malpractice. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuepuka makosa ya mtihani. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan khaladaadka imtixaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay wax khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Wanafunzi washauriwa kuepuka udanganyifu katika mitihani. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakidanganya.

English: The government announces 20,000 new teaching positions. Applications open on the TSC portal from Monday.
Kiswahili2: Serikali yatangaza nafasi 20,000 mpya za kufundisha. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay ku dhawaaqday 20,000 oo boosas cusub oo macallinimo ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Serikali inatangaza nafasi 20,000 mpya za ualimu. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye portal ya TSC kuanzia Jumatatu.

English: All schools in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Shule zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa Wizara.

English: Parents must ensure all students have valid medical insurance coverage before reporting to school.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wahakikishe wanafunzi wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kuripoti shuleni.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan ardaydu ay haystaan ​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aysan iskuulka soo xaadirin.
Kiswahili: Wazazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa wanafunzi wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kuripoti shuleni.

English: The Ministry directs all schools to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting next term.
Kiswahili2: Wizara inaelekeza shule zote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia muhula ujao.
Somali: Wasaaraddu waxay faray dhammaan dugsiyada inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida laga bilaabo xilliga xiga.
Kiswahili: Wizara inaagiza shule zote kutekeleza mtaala mpya wa kulingana na uwezo kuanzia muhula ujao.

English: Students with special needs should register with the county education assessment center before enrollment.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wenye mahitaji maalum wanapaswa kujiandikisha na kituo cha tathmini ya elimu cha kaunti kabla ya kujiandikisha.
Somali: Ardayda baahiyaha gaarka ah qaba waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan xarunta qiimaynta waxbarashada ee degmada ka hor inta aysan isdiiwaangelin.
Kiswahili: Wanafunzi wenye mahitaji maalum wanapaswa kujisajili kwenye kituo cha tathmini cha elimu ya kaunti kabla ya kujiandikisha.

English: All university students must complete their national identity registration before graduation clearance.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wa vyuo vikuu lazima wakamilishe usajili wao wa utambulisho wa taifa kabla ya kuhitimu.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda jaamacadda waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la ansixin qalin-jabinta.
Kiswahili: Wanafunzi wote wa vyuo vikuu lazima wakamilisha usajili wao wa kitambulisho cha kitaifa kabla ya kukubaliwa kuhitimu.

English: The Kenya National Examinations Council warns against fake examination papers circulating on social media.
Kiswahili2: Baraza la Mitihani la Kitaifa la Kenya laonya dhidi ya karatasi bandia za mitihani zinazosambazwa kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Golaha Imtixaanaadka Qaranka Kenya ayaa ka digaya waraaqaha imtixaanaadka been abuurka ah ee lagu faafiyo baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Baraza la Mitihani ya Taifa la Kenya lawaonya dhidi ya karatasi za mitihani bandia zinazosambaa kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.

English: School administrators are reminded to conduct fire safety drills at least once per term.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanakumbushwa kufanya mazoezi ya usalama wa moto angalau mara moja kwa muhula.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay sameeyaan tababarro ku saabsan badbaadada dabka ugu yaraan hal mar xilli dugsiyeedkiiba.
Kiswahili: Wakurugenzi wa shule wamekumbushwa kufanya mazoezi ya usalama wa moto angalau mara moja kwa muhula.

English: All day schools must provide adequate drinking water and sanitation facilities for all students.
Kiswahili2: Shule za mchana kutwa lazima zitoe maji ya kunywa na vifaa vya usafi wa mazingira vya kutosha kwa wanafunzi wote.
Somali: Iskuullada maalintii oo dhan waa inay bixiyaan biyo ku filan oo la cabbo iyo tas-hiilaad fayadhowr oo loogu talagalay dhammaan ardayda.
Kiswahili: Shule zote za mchana lazima zitoe maji ya kunywa na vifaa vya kutosha vya usafi kwa wanafunzi wote.

English: The National Police Service urges citizens to remain vigilant and report suspicious activities to the nearest police station.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawahimiza raia kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa kituo cha polisi kilicho karibu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu ku boorinayaa muwaadiniinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku soo wargeliyaan falalka laga shakiyo saldhigga booliska ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawahimiza raia kuwa macho na kuripoti shughuli zinazoshukiwa kwenye kituo cha polisi cha karibu.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Nairobi-Mombasa highway between Kibwezi and Mtito Andei due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka barabara kuu ya Nairobi-Mombasa kati ya Kibwezi na Mtito Andei kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow wadada weyn ee isku xirta Nairobi iyo Mombasa ee u dhaxaysa Kibwezi iyo Mtito Andei sababo la xiriira howlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka barabara ya Nairobi-Mombasa kati ya Kibwezi na Mtito Andei kutokana na operesheni za usalama.

English: All residents of Mandera County are advised to observe the dusk-to-dawn curfew until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wa Kaunti ya Mandera wanashauriwa kuzingatia amri ya kutotoka nje kuanzia jioni hadi alfajiri hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan Degmada Mandheera waxaa lagu wargelinayaa inay ilaaliyaan bandowgii laga bilaabo qorrax dhaca ilaa waaberiga ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wote wa Kaunti ya Mandera washauriwa kuzingatia amri ya kutotoka jioni hadi asubuhi hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The government announces enhanced security patrols in all urban centers during the festive season.
Kiswahili2: Serikali yatangaza kuimarisha doria za usalama katika vituo vyote vya mijini wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay roondooyin amni oo ka socda dhammaan xarumaha magaalooyinka inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: Serikali inatangaza doria zilizoidhinishwa za usalama katika vituo vyote vya mijini wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.

English: Citizens are warned against sharing unverified security information on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanaonywa dhidi ya kushiriki taarifa za usalama ambazo hazijathibitishwa kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa looga digayaa inay la wadaagaan macluumaadka amniga ee aan la xaqiijin baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Raia wameonywa dhidi ya kushiriki taarifa zisizothibitishwa za usalama kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.

English: All vehicles entering government buildings must undergo mandatory security screening.
Kiswahili2: Magari yote yanayoingia katika majengo ya serikali lazima yapitie uchunguzi wa lazima wa usalama.
Somali: Dhammaan gawaarida soo galaya xarumaha dowladda waa in ay maraan baaritaan amni oo qasab ah.
Kiswahili: Magari yote yaingiayo majengo ya serikali lazima yapitie ukaguzi wa usalama unaolazimishwa.

English: The public is advised to avoid large gatherings in unauthorized venues until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mikusanyiko mikubwa katika maeneo yasiyoruhusiwa hadi pale ambapo kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan isu imaatinka ballaaran ee goobaha aan la ogolayn ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mikusanyiko mikubwa kwenye maeneo yasiyoidhinishwa mpaka idhini ya usalama ipatikane.

English: Residents of border counties must carry valid identification documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wa kaunti za mpakani lazima wabebe hati halali za utambulisho wakati wote.
Somali: Dadka deggan gobollada xuduudda waa inay mar walba wataan dukumentiyo aqoonsi oo sax ah.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa kaunti za mipaka lazima wabebe nyaraka halali za utambulisho wakati wote.

English: The National Police Service has deployed additional officers to maintain law and order during the election period.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi imewatuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha utulivu na sheria wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ciidamo dheeraad ah geeyay si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa imeweka maafisa wa ziada ili kudumisha sheria na utaratibu wakati wa uchaguzi.

English: URGENT: All schools in Garissa County must close by 3:00 PM today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Shule zote katika Kaunti ya Garissa lazima zifunge ifikapo saa 3:00 usiku leo ​​kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal degmada Garissa waa in la xidhaa 3:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: Shule zote katika Kaunti ya Garissa lazima zifungwe saa 9:00 mchana leo kutokana na tathmini ya tishio la usalama.

English: The public is reminded that possession of illegal firearms carries a mandatory minimum sentence of 10 years.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakumbushwa kwamba kumiliki silaha haramu kuna kifungo cha chini cha lazima cha miaka 10.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in haysashada hubka sharci darrada ah ay leedahay xukun ugu yaraan 10 sano ah oo qasab ah.
Kiswahili: Umma umekumbushwa kuwa umiliki wa silaha haramu hubeba adhabu ya kima cha chini ya miaka 10.

English: All commercial establishments must install CCTV cameras as per the Private Security Regulation Act.
Kiswahili2: Makampuni yote ya kibiashara lazima yaweke kamera za CCTV kulingana na Sheria ya Kanuni za Usalama wa Kibinafsi.
Somali: Dhammaan goobaha ganacsiga waa inay rakibaan kamaradaha CCTV sida ku xusan Xeerka Xeerarka Amniga Gaarka ah.
Kiswahili: Mashirika yote ya biashara lazima yasakinishe kamera za CCTV kama ilivyoagizwa na Sheria ya Udhibiti wa Usalama wa Kibinafsi.

English: Travelers to Lamu are advised to use designated security convoys along the Garsen-Lamu road.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri kwenda Lamu wanashauriwa kutumia misafara ya usalama iliyoteuliwa kando ya barabara ya Garsen-Lamu.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah ee tagaya Lamu waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isticmaalaan kolonyo amni oo loogu talagalay oo ku teedsan wadada Garsen-Lamu.
Kiswahili: Wasafiri wa Lamu washauriwa kutumia msafara ulioidhinishwa wa usalama kando ya barabara ya Garsen-Lamu.

English: The government warns against recruitment into extremist groups. Report any such attempts immediately.
Kiswahili2: Serikali inaonya dhidi ya kuajiri watu katika makundi yenye msimamo mkali. Ripoti majaribio yoyote kama hayo mara moja.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay ka digaysaa in la qoro kooxaha xagjirka ah. Isla markiiba soo sheeg isku dayada noocaas ah.
Kiswahili: Serikali inaonya dhidi ya kuajiriwa katika vikundi vikali. Ripoti majaribio yoyote kama hayo mara moja.

English: All motorcycle operators must display reflective jackets and registration numbers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Waendeshaji wote wa pikipiki lazima waonyeshe jaketi zinazoakisi mwanga na nambari za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka wada mootooyinka waa inay mar walba muujiyaan jaakadaha milicsiga leh iyo lambarrada diiwaangelinta.
Kiswahili: Wote waendeshaji wa pikipiki lazima waonyeshe koti zinazoakrisha na namba za usajili wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture advises farmers in arid regions to adopt drought-resistant crop varieties this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawashauri wakulima katika maeneo kame kutumia aina za mazao zinazostahimili ukame msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda gobollada qalalan inay qaataan noocyada dalagga ee u adkaysta abaarta xilligan.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Kilimo inashauri wakulima katika maeneo ya ukame kupanda aina za mimea zinazostahimili ukame msimu huu.

English: URGENT: All livestock farmers must vaccinate their animals against Rift Valley Fever before the rains begin.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wachanje wanyama wao dhidi ya Homa ya Bonde la Ufa kabla ya mvua kuanza.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay xoolahooda ka tallaalaan Rift Valley Fever ka hor inta aysan roobabku bilaaban.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote wanyama lazima wachanje mifugo yao dhidi ya Homa ya Bonde la Ufa kabla ya mvua kuanza.

English: The National Cereals and Produce Board announces maize purchase prices at KSh 3,300 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Bodi ya Kitaifa ya Nafaka na Mazao yatangaza bei za ununuzi wa mahindi kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kila gunia la kilo 90.
Somali: Guddiga Qaranka ee Badarka iyo Waxsoosaarka ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha iibsiga galleyda KSh 3,300 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: Bodi ya Nafaka na Mazao ya Kitaifa inatangaza bei za kununua mahindi kwa Shilingi 3,300 kwa mifuko ya kilo 90.

English: Farmers are reminded to register for the subsidized fertilizer program at their nearest cooperative office.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika ofisi yao ya ushirika iliyo karibu.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo xafiiska iskaashiga ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: Wakulima wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa programu ya mbolea iliyoidhinishwa kwenye ofisi yao ya karibu ya ushirika.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service bans importation of maize from countries affected by armyworm infestation.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inapiga marufuku uagizaji wa mahindi kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa na uvamizi wa viwavi jeshi.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucay soo dejinta galleyda laga keeno wadamada ay saameeyeen cayayaanka dirxiga.
Kiswahili: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inakataza uagizaji wa mahindi kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa na uenezaji wa viwavijeshi.

English: All tea farmers must deliver their green leaf to designated factories before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wapeleke majani yao ya kijani kwenye viwanda vilivyoteuliwa kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay caleenta cagaaran geeyaan warshado loogu talagalay ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima walete majani yao mabichi kwenye viwanda vilivyoidhinishwa kabla ya saa 11:00 jioni kila siku.

English: The county agricultural office announces free extension services for small-scale dairy farmers.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa wafugaji wadogo wa maziwa.
Somali: Xafiiska beeraha ee degmadu wuxuu ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda caanaha yar yar.
Kiswahili: Ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti inatangaza huduma za ugani za bure kwa wakulima wadogo wa maziwa.

English: Farmers in flood-prone areas are advised to harvest their crops immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Beeralayda ku nool meelaha ay fatahaaduhu u nugul yihiin waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Wakulima katika maeneo ya mafuriko washauriwa kuvuna mazao yao mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya kuvuna.

English: The government launches emergency livestock offtake program in Turkana and Marsabit counties.
Kiswahili2: Serikali yazindua mpango wa dharura wa kupunguza mifugo katika kaunti za Turkana na Marsabit.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay bilowday barnaamij degdeg ah oo xoolaha lagu soo saarayo degmooyinka Turkana iyo Marsabit.
Kiswahili: Serikali inazindua programu ya dharura ya kununua mifugo katika kaunti za Turkana na Marsabit.

English: All coffee cooperatives must submit their annual production reports to the Coffee Directorate by March 31st.
Kiswahili2: Vyama vyote vya ushirika vya kahawa lazima viwasilishe ripoti zao za uzalishaji wa kila mwaka kwa Kurugenzi ya Kahawa ifikapo tarehe 31 Machi.
Somali: Dhammaan iskaashatooyinka qaxwada waa inay warbixinnadooda sanadlaha ah ee wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan Agaasinka Qaxwada kahor Maarso 31keeda.
Kiswahili: Vyama vyote vya ushirika vya kahawa lazima viwasilishe ripoti zao za uzalishaji wa kila mwaka kwa Idara ya Kahawa ifikapo Machi 31.

English: The Kenya Agricultural and Livestock Research Organization releases new high-yielding bean varieties for Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Utafiti wa Kilimo na Mifugo la Kenya linatoa aina mpya za maharagwe yenye mavuno mengi kwa ajili ya Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Ururka Cilmi-baarista Beeraha iyo Xoolaha Kenya ayaa soo saaray noocyo cusub oo digir ah oo tayo sare leh oo loogu talagalay Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: Shirika la Utafiti wa Kilimo na Mifugo la Kenya latoa aina mpya za maharagwe yenye mavuno mengi kwa Magharibi mwa Kenya.

English: Farmers are warned against using counterfeit pesticides. Purchase only from licensed agro-dealers.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanaonywa dhidi ya kutumia dawa bandia za kuua wadudu. Nunua kutoka kwa wauzaji wa kilimo walioidhinishwa pekee.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa looga digayaa inay isticmaalaan sunta cayayaanka ee been abuurka ah. Ka iibso oo keliya ganacsatada beeraha ee shatiga haysta.
Kiswahili: Wakulima wameonywa dhidi ya kutumia dawa za kiuawa bandia. Nunua kutoka kwa wauzaji wa kilimo walioidhinishwa tu.

English: The Ministry announces water rationing schedules for all irrigation schemes in the Athi River basin.
Kiswahili2: Wizara inatangaza ratiba za mgao wa maji kwa miradi yote ya umwagiliaji katika bonde la Mto Athi.
Somali: Wasaaraddu waxay ku dhawaaqday jadwalka qaybinta biyaha ee dhammaan qorshayaasha waraabka ee dooxada Wabiga Athi.
Kiswahili: Wizara inatangaza ratiba za kupunguza maji kwa miradi yote ya umwagiliaji katika beseni ya mto Athi.

English: Pastoralist communities are advised to move their herds to designated grazing reserves due to drought conditions.
Kiswahili2: Jamii za wafugaji zinashauriwa kuhamisha mifugo yao kwenye hifadhi za malisho zilizotengwa kutokana na hali ya ukame.
Somali: Bulshooyinka xoolo-dhaqatada ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xoolahooda u raraan meelaha daaqsinka ah ee loo qoondeeyay xaaladaha abaarta awgeed.
Kiswahili: Jamii za wafugaji washauriwa kuhamisha mifugo yao kwenye hifadhi zilizoidhinishwa za malisho kutokana na hali ya ukame.

English: All fish farmers must register their ponds with the county fisheries department by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wasajili mabwawa yao na idara ya uvuvi ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay ka diiwaan geliyaan barkadahooda waaxda kalluumeysiga ee degmada kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Wakulima wote wa samaki lazima wajisajili mabwawa yao kwenye idara ya uvuvi ya kaunti ifikapo Juni 30.

English: IEBC reminds all eligible voters to verify their registration details via SMS by sending their ID number to 70001.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawakumbusha wapiga kura wote wanaostahiki kuthibitisha maelezo yao ya usajili kupitia SMS kwa kutuma nambari yao ya kitambulisho kwa 70001.
Somali: Guddiga doorashada ee IEBC wuxuu xasuusinayaa dhammaan codbixiyeyaasha u qalma inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahinta diiwaan gelinta iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS iyagoo lambarkooda aqoonsiga u diraya lambarka 70001.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawakumbusha wapiga kura wote wanaostahili kuthibitisha maelezo yao ya usajili kupitia SMS kwa kutuma namba yao ya kitambulisho kwa 70001.

English: The government announces that all national identity card applications must be submitted online starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali yatangaza kwamba maombi yote ya vitambulisho vya taifa lazima yawasilishwe mtandaoni kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan codsiyada kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ay tahay in lagu soo gudbiyo khadka tooska ah laga bilaabo Agoosto 1.
Kiswahili: Serikali inatangaza kwamba maombi yote ya kadi za kitambulisho cha kitaifa lazima yatiwe mtandaoni kuanzia Agosti 1.

English: All civil servants are directed to update their personal details on the e-Citizen portal by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wameagizwa kusasisha maelezo yao binafsi kwenye lango la kielektroniki la Citizen ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la farayaa inay cusboonaysiiyaan macluumaadkooda shaqsiyeed bogga internetka ee e-Citizen kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Wafanyakazi wote wa umma wameagizwa kusasisha maelezo yao ya kibinafsi kwenye portal ya e-Citizen ifikapo Septemba 15.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds taxpayers to file their annual returns before the June 30th deadline.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha walipa kodi kuwasilisha marejesho yao ya kila mwaka kabla ya tarehe ya mwisho ya Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celintooda sanadlaha ah ka hor inta aan la gaarin waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha walipa kodi kuwasilisha marejesho yao ya kila mwaka kabla ya tarehe ya mwisho ya Juni 30.

English: Citizens are advised to collect their Huduma Namba cards from designated centers within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanashauriwa kuchukua kadi zao za Huduma Namba kutoka vituo vilivyoteuliwa ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaararka Huduma Namba ka soo qaataan xarumaha loo qoondeeyay muddo 30 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: Raia washauriwa kukokotoa kadi zao za Huduma Namba kwenye vituo vilivyoidhinishwa ndani ya siku 30.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces voter registration centers in all 290 constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza vituo vya usajili wa wapiga kura katika majimbo yote 290.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay xarumaha diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee dhammaan 290-ka degmo doorasho.
Kiswahili: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inatangaza vituo vya usajili wa wapiga kura katika jimbo zote 290.

English: All political parties must submit their nomination lists to the Registrar of Political Parties by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Vyama vyote vya siasa lazima viwasilishe orodha zao za uteuzi kwa Msajili wa Vyama vya Siasa ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan xisbiyada siyaasadeed waa inay liisaska magacaabistooda u gudbiyaan Diiwaanhayaha Xisbiyada Siyaasadda kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Vyama vyote vya siasa lazima viwasilishe orodha zao za uteuzi kwa Msajili wa Vyama vya Siasa ifikapo Februari 28.

English: The public is invited to submit memoranda on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before March 10th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha memoranda kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Machi 10.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan qoraallo ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qoondaynta Dakhliga ee la soo jeediyay ee Degmada ka hor Maarso 10keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha memoranda kuhusu Mswado wa Ugawaji wa Mapato ya Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Machi 10.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority directs all PSV operators to undergo mandatory safety training.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawaagiza waendeshaji wote wa magari ya kifahari kupitia PSV kupata mafunzo ya lazima ya usalama.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada waxay faray dhammaan hawlwadeennada PSV inay maraan tababar badbaado oo khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Usafiri na Usalama ya Kitaifa inaagiza waendeshaji wote wa PSV kupitia mafunzo ya usalama yanayolazimishwa.

English: The government announces a 30-day amnesty for surrender of illegal firearms starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali yatangaza msamaha wa siku 30 kwa kusalimisha silaha haramu kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis 30 maalmood ah oo loogu talagalay soo dhiibista hubka sharci darrada ah laga bilaabo Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Serikali inatangaza muda wa siku 30 wa msamaha wa kusalimisha silaha haramu kuanzia Aprili 1.

English: All county governments must publish their annual budgets on their official websites by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali zote za kaunti lazima zichapishe bajeti zao za kila mwaka kwenye tovuti zao rasmi ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan dowladaha hoose waa inay miisaaniyadooda sanadlaha ah ku daabacaan mareegaha rasmiga ah kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Serikali zote za kaunti lazima zichapie bajeti zao za kila mwaka kwenye tovuti zao rasmi ifikapo Julai 1.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges whistleblowers to report corruption through the toll-free line 1551.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawasihi wafichuzi wa habari kuripoti ufisadi kupitia simu ya bure 1551.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dadka soo sheega musuqmaasuqa inay soo sheegaan iyagoo adeegsanaya lambarka bilaashka ah ee 1551.
Kiswahili: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza watoa taarifa kuripoti ufisadi kupitia laini ya bure 1551.

English: Citizens are reminded that the next General Election will be held on the second Tuesday of August 2027.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kwamba Uchaguzi Mkuu ujao utafanyika Jumanne ya pili ya Agosti 2027.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in Doorashada Guud ee xigta la qaban doono Talaadada labaad ee Agoosto 2027.
Kiswahili: Raia wamekumbushwa kwamba Uchaguzi Mkuu ujao utafanyika Jumanne ya pili ya mwezi wa Agosti 2027.

English: The Office of the Auditor General invites public comments on the draft audit guidelines by May 15th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inakaribisha maoni ya umma kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi ifikapo Mei 15.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku martiqaadayaa dadweynaha inay faallo ka bixiyaan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hantidhawrka kahor 15-ka Maajo.
Kiswahili: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Taifa inakaribisha maoni ya umma kuhusu mwongozo wa ukaguzi uliopendekezwa ifikapo Mei 15.

English: All government procurement officers must complete integrity training by the end of this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa ununuzi wa serikali lazima wakamilishe mafunzo ya uadilifu ifikapo mwisho wa mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Dhammaan saraakiisha wax iibsiga ee dowladda waa inay dhammaystiraan tababarka daacadnimada dhammaadka sannad-maaliyadeedkan.
Kiswahili: Maafisa wote wa ununuzi wa serikali lazima wakamilisha mafunzo ya uadilifu ifikapo mwisho wa mwaka huu wa fedha.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department warns of heavy rainfall exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa roobab xooggan oo ka da'aya Galbeedka Kenya 24 saacadood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inaonya mvua kubwa zaidi ya mm 50 kwa masaa 24 katika Magharibi mwa Kenya.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All residents along the Tana River must move to higher ground immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUHAMISHA: Wakazi wote kando ya Mto Tana lazima wahamie kwenye ardhi ya juu mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan dadka deggan hareeraha Wabiga Tana waa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan dhul sare sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: AMRI YA KUONDOA: Wakazi wote kando ya mto Tana lazima waende kwenye ardhi ya juu mara moja kutokana na kupanda kwa kiwango cha maji.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre issues flood risk alert for Nairobi and its environs.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatoa tahadhari ya hatari ya mafuriko kwa Nairobi na viunga vyake.
Somali: Xarunta Qaranka ee Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka ayaa soo saartay digniin ku saabsan khatarta fatahaadaha ee ka jirta Nairobi iyo agagaarkeeda.
Kiswahili: Kituo cha Operesheni za Majanga ya Kitaifa kinaonya hatari ya mafuriko kwa Nairobi na maeneo yake ya jirani.

English: Residents of coastal counties are advised to secure their properties as strong winds of up to 60km/h are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wa kaunti za pwani wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao kwani upepo mkali wa hadi kilomita 60 kwa saa unatarajiwa.
Somali: Dadka deggan gobollada xeebaha ayaa lagula talinayaa inay sugaan hantidooda maadaama la filayo dabeylo xooggan oo gaaraya 60km/saacaddii.
Kiswahili: Wakazi wa kaunti za pwani washauriwa kulinda mali zao kwani upepo mkali wa hadi km 60 kwa saa unatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates emergency response teams in Garissa, Wajir, and Mandera counties.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika kaunti za Garissa, Wajir, na Mandera.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee degmooyinka Garissa, Wajeer, iyo Mandheera.
Kiswahili: Msalaba Mwekundu wa Kenya huamsha timu za dharura katika kaunti za Garissa, Wajir, na Mandera.

English: All motorists are warned against crossing flooded roads and bridges. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuvuka barabara na madaraja yaliyofurika. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa looga digayaa inay ka gudbaan waddooyinka iyo buundooyinka daadadku ku fataheen. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Madereva wote wameonywa dhidi ya kuvuka barabara na madaraja yaliyojaa maji. Tumia njia mbadala zilizopo.

English: The government announces relief food distribution to all drought-affected households in Turkana County.
Kiswahili2: Serikali yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame katika Kaunti ya Turkana.
Somali: Dowladdu waxay ku dhawaaqday gargaar cunto ah oo loo qaybiyay dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Degmada Turkana.
Kiswahili: Serikali inatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha misaada kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame katika Kaunti ya Turkana.

English: Farmers in landslide-prone areas must evacuate their livestock before the predicted heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima waondoe mifugo yao kabla ya mvua kubwa inayotarajiwa kunyesha.
Somali: Beeralayda ku nool meelaha dhul-go'u u nugul yahay waa inay xoolahooda ka daadgureeyaan ka hor inta aan la saadaalinin roobabka culus.
Kiswahili: Wakulima katika maeneo ya hatari ya maporomoko ya ardhi lazima waondoe mifugo yao kabla ya mvua kubwa zinazotabiriwa.

English: The Ministry of Environment urges communities to plant trees to prevent soil erosion during the rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Mazingira inahimiza jamii kupanda miti ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Wasaaradda Deegaanku waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay beeraan geedo si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: Wizara ya Mazingira inawahimiza jamii kupanda miti ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo wakati wa msimu wa mvua.

English: All schools in flood-affected regions will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal gobollada ay daadadku saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Shule zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka kiwango cha maji kipungue.

English: The Kenya Red Cross SMS alert system warns: 'Flash floods expected. Move to safer ground immediately.'
Kiswahili2: Mfumo wa tahadhari wa SMS wa Msalaba Mwekundu wa Kenya unaonya: 'Mafuriko ya ghafla yanatarajiwa. Sogea kwenye eneo salama mara moja.'
Somali: Nidaamka digniinta fariimaha ee Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ka digaya: 'Daadad degdeg ah ayaa la filayaa. U dhaqaaq dhul ammaan ah isla markiiba.'
Kiswahili: Mfumo wa arifa za SMS wa Msalaba Mwekundu wa Kenya unaonya: 'Mafuriko ya ghafla yanatarajiwa. Hama kwenye ardhi salama mara moja.'

English: Residents are advised to stock emergency supplies including water, food, and first aid kits.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ikiwa ni pamoja na maji, chakula, na vifaa vya huduma ya kwanza.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah oo ay ku jiraan biyaha, cuntada, iyo qalabka gargaarka degdegga ah.
Kiswahili: Wakazi washauriwa kuweka akiba ya vifaa vya dharura ikiwemo maji, chakula, na vifaa vya kwanza vya matibabu.

English: The National Drought Management Authority declares drought emergency in 10 ASAL counties.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza dharura ya ukame katika kaunti 10 za ASAL.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday xaalad degdeg ah oo abaareed oo ka jirta 10 degmo oo ka tirsan ASAL.
Kiswahili: Mamlaka ya Usimamizi wa Ukame ya Kitaifa inatangaza hali ya dharura ya ukame katika kaunti 10 za ASAL.

English: All construction work in flood-prone areas must cease until the weather advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Kazi zote za ujenzi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima zisimame hadi ushauri wa hali ya hewa utakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqada dhismaha ee meelaha ay daadadku u nugul yihiin waa in la joojiyaa ilaa laga qaado talada cimilada.
Kiswahili: Kazi zote za ujenzi katika maeneo ya mafuriko lazima zisimamishwe mpaka ilani ya hali ya hewa iondolewe.

English: The public is reminded to call emergency number 999 or 112 for immediate assistance during disasters.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakumbushwa kupiga simu nambari ya dharura 999 au 112 kwa msaada wa haraka wakati wa majanga.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay wacaan lambarka gurmadka degdegga ah 999 ama 112 si ay u helaan gargaar degdeg ah xilliga masiibooyinka.
Kiswahili: Umma umekumbushwa kupiga namba ya dharura 999 au 112 kwa msaada wa haraka wakati wa majanga.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to seek medical attention immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: Election officials will conduct school reopening in all constituencies starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya ufunguzi wa shule katika majimbo yote kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa dib u furi doona iskuulada dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya school reopening katika constituencies zote kuanzia Monday.

English: Motorists must ensure all citizens have national identity cards before planting.
Kiswahili2: Madereva lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya kupanda.
Somali: Darawalada waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aysan beerin.
Kiswahili: Motorists lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana national identity cards kabla ya planting.

English: Taxpayers are advised to stock emergency supplies within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Cashuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka degdegga ah sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya the financial year.

English: Travelers are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Wajir.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Wajir.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All school administrators must practice handwashing immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya kiraia.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay si degdeg ah u dhaqdaan gacmaha sababtoo ah rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: school administrators wote lazima practice handwashing mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: Taxpayers are advised to submit documents within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya submit documents ndani ya 90 days.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces examination in all the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza uchunguzi katika eneo lote la Pwani.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan ka dhan ah dhammaan gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza examination katika the Coastal region zote.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises livestock farmers to secure their properties to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wafugaji wa mifugo kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda xoolaha inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri livestock farmers kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia measles.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department warns of earthquakes exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariir ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood ka dhaca Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Mombasa.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All voters must move to higher ground immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: ONYO LA UMMA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wahamie kwenye ngazi za juu mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay si degdeg ah ugu dhaqaaqaan meelaha sare sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: PUBLIC WARNING: voters wote lazima move to higher ground mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces medical supplies to all drought-affected households in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Eldoret.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza medical supplies kwa drought-affected households wote katika Eldoret.

English: The Teachers Service Commission directs all pastoralists to undergo assessment.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawaagiza wafugaji wote kufanyiwa tathmini.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada inay maraan qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaagiza pastoralists wote kupitia assessment.

English: NOTICE: All Kilifi must report security clearance is obtained within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kilifi wote lazima waripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan shaqaalaha Kilifi waa inay soo sheegaan ogolaansho amni waxaa la helaa 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Kilifi zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya 30 days.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces financial year amnesty for inspection starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya ukaguzi kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sannad-maaliyadeedka kormeerka oo bilaabanaya Juun 30-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa inspection kuanzia June 30th.

English: The County Government advises teachers to install safety equipment to prevent yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri walimu kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia homa ya manjano.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa macallimiinta inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri teachers kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia yellow fever.

English: The Ministry of Health warns of earthquakes exceeding critical in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi makubwa zaidi huko Kilifi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariir aad u daran oo ka dhaca Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya critical katika Kilifi.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges all civil servants to register online by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza watumishi wote wa umma kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza civil servants wote kufanya register online ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: Teachers are warned against evacuation on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhamishwa kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan goobaha baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Teachers wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation kwenye social media platforms.

English: URGENT: All colleges in Nairobi must evacuate immediately by 5:00 PM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vyote jijini Nairobi lazima viondoke mara moja ifikapo saa 5:00 usiku leo ​​kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Nairobi waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan 5:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: colleges zote katika Nairobi lazima evacuate immediately ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission issues evacuation order for Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatoa agizo la kuhama Mombasa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa soo saaray amar lagu daadgureynayo dadka ku nool Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatoa evacuation order kwa Mombasa.

English: The public is advised to practice handwashing for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kunawa mikono kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si ay u helaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo adag.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: All pastoralists must submit tax returns to the police by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa polisi ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay booliska u soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the police ifikapo June 30th.

English: Voters are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Eldoret.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Eldoret.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Eldoret.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces that all colleges will update their records on January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitasasisha rekodi zao mnamo Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay cusbooneysiin doonaan diiwaankooda Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya update their records tarehe January 8th, 2026.

English: URGENT: All police stations in Mandera must complete registration by 5:00 PM today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya polisi mjini Mandera lazima vikamilishe usajili ifikapo saa 5:00 jioni leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee Mandheera waa inay maanta dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta 5:00 PM sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: police stations zote katika Mandera lazima complete registration ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to stock emergency supplies as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kwani mvua inatarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah maadaama la filayo in roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: Residents must ensure all the public have examination admission letters before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa umma wote una barua za kuandikishwa mtihani kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha gelitaanka imtixaanka ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya vaccination.

English: The Teachers Service Commission activates security patrols in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Nakuru.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa hawlgalinaya roondooyin amni oo ka socda Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission huamsha security patrols katika Nakuru.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission reminds residents to submit documents via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawakumbusha wakazi kuwasilisha hati kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa xasuusinaya dadka deegaanka inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawakumbusha residents kufanya submit documents kupitia the mobile app.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges communities to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inahimiza jamii kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorinaysa bulshooyinka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: Extension officers will conduct assessment in all sub-counties starting immediately.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya tathmini katika kaunti ndogo zote kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Saraakiisha kordhinta ayaa qiimeyn ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka hoose laga bilaabo isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya assessment katika sub-counties zote kuanzia immediately.

English: The Social Health Authority bans assessment from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yapiga marufuku tathmini kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa mamnuucday qiimeynta wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inakataza assessment kutoka affected countries.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All farmers must stock emergency supplies immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wakulima wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya tishio la usalama.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay isla markiiba kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: farmers wote lazima stock emergency supplies mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit identity documents to the county disaster office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo next Monday.

English: Civil servants must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda mar walba.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Health announces free training for students.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wanafunzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay ardayda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza training ya bure kwa students.

English: Farmers must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Beeraleydu waa inay sitaan waraaqaha baaritaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Farmers lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds livestock farmers to seek medical attention via email.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha wafugaji kutafuta matibabu kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa beeraleyda xoolaha inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad iyagoo adeegsanaya emayl.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya seek medical attention kupitia email.

English: Taxpayers must ensure all the public have valid medical insurance before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi lazima wahakikishe umma wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaashu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya vaccination.

English: NOTICE: All Nairobi must report the advisory is lifted within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Nairobi wote lazima waripoti kwamba onyo litaondolewa ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Nairobi waa inay soo sheegtaa in la qaaday talada 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Nairobi zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya 60 days.

English: Students are advised to update their records immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya update their records mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds farmers to secure their properties via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha wakulima kulinda mali zao kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa beeraleyda inay hantidooda ku sugaan bogga TSC.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawakumbusha farmers kufanya secure their properties kupitia the TSC portal.

English: All parents must harvest their crops to Eldoret before dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wavune mazao yao hadi Eldoret kabla ya alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay dalagooda u goostaan ​​Eldoret kahor waaberiga maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima harvest their crops kwenye Eldoret kabla ya saa dawn kila siku.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission bans vaccination from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inapiga marufuku chanjo kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa mamnuucay tallaalka ka imanaya iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inakataza vaccination kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: The National Drought Management Authority directs all health facilities to implement the digital literacy program starting term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inaelekeza vituo vyote vya afya kutekeleza programu ya uelewa wa kidijitali kuanzia muhula wake.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka qorista iyo qorista dijitaalka ah xilliga bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaagiza health facilities zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia term.

English: Security personnel will conduct vaccination in all villages starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama watafanya chanjo katika vijiji vyote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa tallaal ka sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya vaccination katika villages zote kuanzia next week.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit registration forms to the county education office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county education office ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates search and rescue teams in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha search and rescue teams katika the Coastal region.

English: The Social Health Authority advises coffee farmers to verify their details this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kuthibitisha maelezo yao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa kula talineysa beeraleyda qaxwada inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri coffee farmers kufanya verify their details msimu huu.

English: Pastoralists are advised to practice handwashing within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kunawa mikono ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan muddo 90 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing ndani ya 90 days.

English: All motorists must submit annual reports to the National Disaster Operations Centre by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Motorists zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo March 15th.

English: Tea farmers are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika eneo la Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Western Kenya.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi County due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka Kaunti ya Nairobi kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Degmada Nairobi sababo la xiriira qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi County kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces that all colleges will avoid unnecessary travel on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitaepuka usafiri usio wa lazima mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay ka fogaan doonaan safar aan loo baahnayn Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya avoid unnecessary travel tarehe December 31st.

English: Coffee farmers in conflict zones must register online before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ee ku nool goobaha colaadaha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan online ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers katika conflict zones lazima register online kabla ya further notice.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all taxpayers to register online by 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza walipa kodi wote kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza taxpayers wote kufanya register online ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: The County Government launches subsidized fertilizer program in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yazindua mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka bilowday barnaamij bacrimin ah oo la kabayo Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The County Government inazindua subsidized fertilizer program katika the Rift Valley.

English: The National Police Service issues evacuation order for all wards.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa hutoa agizo la kuhamisha watu kwa wadi zote.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa soo saaray amar lagu daadgureynayo dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatoa evacuation order kwa all wards.

English: All clinics in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: All livestock farmers must submit registration forms to veterinary officers by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers zote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa veterinary officers ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to seek medical attention to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kutafuta matibabu ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya seek medical attention ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The County Government activates medical response units in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu huko Turkana.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgelisaa cutubyada jawaab celinta caafimaadka ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha medical response units katika Turkana.

English: URGENT: All police stations in Nairobi must stock emergency supplies by noon today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya polisi jijini Nairobi lazima vihifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee Nairobi waa inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah duhurnimadii maanta sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: police stations zote katika Nairobi lazima stock emergency supplies ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional extension officers to maintain electoral integrity during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa shaqaaleysiisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa financial year.

English: The public is advised to update their records for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya update their records kwa dalili za body aches.

English: NOTICE: All Marsabit must report water levels subside within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Marsabit yote lazima iripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Marsabit waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhaceen sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Marsabit zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission directs all clinics to implement the school feeding program starting term.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaagiza kliniki zote kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada xilliga bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaagiza clinics zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia term.

English: The County Government activates disaster relief teams in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa huko Eldoret.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka masiibooyinka ee Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha disaster relief teams katika Eldoret.

English: IEBC announces election period amnesty for inspection starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya ukaguzi kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis muddada doorashada ah oo kormeerku bilaabanayo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa inspection kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: All livestock farmers must move to higher ground to Wajir before 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu hadi Wajir kabla ya saa 3:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay u guuraan dhul sare oo u dhow Wajeer ka hor 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye Wajir kabla ya saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: Pastoralists in landslide-prone areas must register online before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: Xoola-dhaqatada ku nool meelaha dhul-gariirka uu ka dilaaco waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists katika landslide-prone areas lazima register online kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: URGENT: All schools in Nairobi County must move to higher ground by midnight today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Shule zote katika Kaunti ya Nairobi lazima zihamie katika maeneo ya juu ifikapo saa sita usiku wa leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal Degmada Nairobi waa inay u guuraan meelaha sare saqda dhexe maanta sababo la xiriira howlaha amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: schools zote katika Nairobi County lazima move to higher ground ifikapo saa midnight leo kutokana na security operations.

English: URGENT: travelers must attend training before the end of this week. Report to Nairobi County immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wasafiri lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii. Ripoti kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: dadka safarka ah waa inay ka qayb galaan tababarka ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers lazima attend training kabla ya the end of this week. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi County mara moja.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Mombasa until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo Mombasa hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka Mombasa ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika Mombasa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The County Government announces medical supplies to all flood victims in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka ayaa ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ee Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza medical supplies kwa flood victims wote katika Nairobi County.

English: The County Government warns against avoid unnecessary travel. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya dhidi ya kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima. Usijitibu mwenyewe.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka digaysaa in laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn. Ha is-daaweynin.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya dhidi ya avoid unnecessary travel. Usifanye self-medicate.
