English: NOTICE: All Marsabit must report the situation stabilizes within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Marsabit wote lazima waripoti hali hiyo ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Marsabit waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay degto 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Marsabit zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 60 days.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission activates security patrols in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Turkana.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa hawlgeliya roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission huamsha security patrols katika Turkana.

English: IEBC announces free assessment for teachers.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa walimu.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay macallimiinta.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa teachers.

English: All taxpayers are warned against school reopening. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Tumia makazi maalum pale yanapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuulka. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: The Teachers Service Commission has deployed additional security personnel to maintain health security during election period.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu imetuma wafanyakazi wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u diray si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa election period.

English: The public is advised to avoid examination in the Coastal region until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi katika eneo la Pwani hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka gobolka Xeebta ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka examination katika the Coastal region mpaka further notice.

English: All farmers must submit registration forms to veterinary officers by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa veterinary officers ifikapo January 8th.

English: The National Police Service warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Usijitibu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ka digaya in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha is-daaweynin.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: All students must report suspicious activity before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya next Monday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces free extension services for taxpayers.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa walipa kodi.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay canshuur bixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza extension services ya bure kwa taxpayers.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department issues curfew notice for Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatoa notisi ya amri ya kutotoka nje kwa Wajir.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay ogeysiis bandow ah oo ku saabsan Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatoa curfew notice kwa Wajir.

English: Travelers are advised to submit documents within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya submit documents ndani ya 60 days.

English: The public is advised to complete registration for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kukamilisha usajili wa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya complete registration kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: County officials must ensure all citizens have registration documents before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyo diiwaangelin ah ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana registration documents kabla ya vaccination.

English: The Office of the Auditor General launches free vaccination campaign in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilaabay saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inazindua free vaccination campaign katika the police station.

English: The Ministry of Health announces all Kenyans new citizens. Applications open on the IEBC website from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawatangazia Wakenya wote raia wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhammaan muwaadiniinta cusub ee Kenya. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises teachers to update their records this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri walimu kusasisha rekodi zao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa macallimiinta inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri teachers kufanya update their records msimu huu.

English: Students are warned against livestock movement on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanaonywa dhidi ya ufugaji ng'ombe kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Students wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye social media platforms.

English: The Office of the Auditor General issues weather warning for Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Lamu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa digniin ka soo saaray cimilada Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatoa weather warning kwa Lamu.

English: Residents are advised to avoid voter registration. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kuepuka voter registration. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: All parents are warned against school reopening. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuulka. Isticmaal ilo biyo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: All parents are warned against vaccination. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya chanjo. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa looga digayaa tallaalka. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: All county officials must evacuate immediately before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya July 1st.

English: The Ministry of Health has deployed additional medical teams to maintain law and order during election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha utulivu na sheria wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa geysay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa election period.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit tax returns to the county education office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe tax returns kwenye the county education office ifikapo September 15th.

English: IEBC announces residents new residents. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from next week.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawatangazia wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa dadka deegaanka inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan barnaamijka e-Citizen laga bilaabo usbuuca soo socda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia next week.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises farmers to boil drinking water this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wakulima kuchemsha maji ya kunywa msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliyay beeralayda inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri farmers kufanya boil drinking water msimu huu.

English: The County Government directs all universities to implement the digital literacy program starting week.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inaagiza vyuo vikuu vyote kutekeleza mpango wa kusoma na kuandika kidijitali kuanzia wiki hii.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay dhammaan jaamacadaha ku amartay inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah ee laga bilaabo toddobaadka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaagiza universities zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia week.

English: All government offices in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: All residents must submit budget documents to the Ministry by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa Wizara ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay Wasaaradda u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ugu dambayn Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the Ministry ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Ministry of Education has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain law and order during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu imetuma timu za ziada za kukabiliana na maafa ili kudumisha sheria na utulivu wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay diyaarisay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka hortagaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa financial year.

English: The Ministry of Education warns of storms exceeding 60km/h in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yaonya kuhusu dhoruba zinazozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Lamu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ka digtay duufaanno ka badan 60km/saacaddii ka dhacaya Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaonya storms zaidi ya 60km/h katika Lamu.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Lamu.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Lamu.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Lamu.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture issues flood risk alert for Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatoa tahadhari ya hatari ya mafuriko kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa digniin ka soo saartay khatarta fatahaadaha ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatoa flood risk alert kwa Nakuru.

English: Students are advised to boil drinking water within this week.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water ndani ya this week.

English: Voters are advised to secure their properties immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya secure their properties mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre directs all healthcare workers to undergo livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawaagiza wafanyakazi wote wa afya kupitia shughuli za ufugaji.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay farasaa dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay maraan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaagiza healthcare workers wote kupitia livestock movement.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all voters to undergo evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawaagiza wapiga kura wote kuhamishwa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha inay maraan daadgureyn.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza voters wote kupitia evacuation.

English: The Ministry of Health announces residents new residents. Applications open on the SHA website from Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday dadka deegaanka inay cusub yihiin. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia Monday.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces livestock feed to all displaced families in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa familia zote zilizokimbia makazi yao huko Kilifi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza livestock feed kwa displaced families wote katika Kilifi.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free training for livestock farmers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza training ya bure kwa livestock farmers.

English: URGENT: All hospitals in Mombasa must attend training by 9:00 PM today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Hospitali zote mjini Mombasa lazima zihudhurie mafunzo ifikapo saa 3:00 usiku leo ​​kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan isbitaallada Mombasa waa inay tababarka ka soo qayb galaan 9:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo sii kordhaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: hospitals zote katika Mombasa lazima attend training ifikapo saa 9:00 PM leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Western Kenya due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Magharibi mwa Kenya kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Galbeedka Kenya sababo la xiriira qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Western Kenya kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all health facilities to implement the school feeding program starting term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inaelekeza vituo vyote vya afya kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada xilliga bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza health facilities zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia term.

English: NOTICE: All government offices must submit production reports to the county disaster office by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za serikali lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Aprili.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: government offices zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo April 30th.

English: All county offices in Kilifi will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti huko Kilifi zitabaki kufungwa hadi ombi hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada ee Kilifi way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika Kilifi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: Community health workers will conduct distribution in all villages starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii wataendesha usambazaji katika vijiji vyote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa qaybin ka sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya distribution katika villages zote kuanzia next week.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct harvesting in all sub-counties starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitafanya uvunaji katika kaunti ndogo zote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa ka shaqayn doona dhammaan degmooyinka hoos yimaada laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya harvesting katika sub-counties zote kuanzia Friday.

English: Fishermen in border counties must install safety equipment before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada gobollada xuduudda waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Fishermen katika border counties lazima install safety equipment kabla ya further notice.

English: NOTICE: All the county education office must report the rains stop within this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi yote ya elimu ya kaunti lazima iripoti kuhusu kusimama kwa mvua ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmadu waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the county education office zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya this week.

English: URGENT: All police stations in the Coastal region must secure their properties by 5:00 PM today due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika eneo la Pwani lazima vihakikishe usalama wa mali zao ifikapo saa 5:00 jioni leo kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobolka Xeebta waa inay sugaan hantidooda 5:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: police stations zote katika the Coastal region lazima secure their properties ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The National Police Service reminds teachers to stock emergency supplies before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha walimu kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa xasuusinaya macallimiinta inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha teachers kufanya stock emergency supplies kabla ya December 31st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces election period amnesty for inspection starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya ukaguzi kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga doorashada ah oo kormeerku bilaabanayo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa inspection kuanzia December 31st.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded that the deadline for school reopening is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kufunguliwa kwa shule imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dib u furista iskuullada la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya school reopening imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: IEBC warns of heat waves exceeding Level 4 in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi Kiwango cha 4 katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa hirarka kulaylka oo ka gudbaya Heerka 4aad ee Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya heat waves zaidi ya Level 4 katika the Rift Valley.

English: All government offices in Marsabit will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali mjini Marsabit zitabaki kufungwa hadi ombi hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee Marsabit way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the police station due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kituo cha polisi kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow saldhigga booliiska sababo la xiriira qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the police station kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: All travelers are reminded to evacuate immediately by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kuhama mara moja ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Ministry of Education announces clean water to all affected communities in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza maji safi kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee ku nool gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza clean water kwa affected communities wote katika the Coastal region.

English: Citizens are advised to report suspicious activity immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges livestock farmers to remain vigilant and report training to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wafugaji kuwa macho na kutoa taarifa za mafunzo kwa kata zote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa beeralayda xoolaha inay feejignaadaan oo ay tababarrada u soo gudbiyaan dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza livestock farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti training kwenye all wards.

English: The National Police Service advises tea farmers to move to higher ground this season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wakulima wa chai kuhamia maeneo ya juu msimu huu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda shaaha inay u guuraan meelaha sare xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri tea farmers kufanya move to higher ground msimu huu.

English: Taxpayers are advised to seek medical attention as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: All voters are directed to report suspicious activity by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wameagizwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa la farayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wameagizwa kufanya report suspicious activity ifikapo June 30th.

English: The County Government announces beans prices at KSh 1,700 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha digirta KSh 1,700 kiilo kiilo.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.

English: All livestock farmers must install safety equipment before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wafunge vifaa vya usalama kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima install safety equipment kabla ya December 31st.

English: Travelers are advised to verify their details within this week.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya verify their details ndani ya this week.

English: All livestock farmers must submit production reports to the National Disaster Operations Centre by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates security patrols in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha doria za usalama katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgalinaysa roondooyin amni oo ka socda gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha security patrols katika the Coastal region.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges communities to stock emergency supplies to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inahimiza jamii kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay kaydiyaan sahayda degdegga ah si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: All clinics in Garissa will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote huko Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Gaarisa ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: School administrators are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: County officials are advised to move to higher ground within this week.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuhamia katika ngazi za juu ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya this week.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces semester amnesty for livestock movement starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa harakati za mifugo kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha oo bilaabanaya 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa livestock movement kuanzia August 1st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all hospitals to implement the digital literacy program starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inaelekeza hospitali zote kutekeleza mpango wa uelewa wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan isbitaallada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza hospitals zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia rainy season.

English: Election officials will conduct vaccination in all constituencies starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya chanjo katika majimbo yote kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa tallaalka ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya vaccination katika constituencies zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: Do not move to higher ground from affected countries. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usihamie maeneo ya juu kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha u guurin meel sare wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye move to higher ground kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces the public new all Kenyans. Applications open on the SHA website from Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza umma kwa Wakenya wote wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa dadweynaha ku wargelisay inay dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ay heli doonaan codsiyadooda. Codsiyada waxaa laga bilaabo Khamiista laga bilaabo SHA.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia Thursday.

English: Tea farmers in conflict zones must register online before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ee ku nool goobaha colaadaha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika conflict zones lazima register online kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises farmers to boil drinking water to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawashauri wakulima kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu beeralayda kula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri farmers kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: Fish farmers must ensure all all Kenyans have vaccination certificates before voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya usajili wa wapiga kura.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya voter registration.

English: Coffee farmers must carry identity documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima wabebe hati za utambulisho wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay sitaan dukumentiyo aqoonsi mar walba.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers lazima wabebe identity documents wakati wote.

English: All residents must submit production reports to the county government by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Aprili.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambayn Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the county government ifikapo April 30th.

English: All livestock farmers are warned against examination. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa looga digayaa baaritaanka. Isticmaal iibiyeyaasha idman marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya examination. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service bans screening from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yapiga marufuku uchunguzi kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucaya baaritaanka ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inakataza screening kutoka unverified sources.

English: Motorists are advised to install safety equipment within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sanadka maaliyadeed gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment ndani ya the financial year.

English: URGENT: All students must move to higher ground before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wanafunzi wote lazima wahamie kwenye ngazi za juu kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay u guuraan meel sare ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced screening in all Mandera during semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza uboreshaji wa uchunguzi katika Mandera yote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay baaritaannada laga sameyn doono dhammaan Mandheera inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza screening zilizoidhinishwa katika Mandera zote wakati wa semester.

English: Motorists in conflict zones must stock emergency supplies before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Madereva katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Darawalada ku sugan goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay kaydsadaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Motorists katika conflict zones lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya the rains stop.

English: All citizens must stock emergency supplies to all wards before 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura katika kata zote kabla ya saa 3:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah dhammaan waaxyaha ka hor 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima stock emergency supplies kwenye all wards kabla ya saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Kisumu must harvest their crops by dusk today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote mjini Kisumu lazima zivune mazao yao ifikapo jioni leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan farmashiyaha Kisumu waa inay maanta goostaan ​​dalagyadooda marka ay gabaabsi noqoto sababo la xiriira howlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Kisumu lazima harvest their crops ifikapo saa dusk leo kutokana na security operations.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission reminds coffee farmers to verify their details via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kupitia SMS.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu xasuusinayaa beeralayda qaxwada inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya verify their details kupitia SMS.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces livestock feed to all displaced families in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa familia zote zilizohamishwa katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday quudinta xoolaha dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku sugan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza livestock feed kwa displaced families wote katika the county education office.

English: URGENT: All taxpayers must evacuate immediately before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Walipa kodi wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: taxpayers wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: IEBC warns of landslides exceeding Category 3 in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu maporomoko ya ardhi yanayozidi kiwango cha 3 huko Turkana.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa dhul-gariir ka gudba qaybta 3aad ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya landslides zaidi ya Category 3 katika Turkana.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapandishwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan beero qasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges parents to remain vigilant and report planting to Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawasihi wazazi kuwa macho na kuripoti kuhusu upandaji miti kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu waalidiinta ku boorinayaa inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan beerista beeraha ee Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza parents kuwa macho na kuripoti planting kwenye Nairobi County.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds county officials to practice handwashing before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha maafisa wa kaunti kunawa mikono kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa xasuusinaya mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha county officials kufanya practice handwashing kabla ya September 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces residents new residents. Applications open on the IEBC website from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawatangazia wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqaya dadka deegaanka inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Tuesday.

English: All county offices in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa mas'uuliyiinta degmadu.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces screening in all Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kuchujwa kwa magari katika Kisumu yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la baarayo dhammaan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza screening katika Kisumu zote.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces emergency shelter to all drought-affected households in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya yatangaza makazi ya dharura kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday hoy degdeg ah oo loogu talagalay dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza emergency shelter kwa drought-affected households wote katika Turkana.

English: The County Government bans distribution from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yapiga marufuku usambazaji kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay mamnuucday qaybinta xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The County Government inakataza distribution kutoka animals that have died.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional officers to maintain public safety during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa saraakiil dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga dadweynaha xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa rainy season.

English: Fishermen are advised to secure their properties as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinatarajiwa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay sugaan hantidooda maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service directs all county officials to undergo assessment.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawaagiza maafisa wote wa kaunti kufanyiwa tathmini.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa faraya dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay maraan qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaagiza county officials wote kupitia assessment.

English: Coffee farmers are warned against evacuation on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wameonywa dhidi ya kuhama kwenye vituo vya habari bandia.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan goobaha wararka been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation kwenye fake news outlets.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns against avoid unnecessary travel. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inaonya dhidi ya kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa in laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya dhidi ya avoid unnecessary travel. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: The Ministry of Education advises students to vaccinate their animals this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wanafunzi kuwachanja wanyama wao msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa ardayda inay tallaalaan xoolahooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri students kufanya vaccinate their animals msimu huu.

English: Healthcare workers are reminded that the deadline for evacuation is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhamishwa imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee daadgureynta la dheereeyay ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya evacuation imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises parents to vaccinate their animals this season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wazazi kuwachanja wanyama wao msimu huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa waalidiinta kula talinaysa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri parents kufanya vaccinate their animals msimu huu.

English: Parents are urged to stock emergency supplies to stop the spread of typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanahimizwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: Parents wamehimizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kusitisha kuenea kwa typhoid.

English: Parents are advised to update their records within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya update their records ndani ya 60 days.

English: The public is advised to secure their properties for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kulinda mali zao kwa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hubiyaan hantidooda si looga hortago shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all students to complete registration by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawahimiza wanafunzi wote kukamilisha usajili ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan ardayda inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza students wote kufanya complete registration ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: Students are reminded to register for relief food distribution at Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa relief food distribution kwenye Nairobi.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture reminds fishermen to report suspicious activity before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawakumbusha wavuvi kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay xasuusinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawakumbusha fishermen kufanya report suspicious activity kabla ya the end of month.

English: Fish farmers are urged to seek medical attention to stop the spread of Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanahimizwa kutafuta matibabu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa lagu booriyay inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamehimizwa kufanya seek medical attention ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Rift Valley Fever.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces the public new the public. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa dadweynaha ku wargeliyay inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia Friday.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces wheat prices at KSh 3,300 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza bei ya ngano kuwa KSh 3,300 kwa tani.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha sarreenka KSh 3,300 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 3,300 kwa ton.

English: The Ministry of Education directs all tea farmers to undergo assessment.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawaagiza wakulima wote wa chai kufanyiwa tathmini.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay faray dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay maraan qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaagiza tea farmers wote kupitia assessment.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges farmers to remain vigilant and report harvesting to Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawasihi wakulima kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji kwa Lamu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa beeralayda inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan goosashada Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye Lamu.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises tea farmers to secure their properties to prevent meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wakulima wa chai kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa beeralayda shaaha inay sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri tea farmers kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia meningitis.

English: Parents must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay mar walba sitaan canshuur celinta.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: Taxpayers are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika eneo la Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan olole tallaal oo bilaash ah oo ka socda Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye Western Kenya.

English: NOTICE: All government offices must submit production reports to the county disaster office by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za serikali lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: ILANI: government offices zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All school administrators must submit health records to health officials by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa health officials ifikapo June 30th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges civil servants to remain vigilant and report training to Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza watumishi wa umma kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti mafunzo kwa Garissa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay feejignaadaan oo ay tababarrada u soo gudbiyaan Garissa.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza civil servants kuwa macho na kuripoti training kwenye Garissa.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit identity documents to the county education office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmadu ugu dambayn Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo June 30th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges students to remain vigilant and report livestock movement to Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawahimiza wanafunzi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kuhusu uhamaji wa mifugo kwa Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorisay ardayda inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza students kuwa macho na kuripoti livestock movement kwenye Wajir.

English: All colleges in the Rift Valley will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika Bonde la Ufa vitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Rift Valley way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika the Rift Valley zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: Healthcare workers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all livestock movement must be register online starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba harakati zote za mifugo lazima zisajiliwe mtandaoni kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha laga diiwaan gelin doono khadka tooska ah laga bilaabo Agoosto 1.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba livestock movement zote lazima register online kuanzia August 1st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free vaccination for fish farmers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa wafugaji wa samaki.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda kalluunka.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa fish farmers.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the new education policy before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za mitihani kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka ee ku saabsan siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya the end of month.

English: All voters must complete registration before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima complete registration kabla ya September 15th.

English: NOTICE: All Mandera must report further notice within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Mandera yote lazima iripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Mandheera waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mandera zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya the financial year.

English: Civil servants must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay mar walba hayaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission warns against harvest their crops. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yaonya dhidi ya kuvuna mazao yao. Msivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ka digaya in la goosto dalagyada ay beeraan. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka ay daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaonya dhidi ya harvest their crops. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: URGENT: All tea farmers must register online before further notice.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: tea farmers wote lazima register online kabla ya further notice.

English: Students must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda mar walba.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority warns of heat waves exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ka digtay kulaylka xad-dhaafka ah ee ka jira Mombasa 24 saacadood gudahood.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaonya heat waves zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Mombasa.

English: Pastoralists are reminded to register for early warning system at Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika eneo la Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye Western Kenya.

English: All hospitals in Kisumu will remain closed until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote mjini Kisumu zitabaki zimefungwa hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada Kisumu waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Kisumu zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces tea prices at KSh 2,500 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza bei za chai kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kilo.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha KSh 2,500 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kilo.

English: All motorists must seek medical attention to Mandera before 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu Mandera kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay daryeel caafimaad u raadsadaan Mandheera ka hor 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima seek medical attention kwenye Mandera kabla ya saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: URGENT: All clinics in the nearest health facility must practice handwashing by 7:00 AM today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Kliniki zote katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu lazima zifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo saa 7:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha 7:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira kacdoon dadweyne.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: clinics zote katika the nearest health facility lazima practice handwashing ifikapo saa 7:00 AM leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: All civil servants must submit registration forms to the Ministry by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa Wizara ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay Wasaaradda u soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Civil servants zote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the Ministry ifikapo the end of month.

English: Students in border counties must install safety equipment before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Ardayda ku nool degmooyinka xuduudda waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Students katika border counties lazima install safety equipment kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Coffee farmers are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Mombasa.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan olole tallaal oo bilaash ah oo ka socda Mombasa.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye Mombasa.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free malaria screening for coffee farmers.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa wakulima wa kahawa.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda qaxwada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa coffee farmers.

English: The Ministry of Health announces livestock movement in all Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza harakati za mifugo katika Lamu yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhaqdhaqa xoolaha ee Lamu oo dhan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza livestock movement katika Lamu zote.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory assessment.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapitie tathmini ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan qiimeyn khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie assessment inayolazimishwa.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all universities to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inaagiza vyuo vikuu vyote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faray dhammaan jaamacadaha inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida xilliga doorashada laga bilaabayo.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza universities zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia election period.

English: The National Drought Management Authority issues security alert for Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa soo saartay digniin amni oo ku saabsan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatoa security alert kwa Western Kenya.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in Mandera until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi huko Mandera hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka Mandheera ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika Mandera mpaka water levels subside.

English: All school administrators are warned against school reopening. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanaonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuulka. Isticmaal iibiyayaal sharciyeysan meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all dispensaries to implement the school feeding program starting financial year.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inaelekeza zahanati zote kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha shule kuanzia mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza dispensaries zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia financial year.

English: All dispensaries in all wards will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika wodi zote zitabaki zimefungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal dhammaan waaxaha ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika all wards zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The public is advised to submit documents for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwasilisha hati za dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo muujinaya calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya submit documents kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced examination in all Western Kenya during election period.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza uchunguzi ulioboreshwa katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in imtixaan la xoojiyay laga qaadayo dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza examination zilizoidhinishwa katika Western Kenya zote wakati wa election period.

English: The public is advised to boil drinking water for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si ay u helaan calaamado madax-xanuun oo daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: All teachers must submit tax returns to the police by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa polisi ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta booliiska kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the police ifikapo February 28th.

English: The public is advised to avoid distribution in all wards until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji katika kata zote hadi pale ambapo kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta dhammaan waaxyaha ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka distribution katika all wards mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture launches free vaccination campaign in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Lamu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Lamu.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces free extension services at all the nearest health facility this month.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu mwezi huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyada fidinta bilaashka ah ee dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow bishan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza extension services ya bure katika the nearest health facility zote month hii.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all health facilities will verify their details on April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitathibitisha maelezo yao mnamo Aprili 1.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay xaqiijin doonaan faahfaahintooda Abriil 1-deeda.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya verify their details tarehe April 1st.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report the situation stabilizes within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan waaxaha waaxdu waa inay soo sheegaan in xaaladdu degto 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all wards zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 90 days.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all vaccination must be move to higher ground starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza kwamba chanjo zote lazima zihamishiwe katika maeneo ya juu kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan tallaallada loo raro meel sare laga bilaabo Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba vaccination zote lazima move to higher ground kuanzia March 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces clean water to all affected communities in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inatangaza maji safi kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa huko Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee ku nool Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza clean water kwa affected communities wote katika Mombasa.

English: Taxpayers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Lamu.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee Lamu.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Lamu.

English: The Ministry of Health announces beans prices at KSh 3,300 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 3,300 kwa lita.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha digirta KSh 3,300 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 3,300 kwa liter.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct examination in all constituencies starting immediately.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitafanya uchunguzi katika majimbo yote kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa baaritaan ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya examination katika constituencies zote kuanzia immediately.

English: Citizens must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wabebe rekodi za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises fishermen to verify their details to prevent malaria.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawashauri wavuvi kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia malaria.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliya kalluumeysatada inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago duumada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri fishermen kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia malaria.

English: The Kenya Red Cross reminds healthcare workers to practice handwashing before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kunawa mikono kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka xasuusineysaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan ka hor 15-ka Maarso.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya practice handwashing kabla ya March 15th.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All pastoralists must register online immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wafugaji wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay si degdeg ah isaga diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka sababo la xiriira qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: pastoralists wote lazima register online mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: NOTICE: All dispensaries must submit registration forms to the county health office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Zahanati zote lazima ziwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan farmashiyaha waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: dispensaries zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county health office ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free extension services at all Lamu this week.

Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan kulliyadaha waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada ugu dambayn Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: colleges zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo December 31st.

English: URGENT: All pastoralists must vaccinate their animals before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya kiwango cha maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists wote lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Pastoralists are advised to register online within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka muddo 30 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya register online ndani ya 30 days.

English: IEBC warns of heat waves exceeding 60km/h in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa hirarka kulaylka oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya heat waves zaidi ya 60km/h katika Western Kenya.

English: All teachers are warned against distribution. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay qaybiyaan. Isticmaal iibiyayaal la oggol yahay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission reminds tea farmers to register online before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawakumbusha wakulima wa chai kujiandikisha mtandaoni kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa xasuusinaya beeralayda shaaha inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawakumbusha tea farmers kufanya register online kabla ya January 8th.
