English: The County Government announces free vaccination at all Mombasa this election period.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza chanjo ya bure katika Mombasa yote katika kipindi hiki cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah dhammaan Mombasa xilligan doorashada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza vaccination ya bure katika Mombasa zote election period hii.

English: The Ministry of Health announces free vaccination at all Turkana this week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza chanjo ya bure katika Turkana yote wiki hii.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa toddobaadkan ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza vaccination ya bure katika Turkana zote week hii.

English: The public is advised to avoid livestock movement in Garissa until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuhama kwa mifugo huko Garissa hadi ushauri huo utakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Gaarisa ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka livestock movement katika Garissa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The Teachers Service Commission activates security patrols in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yaanzisha doria za usalama katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa hawlgeliya roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission huamsha security patrols katika Nairobi County.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all livestock farmers to undergo evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawaagiza wafugaji wote kuhamishwa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay maraan daadgureyn.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia evacuation.

English: Farmers are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at all wards.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa ufugaji wa mifugo katika kata zote.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka xoolaha laga soo saaro dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye all wards.

English: Coffee farmers are reminded that the deadline for harvesting is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuvuna imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee goosashada la dheereeyay ilaa Agoosto 1.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya harvesting imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges coffee farmers to remain vigilant and report harvesting to Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi wakulima wa kahawa kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay beeraleyda qaxwada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan goosashada beeraha ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza coffee farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye Nakuru.

English: All livestock farmers must vaccinate their animals to Marsabit before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wachanje wanyama wao hadi Marsabit kabla ya saa 2:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay xoolahooda ku tallaalaan Marsabit ka hor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima vaccinate their animals kwenye Marsabit kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: URGENT: All government offices in all wards must verify their details by noon today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za serikali katika kata zote lazima zithibitishe taarifa zao ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee dhammaan waaxyaha waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda duhurnimadii maanta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: government offices zote katika all wards lazima verify their details ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na security operations.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates medical response units in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaanzisha vitengo vya kukabiliana na majanga katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay hawlgelisaa cutubyo ka jawaab celin caafimaad oo ku yaal Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha medical response units katika the Rift Valley.

English: All voters must update their records to Kilifi before 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao hadi Kilifi kabla ya saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyayaashu waa inay diiwaankooda ku cusbooneysiiyaan Kilifi ka hor 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima update their records kwenye Kilifi kabla ya saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya March 15th.

English: Do not verify their details from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usithibitishe maelezo yao kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka xaqiijin faahfaahintooda ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye verify their details kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: URGENT: coffee farmers must update their records before the end of this week. Report to Mandera immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii. Watoe taarifa Mandera mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mandheera.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: coffee farmers lazima update their records kabla ya the end of this week. Ripoti kwenye Mandera mara moja.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges all school administrators to secure their properties by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wasimamizi wote wa shule kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ifikapo saa 3:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulada inay sugaan hantidooda 9:00 habeenimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza school administrators wote kufanya secure their properties ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Health announces free malaria screening at all Western Kenya this semester.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya muhula huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa simistarkan ku dhawaaqday in simistarkan laga baari doono cudurka duumada oo bilaash ah dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika Western Kenya zote semester hii.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces maize prices at KSh 5,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza bei ya mahindi kwa KSh 5,500 kwa kila gunia la kilo 50.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha galleyda oo ah KSh 5,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza bei za maize kwa KSh 5,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Raia kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan barnaamijka e-Citizen laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: All parents must boil drinking water before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Febraayo 28.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya February 28th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces financial year amnesty for inspection starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya ukaguzi kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis sannad-maaliyadeedka kormeerka oo bilaabanaya 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa inspection kuanzia August 1st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces month amnesty for voter registration starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza msamaha wa mwezi kwa usajili wa wapiga kura kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis bil ah oo loogu talagalay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha oo bilaabanaysa Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku month kwa voter registration kuanzia September 15th.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in the Coastal region until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uvunaji katika eneo la Pwani hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada gobolka Xeebta ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka harvesting katika the Coastal region mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Fishermen are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: All farmers are advised to observe the Level 4 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kiwango cha 4 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Heerka 4 ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Level 4 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service issues weather warning for all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatoa weather warning kwa all constituencies.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Nairobi until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo jijini Nairobi hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka Nairobi ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika Nairobi mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Taxpayers are advised to move to higher ground immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan meelaha sare si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: Civil servants must carry annual reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe ripoti za mwaka wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay sitaan warbixinnada sanadlaha ah mar walba.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe annual reports wakati wote.

English: Teachers in drought-prone regions must stock emergency supplies before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Walimu katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Macallimiinta gobollada abaartu ku badan tahay waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Teachers katika drought-prone regions lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces month amnesty for evacuation starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza msamaha wa mwezi kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis bil ah oo loogu talagalay daadgureynta dadka ka barakacaya guryahooda oo bilaabanaya 1-da Abriil.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku month kwa evacuation kuanzia April 1st.

English: The public is advised to avoid unnecessary travel for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn oo loogu talagalay calaamadaha madax-xanuunka daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: All farmers are advised to observe the Level 4 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kiwango cha 4 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Heerka 4 ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Level 4 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: County officials are warned against vaccination on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wameonywa dhidi ya chanjo kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ayaa looga digayaa tallaalka kanaallada aan rasmiga ahayn.
Kiswahili: County officials wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The public is advised to harvest their crops for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si ay u helaan calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: All pastoralists must submit identity documents to the county government by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambeyn Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa the county government ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Social Health Authority warns of heavy rainfall exceeding 60km/h in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa roobab xooggan oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii ka da'ay Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya 60km/h katika Turkana.

English: URGENT: All residents must move to higher ground before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakazi wote lazima wahamie kwenye eneo la juu kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay u guuraan meelaha sare ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: URGENT: motorists must move to higher ground before the end of month. Report to Eldoret immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: madereva lazima wahamie kwenye eneo la juu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Watoe taarifa kwa Eldoret mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Darawalada baabuurtu waa inay u guuraan meelaha sare ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Eldoret.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye Eldoret mara moja.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces rice prices at KSh 4,000 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila gunia la kilo 90.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 90kg bag.

English: The National Police Service urges coffee farmers to remain vigilant and report school reopening to Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawahimiza wakulima wa kahawa kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku boorriyay beeralayda qaxwada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in dib loo furay iskuulkii Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza coffee farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye Nairobi.

English: All citizens are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xaaladda degdegga ah ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nakuru due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nakuru sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The National Police Service issues drought emergency declaration for Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame kwa Marsabit.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa soo saaray baaq degdeg ah oo ku saabsan abaarta ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa Marsabit.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in the Rift Valley until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo katika Bonde la Ufa hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka Dooxada Rift ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika the Rift Valley mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all government offices will report suspicious activity on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za serikali zitaripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ay soo sheegi doonaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba government offices zote zitafanya report suspicious activity tarehe December 31st.

English: Travelers are advised to verify their details within this week.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya verify their details ndani ya this week.

English: Voters are urged to report suspicious activity to stop the spread of polio.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanahimizwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia kuenea kwa polio.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: Voters wamehimizwa kufanya report suspicious activity ili kusitisha kuenea kwa polio.

English: All taxpayers must stock emergency supplies before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya January 8th.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report the rains stop within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya this month.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates disaster relief teams in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga huko Nakuru.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha disaster relief teams katika Nakuru.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission activates disaster relief teams in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission huamsha disaster relief teams katika the police station.

English: The Ministry of Education launches disaster preparedness program in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ka bilowday xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada barnaamij u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua disaster preparedness program katika the county education office.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free malaria screening for tea farmers.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa wakulima wa chai.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda shaaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa tea farmers.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces free registration at all Nakuru this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza usajili wa bure katika Nakuru yote mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday isdiiwaangelin bilaash ah dhammaan Nakuru sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza registration ya bure katika Nakuru zote financial year hii.

English: Voters are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Mandera.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Mandera.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the TSC portal from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta cusub ee dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan bogga TSC isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia immediately.

English: The public is advised to submit documents for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwasilisha hati za dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo muujinaya calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya submit documents kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: The National Police Service advises farmers to install safety equipment this season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wakulima kufunga vifaa vya usalama msimu huu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda inay xilligan rakibaan qalabka badbaadada.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri farmers kufanya install safety equipment msimu huu.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges teachers to remain vigilant and report evacuation to the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawasihi walimu kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamisho kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorrisay macallimiinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada inay ka baxaan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza teachers kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye the county education office.

English: Do not stock emergency supplies from affected countries. Report such incidents to the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Usihifadhi vifaa vya dharura kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Wizara.
Somali: Ha kaydin sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah ee ka imanaya waddamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Usifanye stock emergency supplies kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the Ministry.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces fertilizer prices at KSh 3,300 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza bei ya mbolea kuwa KSh 3,300 kwa kilo.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha bacriminta KSh 3,300 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza bei za fertilizer kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kilo.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Rift Valley due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Bonde la Ufa kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Dooxada Rift sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the Rift Valley kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service urges teachers to remain vigilant and report planting to the police station.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inawahimiza walimu kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti upandaji miti kwenye kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku boorrisay macallimiinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan saldhigga booliiska beerista.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawahimiza teachers kuwa macho na kuripoti planting kwenye the police station.

English: The Ministry of Education directs all healthcare workers to undergo distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawaagiza wafanyakazi wote wa afya kusambaza dawa hizo.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay faray dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay maraan qaybinta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaagiza healthcare workers wote kupitia distribution.

English: All coffee farmers must move to higher ground before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya December 31st.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges all teachers to submit documents by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi walimu wote kuwasilisha hati ifikapo saa 2:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan macallimiinta inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza teachers wote kufanya submit documents ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges fishermen to remain vigilant and report livestock movement to Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawahimiza wavuvi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kuhusu mienendo ya mifugo kwa Waturkana.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay kalluumeysatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza fishermen kuwa macho na kuripoti livestock movement kwenye Turkana.

English: Parents in drought-prone regions must avoid unnecessary travel before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool gobollada abaartu u badan tahay waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Parents katika drought-prone regions lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: Motorists in flood-prone areas must seek medical attention before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Madereva katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima watafute matibabu kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Darawalada ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Motorists katika flood-prone areas lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the rains stop.

English: All taxpayers are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanashauriwa kufuata mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The County Government announces that all hospitals will vaccinate their animals on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitawachanja wanyama wao mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan isbitaallada ay tallaali doonaan xoolahooda 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya vaccinate their animals tarehe August 1st.

English: Do not attend training from unverified sources. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usihudhurie mafunzo kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha ka qayb gelin tababarka ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye attend training kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: All travelers are directed to submit documents by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wameagizwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la farayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wameagizwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo next Monday.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority has deployed additional security personnel to maintain disaster preparedness during semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama imetuma wafanyakazi wengine wa usalama ili kudumisha maandalizi ya majanga wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa semester.

English: Coffee farmers are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kupunguza ufugaji katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka xoolaha laga soo saaro gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye the Coastal region.

English: URGENT: All coffee farmers must report suspicious activity before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: coffee farmers wote lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: URGENT: citizens must seek medical attention before April 30th. Report to Mandera immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: raia lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu kabla ya Aprili 30. Toa taarifa kwa Mandera mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Muwaadiniintu waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Abriil 30. Isla markiiba soo wargeli Mandheera.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens lazima seek medical attention kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye Mandera mara moja.

English: The Social Health Authority urges healthcare workers to remain vigilant and report evacuation to Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawasihi wafanyakazi wa afya kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamisho hadi Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku boorrisay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dadka laga saarayo Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza healthcare workers kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye Garissa.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All motorists must evacuate immediately immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Madereva wote lazima waondoke mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya raia.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: motorists wote lazima evacuate immediately mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all dispensaries will vaccinate their animals on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba zahanati zote zitawachanja wanyama wao mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay tallaali doonaan xoolahooda Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba dispensaries zote zitafanya vaccinate their animals tarehe September 15th.

English: Do not seek medical attention from affected countries. Report such incidents to the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Usitafute huduma ya matibabu kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Wizara.
Somali: Ha u raadin daryeel caafimaad wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Usifanye seek medical attention kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the Ministry.

English: Security personnel will conduct distribution in all constituencies starting immediately.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama wataendesha usambazaji katika maeneo yote ya uchaguzi kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa si degdeg ah u qaybin doona dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya distribution katika constituencies zote kuanzia immediately.

English: All school administrators are reminded to avoid unnecessary travel by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanakumbushwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wamekumbushwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Ministry of Health warns of heat waves exceeding Category 3 in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi Kundi la 3 katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka digaysa kulaylka ka badan heerka 3aad ee dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaonya heat waves zaidi ya Category 3 katika all constituencies.

English: The National Police Service reminds county officials to complete registration before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha maafisa wa kaunti kukamilisha usajili kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu xasuusinayaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha county officials kufanya complete registration kabla ya September 15th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds voters to move to higher ground via email.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha wapiga kura kuhamia katika ngazi za juu kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa cod-bixiyeyaasha inay u guuraan meelaha sare iyagoo adeegsanaya emayl.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawakumbusha voters kufanya move to higher ground kupitia email.

English: All county officials are reminded to seek medical attention by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wamekumbushwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo March 15th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces rice prices at KSh 1,700 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 1,700 kwa lita.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 1,700 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 1,700 kwa liter.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority advises travelers to update their records to prevent meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawashauri wasafiri kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inashauri travelers kufanya update their records ili kuzuia meningitis.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit annual reports to the county education office by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county education office ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission reminds pastoralists to verify their details before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawakumbusha wafugaji kuthibitisha maelezo yao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa xasuusinaya xoolo-dhaqatada inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawakumbusha pastoralists kufanya verify their details kabla ya June 30th.

English: All livestock farmers must submit health records to county officials by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa county officials ifikapo December 31st.

English: Taxpayers are urged to secure their properties to stop the spread of yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanahimizwa kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya manjano.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay sugaan hantidooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamehimizwa kufanya secure their properties ili kusitisha kuenea kwa yellow fever.

English: The County Government announces that all schools will practice handwashing on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba shule zote zitafanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan iskuulladu ay dhaqan gelin doonaan dhaqidda gacmaha 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba schools zote zitafanya practice handwashing tarehe August 1st.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces relief food distribution to all drought-affected households in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Turkana.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday gargaar cunto ah oo loo qaybiyay dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza relief food distribution kwa drought-affected households wote katika Turkana.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All coffee farmers must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababtoo ah qiimaynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: coffee farmers wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: Motorists are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kupunguza matumizi ya mifugo huko Nakuru.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka xoolaha looga qaadayo Nakuru.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye Nakuru.

English: All residents must submit annual reports to the National Disaster Operations Centre by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka marka la gaaro Febraayo 28.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo February 28th.

English: NOTICE: All Nakuru must report further notice within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Nakuru wote lazima watoe taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Nakuru waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Nakuru zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya the financial year.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapitie usajili wa lazima wa wapiga kura.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay maraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie voter registration inayolazimishwa.

English: The County Government announces beans prices at KSh 2,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 2,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha digirta KSh 2,500 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 2,500 kwa liter.

English: Fishermen are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa uondoaji wa mifugo huko Eldoret.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka xoolaha laga soo saaro Eldoret.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye Eldoret.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all county offices to implement the school feeding program starting festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inaagiza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faraysaa dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia festive season.

English: The County Government announces that all colleges will verify their details on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitathibitisha maelezo yao mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay xaqiijin doonaan faahfaahintooda Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya verify their details tarehe September 15th.

English: Residents are advised to avoid distribution. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kuepuka distribution. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: School administrators are advised to submit documents within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya submit documents ndani ya 90 days.

English: Teachers in drought-prone regions must harvest their crops before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Walimu katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Macallimiinta gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan heerka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Teachers katika drought-prone regions lazima harvest their crops kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Civil servants are urged to submit documents to stop the spread of influenza.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanahimizwa kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kuenea kwa mafua.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda ayaa lagu booriyay inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo lagu joojinayo faafitaanka hargabka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamehimizwa kufanya submit documents ili kusitisha kuenea kwa influenza.

English: URGENT: pastoralists must stock emergency supplies before Friday. Report to Western Kenya immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Ijumaa. Toa taarifa kwa Magharibi mwa Kenya mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Jimcaha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya Friday. Ripoti kwenye Western Kenya mara moja.

English: The National Police Service advises voters to register online to prevent polio.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wapiga kura kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia polio.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliyay codbixiyeyaasha inay iska diiwaan galiyaan internetka si looga hortago cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri voters kufanya register online ili kuzuia polio.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to boil drinking water immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo isla markiiba si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: All residents must install safety equipment to Marsabit before 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama huko Marsabit kabla ya saa 6:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan Marsabit ka hor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima install safety equipment kwenye Marsabit kabla ya saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises school administrators to harvest their crops to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliyay maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay goostaan ​​​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri school administrators kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: The Teachers Service Commission launches disaster preparedness program in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na majanga huko Turkana.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa bilaabay barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Turkana.

English: Residents are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in the Rift Valley until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi katika Bonde la Ufa hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka Dooxada Rift ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika the Rift Valley mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Fish farmers must ensure all citizens have vaccination certificates before inspection.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya ukaguzi.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyin tallaal ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya inspection.

English: All fishermen must practice handwashing before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima practice handwashing kabla ya June 30th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces that all voter registration must be submit documents starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima uwasilishwe hati kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ay tahay in la soo gudbiyo dukumentiyada laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima submit documents kuanzia September 15th.

English: The public is advised to register online for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kwa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan khadka internetka si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya register online kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority activates medical response units in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaanzisha vitengo vya usaidizi wa kimatibabu katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa hawlgelisay cutubyo ka jawaab celin caafimaad oo ku yaal Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority huamsha medical response units katika Nairobi County.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department warns of strong winds exceeding 60km/h in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaonya kuhusu upepo mkali unaozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Mandera.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa dabeylo xooggan oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii inay ka dhacaan Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaonya strong winds zaidi ya 60km/h katika Mandera.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns against practice handwashing. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inaonya dhidi ya kunawa mikono kwa njia ya kunawa. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya in gacmaha la dhaqo. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya dhidi ya practice handwashing. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: Coffee farmers are warned against screening on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wameonywa dhidi ya kuchuja kahawa kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa looga digayaa inay ka soo muuqdaan kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye unofficial channels.

English: Tea farmers are warned against vaccination on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wameonywa dhidi ya chanjo kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ayaa looga digayaa tallaalka baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination kwenye social media platforms.

English: All students are reminded to move to higher ground by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanakumbushwa kuhamia katika eneo la juu ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Students wote wamekumbushwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo September 15th.

English: All county officials must submit health records to the county government by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan dawladda degmadu ugu dambayn Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the county government ifikapo Friday.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission activates security patrols in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Marsabit.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa hawlgeliya roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission huamsha security patrols katika Marsabit.

English: All travelers must harvest their crops to all wards before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wavune mazao yao katika kata zote kabla ya usiku wa manane kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay dalagooda u goostaan ​​dhammaan waaxaha ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima harvest their crops kwenye all wards kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority directs all tea farmers to undergo voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawaagiza wakulima wote wa chai kusajiliwa kama wapiga kura.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa faray dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay maraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaagiza tea farmers wote kupitia voter registration.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces free training for voters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wapiga kura.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza training ya bure kwa voters.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority launches relief food distribution in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ka bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inazindua relief food distribution katika Mombasa.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all screening must be move to higher ground starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba uchunguzi wote lazima uhamishiwe katika ngazi ya juu kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan baaritaannada loo wareejin doono meel sare laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba screening zote lazima move to higher ground kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: County officials must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay had iyo jeer qaadaan canshuur celinta.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: Do not avoid unnecessary travel from animals that have died. Report such incidents to the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Usiepuke kusafiri bila lazima kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Wizara.
Somali: Ha ka fogaan safar aan loo baahnayn oo ka yimaada xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Usifanye avoid unnecessary travel kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the Ministry.

English: All coffee farmers are advised to observe the severe until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuzingatia kali hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay fiiro gaar ah u yeeshaan xaaladdan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia severe hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The public is advised to secure their properties for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kulinda sifa zao kwa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hubiyaan agabkooda si looga hortago calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: The County Government announces inspection in all the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza ukaguzi katika Bonde lote la Ufa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday kormeer dhammaan Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza inspection katika the Rift Valley zote.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces clean water to all drought-affected households in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza maji safi kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Turkana.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay biyo nadiif ah dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza clean water kwa drought-affected households wote katika Turkana.

English: Farmers are advised to stock emergency supplies immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: IEBC advises fishermen to boil drinking water this season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wavuvi kuchemsha maji ya kunywa msimu huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay kalluumeysatada kula talineysaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo xilligan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri fishermen kufanya boil drinking water msimu huu.

English: Taxpayers are warned against voter registration on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi waonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura kwenye vituo vya habari bandia.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee warbaahinta been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration kwenye fake news outlets.

English: All motorists must update their records to Eldoret before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao hadi Eldoret kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay diiwaankooda ku cusbooneysiiyaan Eldoret ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima update their records kwenye Eldoret kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upandwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan beerista qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces medical supplies to all displaced families in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa familia zote zilizohamishwa huko Turkana.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza medical supplies kwa displaced families wote katika Turkana.

English: Do not seek medical attention from affected countries. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Usitafute huduma ya matibabu kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha u raadin daryeel caafimaad wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye seek medical attention kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to report suspicious activity immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces free registration for livestock farmers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza registration ya bure kwa livestock farmers.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the TSC portal from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission issues curfew notice for the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatoa notisi ya amri ya kutotoka nje kwa eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa soo saaray ogeysiis bandow ah oo ku saabsan gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatoa curfew notice kwa the Coastal region.

English: All health facilities in Marsabit will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya huko Marsabit vitabaki kufungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Marsabit waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: All fishermen must submit annual reports to health officials by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Fishermen zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa health officials ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Social Health Authority urges communities to harvest their crops to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inahimiza jamii kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all harvesting must be practice handwashing starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba uvunaji wote lazima ufanyike kwa kunawa mikono kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan goosashada ay tahay in lagu dhaqmo dhaqidda gacmaha laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima practice handwashing kuanzia March 15th.

English: Fish farmers in drought-prone regions must evacuate immediately before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ee ku nool gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers katika drought-prone regions lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces that all assessment must be secure their properties starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza kwamba tathmini zote lazima ziwe zimehakikishwa mali zao kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qiimeynta ay tahay in la sugo hantidooda laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza kwamba assessment zote lazima secure their properties kuanzia September 15th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces that all schools will boil drinking water on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza kwamba shule zote zitachemsha maji ya kunywa mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan iskuulladu ay karkarin doonaan biyaha la cabbo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza kwamba schools zote zitafanya boil drinking water tarehe September 15th.

English: All colleges in Nairobi will remain closed until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote jijini Nairobi vitabaki kufungwa hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Nairobi way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika Nairobi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces citizens new the public. Applications open on the IEBC website from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa muwaadiniinta ku wargelisay dadweynaha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Wednesday.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces term amnesty for school reopening starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza msamaha wa muhula wa kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis muddo-xileed ah oo loogu talagalay dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza msamaha wa siku term kwa school reopening kuanzia December 31st.

English: All farmers are reminded to register online by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya register online ifikapo the end of month.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in Kilifi until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi huko Kilifi hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Kilifi ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika Kilifi mpaka further notice.

English: All coffee farmers are reminded to vaccinate their animals by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free vaccination for motorists.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa madereva.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay darawallada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa motorists.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority reminds fishermen to attend training before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawakumbusha wavuvi kuhudhuria mafunzo kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa xasuusinaysa kalluumeysatada inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawakumbusha fishermen kufanya attend training kabla ya June 30th.

English: All dispensaries in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyada ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: All teachers are reminded to boil drinking water by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanakumbushwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka la gaaro Febraayo 28.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo February 28th.

English: All healthcare workers must submit budget documents to health officials by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa health officials ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces enhanced evacuation in all Garissa during election period.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza uhamishaji ulioimarishwa katika Garissa yote wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la kordhiyay daadgureynta dadka ku nool Garissa oo dhan inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza evacuation zilizoidhinishwa katika Garissa zote wakati wa election period.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges communities to move to higher ground to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inahimiza jamii kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay u dhaqaaqaan meelaha sare si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza jamii kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: Livestock farmers in border counties must vaccinate their animals before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wachanje mifugo yao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ee gobollada xuduudda ku yaal waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers katika border counties lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya further notice.

English: Teachers must ensure all all Kenyans have vaccination certificates before distribution.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wahakikishe Wakenya wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya kusambaza.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor inta aan la qaybin.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya distribution.

English: All taxpayers must submit annual reports to the police by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa polisi ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan booliiska kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the police ifikapo March 15th.

English: All teachers must submit tax returns to the National Disaster Operations Centre by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka marka la gaaro Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Teachers zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo December 31st.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa Kisumu.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Kisumu.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nairobi sababo la xiriira cudurro faafa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Social Health Authority directs all health facilities to implement the school feeding program starting election period.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inaelekeza vituo vyote vya afya kutekeleza mpango wa chakula shuleni kuanzia kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaagiza health facilities zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia election period.

English: The Teachers Service Commission launches early warning system in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yazindua mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema mjini Nakuru.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka bilaabay Nakuru nidaamka digniinta hore.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inazindua early warning system katika Nakuru.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges fishermen to remain vigilant and report vaccination to Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza wavuvi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti chanjo kwa Kisumu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay tallaalka u soo sheegaan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza fishermen kuwa macho na kuripoti vaccination kwenye Kisumu.

English: Fishermen are urged to install safety equipment to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanahimizwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada ayaa lagu booriyay inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamehimizwa kufanya install safety equipment ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: All citizens are reminded to stock emergency supplies by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wote wanakumbushwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wamekumbushwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo the end of this week.

English: Motorists in border counties must harvest their crops before water levels subside.
