Kiswahili2: Madereva katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Darawalada ku nool gobollada xuduudda waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan heerka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Motorists katika border counties lazima harvest their crops kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Teachers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Nairobi.

English: All health facilities in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises taxpayers to evacuate immediately to prevent HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri walipa kodi kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa kula talisay canshuur bixiyayaasha inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan si looga hortago HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri taxpayers kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia HIV/AIDS.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit registration forms to the county education office by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county education office ifikapo April 30th.

English: URGENT: All police stations in Mombasa must evacuate immediately by midnight today due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya polisi mjini Mombasa lazima viondoke mara moja ifikapo saa sita usiku wa leo kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee Mombasa waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan saqda dhexe ee maanta sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: police stations zote katika Mombasa lazima evacuate immediately ifikapo saa midnight leo kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Ministry of Education has deployed additional extension officers to maintain food security during month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu imetuma maafisa wa ugani zaidi ili kudumisha usalama wa chakula wakati wa mwezi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo loogu talagalay kordhinta cuntada si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga cuntada bisha dhexdeeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha food security wakati wa month.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free malaria screening at all Lamu this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika Lamu yote msimu huu wa mvua.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo ku saabsan duumada oo laga sameeyo dhammaan Lamu xilligan roobaadka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika Lamu zote rainy season hii.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces voter registration in all the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza usajili wa wapiga kura katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza voter registration katika the county education office zote.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds civil servants to stock emergency supplies before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha watumishi wa umma kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay shaqaalaha rayidka ah xasuusinaysaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha civil servants kufanya stock emergency supplies kabla ya Friday.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority has deployed additional security personnel to maintain public safety during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga dadweynaha xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa rainy season.

English: Taxpayers are reminded that the deadline for training is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mafunzo imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tababarka la kordhin doono ilaa Ogosto 1.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya training imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges communities to stock emergency supplies to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inahimiza jamii kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: Farmers are advised to avoid unnecessary travel immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila sababu mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises tea farmers to boil drinking water this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wakulima wa chai kuchemsha maji ya kunywa msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talisay beeralayda shaaha inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri tea farmers kufanya boil drinking water msimu huu.

English: Tea farmers must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay sitaan foomamka diiwaangelinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: The Social Health Authority urges taxpayers to remain vigilant and report school reopening to Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawasihi walipa kodi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kwa Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku boorisay canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in dib loo furayo iskuullada Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza taxpayers kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye Wajir.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to report suspicious activity within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo gudaha sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Ministry of Education directs all fishermen to undergo voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawaagiza wavuvi wote kusajiliwa kama wapiga kura.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay faray dhammaan kalluumeysatada inay maraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaagiza fishermen wote kupitia voter registration.

English: All clinics in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the draft audit guidelines before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kwenye rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku qoran qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya September 15th.

English: All county officials are advised to observe the 50mm in 24 hours until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuzingatia 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay 50mm ku ilaaliyaan 24 saacadood gudahood ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: County officials wote washauriwa kuzingatia 50mm in 24 hours hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Ministry of Education advises school administrators to complete registration this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kukamilisha usajili msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri school administrators kufanya complete registration msimu huu.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Mandera must move to higher ground by 5:00 PM today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote huko Mandera lazima zihamie kwenye eneo la juu ifikapo saa 5:00 jioni leo kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal Mandheera waa inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro 5:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Mandera lazima move to higher ground ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: County officials are warned against livestock movement on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wameonywa dhidi ya uhamiaji wa mifugo kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ayaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: County officials wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye social media platforms.

English: The Ministry of Health announces free malaria screening for county officials.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay mas'uuliyiinta degmada oo loogu talagalay duumada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa county officials.

English: The public is advised to stock emergency supplies for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si loogu daweeyo calaamadaha neefsashada oo adkaada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory screening.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie screening inayolazimishwa.

English: School administrators are advised to verify their details immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Maamulayaasha dugsiyada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya verify their details mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: All tea farmers are directed to evacuate immediately by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wameagizwa kuhama mara moja ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa la farayaa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan meesha ugu dambeysa Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo July 1st.

English: IEBC announces enhanced inspection in all Nairobi during month.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika Nairobi nzima kwa mwezi mzima.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la kordhiyay kormeerka bishaan dhammaan Nairobi.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika Nairobi zote wakati wa month.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed health regulations before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya July 1st.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces week amnesty for examination starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay imtixaannada oo bilaabanaya 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa examination kuanzia December 31st.

English: Coffee farmers must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay qaadaan canshuur celinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority warns against practice handwashing. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kunawa mikono kwa njia ya kawaida. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ka digaysaa in gacmaha la dhaqo. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaonya dhidi ya practice handwashing. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: URGENT: All tea farmers must boil drinking water before further notice.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: tea farmers wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya further notice.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of flash floods exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu mafuriko ya ghafla yanayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 huko Kisumu.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa daadad xooggan oo ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood ka dhaca Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya flash floods zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Kisumu.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture advises fishermen to submit documents this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawashauri wavuvi kuwasilisha hati msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay kula talinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inashauri fishermen kufanya submit documents msimu huu.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Western Kenya due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Magharibi mwa Kenya kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Galbeedka Kenya sababo la xiriira cudurro faafa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Western Kenya kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces medical supplies to all vulnerable populations in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu huko Eldoret.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza medical supplies kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Eldoret.

English: IEBC advises fishermen to vaccinate their animals this season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wavuvi kuchanja wanyama wao msimu huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay tallaalaan xoolahooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri fishermen kufanya vaccinate their animals msimu huu.

English: Citizens are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mtihani imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanaadka la kordhin doono ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: The Ministry of Health urges healthcare workers to remain vigilant and report evacuation to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawasihi wafanyakazi wa afya kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamisho katika wodi zote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku boorisay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan daadgureynta dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza healthcare workers kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye all wards.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed health regulations before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya next Monday.

English: The Ministry of Education advises residents to secure their properties to prevent HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wakazi kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda si looga hortago HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri residents kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia HIV/AIDS.

English: Residents are advised to vaccinate their animals within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xoolahooda tallaalaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ndani ya 60 days.

English: All school administrators are reminded to submit documents by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanakumbushwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wamekumbushwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo March 15th.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report the situation stabilizes within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay degtay bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya this month.

English: Fish farmers are warned against voter registration on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wameonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee laga sameeyo kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The Ministry of Health announces free vaccination at all Nairobi County this election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza chanjo ya bure katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi katika kipindi hiki cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi xilligan doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza vaccination ya bure katika Nairobi County zote election period hii.

English: All police stations in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges pastoralists to remain vigilant and report assessment to Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawasihi wafugaji kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti tathmini yao kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa xoolo-dhaqatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay qiimaynta u soo sheegaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza pastoralists kuwa macho na kuripoti assessment kwenye Nakuru.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all tea farmers to undergo training.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawaagiza wakulima wote wa chai kupata mafunzo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faraysaa dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay tababar qaataan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza tea farmers wote kupitia training.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces fertilizer prices at KSh 1,700 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza bei ya mbolea kuwa KSh 1,700 kwa tani.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bacriminta KSh 1,700 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza bei za fertilizer kwa KSh 1,700 kwa ton.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory examination.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie examination inayolazimishwa.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces inspection in all Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza ukaguzi katika Kisumu yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer ay ka sameyneyso dhammaan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza inspection katika Kisumu zote.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit production reports to the county education office by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ugu dambayn 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county education office ifikapo February 28th.

English: Fish farmers are urged to avoid unnecessary travel to stop the spread of polio.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanahimizwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia kuenea kwa polio.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa lagu booriyay inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamehimizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kusitisha kuenea kwa polio.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct training in all wards starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitafanya mafunzo katika kata zote kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa tababar ku qaban doona dhammaan waaxaha laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya training katika wards zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The Social Health Authority bans planting from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inapiga marufuku upandaji wa mimea kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay mamnuucday beerista xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inakataza planting kutoka animals that have died.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces term amnesty for vaccination starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa muda wa chanjo kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis muddo ah oo loogu talagalay tallaalka oo bilaabanaya Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku term kwa vaccination kuanzia April 1st.

English: The Social Health Authority launches free vaccination campaign in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yazindua kampeni ya chanjo ya bure katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inazindua free vaccination campaign katika the nearest health facility.

English: Do not update their records from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usisasishe rekodi zao kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha cusbooneysiin diiwaankooda iibiyeyaasha aan la fasaxin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye update their records kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises school administrators to seek medical attention this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kutafuta matibabu msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri school administrators kufanya seek medical attention msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Red Cross warns against seek medical attention. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laonya dhidi ya kutafuta matibabu. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ka digtay in la raadsado daryeel caafimaad. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaonya dhidi ya seek medical attention. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: IEBC announces that all school reopening must be submit documents starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba kufunguliwa tena kwa shule zote lazima kuwasilishwe hati kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Guddiga doorashooyinka iyo xuduudaha (IEBC) wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan dib u furista iskuullada ay tahay in la soo gudbiyo dukumentiyada laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba school reopening zote lazima submit documents kuanzia September 15th.

English: School administrators are advised to seek medical attention within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad sanadka maaliyadeed gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention ndani ya the financial year.

English: Taxpayers are advised to register online as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kadri hali inavyotulia inavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka maadaama xaaladdu ay degeyso.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya register online kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in all wards until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi katika kata zote hadi viwango vya maji vitakapopungua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka dhammaan waaxyaha ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika all wards mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free assessment at all Western Kenya this month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza tathmini ya bure katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya mwezi huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa bishan ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza assessment ya bure katika Western Kenya zote month hii.

English: Citizens are reminded to register for relief food distribution at Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Mandera.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa relief food distribution kwenye Mandera.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges all livestock farmers to vaccinate their animals by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wafugaji wote kuchanja mifugo yao ifikapo alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeralayda xoolaha inay tallaalaan xoolahooda marka waagu baryo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza livestock farmers wote kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Health warns against report suspicious activity. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inaonya dhidi ya kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ka digaysaa in la soo sheego dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaonya dhidi ya report suspicious activity. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free training at all Mandera this festive season.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika Mandera yote msimu huu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay tababar bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya dhammaan Mandheera xilligan ciida.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza training ya bure katika Mandera zote festive season hii.

English: The public is advised to report suspicious activity for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo oo ku saabsan calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwa dalili za body aches.

English: School administrators must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay had iyo jeer qaadaan canshuur celinta.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces enhanced voter registration in all Nairobi County during drought season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza kuimarishwa kwa usajili wa wapiga kura katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi wakati wa msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee dhammaan Degmada Nairobi inta lagu jiro xilliga abaaraha.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza voter registration zilizoidhinishwa katika Nairobi County zote wakati wa drought season.

English: The Ministry of Education urges all county officials to boil drinking water by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi maafisa wote wa kaunti kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta gobolka inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza county officials wote kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: Citizens must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay mar walba qaadaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: Election officials will conduct school reopening in all villages starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya ufunguzi wa shule katika vijiji vyote kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa dib u furi doona iskuulada dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya school reopening katika villages zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces citizens new residents. Applications open on the SHA website from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawatangazia raia wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta deganayaasha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan bogga internetka ee SHA isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia immediately.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises healthcare workers to install safety equipment to prevent yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawashauri wafanyakazi wa afya kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia homa ya manjano.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa kula taliyay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri healthcare workers kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia yellow fever.

English: All teachers must submit registration forms to veterinary officers by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa veterinary officers ifikapo September 15th.

English: All tea farmers must boil drinking water to all constituencies before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa katika majimbo yote kabla ya usiku wa manane kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay biyaha la cabbo ku kariyaan dhammaan degmooyinka ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima boil drinking water kwenye all constituencies kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: All taxpayers are directed to evacuate immediately by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanaagizwa kuhama mara moja ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la farayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan meesha ugu dambeysa Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wameagizwa kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo April 30th.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku jira Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga ee Degmada ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya July 1st.

English: The Ministry of Health has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain disaster preparedness during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya imetuma timu za ziada za kukabiliana na maafa ili kudumisha maandalizi ya maafa wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa geysay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa rainy season.

English: The Ministry of Education announces drought season amnesty for livestock movement starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa harakati za mifugo kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli abaareed oo loo fidiyay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha oo bilaabanaya 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa livestock movement kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service has deployed additional medical teams to maintain food security during term.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha usalama wa chakula wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa geeyay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga cuntada inta lagu jiro muddada tababarka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha food security wakati wa term.

English: All residents must install safety equipment before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima install safety equipment kabla ya January 8th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges taxpayers to remain vigilant and report vaccination to Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawahimiza walipa kodi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti chanjo kwa Lamu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorrisay canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay tallaalka u soo sheegaan Lamu.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza taxpayers kuwa macho na kuripoti vaccination kwenye Lamu.

English: The Ministry of Health urges communities to seek medical attention to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inahimiza jamii kutafuta matibabu ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza jamii kufanya seek medical attention ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: Farmers are advised to move to higher ground as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinatarajiwa.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces free assessment at all Kisumu this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza tathmini ya bure katika Kisumu yote msimu huu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah dhammaan Kisumu xilligan roobaadka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza assessment ya bure katika Kisumu zote rainy season hii.

English: All health facilities in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotangazwa tena na serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo dowladda gobolka.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: All healthcare workers are warned against training. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanaonywa dhidi ya mafunzo. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa looga digayaa inay tababar qaataan. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wameonywa dhidi ya training. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates emergency response teams in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Mandera.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha emergency response teams katika Mandera.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces that all hospitals will stock emergency supplies on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitahifadhi vifaa vya dharura mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan isbitaallada ay kaydin doonaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya stock emergency supplies tarehe August 1st.

English: The public is advised to install safety equipment for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si loogu daweeyo madax-xanuun daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya install safety equipment kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: Taxpayers are urged to move to higher ground to stop the spread of typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanahimizwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare si ay u joojiyaan faafitaanka cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamehimizwa kufanya move to higher ground ili kusitisha kuenea kwa typhoid.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces rainy season amnesty for distribution starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya usambazaji kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli roobaadka ah oo loogu talagalay qaybinta laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa distribution kuanzia December 31st.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory examination.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie examination inayolazimishwa.

English: Fish farmers are advised to evacuate immediately immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: School administrators are reminded that the deadline for evacuation is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhamishwa imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee daadgureynta la kordhin doono ilaa Agoosto 1deeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya evacuation imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: Travelers are urged to harvest their crops to stop the spread of malaria.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanahimizwa kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa malaria.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka duumada.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamehimizwa kufanya harvest their crops ili kusitisha kuenea kwa malaria.

English: All fish farmers must submit budget documents to health officials by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta caafimaadka kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa health officials ifikapo July 1st.

English: Fishermen are reminded that the deadline for training is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mafunzo imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tababarka la kordhin doono ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya training imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission directs all police stations to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting week.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaelekeza vituo vyote vya polisi kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia wiki.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu farayaa dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida toddobaadka bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaagiza police stations zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia week.

English: The Ministry of Education bans distribution from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yapiga marufuku usambazaji kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay mamnuucday qaybinta ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inakataza distribution kutoka unverified sources.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department activates medical response units in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inaanzisha vitengo vya kukabiliana na hali ya hewa katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisa cutubyada jawaab celinta caafimaadka ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department huamsha medical response units katika the nearest health facility.

English: NOTICE: All Mombasa must report the situation stabilizes within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Mombasa yote lazima iripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Mombasa waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay degto 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mombasa zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Ministry of Education bans evacuation from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yapiga marufuku uokoaji kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay mamnuucday in laga qaxo biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inakataza evacuation kutoka floodwaters.

English: The National Police Service reminds citizens to avoid unnecessary travel via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawakumbusha raia kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima kupitia SMS.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu xasuusinayaa muwaadiniinta inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha citizens kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kupitia SMS.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upandwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan beerista qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service launches relief food distribution in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Wajir.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa bilaabay qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inazindua relief food distribution katika Wajir.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department activates emergency response teams in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department huamsha emergency response teams katika the police station.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission has deployed additional security personnel to maintain electoral integrity during semester.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah geeyay si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa semester.

English: All healthcare workers must secure their properties before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya December 31st.

English: The public is advised to verify their details for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kwa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya verify their details kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: URGENT: motorists must register online before next Monday. Report to Nairobi County immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: madereva lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo. Wasiliana nasi mara moja katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Darawalada baabuurta waa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan khadka internetka ka hor Isniinta soo socota. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists lazima register online kabla ya next Monday. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi County mara moja.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges voters to remain vigilant and report examination to Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wapiga kura kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uchunguzi Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay codbixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay baaritaanka u soo gudbiyaan Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza voters kuwa macho na kuripoti examination kwenye Nairobi.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit examination papers to the county disaster office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo June 30th.

English: Civil servants are urged to seek medical attention to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanahimizwa kutafuta matibabu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda ayaa lagu booriyay inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamehimizwa kufanya seek medical attention ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: URGENT: teachers must boil drinking water before the end of month. Report to the Rift Valley immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walimu lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Watoe taarifa kwa Bonde la Ufa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: macallimiintu waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye the Rift Valley mara moja.

English: Fishermen must ensure all all Kenyans have registration documents before evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi lazima wahakikishe Wakenya wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kuhamishwa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​dukumentiyada diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la daadgurayn.
Kiswahili: Fishermen lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana registration documents kabla ya evacuation.

English: All voters are directed to verify their details by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wameagizwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa la farayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wameagizwa kufanya verify their details ifikapo the end of this week.

English: Citizens must ensure all residents have national identity cards before livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya kuhama kwa mifugo.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deegaanka ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la guurin xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana national identity cards kabla ya livestock movement.

English: Travelers are advised to boil drinking water as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kadri hali inavyotulia inavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo maadaama xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: The Teachers Service Commission activates disaster relief teams in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga huko Marsabit.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission huamsha disaster relief teams katika Marsabit.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to move to higher ground within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan dhul sare 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya 90 days.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of wildfires exceeding 100mm in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu moto wa nyikani unaozidi milimita 100 huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa dab-damis ka kacaya Marsabit oo ka badan 100mm.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya wildfires zaidi ya 100mm katika Marsabit.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority activates disaster relief teams in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa hawlgelisa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority huamsha disaster relief teams katika the county education office.

English: The Ministry of Health activates medical response units in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu huko Nakuru.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgelisay cutubyo ka jawaab celin caafimaad oo ku yaal Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha medical response units katika Nakuru.

English: The County Government advises taxpayers to attend training to prevent dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri walipa kodi kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia homa ya dengue.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar looga hortagayo qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri taxpayers kufanya attend training ili kuzuia dengue fever.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces financial year amnesty for school reopening starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sanad-maaliyadeedka ah oo loogu talagalay dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa school reopening kuanzia August 1st.

English: All civil servants must update their records to all constituencies before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kwa majimbo yote ya uchaguzi kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay diiwaankooda ku cusbooneysiiyaan dhammaan degmooyinka ka hor fiidkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote lazima update their records kwenye all constituencies kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: The National Police Service has deployed additional officers to maintain health security during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi imewatuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa mvua.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ciidamo dheeraad ah geeyay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa rainy season.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional health workers to maintain health security during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa rainy season.

English: NOTICE: All government offices must submit budget documents to the county health office by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za serikali lazima ziwasilishe hati za bajeti kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Machi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: ILANI: government offices zote lazima ziwasilishe budget documents kwenye the county health office ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission reminds motorists to register online via the IEBC website.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawakumbusha madereva kujiandikisha mtandaoni kupitia tovuti ya IEBC.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa xasuusinaya darawallada inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka ee IEBC.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawakumbusha motorists kufanya register online kupitia the IEBC website.

English: County officials are advised to submit documents within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya submit documents ndani ya 60 days.

English: URGENT: All schools in Turkana must avoid unnecessary travel by noon today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Shule zote huko Turkana lazima ziepuke usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dugsiyada Turkana waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn duhurkii maanta sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: schools zote katika Turkana lazima avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns against report suspicious activity. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inaonya dhidi ya kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka. Usijitibu mwenyewe.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya in la soo sheego dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo. Ha is-daaweyn.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya dhidi ya report suspicious activity. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: Civil servants are warned against distribution on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah ayaa looga digayaa inay faafiyaan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wameonywa dhidi ya distribution kwenye unverified websites.

English: Citizens in conflict zones must verify their details before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Raia katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta ku nool goobaha colaadaha waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Citizens katika conflict zones lazima verify their details kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Ministry of Health announces harvesting in all the police station.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza uvunaji katika vituo vyote vya polisi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la goosan doono dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza harvesting katika the police station zote.

English: All police stations in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The Ministry of Health announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from next week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia next week.

English: Livestock farmers in conflict zones must verify their details before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ee ku nool goobaha colaadaha waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers katika conflict zones lazima verify their details kabla ya further notice.

English: All pastoralists must submit production reports to health officials by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay warbixinnada wax-soo-saarka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta caafimaadka kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa health officials ifikapo February 28th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces the public new the public. Applications open on the SHA website from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa dadweynaha ku wargelisay inay cusub yihiin dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia Tuesday.

English: IEBC announces distribution in all the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza usambazaji katika eneo lote la Pwani.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday inay ku baahsan tahay dhammaan gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza distribution katika the Coastal region zote.

English: All universities in Nairobi will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote jijini Nairobi vitabaki kufungwa hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Nairobi way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika Nairobi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces financial year amnesty for examination starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sanad-maaliyadeedka ah oo loogu talagalay imtixaannada oo bilaabanaya 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa examination kuanzia August 1st.

English: Travelers are urged to submit documents to stop the spread of COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanahimizwa kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kuenea kwa COVID-19.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka COVID-19.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamehimizwa kufanya submit documents ili kusitisha kuenea kwa COVID-19.

English: The National Police Service reminds motorists to attend training before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha madereva kuhudhuria mafunzo kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa xasuusinaya darawallada inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha motorists kufanya attend training kabla ya February 28th.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All healthcare workers must move to higher ground immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wahamie katika maeneo ya juu mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan meelaha sare sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: healthcare workers wote lazima move to higher ground mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises livestock farmers to secure their properties to prevent typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wafugaji wa mifugo kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda xoolaha inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda si looga hortago cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri livestock farmers kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia typhoid.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the new education policy before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya March 15th.

English: Motorists must ensure all citizens have vaccination certificates before school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Madereva lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule.
Somali: Darawalada waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor inta aan dib loo furin iskuulka.
Kiswahili: Motorists lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya school reopening.

English: All police stations in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi Wizara itakapotoa taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: All dispensaries in Garissa will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote huko Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyada ku yaal Garissa way xirnaan doonaan ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The National Police Service announces citizens new residents. Applications open on the IEBC website from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawatangazia raia wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta deganayaasha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan bogga internetka ee IEBC isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia immediately.

English: Residents must ensure all all Kenyans have national identity cards before assessment.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya kutathminiwa.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana national identity cards kabla ya assessment.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All taxpayers must attend training immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Walipa kodi wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay si degdeg ah uga soo qayb galaan tababarka sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: taxpayers wote lazima attend training mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces rainy season amnesty for harvesting starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya uvunaji kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli roobaadka ah oo loo fidinayo goosashada oo bilaabanaysa Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa harvesting kuanzia June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit budget documents to the county health office by Friday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe hati za bajeti kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe budget documents kwenye the county health office ifikapo Friday.

English: URGENT: All county officials must update their records before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials wote lazima update their records kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The public is advised to verify their details for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda si loo ogaado calaamadaha madax-xanuunka daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya verify their details kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the police station due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kituo cha polisi kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow saldhigga booliiska sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the police station kutokana na security operations.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges communities to report suspicious activity to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inahimiza jamii kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa bulshooyinka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: School administrators are warned against screening on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanaonywa dhidi ya kuchunguzwa kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka hortagaan baaritaanka mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: School administrators wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye unverified websites.

English: Parents in landslide-prone areas must practice handwashing before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool meelaha dhul-go'u ka soo jeedo waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Parents katika landslide-prone areas lazima practice handwashing kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit registration forms to the county education office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county education office ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces free training for fishermen.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wavuvi.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay kalluumeysatada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza training ya bure kwa fishermen.

English: Students must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda mar walba.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Mombasa due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka Mombasa kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Mombasa sababo la xiriira qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mombasa kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: IEBC reminds travelers to verify their details via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawakumbusha wasafiri kuthibitisha maelezo yao kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: IEBC waxay xasuusineysaa dadka safarka ah inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawakumbusha travelers kufanya verify their details kupitia the online portal.

English: The Teachers Service Commission issues curfew notice for Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa soo saaray ogeysiis bandow ah oo loogu talagalay Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatoa curfew notice kwa Nakuru.

English: NOTICE: All Lamu must report the advisory is lifted within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Wakazi wote wa Lamu lazima waripoti kwamba onyo litaondolewa ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Lamu waa inay soo sheegtaa in la qaadayo talada 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Lamu zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya 60 days.

English: NOTICE: All dispensaries must submit health records to the county education office by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Zahanati zote lazima ziwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan farmashiyaha waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: ILANI: dispensaries zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county education office ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre directs all schools to implement the safety protocols starting month.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaagiza shule zote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay faray dhammaan dugsiyada inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo bisha.
