Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaagiza schools zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia month.

English: NOTICE: All Western Kenya must report the advisory is lifted within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kenya yote ya Magharibi lazima iripoti kwamba ombi hilo litaondolewa ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dadka ku nool Galbeedka Kenya waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaaday tallada 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Western Kenya zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority advises coffee farmers to verify their details this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kuthibitisha maelezo yao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inashauri coffee farmers kufanya verify their details msimu huu.

English: All dispensaries in the police station will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika kituo cha polisi zitabaki zimefungwa hadi onyo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyada ku yaal saldhigga booliska ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika the police station zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: Do not attend training from unverified sources. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usihudhurie mafunzo kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka qayb gelin tababarka ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye attend training kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: The County Government warns of drought exceeding critical in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya kuhusu ukame mkubwa zaidi katika kata zote.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka digaysaa abaar aad u daran oo ka jirta dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya drought zaidi ya critical katika all wards.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission directs all health facilities to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inaelekeza vituo vyote vya afya kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa faraya dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaagiza health facilities zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia drought season.

English: Tea farmers in border counties must move to higher ground before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wahamie katika maeneo ya juu kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ee ku nool gobollada xuduudda waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika border counties lazima move to higher ground kabla ya further notice.

English: All healthcare workers must practice handwashing to the county education office before dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono hadi ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti kabla ya alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay gacmaha ku dhaqdaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ka hor waaberiga maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima practice handwashing kwenye the county education office kabla ya saa dawn kila siku.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department bans planting from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yapiga marufuku upandaji miti kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucday beerista ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inakataza planting kutoka unverified sources.

English: The public is invited to submit annual reports on the new education policy before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za kila mwaka kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinno sannadeed oo ku saabsan siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha annual reports kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya December 31st.

English: URGENT: healthcare workers must seek medical attention before February 28th. Report to Turkana immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wafanyakazi wa afya lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu kabla ya Februari 28. Toa taarifa kwa Turkana mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Febraayo 28. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Turkana.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: healthcare workers lazima seek medical attention kabla ya February 28th. Ripoti kwenye Turkana mara moja.

English: Livestock farmers are urged to practice handwashing to stop the spread of typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa mifugo wanahimizwa kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagu booriyay inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamehimizwa kufanya practice handwashing ili kusitisha kuenea kwa typhoid.

English: All healthcare workers are directed to attend training by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanaelekezwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la farayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wameagizwa kufanya attend training ifikapo September 15th.

English: Parents are advised to move to higher ground as the advisory is lifted are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuhamia katika ngazi ya juu kwani ushauri unatarajiwa kuondolewa.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meel sare maadaama la filayo in talo-bixinta la qaado.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwani the advisory is lifted zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Red Cross issues health advisory for Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latoa ushauri wa afya kwa Waturkana.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay talo caafimaad oo ku saabsan Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatoa health advisory kwa Turkana.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture launches subsidized fertilizer program in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yazindua mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa mjini Kisumu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka bilowday Kisumu barnaamij bacrimin ah oo la kabayo.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inazindua subsidized fertilizer program katika Kisumu.

English: Community health workers will conduct screening in all villages starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya uchunguzi katika vijiji vyote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa baaritaan ku sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya screening katika villages zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free extension services at all the Coastal region this festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika maeneo yote ya Pwani msimu huu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan gobolka Xeebta xilligan ciidaha ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza extension services ya bure katika the Coastal region zote festive season hii.

English: Pastoralists are urged to complete registration to stop the spread of malaria.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanahimizwa kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia kuenea kwa malaria.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka duumada.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamehimizwa kufanya complete registration ili kusitisha kuenea kwa malaria.

English: Tea farmers are advised to stock emergency supplies within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka degdegga ah 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya 60 days.

English: All tea farmers are directed to secure their properties by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wameagizwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa la farayaa inay sugaan hantidooda kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo Friday.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns of storms exceeding 60km/h in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya kuhusu dhoruba zinazozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya duufaanno ka badan 60km/saacaddii oo ka dhacaya saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya storms zaidi ya 60km/h katika the police station.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces free malaria screening for farmers.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa wakulima.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa farmers.

English: School administrators are advised to boil drinking water within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water ndani ya 60 days.

English: The National Drought Management Authority has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain public safety during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame imetuma timu za ziada za kukabiliana na maafa ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa geysay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan badqabka dadweynaha inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa financial year.

English: All civil servants must submit identity documents to health officials by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa health officials ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All fishermen are reminded to register online by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wamekumbushwa kufanya register online ifikapo April 30th.

English: The public is advised to update their records for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda calaamadaha neefsashada ee dhibka leh.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya update their records kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit examination papers to the county disaster office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo September 15th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces examination in all all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza uchunguzi katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday imtixaan laga qaadayo dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza examination katika all constituencies zote.

English: IEBC advises healthcare workers to vaccinate their animals to prevent bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wafanyakazi wa afya kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kichocho.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si looga hortago bilharzia.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri healthcare workers kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kuzuia bilharzia.

English: All dispensaries in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission issues security alert for the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa soo saaray digniin amni oo ku saabsan Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatoa security alert kwa the Rift Valley.

English: All voters are warned against planting. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa looga digayaa inay beeraan. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wameonywa dhidi ya planting. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: All residents are reminded to install safety equipment by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanakumbushwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free assessment for farmers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wakulima.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa farmers.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all county offices to implement the digital literacy program starting semester.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inaelekeza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza programu ya uandishi wa habari kidijitali kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xafiisyada degmada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka qorista iyo qorista dijitaalka ah ee bilawga simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia semester.

English: Extension officers will conduct vaccination in all trading centers starting immediately.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya chanjo katika vituo vyote vya biashara kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa tallaalka ka sameyn doona dhammaan xarumaha ganacsiga isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya vaccination katika trading centers zote kuanzia immediately.

English: All students are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Students wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All civil servants are reminded to update their records by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanakumbushwa kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wamekumbushwa kufanya update their records ifikapo Friday.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority reminds travelers to update their records via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawakumbusha wasafiri kusasisha rekodi zao kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawakumbusha travelers kufanya update their records kupitia the online portal.

English: All pastoralists are warned against voter registration. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta cod-bixiyeyaasha. Isticmaal kanaallo rasmi ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: Tea farmers are advised to stock emergency supplies within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka degdegga ah 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya 30 days.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapandishwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan beero qasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: NOTICE: All Garissa must report the situation stabilizes within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Garissa wote lazima waripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Garissa waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay degto 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Garissa zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises citizens to update their records this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri raia kusasisha rekodi zao msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliyay muwaadiniinta inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri citizens kufanya update their records msimu huu.

English: The National Police Service announces milk prices at KSh 4,000 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza bei ya maziwa kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha caanaha KSh 4,000 halkii kiish ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza bei za milk kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 50kg bag.

English: The County Government announces enhanced livestock movement in all Eldoret during week.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza uhamaji ulioimarishwa wa mifugo katika Eldoret yote wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday kor u kaca dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan Eldoret inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza livestock movement zilizoidhinishwa katika Eldoret zote wakati wa week.

English: Pastoralists must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Xoolo-dhaqatadu waa inay sitaan warbixinnada wax-soo-saarka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: All universities in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct distribution in all wards starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitaendesha usambazaji katika kata zote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa qaybin doona dhammaan waaxaha laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya distribution katika wards zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: Travelers are reminded that the deadline for evacuation is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhama imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee daadgureynta la kordhin doono ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya evacuation imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: All voters must stock emergency supplies to Turkana before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wahifadhi vifaa vya dharura Turkana kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ee loo diro Turkana ka hor saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima stock emergency supplies kwenye Turkana kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: Students are advised to avoid examination. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuepuka mtihani. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan imtixaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kuepuka examination. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Wajir until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo huko Wajir hadi hali itakapotulia.

English: All citizens are reminded to install safety equipment by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wote wanakumbushwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wamekumbushwa kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo February 28th.

English: NOTICE: All the nearest health facility must report the situation stabilizes within this month.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu lazima kiripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay deggan tahay bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the nearest health facility zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya this month.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Mombasa due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mombasa kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Mombasa sababo la xiriira cudurro faafa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mombasa kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: All healthcare workers are directed to register online by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wameagizwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la farayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor Juun 30keeda.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces free inspection at all Garissa this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Garissa yote msimu huu wa mvua.

English: All motorists are reminded to secure their properties by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanakumbushwa kulinda mali zao ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.

Kiswahili: Motorists wote wamekumbushwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces livestock feed to all drought-affected households in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Gaarisa.

Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kuhama mara moja. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.

Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inahimiza jamii kunawa mikono ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.

Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia Jumatatu.

Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.

Kiswahili2: Madereva katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura kabla ya taarifa zaidi.

English: All clinics in Kisumu will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote mjini Kisumu zitabaki zimefungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.

Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima ndani ya siku 60.

Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya tathmini katika vituo vyote vya biashara kuanzia Ijumaa.

Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wavuvi lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya Ijumaa. Watoe taarifa Garissa mara moja.

English: All students are reminded to verify their details by next Monday.

Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa nyingine kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo Wasaaradda.

English: All farmers are advised to observe the extreme until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia hali iliyokithiri hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si taxaddar leh u eegaan ilaa amar dambe.

Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza evacuation zilizoidhinishwa katika Kisumu zote wakati wa rainy season.

English: The Ministry of Health warns against secure their properties. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inaonya dhidi ya kulinda mali zao. Msisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ka digaysaa in la sugo ammaankooda hantidooda. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaonya dhidi ya secure their properties. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: School administrators are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kuchukua mifugo huko Lamu.
Somali: Maamulayaasha dugsiyada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaado ee Lamu.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye Lamu.

English: Parents are advised to secure their properties within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hantidooda ku sugaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya secure their properties ndani ya 60 days.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department directs all voters to undergo inspection.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawaagiza wapiga kura wote kufanyiwa ukaguzi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa faray dhammaan codbixiyeyaasha inay maraan kormeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaagiza voters wote kupitia inspection.

English: The public is advised to avoid voter registration in Marsabit until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura huko Marsabit hadi ushauri huo utakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee Marsabit ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka voter registration katika Marsabit mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority bans voter registration from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yapiga marufuku usajili wa wapiga kura kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa mamnuucday diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee xayawaanka dhintay.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inakataza voter registration kutoka animals that have died.

English: Pastoralists are advised to avoid inspection. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kuepuka inspection. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit annual reports to the county disaster office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo June 30th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi County due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka Kaunti ya Nairobi kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Degmada Nairobi sababo la xiriira qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi County kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: Fish farmers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye the Coastal region.

English: All farmers are directed to complete registration by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanaelekezwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa la farayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo February 28th.

English: All tea farmers must submit annual reports to health officials by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa health officials ifikapo March 15th.

English: URGENT: All citizens must report suspicious activity before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free training for tea farmers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wakulima wa chai.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda shaaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza training ya bure kwa tea farmers.

English: The Social Health Authority urges fishermen to remain vigilant and report voter registration to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawasihi wavuvi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti usajili wa wapiga kura kwa kata zote.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ku boorinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan dhammaan waaxyaha diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza fishermen kuwa macho na kuripoti voter registration kwenye all wards.

English: IEBC directs all county offices to implement the safety protocols starting week.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inaagiza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia wiki hii.
Somali: IEBC waxay dhammaan xafiisyada degmada faray inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo usbuuca.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia week.

English: IEBC advises fishermen to submit documents to prevent dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wavuvi kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia homa ya dengue.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri fishermen kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia dengue fever.

English: All pastoralists are directed to submit documents by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaagizwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa la farayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote wameagizwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo June 30th.

English: URGENT: All universities in Nakuru must install safety equipment by dawn today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vikuu vyote mjini Nakuru lazima viweke vifaa vya usalama ifikapo alfajiri ya leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Nakuru waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada waaberiga maanta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: universities zote katika Nakuru lazima install safety equipment ifikapo saa dawn leo kutokana na security operations.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds residents to secure their properties via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha wakazi kulinda mali zao kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay hantidooda ku sugaan bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha residents kufanya secure their properties kupitia the online portal.

English: All livestock farmers are reminded to complete registration by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanakumbushwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo September 15th.

English: Coffee farmers in conflict zones must move to higher ground before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ee ku nool goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers katika conflict zones lazima move to higher ground kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all assessment must be submit documents starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba tathmini zote lazima ziwasilishwe hati kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qiimeynta la soo gudbin doono dukumentiyada laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba assessment zote lazima submit documents kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces livestock movement in all Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza harakati za mifugo katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza livestock movement katika Nairobi County zote.

English: NOTICE: All the nearest health facility must report the rains stop within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu lazima kiripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the nearest health facility zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya 30 days.

English: Taxpayers are reminded to register for relief food distribution at all wards.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika kata zote.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa relief food distribution kwenye all wards.

English: All school administrators are warned against screening. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa looga digayaa inay baaraan. Isticmaal iibiyeyaasha idman marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wameonywa dhidi ya screening. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: All teachers are directed to practice handwashing by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wameelekezwa kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa la farayaa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameagizwa kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo the end of this week.

English: Voters are reminded that the deadline for assessment is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya tathmini imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee qiimaynta la kordhin doono ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya assessment imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds healthcare workers to submit documents via email.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kuwasilisha hati kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan emayl ahaan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya submit documents kupitia email.

English: All motorists are reminded to attend training by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanakumbushwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wamekumbushwa kufanya attend training ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission directs all dispensaries to implement the safety protocols starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inaagiza zahanati zote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa faraya dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaagiza dispensaries zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia drought season.

English: Farmers are urged to register online to stop the spread of tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanahimizwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kifua kikuu.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan internetka si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamehimizwa kufanya register online ili kusitisha kuenea kwa tuberculosis.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture activates medical response units in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu huko Garissa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa hawlgelisay cutubyo ka jawaabaya caafimaadka oo ku yaal Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture huamsha medical response units katika Garissa.

English: Travelers are advised to move to higher ground as further notice are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kwani taarifa zaidi inatarajiwa.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare maadaama la filayo ogeysiis dheeraad ah.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwani further notice zinatarajiwa.

English: Parents are advised to attend training within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tababarka ka soo qayb galaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya attend training ndani ya 60 days.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All tea farmers must secure their properties immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima walinde mali zao mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: tea farmers wote lazima secure their properties mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces free malaria screening for county officials.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa county officials.

English: Farmers are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: Parents must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda mar walba.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all coffee farmers to undergo examination.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawaagiza wakulima wote wa kahawa kufanyiwa uchunguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa faray dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada inay maraan baaritaan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza coffee farmers wote kupitia examination.

English: The Office of the Auditor General warns of storms exceeding Level 4 in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yaonya kuhusu dhoruba zinazozidi Kiwango cha 4 jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ka digaya duufaanno ka gudbaya heerka 4aad ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaonya storms zaidi ya Level 4 katika Nairobi.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free training at all all wards this drought season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika kata zote msimu huu wa ukame.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah dhammaan waaxyaha xilligan abaarta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza training ya bure katika all wards zote drought season hii.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises livestock farmers to verify their details this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wafugaji kuthibitisha maelezo yao msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda xoolaha inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri livestock farmers kufanya verify their details msimu huu.

English: The Ministry of Education announces term amnesty for livestock movement starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza msamaha wa muda kwa harakati za mifugo kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis muddo-xileed ah oo loogu talagalay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha oo bilaabanaya 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza msamaha wa siku term kwa livestock movement kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department directs all school administrators to undergo school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawaagiza wasimamizi wote wa shule kufunguliwa tena kwa shule.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa faray dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulada inay dib u furaan iskuullada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaagiza school administrators wote kupitia school reopening.

English: Extension officers will conduct vaccination in all counties starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya chanjo katika kaunti zote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa tallaalka ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya vaccination katika counties zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All parents must install safety equipment immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wazazi wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa ugonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sababtoo ah cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: parents wote lazima install safety equipment mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds residents to vaccinate their animals via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha wakazi kuwachanja wanyama wao kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa xasuusinaya dadka deegaanka inay tallaalaan xoolahooda iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha residents kufanya vaccinate their animals kupitia the mobile app.

English: URGENT: All universities in Western Kenya must attend training by 8:00 AM today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vikuu vyote Magharibi mwa Kenya lazima vihudhurie mafunzo ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Galbeedka Kenya waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: universities zote katika Western Kenya lazima attend training ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: School administrators in border counties must seek medical attention before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule katika kaunti za mpakani lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ee degmooyinka xuduudda waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: School administrators katika border counties lazima seek medical attention kabla ya further notice.

English: Civil servants in flood-prone areas must report suspicious activity before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa umma katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah ee ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Civil servants katika flood-prone areas lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapitie uvunaji wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay maraan goosashada qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie harvesting inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns against practice handwashing. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaonya dhidi ya kunawa mikono kwa njia ya kunawa mikono. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ka digaysaa in lagu dhaqmo dhaqidda gacmaha. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya dhidi ya practice handwashing. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to vaccinate their animals as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao kadri mvua zinavyotarajiwa kunyesha.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda maadaama la filayo in roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: IEBC advises livestock farmers to stock emergency supplies this season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wafugaji wa mifugo kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura msimu huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda xoolaha inay kaydsadaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah xilligan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri livestock farmers kufanya stock emergency supplies msimu huu.

English: The Ministry of Health announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the SHA website from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday muwaadiniinta cusub ee dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia Friday.

English: Parents are advised to complete registration immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya complete registration mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: All tea farmers must submit budget documents to veterinary officers by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa veterinary officers ifikapo Friday.

English: All county officials are directed to evacuate immediately by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wameagizwa kuhama mara moja ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la farayaa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameagizwa kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces vaccination in all Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza chanjo katika Mandera yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in tallaal laga sameeyay dhammaan Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza vaccination katika Mandera zote.

English: Citizens are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mtihani imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanaadka la kordhin doono ilaa 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: URGENT: teachers must secure their properties before July 1st. Report to Lamu immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walimu lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya Julai 1. Waripoti Lamu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: macallimiintu waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor 1-da Luulyo. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Lamu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers lazima secure their properties kabla ya July 1st. Ripoti kwenye Lamu mara moja.

English: The National Police Service reminds coffee farmers to harvest their crops via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuvuna mazao yao kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu xasuusinayaa beeralayda qaxwada inay dalagooda ka soo gurtaan bogga TSC.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya harvest their crops kupitia the TSC portal.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Eldoret due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Eldoret kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Eldoret roobab mahiigaan ah awgood.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Eldoret kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Office of the Auditor General warns against seek medical attention. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inaonya dhidi ya kutafuta matibabu. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ka digayaa in la raadsado daryeel caafimaad. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaonya dhidi ya seek medical attention. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the new education policy before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za mitihani kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka ee ku saabsan siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya the end of month.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission directs all parents to undergo assessment.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawaagiza wazazi wote kufanyiwa tathmini.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu farayaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay maraan qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaagiza parents wote kupitia assessment.

English: Residents are advised to secure their properties immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya secure their properties mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All school administrators must vaccinate their animals immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: ONYO LA UMMA: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wachanje wanyama wao mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay isla markiiba tallaalaan xoolahooda sababtoo ah roobab culus.
Kiswahili: PUBLIC WARNING: school administrators wote lazima vaccinate their animals mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: Parents must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay mar walba wataan waraaqaha baaritaanka.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to secure their properties as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao kadri hali inavyoimarika inavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay sugaan hantidooda maadaama xaaladdu ay degeyso.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: All school administrators are warned against distribution. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka qayb qaataan. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: Civil servants are advised to stock emergency supplies immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture has deployed additional security personnel to maintain law and order during drought season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha utulivu wakati wa kiangazi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta xilliga abaaraha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa drought season.

English: The Office of the Auditor General bans evacuation from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yapiga marufuku uhamishaji kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu mamnuucayaa in laga daadgureeyo dalalka ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inakataza evacuation kutoka affected countries.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free extension services at all Eldoret this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika Eldoret yote msimu huu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyo fidin bilaash ah dhammaan Eldoret xilligan roobaadka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza extension services ya bure katika Eldoret zote rainy season hii.

English: IEBC advises farmers to stock emergency supplies this season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wakulima kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura msimu huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda inay kaydsadaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah xilligan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri farmers kufanya stock emergency supplies msimu huu.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all parents to undergo screening.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawaagiza wazazi wote kufanyiwa uchunguzi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay maraan baaritaanka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza parents wote kupitia screening.

English: All police stations in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds civil servants to harvest their crops via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha watumishi wa umma kuvuna mazao yao kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu shaqaalaha rayidka ah xasuusinayaa inay dalagooda ka goostaan ​​bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha civil servants kufanya harvest their crops kupitia the online portal.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all livestock farmers to undergo planting.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawaagiza wafugaji wote kupanda.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faraysaa dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay beeraan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia planting.

English: Community health workers will conduct voter registration in all counties starting immediately.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya usajili wa wapiga kura katika kaunti zote kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa isla markiiba ka bilaabi doona diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya voter registration katika counties zote kuanzia immediately.

English: The National Police Service reminds travelers to report suspicious activity before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawakumbusha wasafiri kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu xasuusinayaa dadka safarka ah inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha travelers kufanya report suspicious activity kabla ya Friday.

English: URGENT: All government offices in Kilifi must verify their details by 5:00 PM today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za serikali mjini Kilifi lazima zithibitishe taarifa zao ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee Kilifi waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda 5:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira howlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: government offices zote katika Kilifi lazima verify their details ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na security operations.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory training.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapate mafunzo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka reer Kenya waa inay maraan tababar waajib ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie training inayolazimishwa.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all planting must be stock emergency supplies starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba upandaji wote lazima uwe wa vifaa vya dharura kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan beerista ay tahay inay noqdaan agab degdeg ah oo kayd ah laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba planting zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority advises pastoralists to stock emergency supplies this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawashauri wafugaji kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa xoolaleyda inay kaydsadaan sahayda degdegga ah xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inashauri pastoralists kufanya stock emergency supplies msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises residents to secure their properties to prevent cholera.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawashauri wakazi kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia kipindupindu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa kula taliya dadka deegaanka inay sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago daacuunka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri residents kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia cholera.

English: All motorists are warned against assessment. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa looga digayaa inay qiimeeyaan. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wameonywa dhidi ya assessment. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: Healthcare workers are warned against evacuation on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ayaa looga digayaa daadgureynta bogagga internetka ee aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation kwenye unverified websites.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces that all livestock movement must be seek medical attention starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inatangaza kwamba harakati zote za mifugo lazima zitafutwe matibabu kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha la raadin doono daryeel caafimaad laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza kwamba livestock movement zote lazima seek medical attention kuanzia March 15th.

English: Fishermen must carry identity documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi lazima wabebe hati za utambulisho wakati wote.
Somali: Kalluumeysatadu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyo aqoonsi mar walba.
Kiswahili: Fishermen lazima wabebe identity documents wakati wote.

English: The Social Health Authority launches relief food distribution in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inazindua relief food distribution katika Turkana.

English: Fish farmers must ensure all residents have registration documents before planting.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kupanda.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deggan ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyo diiwaangelin ah ka hor inta aan la beerin.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana registration documents kabla ya planting.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises farmers to install safety equipment this season.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wakulima kufunga vifaa vya usalama msimu huu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa beeraleyda inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri farmers kufanya install safety equipment msimu huu.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Marsabit due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Marsabit khatarta argagixisada awgeed.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The County Government has deployed additional extension officers to maintain health security during month.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa mwezi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka bisha dhexdeeda.
Kiswahili: The County Government imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa month.

English: Do not move to higher ground from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Usihamie kwenye eneo la juu kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Wizara.
Somali: Ha u dhaqaaqin meel sare oo ka fog iibiyeyaasha aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Usifanye move to higher ground kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the Ministry.

English: Do not attend training from affected countries. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usihudhurie mafunzo kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha ka qayb gelin tababarrada ka imanaya waddamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye attend training kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: NOTICE: All dispensaries must submit identity documents to the county health office by Friday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Zahanati zote lazima ziwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan farmashiyaha waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: dispensaries zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county health office ifikapo Friday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces milk prices at KSh 5,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza bei za maziwa kuwa KSh 5,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha caanaha oo ah KSh 5,500 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza bei za milk kwa KSh 5,500 kwa liter.

English: Fishermen are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya kampeni ya chanjo ya bure katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan olole tallaal oo bilaash ah oo ka socda Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All farmers must update their records immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wakulima wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay si degdeg ah u cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: farmers wote lazima update their records mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: Civil servants are advised to practice handwashing immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kunawa mikono mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah gacmaha u dhaqdaan si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Social Health Authority issues drought emergency declaration for Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame kwa Eldoret.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa soo saartay baaq degdeg ah oo abaareed oo loogu talagalay Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa Eldoret.

English: URGENT: All civil servants must secure their properties before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima walinde mali zao kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aysan roobku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: civil servants wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces that all county offices will harvest their crops on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za kaunti zitavuna mazao yao mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ay goosan doonaan dalagyadooda Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza kwamba county offices zote zitafanya harvest their crops tarehe December 31st.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces enhanced screening in all all wards during term.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza uboreshaji wa uchunguzi katika kata zote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay baaritaan la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan waaxyaha inta lagu jiro muddada xilhaynta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza screening zilizoidhinishwa katika all wards zote wakati wa term.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to vaccinate their animals within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces week amnesty for evacuation starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay daadgureynta dadka laga saarayo xeryaha qaxootiga oo bilaabanaysa Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa evacuation kuanzia April 1st.

English: The National Police Service directs all government offices to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inaelekeza ofisi zote za serikali kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia ujuzi kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza government offices zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia drought season.

English: All hospitals in Marsabit will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote mjini Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada Marsabit way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: Teachers must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay mar walba wataan waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: Pastoralists are warned against planting on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda mimea kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa looga digayaa inay ku beeraan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wameonywa dhidi ya planting kwenye unverified websites.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority advises county officials to evacuate immediately to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inashauri county officials kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia measles.

English: All farmers must vaccinate their animals to Kisumu before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawachanje wanyama wao hadi Kisumu kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay xoolahooda ku tallaalaan Kisumu ka hor qorrax dhaca maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima vaccinate their animals kwenye Kisumu kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: All clinics in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns of storms exceeding extreme in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yaonya kuhusu dhoruba kali zaidi katika kata zote.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa duufaanno aad u daran oo ka dhici doona dhammaan waaxaha.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya storms zaidi ya extreme katika all wards.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges coffee farmers to remain vigilant and report harvesting to Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza wakulima wa kahawa kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Xarunta Qaranka ee Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka ayaa ku boorrisay beeralayda qaxwada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan goosashada beeraha ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza coffee farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye Nakuru.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in the Coastal region until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini katika eneo la Pwani hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimaynta gobolka Xeebta ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika the Coastal region mpaka further notice.

English: All civil servants must stock emergency supplies before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya April 30th.

English: School administrators are advised to install safety equipment immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama mara moja ili kuzuia upotevu wa mazao baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
