Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: All farmers must submit budget documents to health officials by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Farmers zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa health officials ifikapo the end of month.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit tax returns to the county health office by Friday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe tax returns kwenye the county health office ifikapo Friday.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Nairobi must submit documents by noon today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote jijini Nairobi lazima ziwasilishe hati ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan farmashiyaha Nairobi waa inay maanta soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Nairobi lazima submit documents ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: URGENT: All county offices in Nakuru must report suspicious activity by 6:00 PM today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti mjini Nakuru lazima ziripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo saa 6:00 jioni leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada Nakuru waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo 6:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika Nakuru lazima report suspicious activity ifikapo saa 6:00 PM leo kutokana na security operations.

English: Community health workers will conduct planting in all villages starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya upandaji miti katika vijiji vyote kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa beerista ka sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya planting katika villages zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain law and order during week.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya imetuma timu za ziada za kukabiliana na maafa ili kudumisha sheria na utulivu wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa hawlgalisay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa week.

English: Healthcare workers are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kichocho.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka bilharzia.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa bilharzia.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission launches early warning system in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yazindua mfumo wa tahadhari mapema katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa bilaabay nidaam digniin hore ah oo ka socda Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inazindua early warning system katika the Rift Valley.

English: The National Police Service urges all students to attend training by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawahimiza wanafunzi wote kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan ardayda inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza students wote kufanya attend training ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: Voters in border counties must submit documents before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wawasilishe hati kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha gobollada xuduudda ku yaal waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Voters katika border counties lazima submit documents kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: All teachers must submit annual reports to county officials by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Teachers zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa county officials ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges all school administrators to attend training by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wasimamizi wote wa shule kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza school administrators wote kufanya attend training ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory screening.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie screening inayolazimishwa.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces training in all Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza mafunzo katika Mombasa nzima.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay tababar ka socda dhammaan Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza training katika Mombasa zote.

English: Travelers are advised to stock emergency supplies within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya 30 days.

English: All voters are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Voters wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in Kisumu until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uvunaji huko Kisumu hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada Kisumu ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka harvesting katika Kisumu mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces clean water to all displaced families in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza maji safi kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza clean water kwa displaced families wote katika the Coastal region.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department directs all livestock farmers to undergo evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawaagiza wafugaji wote kuhamishwa.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay faray dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay maraan daadgureyn.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia evacuation.

English: The Social Health Authority announces enhanced inspection in all Lamu during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika Lamu yote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer la xoojiyay oo ka socda dhammaan Lamu inta lagu jiro muddada waxbarashada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika Lamu zote wakati wa term.

English: Civil servants must ensure all all Kenyans have valid medical insurance before planting.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa umma lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kupanda.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​caymis caafimaad oo sax ah ka hor inta aysan beerin.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya planting.

English: Pastoralists are advised to move to higher ground within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan dhul sare 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda gudahood.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The public is advised to harvest their crops for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si ay u helaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo adag.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: Students are urged to complete registration to stop the spread of meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanahimizwa kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: Students wamehimizwa kufanya complete registration ili kusitisha kuenea kwa meningitis.

English: All voters are warned against planting. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa looga digayaa inay beeraan. Isticmaal iibiyeyaasha la oggol yahay marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wameonywa dhidi ya planting. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: All school administrators must submit registration forms to the police by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa polisi ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay booliska u soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the police ifikapo next Monday.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed health regulations before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya next Monday.

English: All tea farmers must submit documents before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima submit documents kabla ya September 15th.

English: All pastoralists are advised to observe the 50mm in 24 hours until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanashauriwa kuchunguza 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay 50mm ku ilaaliyaan 24 saacadood gudahood ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote washauriwa kuzingatia 50mm in 24 hours hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All farmers are directed to seek medical attention by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wameagizwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa la farayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo Friday.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all health facilities will boil drinking water on April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitachemsha maji ya kunywa tarehe 1 Aprili.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay karkarin doonaan biyaha la cabbo 1-da Abriil.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya boil drinking water tarehe April 1st.

English: Fish farmers are advised to evacuate immediately as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: All fishermen are warned against planting. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa inay beeraan. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameonywa dhidi ya planting. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the new education policy before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya January 8th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all hospitals to implement the digital literacy program starting semester.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaagiza hospitali zote kutekeleza mpango wa uandishi wa kidijitali kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay faray dhammaan isbitaallada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka qorista iyo qorista dijitaalka ah ee bilawga simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza hospitals zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia semester.

English: Security personnel will conduct livestock movement in all regions starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama wataendesha harakati za mifugo katika maeneo yote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa dhaqdhaqa xoolaha ka sameyn doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya livestock movement katika regions zote kuanzia next week.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds teachers to install safety equipment via email.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha walimu kufunga vifaa vya usalama kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa macallimiinta inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan emayl ahaan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha teachers kufanya install safety equipment kupitia email.

English: URGENT: school administrators must complete registration before December 31st. Report to all wards immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Desemba 31. Watoe taarifa kwa wadi zote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor Diseembar 31. Isla markiiba soo wargeli dhammaan waaxaha.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: school administrators lazima complete registration kabla ya December 31st. Ripoti kwenye all wards mara moja.

English: The County Government advises taxpayers to submit documents this season.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri walipa kodi kuwasilisha hati msimu huu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri taxpayers kufanya submit documents msimu huu.

English: The County Government announces relief food distribution to all flood victims in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qaybin cunto gargaar ah oo loo sameeyay dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza relief food distribution kwa flood victims wote katika the police station.

English: The County Government has deployed additional extension officers to maintain law and order during drought season.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha utulivu wakati wa kiangazi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay geysay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta xilliga abaaraha.
Kiswahili: The County Government imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa drought season.

English: The public is advised to submit documents for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwasilisha hati za dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo muujinaya calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya submit documents kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: The County Government reminds motorists to boil drinking water via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawakumbusha madereva kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay xasuusinaysaa darawallada inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawakumbusha motorists kufanya boil drinking water kupitia the mobile app.

English: Motorists are advised to stock emergency supplies within this week.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya this week.

English: Residents are warned against harvesting on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wameonywa dhidi ya kuvuna kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka goostaan ​​​​goosashada mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Residents wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting kwenye unverified websites.

English: The public is invited to submit annual reports on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha ripoti za kila mwaka kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinno sannadeed oo ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha annual reports kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya the end of month.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Raia kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta cusub ee dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan barnaamijka e-Citizen isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia immediately.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free training for parents.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wazazi.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay waalidiinta.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza training ya bure kwa parents.

English: All pastoralists are advised to observe the extreme until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia hali iliyokithiri hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xad-dhaafka ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote washauriwa kuzingatia extreme hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Kenya Red Cross reminds motorists to boil drinking water before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawakumbusha madereva kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay xasuusineysaa darawallada inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawakumbusha motorists kufanya boil drinking water kabla ya next Monday.

English: Extension officers will conduct inspection in all sub-counties starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya ukaguzi katika kaunti ndogo zote kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Saraakiisha kordhinta ayaa kormeer ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka hoose laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya inspection katika sub-counties zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service bans screening from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya imepiga marufuku uchunguzi wa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucday baaritaanka xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inakataza screening kutoka animals that have died.

English: Community health workers will conduct examination in all counties starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya uchunguzi katika kaunti zote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa baaritaan ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya examination katika counties zote kuanzia Friday.

English: Motorists are advised to report suspicious activity immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: Citizens must carry annual reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wabebe ripoti za mwaka wakati wote.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay sitaan warbixinno sannadeed mar walba.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wabebe annual reports wakati wote.

English: NOTICE: All the Coastal region must report security clearance is obtained within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Eneo lote la Pwani lazima liripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan gobolka Xeebta waa inay soo sheegaan in la helay ogolaansho amni 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Coastal region zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free malaria screening at all Nakuru this week.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika Nakuru nzima wiki hii.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa toddobaadkan ku dhawaaqay baaritaan bilaash ah oo ku saabsan duumada oo laga sameeyo dhammaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika Nakuru zote week hii.

English: Citizens are advised to complete registration within this week.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kufanya complete registration ndani ya this week.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises healthcare workers to harvest their crops this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wafanyakazi wa afya kuvuna mazao yao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talisa shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri healthcare workers kufanya harvest their crops msimu huu.

English: All tea farmers are warned against assessment. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa looga digayaa qiimeynta. Isticmaal ilo biyo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya assessment. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service urges all pastoralists to harvest their crops by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inawahimiza wafugaji wote kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawahimiza pastoralists wote kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo saa noon kila siku.

English: Do not seek medical attention from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usitafute huduma ya matibabu kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka raadin daryeel caafimaad ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye seek medical attention kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: All motorists must submit identity documents to the National Disaster Operations Centre by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Motorists zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces enhanced voter registration in all Turkana during semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza usajili ulioimarishwa wa wapiga kura katika Waturkana wote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee dhammaan Turkana inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza voter registration zilizoidhinishwa katika Turkana zote wakati wa semester.

English: The public is advised to verify their details for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si loo ogaado calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya verify their details kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory assessment.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upitie tathmini ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan qiimeyn khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie assessment inayolazimishwa.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Rift Valley due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Bonde la Ufa kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Dooxada Rift-ka sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the Rift Valley kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The public is advised to report suspicious activity for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo oo ku saabsan calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department has deployed additional officers to maintain food security during term.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya imetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa chakula wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ciidamo dheeraad ah geysay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga cuntada inta lagu jiro muddada xilhaynta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha food security wakati wa term.

English: Community health workers will conduct distribution in all trading centers starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii wataendesha usambazaji katika vituo vyote vya biashara kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa qaybin doona dhammaan xarumaha ganacsiga laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya distribution katika trading centers zote kuanzia Friday.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission directs all parents to undergo school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawaagiza wazazi wote kufungua shule.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa faraya dhammaan waalidiinta inay dib u furaan iskuullada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaagiza parents wote kupitia school reopening.

English: Citizens are warned against screening on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Raia wameonywa dhidi ya kuonyeshwa kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan baraha bulshada ee WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Citizens wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces tea prices at KSh 4,000 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza bei ya chai kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha oo ah KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 90kg bag.

English: Do not avoid unnecessary travel from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Usiepuke kusafiri bila lazima kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha ka fogaan safar aan loo baahnayn oo ka yimaada ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye avoid unnecessary travel kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: Parents are advised to avoid inspection. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mtihani.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kuepuka inspection. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: Residents in landslide-prone areas must avoid unnecessary travel before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Dadka degan meelaha ay dhul-go'u u nugul yihiin waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Residents katika landslide-prone areas lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: All taxpayers must submit examination papers to the police by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani polisi ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan booliiska kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers zote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa the police ifikapo January 8th.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to complete registration within this week.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kufanya complete registration ndani ya this week.

English: All teachers are advised to observe the severe until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia kali hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay fiiro gaar ah u yeeshaan xaaladdan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote washauriwa kuzingatia severe hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces semester amnesty for planting starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa ajili ya upandaji kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay beerista beeraha oo bilaabanaysa 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa planting kuanzia August 1st.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free vaccination for teachers.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa walimu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay macallimiinta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa teachers.

English: The Social Health Authority warns of heavy rainfall exceeding severe in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi kuwa kali huko Nakuru.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa roobab xooggan oo aad u daran oo ka da'aya Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya severe katika Nakuru.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All farmers must update their records immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: ONYO KWA UMMA: Wakulima wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan beeralayda waa inay si degdeg ah u cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda sababtoo ah roobab culus.
Kiswahili: PUBLIC WARNING: farmers wote lazima update their records mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Ministry of Education urges all civil servants to stock emergency supplies by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawahimiza watumishi wote wa umma kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza civil servants wote kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: URGENT: travelers must update their records before July 1st. Report to Kilifi immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wasafiri lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Julai 1. Toa taarifa Kilifi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: dadka safarka ah waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor Luulyo 1. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Kilifi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers lazima update their records kabla ya July 1st. Ripoti kwenye Kilifi mara moja.

English: NOTICE: All Eldoret must report the situation stabilizes within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Eldoret wote lazima waripoti hali hiyo ikiwa imetulia ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Eldoret waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladda oo deggan sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Eldoret zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces wheat prices at KSh 1,700 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza bei ya ngano kuwa KSh 1,700 kwa tani.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha sarreenka KSh 1,700 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 1,700 kwa ton.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises residents to complete registration this season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri wakazi kukamilisha usajili msimu huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri residents kufanya complete registration msimu huu.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces enhanced vaccination in all Wajir during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza chanjo iliyoimarishwa katika Wajir yote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay Wajeer oo dhan xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza vaccination zilizoidhinishwa katika Wajir zote wakati wa festive season.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges communities to vaccinate their animals to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inahimiza jamii kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission activates medical response units in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaanzisha vitengo vya kukabiliana na matatizo ya kimatibabu huko Nakuru.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa hawlgeliya cutubyo ka jawaab celinta caafimaadka ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission huamsha medical response units katika Nakuru.

English: The Ministry of Health activates security patrols in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Mandera.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgelisay roondooyin amni oo ka dhacay Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha security patrols katika Mandera.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre directs all colleges to implement the safety protocols starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Uendeshaji wa Maafa kinaagiza vyuo vyote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay farasaa dhammaan kulliyadaha inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaagiza colleges zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia drought season.

English: Do not submit documents from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyo ka yimid iibiyayaal aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to harvest their crops within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops ndani ya 90 days.

English: Travelers are advised to seek medical attention immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: Healthcare workers must ensure all all Kenyans have vaccination certificates before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wahakikishe Wakenya wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya vaccination.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the proposed health regulations before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za uchunguzi kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warqadaha baaritaanka ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya September 15th.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit tax returns to the county disaster office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe tax returns kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo December 31st.

English: The public is advised to update their records for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya update their records kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: The Office of the Auditor General issues health advisory for the police station.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali hutoa ushauri wa afya kwa kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu soo saaraa la-talin caafimaad oo loogu talagalay saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatoa health advisory kwa the police station.

English: Residents are urged to boil drinking water to stop the spread of HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanahimizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia kuenea kwa VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka ayaa lagu booriyay inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: Residents wamehimizwa kufanya boil drinking water ili kusitisha kuenea kwa HIV/AIDS.

English: All livestock farmers are warned against assessment. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa looga digayaa qiimeynta. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya assessment. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: Tea farmers are advised to vaccinate their animals within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xoolahooda tallaalaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free training for tea farmers.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wakulima wa chai.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda shaaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza training ya bure kwa tea farmers.

English: Students are advised to evacuate immediately within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately ndani ya this month.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all healthcare workers to undergo voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawaagiza wafanyakazi wote wa afya kusajiliwa kama wapiga kura.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay faray dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay maraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza healthcare workers wote kupitia voter registration.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi County due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka Kaunti ya Nairobi kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Degmada Nairobi sababo la xiriira cudurro faafa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi County kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces free registration at all Nakuru this month.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza usajili wa bure katika Nakuru yote mwezi huu.
Somali: Bishan gudaheeda, Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in isdiiwaangelin bilaash ah laga sameyn doono dhammaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza registration ya bure katika Nakuru zote month hii.

English: Parents in border counties must vaccinate their animals before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wawachanje wanyama wao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool gobollada xuduudda waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Parents katika border counties lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional extension officers to maintain disaster preparedness during week.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha maandalizi ya maafa wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa shaqaaleysiisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa week.

English: URGENT: All county officials must report suspicious activity before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials wote lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to boil drinking water to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: Coffee farmers are warned against training on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanaonywa dhidi ya mafunzo kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa looga digayaa inay tababar ku qaataan kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wameonywa dhidi ya training kwenye unofficial channels.

English: Extension officers will conduct evacuation in all regions starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya uokoaji katika maeneo yote kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa ka sameyn doona daadgureyn dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya evacuation katika regions zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the county education office due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow xafiiska waxbarashada degmada sababtoo ah roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the county education office kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns against move to higher ground. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaonya dhidi ya kuhamia maeneo ya juu. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ka digaysaa in loo guuro meelaha sare. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya dhidi ya move to higher ground. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: All livestock farmers must move to higher ground to all wards before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu hadi kata zote kabla ya saa 5:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay u guuraan dhul sare oo dhan oo ay ku nastaan ​​​​dhammaan waaxyaha ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye all wards kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: The public is advised to avoid voter registration in Garissa until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura huko Garissa hadi ushauri huo utakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee Garissa ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka voter registration katika Garissa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all farmers to undergo distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawaagiza wakulima wote kusambaza.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faraysaa dhammaan beeralayda inay maraan qaybinta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza farmers wote kupitia distribution.

English: All residents are reminded to boil drinking water by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanakumbushwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka la gaaro Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo December 31st.

English: All teachers must submit production reports to the National Disaster Operations Centre by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Teachers zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo next Monday.

English: All county officials are reminded to boil drinking water by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka la gaaro Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wamekumbushwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo April 30th.

English: All motorists are directed to evacuate immediately by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wameagizwa kuondoka mara moja ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa la farayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wameagizwa kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All voters must update their records before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyayaashu waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima update their records kabla ya April 30th.

English: IEBC advises county officials to report suspicious activity this season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka msimu huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo xilligan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri county officials kufanya report suspicious activity msimu huu.

English: Pastoralists must ensure all all Kenyans have national identity cards before distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya kusambazwa.
Somali: Xoolo-dhaqatadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la qaybin.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana national identity cards kabla ya distribution.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces cash transfers to all vulnerable populations in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza uhamishaji wa pesa taslimu kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu huko Turkana.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay lacago xawilaad ah oo loo dirayo dhammaan dadka nugul ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza cash transfers kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Turkana.

English: The National Police Service announces voter registration in all Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza usajili wa wapiga kura katika Kilifi nzima.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee dhammaan Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza voter registration katika Kilifi zote.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to avoid distribution. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugaysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kuepuka distribution. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds healthcare workers to seek medical attention before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kutafuta matibabu kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay xasuusineysaa shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya seek medical attention kabla ya next Monday.

English: Do not update their records from animals that have died. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usisasishe rekodi zao kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha cusbooneysiin diiwaankooda xoolaha dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye update their records kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns against register online. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya dhidi ya kujisajili mtandaoni. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya in la iska diiwaan geliyo khadka internetka. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya dhidi ya register online. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: All universities in Marsabit will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote huko Marsabit vitabaki kufungwa hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Marsabit way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The County Government warns of heat waves exceeding 60km/h in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Garissa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka ayaa ka digaysa kulaylka ka badan 60km/saacaddii Gaarisa.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya heat waves zaidi ya 60km/h katika Garissa.

English: The National Police Service announces that all school reopening must be complete registration starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inatangaza kwamba kufunguliwa tena kwa shule zote lazima kuwe na usajili kamili kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan dib u furista iskuullada ay tahay inay si dhammaystiran u diiwaan gashanaadaan laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza kwamba school reopening zote lazima complete registration kuanzia September 15th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain electoral integrity during election period.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu imetuma timu zaidi za kukabiliana na majanga ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa geeyay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa election period.

English: Do not secure their properties from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usiwawekee dhamana wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa katika mali zao. Waripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha ka ilaalin hantidooda iibiyeyaasha aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye secure their properties kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: The Ministry of Health has deployed additional security personnel to maintain electoral integrity during term.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya imetuma maafisa wa usalama zaidi ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa shaqaalo amni oo dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro muddada xil haynta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa term.

English: Parents must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay mar walba wataan foomamka diiwaangelinta.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: All county officials are warned against harvesting. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanaonywa dhidi ya uvunaji. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima uvune kwa lazima.
Somali: Dadweynaha oo dhan waa inay maraan goosashada qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie harvesting inayolazimishwa.

English: All farmers must submit registration forms to veterinary officers by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa veterinary officers ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service urges all voters to evacuate immediately by 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inawahimiza wapiga kura wote kuhama mara moja ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan guryahooda 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawahimiza voters wote kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Health advises students to update their records this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wanafunzi kusasisha rekodi zao msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay kula talinaysaa ardayda inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri students kufanya update their records msimu huu.

English: Taxpayers are advised to report suspicious activity immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces examination in all Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza uchunguzi katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday imtixaan laga qaadayo dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza examination katika Nairobi County zote.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service bans vaccination from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yapiga marufuku chanjo dhidi ya maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucay tallaalka ka yimaada daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inakataza vaccination kutoka floodwaters.

English: Tea farmers must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wawe na kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay haystaan ​​​​diiwaannada caafimaadka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns of strong winds exceeding Level 4 in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya kuhusu upepo mkali unaozidi Kiwango cha 4 mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya dabeylo xooggan oo ka gudbaya heerka 4aad ee Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya strong winds zaidi ya Level 4 katika Mombasa.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds students to verify their details via the IEBC website.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wanafunzi kuthibitisha maelezo yao kupitia tovuti ya IEBC.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay xasuusinaysaa ardayda inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda iyagoo adeegsanaya mareegaha IEBC.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha students kufanya verify their details kupitia the IEBC website.

English: Fishermen are urged to stock emergency supplies to stop the spread of meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanahimizwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada ayaa lagu booriyay inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamehimizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kusitisha kuenea kwa meningitis.

English: All civil servants are directed to install safety equipment by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wameagizwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la farayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada kahor 8-da Janaayo.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wameagizwa kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo January 8th.

English: All livestock farmers are advised to observe the severe until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia kali hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay fiiro gaar ah u yeeshaan xaaladdan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia severe hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces livestock movement in all Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza harakati za mifugo jijini Nairobi nzima.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza livestock movement katika Nairobi zote.

English: All taxpayers are directed to practice handwashing by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanaelekezwa kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la farayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wameagizwa kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises fishermen to harvest their crops to prevent Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wavuvi kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago qandhada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri fishermen kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia Rift Valley Fever.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges all fish farmers to install safety equipment by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawahimiza wafugaji wote wa samaki kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza fish farmers wote kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo saa noon kila siku.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges communities to move to higher ground to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inahimiza jamii kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay u guuraan dhul sare si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The Ministry of Education activates search and rescue teams in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji huko Kilifi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education huamsha search and rescue teams katika Kilifi.

English: All schools in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa mas'uuliyiinta degmadu.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all distribution must be avoid unnecessary travel starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inatangaza kwamba usambazaji wote lazima uepuke kusafiri bila lazima kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qaybinta waa in laga fogaadaa safar aan loo baahnayn laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba distribution zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia March 15th.

English: All county offices in Kilifi will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti huko Kilifi zitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada ee Kilifi way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika Kilifi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: Students are advised to vaccinate their animals as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao kadri mvua zinavyotarajiwa kunyesha.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda maadaama la filayo in roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: URGENT: All livestock farmers must register online before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla viwango vya maji havijapungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers wote lazima register online kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Motorists are advised to attend training immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga soo qayb galaan tababarka si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya attend training mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all fish farmers to undergo examination.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawaagiza wafugaji wote wa samaki kufanyiwa uchunguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka inay maraan baaritaan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza fish farmers wote kupitia examination.

English: The Social Health Authority announces clean water to all displaced families in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inatangaza maji safi kwa familia zote zilizohamishwa katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku sugan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza clean water kwa displaced families wote katika the nearest health facility.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces free inspection for coffee farmers.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa wakulima wa kahawa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda qaxwada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa coffee farmers.

English: NOTICE: All the police station must report water levels subside within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kituo chote cha polisi lazima kiripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay soo sheegaan in heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the police station zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces free registration for pastoralists.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay xoolo dhaqatada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza registration ya bure kwa pastoralists.

English: All pastoralists must secure their properties before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya June 30th.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds pastoralists to seek medical attention via the IEBC website.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha wafugaji kutafuta matibabu kupitia tovuti ya IEBC.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay xasuusinaysaa xoolo dhaqatada inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka ee IEBC.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha pastoralists kufanya seek medical attention kupitia the IEBC website.

English: Civil servants are urged to submit documents to stop the spread of COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanahimizwa kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kuenea kwa COVID-19.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka COVID-19.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamehimizwa kufanya submit documents ili kusitisha kuenea kwa COVID-19.

English: URGENT: All county offices in the Coastal region must secure their properties by dawn today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika eneo la Pwani lazima zihakikishe mali zao zinapatikana ifikapo alfajiri leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee gobolka Xeebta waa inay sugaan hantidooda waaberiga maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika the Coastal region lazima secure their properties ifikapo saa dawn leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission issues flood risk alert for the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatoa tahadhari ya hatari ya mafuriko kwa Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa soo saaray digniin ku saabsan khatarta fatahaadda ee Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatoa flood risk alert kwa the Rift Valley.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Nakuru.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Nakuru.

English: The Social Health Authority warns against submit documents. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inaonya dhidi ya kuwasilisha hati. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa soo gudbinta dukumentiyada. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku ku fataheen.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya dhidi ya submit documents. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: Citizens are advised to avoid planting. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanashauriwa kuepuka kupanda. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kuepuka planting. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: URGENT: All healthcare workers must avoid unnecessary travel before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay iska ilaaliyaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: healthcare workers wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: Taxpayers are advised to avoid evacuation. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhamishwa. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan daadgureynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kuepuka evacuation. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: Civil servants are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la kordhiyay ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges parents to remain vigilant and report voter registration to Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawasihi wazazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti usajili wa wapiga kura kwa Eldoret.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa waalidiinta ku boorriyay inay feejignaadaan oo ay diiwaan-gelinta cod-bixiyeyaasha u soo sheegaan Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza parents kuwa macho na kuripoti voter registration kwenye Eldoret.

English: Voters are reminded to register for relief food distribution at Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Marsabit.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa relief food distribution kwenye Marsabit.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Usijitibu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ka digaysaa in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha is-daaweynin.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: NOTICE: All the police station must report further notice within 60 days.
