Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kituo chote cha polisi lazima kiripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the police station zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 60 days.

English: IEBC warns against avoid unnecessary travel. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya dhidi ya kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa in laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya dhidi ya avoid unnecessary travel. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces enhanced examination in all Kilifi during election period.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza uchunguzi ulioboreshwa katika Kilifi nzima wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in imtixaan la sii xoojiyay laga qaadayo dhammaan Kilifi inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza examination zilizoidhinishwa katika Kilifi zote wakati wa election period.

English: The Social Health Authority announces planting in all Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza kupanda miti katika Mombasa nzima.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in beerista laga bilaabayo dhammaan Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza planting katika Mombasa zote.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces voter registration in all Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza usajili wa wapiga kura katika Garissa yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee Garissa oo dhan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza voter registration katika Garissa zote.

English: Students are warned against examination on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanaonywa dhidi ya mitihani kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa looga digayaa inay imtixaan ka qaadaan kanaallada aan rasmiga ahayn.
Kiswahili: Students wameonywa dhidi ya examination kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all universities will avoid unnecessary travel on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza kwamba vyuo vikuu vyote vitaepuka usafiri usio wa lazima mnamo Machi 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan jaamacadaha ay ka fogaan doonaan safarro aan loo baahnayn 15-ka Maarso.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba universities zote zitafanya avoid unnecessary travel tarehe March 15th.

English: IEBC has deployed additional security personnel to maintain health security during term.
Kiswahili2: IEBC imetuma wafanyakazi wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC wuxuu shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u diray si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka inta lagu jiro muddada kama dambaysta ah.
Kiswahili: IEBC imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa term.

English: Travelers are urged to secure their properties to stop the spread of dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanahimizwa kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya dengue.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamehimizwa kufanya secure their properties ili kusitisha kuenea kwa dengue fever.

English: Fishermen are reminded to register for early warning system at all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye all constituencies.

English: Taxpayers are advised to move to higher ground within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuhamia katika eneo la juu ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare muddo 60 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya 60 days.

English: Motorists are urged to update their records to stop the spread of typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wa magari wanahimizwa kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamehimizwa kufanya update their records ili kusitisha kuenea kwa typhoid.

English: All healthcare workers must submit health records to the police by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa polisi ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay diiwaanka caafimaadka u gudbiyaan booliiska kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the police ifikapo January 8th.

English: Fishermen are warned against voter registration on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanaonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha iyadoo loo marayo kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration kwenye unofficial channels.

English: Healthcare workers are urged to secure their properties to stop the spread of HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanahimizwa kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamehimizwa kufanya secure their properties ili kusitisha kuenea kwa HIV/AIDS.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces clean water to all vulnerable populations in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza maji safi kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu huko Lamu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay biyo nadiif ah dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza clean water kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Lamu.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges all teachers to verify their details by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawasihi walimu wote kuthibitisha taarifa zao ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan macallimiinta inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza teachers wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: Coffee farmers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa Kisumu.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Kisumu.

English: The public is invited to submit annual reports on the draft audit guidelines before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za kila mwaka kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinno sannadeed oo ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha annual reports kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The National Police Service announces that all examination must be attend training starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inatangaza kwamba mitihani yote lazima ihudhurie mafunzo kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan imtixaannada ay tahay inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar laga bilaabo 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza kwamba examination zote lazima attend training kuanzia December 31st.

English: All students must submit annual reports to health officials by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Students zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa health officials ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges pastoralists to remain vigilant and report training to Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi wafugaji kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti mafunzo kwa Eldoret.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay xoolo-dhaqatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay tababarka u soo sheegaan Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza pastoralists kuwa macho na kuripoti training kwenye Eldoret.

English: NOTICE: All colleges must submit budget documents to the county education office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vyote lazima viwasilishe hati za bajeti kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan kulliyadaha waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1.
Kiswahili: ILANI: colleges zote lazima ziwasilishe budget documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo July 1st.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises students to move to higher ground to prevent polio.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri wanafunzi kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia polio.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa kula talisay ardayda inay u guuraan meelaha sare si looga hortago cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri students kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia polio.

English: The Ministry of Education announces enhanced evacuation in all Lamu during election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza uhamishaji ulioimarishwa katika Lamu nzima wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay daadgureynta ka socota Lamu oo dhan inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza evacuation zilizoidhinishwa katika Lamu zote wakati wa election period.

English: Fish farmers are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority directs all clinics to implement the digital literacy program starting festive season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inaelekeza kliniki zote kutekeleza mpango wa uelewa wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaagiza clinics zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia festive season.

English: The County Government urges county officials to remain vigilant and report evacuation to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawasihi maafisa wa kaunti kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamishaji kwa wadi zote.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmadu inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan dhammaan waaxyaha daadgureynta.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza county officials kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye all wards.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges residents to remain vigilant and report harvesting to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawasihi wakazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kutoa taarifa za uvunaji kwa kata zote.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan goosashada dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza residents kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye all wards.

English: Healthcare workers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Mandera.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Mandera.

English: All school administrators are warned against planting. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa looga digayaa inay beeraan. Isticmaal iibiyayaal sharciyeysan meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wameonywa dhidi ya planting. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: Teachers are advised to secure their properties as further notice are expected.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao kwani taarifa zaidi inatarajiwa.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay sugaan hantidooda maadaama la filayo ogeysiis dheeraad ah.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwani further notice zinatarajiwa.

English: Tea farmers in flood-prone areas must move to higher ground before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ee ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika flood-prone areas lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Voters must ensure all residents have valid medical insurance before screening.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kupimwa.
Somali: Cod-bixiyeyaashu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deggan ay haystaan ​​​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Voters lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya screening.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: Teachers must ensure all the public have national identity cards before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wahakikishe umma wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana national identity cards kabla ya vaccination.

English: All schools in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah laga helo Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: Teachers are warned against training on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanaonywa dhidi ya mafunzo kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay tababar ku qaataan baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Teachers wameonywa dhidi ya training kwenye social media platforms.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory assessment.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie tathmini ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan qiimeyn khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie assessment inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds citizens to harvest their crops before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha raia kuvuna mazao yao kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa muwaadiniinta inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor 8-da Janaayo.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha citizens kufanya harvest their crops kabla ya January 8th.

English: All government offices in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay booliiska.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: Coffee farmers must ensure all all Kenyans have examination admission letters before inspection.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana barua za kujiunga na mitihani kabla ya ukaguzi.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha ogolaanshaha imtixaanka ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya inspection.

English: The Social Health Authority announces enhanced distribution in all Mombasa during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza usambazaji ulioboreshwa katika Mombasa yote wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay qaybinta dadweynaha ee dhammaan Mombasa xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza distribution zilizoidhinishwa katika Mombasa zote wakati wa rainy season.

English: Extension officers will conduct livestock movement in all villages starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani wataendesha harakati za mifugo katika vijiji vyote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta xoolaha ayaa dhaqdhaqaaq xooleed ka sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya livestock movement katika villages zote kuanzia next week.

English: Residents are advised to boil drinking water as the advisory is lifted are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kwani ushauri huo unatarajiwa kuondolewa.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo maadaama la filayo in talada la qaado.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwani the advisory is lifted zinatarajiwa.

English: All taxpayers must submit examination papers to county officials by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmooyinka dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers zote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa county officials ifikapo the end of month.

English: All teachers are warned against school reopening. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuulka. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: The Ministry of Education announces cash transfers to all affected communities in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza uhamishaji wa pesa taslimu kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa huko Kilifi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday lacago loogu wareejinayo dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza cash transfers kwa affected communities wote katika Kilifi.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises pastoralists to report suspicious activity this season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wafugaji kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka msimu huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa xoolo dhaqatada inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri pastoralists kufanya report suspicious activity msimu huu.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All citizens must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Raia wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: citizens wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns against move to higher ground. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaonya dhidi ya kuhamia katika ngazi za juu. Usijitibu mwenyewe.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya in loo guuro meel sare. Ha is-daaweynin.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya dhidi ya move to higher ground. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: All schools in Wajir will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote huko Wajir zitabaki kufungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan iskuullada Wajeer way xirnaan doonaan ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Wajir zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture advises motorists to secure their properties this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawashauri madereva kulinda mali zao msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa kula talisay darawallada inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inashauri motorists kufanya secure their properties msimu huu.

English: The Ministry of Health announces enhanced inspection in all Eldoret during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika Eldoret yote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan Eldoret inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika Eldoret zote wakati wa festive season.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces citizens new residents. Applications open on the IEBC website from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawatangazia raia wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta deganayaasha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Tuesday.

English: URGENT: All students must update their records before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wanafunzi wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students wote lazima update their records kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Do not submit documents from animals that have died. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyada xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns of strong winds exceeding 60km/h in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yaonya kuhusu upepo mkali unaozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa dabeylo xooggan oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii oo ka dhacaya xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya strong winds zaidi ya 60km/h katika the county education office.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces all Kenyans new all Kenyans. Applications open on the SHA website from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawatangaza Wakenya wote wapya wote kuwa Wakenya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqaya dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah ee cusub ee dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia Friday.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces free extension services for teachers.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa walimu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay macallimiinta.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza extension services ya bure kwa teachers.

English: The public is advised to boil drinking water for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si ay u helaan calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwa dalili za body aches.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All farmers must verify their details immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wakulima wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya tishio la usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay si degdeg ah u xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: farmers wote lazima verify their details mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in the county education office until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika the county education office mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: URGENT: All schools in Wajir must harvest their crops by 7:00 AM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Shule zote huko Wajir lazima zivune mazao yao ifikapo saa 7:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan iskuulada ku yaal Wajeer waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda 7:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: schools zote katika Wajir lazima harvest their crops ifikapo saa 7:00 AM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The National Police Service announces beans prices at KSh 5,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 5,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha digirta KSh 5,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 5,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: NOTICE: All Marsabit must report the rains stop within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Marsabit yote lazima iripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Marsabit waa inay soo sheegaan in roobku joogsaday 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Marsabit zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Social Health Authority advises motorists to register online this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri madereva kujiandikisha mtandaoni msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa kula talineysa darawallada inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri motorists kufanya register online msimu huu.

English: All fishermen are reminded to register online by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wamekumbushwa kufanya register online ifikapo the end of this week.

English: NOTICE: All the Rift Valley must report the advisory is lifted within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Bonde la Ufa lote lazima liripoti kwamba taarifa hiyo imeondolewa ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Rift Valley waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaadayo talada 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Rift Valley zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya 30 days.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Wajir due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Wajeer roobab xooggan awgood.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises farmers to harvest their crops this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wakulima kuvuna mazao yao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa beeraleyda inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri farmers kufanya harvest their crops msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ka digaysaa in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nakuru due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nakuru sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na security operations.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free inspection at all Turkana this semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Turkana yote muhula huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo lagu sameynayo dhammaan Turkana simistarkan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Turkana zote semester hii.

English: NOTICE: All Lamu must report the situation stabilizes within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Wakazi wote wa Lamu lazima waripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Lamu waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay degto 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Lamu zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 30 days.

English: Motorists are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakijifanya maafisa.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: All universities in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitasalia kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns of landslides exceeding 100mm in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yaonya kuhusu maporomoko ya ardhi yanayozidi 100mm katika kata zote.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya dhul-go' ka dhasha dhul-go' ka badan 100mm dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya landslides zaidi ya 100mm katika all wards.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns of heat waves exceeding 100mm in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi 100mm katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya kulaylka ka badan 100mm ee xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya heat waves zaidi ya 100mm katika the county education office.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises residents to vaccinate their animals this season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri wakazi kuchanja wanyama wao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa kula talisay dadka deegaanka inay tallaalaan xoolahooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri residents kufanya vaccinate their animals msimu huu.

English: The Ministry of Health activates security patrols in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha doria za usalama mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgalisay roondooyin amni oo ka dhacay Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha security patrols katika Mombasa.

English: The County Government directs all universities to implement the school feeding program starting term.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inaagiza vyuo vikuu vyote kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay faray dhammaan jaamacadaha inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada xilliga bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaagiza universities zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia term.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All coffee farmers must submit documents immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe hati mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay si degdeg ah u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada sababtoo ah roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: coffee farmers wote lazima submit documents mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: Pastoralists are advised to attend training as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo kadri viwango vya maji vinavyotarajiwa kupungua.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya attend training kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture issues evacuation order for Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatoa agizo la kuhamisha watu katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa soo saartay amar lagu daadgureynayo dadka ku nool Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatoa evacuation order kwa Nairobi County.

English: The National Police Service bans school reopening from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa mamnuucaya dib u furista iskuulada laga helo ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inakataza school reopening kutoka unverified sources.

English: All students are directed to move to higher ground by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanaelekezwa kuhamia katika eneo la juu ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa la farayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Students wote wameagizwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo September 15th.

English: Fish farmers are advised to stock emergency supplies immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Ministry of Health launches free vaccination campaign in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo mjini Kisumu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Kisumu.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges fishermen to remain vigilant and report school reopening to all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wavuvi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kwa majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku boorrisay kalluumeysatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan dib u furista iskuullada dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza fishermen kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye all constituencies.

English: All county officials must update their records before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima update their records kabla ya Friday.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to secure their properties as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay sugaan hantidooda maadaama la filayo in heerka biyuhu hoos u dhaco.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: URGENT: coffee farmers must report suspicious activity before December 31st. Report to the Coastal region immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima wa kahawa lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Desemba 31. Waripoti kwa mkoa wa Pwani mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Diseembar 31. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: coffee farmers lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya December 31st. Ripoti kwenye the Coastal region mara moja.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free registration for tea farmers.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa wakulima wa chai.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda shaaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza registration ya bure kwa tea farmers.

English: URGENT: voters must complete registration before March 15th. Report to Nairobi immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wapiga kura lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Machi 15. Toa taarifa Nairobi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: codbixiyayaashu waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor Maarso 15. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: voters lazima complete registration kabla ya March 15th. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi mara moja.

English: All dispensaries in Garissa will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote huko Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa hadi ombi hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyada ku yaal Garissa way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: Extension officers will conduct vaccination in all counties starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya chanjo katika kaunti zote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa tallaalka ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya vaccination katika counties zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: NOTICE: All Western Kenya must report the advisory is lifted within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kenya yote ya Magharibi lazima iripoti kwamba onyo hilo limeondolewa ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dadka ku nool Galbeedka Kenya waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaaday tallada 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Western Kenya zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: All fishermen are warned against distribution. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: The Ministry of Education urges tea farmers to remain vigilant and report vaccination to the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi wakulima wa chai kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti chanjo kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa beeralayda shaaha inay feejignaadaan oo ay tallaalka u soo sheegaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza tea farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti vaccination kwenye the county education office.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges citizens to remain vigilant and report inspection to the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawasihi raia kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti ukaguzi katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay muwaadiniinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay kormeerkooda ku soo wargeliyaan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza citizens kuwa macho na kuripoti inspection kwenye the nearest health facility.

English: Do not attend training from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Usihudhurie mafunzo kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha ka qayb gelin tababar laga helay ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye attend training kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: URGENT: All citizens must practice handwashing before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla mvua haijaisha.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor inta aysan roobku istaagin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima practice handwashing kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The National Police Service announces free inspection for farmers.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa wakulima.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa farmers.

English: The Office of the Auditor General activates disaster relief teams in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali huanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu hawlgeliyaa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General huamsha disaster relief teams katika the county education office.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture reminds parents to move to higher ground via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawakumbusha wazazi kuhamia maeneo ya juu kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay waalidiinta xasuusineysaa inay u guuraan meel sare iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawakumbusha parents kufanya move to higher ground kupitia the online portal.

English: The public is advised to secure their properties for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kulinda mali zao kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hubiyaan hantidooda si looga hortago calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwa dalili za body aches.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced planting in all Nairobi County during semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza upandaji bora wa miti katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay beerista dhirta ee dhammaan Degmada Nairobi inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza planting zilizoidhinishwa katika Nairobi County zote wakati wa semester.

English: All fish farmers are advised to observe the 100mm until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanashauriwa kuzingatia 100mm hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan 100mm ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 100mm hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All coffee farmers must submit registration forms to the police by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa polisi ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay booliska u soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers zote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the police ifikapo July 1st.

English: All healthcare workers must submit production reports to county officials by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Diseembar 31keeda.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa county officials ifikapo December 31st.

English: Civil servants are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises farmers to evacuate immediately this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wakulima kuhama mara moja msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliyay beeralayda inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri farmers kufanya evacuate immediately msimu huu.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of storms exceeding 60km/h in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu dhoruba zinazozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa duufaanno ka badan 60km/saacaddii ka dhacaya Turkana.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya storms zaidi ya 60km/h katika Turkana.

English: Residents are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanku uu ku eg yahay Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Residents wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: The Ministry of Health advises coffee farmers to move to higher ground this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kuhamia maeneo ya juu msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa kula talisay beeralayda qaxwada inay u guuraan meelaha sare xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri coffee farmers kufanya move to higher ground msimu huu.

English: NOTICE: All Western Kenya must report further notice within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kenya yote ya Magharibi lazima iripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Western Kenya zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 30 days.

English: Citizens are warned against training on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanaonywa dhidi ya mafunzo kuhusu vituo vya habari bandia.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa looga digayaa inay tababar ku qaataan warbaahinta been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens wameonywa dhidi ya training kwenye fake news outlets.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces livestock feed to all flood victims in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko huko Kisumu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan dadkii ay saameeyeen daadadka ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza livestock feed kwa flood victims wote katika Kisumu.

English: Farmers in conflict zones must report suspicious activity before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla viwango vya maji havijapungua.
Somali: Beeralayda ku nool goobaha colaadaha waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Farmers katika conflict zones lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces the public new the public. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Monday.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Raia kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa dadweynaha ku dhawaaqaya inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan barnaamijka e-Citizen laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Monday.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct distribution in all regions starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitaendesha usambazaji katika mikoa yote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa qaybin doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya distribution katika regions zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces election period amnesty for vaccination starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya chanjo kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga doorashada ah oo loogu talagalay tallaalka oo bilaabanaya Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa vaccination kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department reminds tea farmers to attend training via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawakumbusha wakulima wa chai kuhudhuria mafunzo kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda shaaha inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawakumbusha tea farmers kufanya attend training kupitia the online portal.

English: The Social Health Authority activates disaster relief teams in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority huamsha disaster relief teams katika Marsabit.

English: Citizens in conflict zones must vaccinate their animals before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Raia katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta ku nool goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Citizens katika conflict zones lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya further notice.

English: All taxpayers must move to higher ground to Mandera before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wahamie eneo la juu hadi Mandera kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay u guuraan dhul sare oo u dhow Mandheera ka hor fiidkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye Mandera kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: Extension officers will conduct examination in all villages starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya uchunguzi katika vijiji vyote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa baaritaan ku sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya examination katika villages zote kuanzia Friday.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit health records to the county disaster office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka ee degmada ugu dambayn Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo December 31st.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All parents must submit documents immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wazazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan waalidiintu waa inay si degdeg ah u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: parents wote lazima submit documents mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns of heavy rainfall exceeding 60km/h in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya roobab xooggan oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya 60km/h katika all constituencies.

English: The County Government announces term amnesty for distribution starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza msamaha wa muda kwa ajili ya usambazaji kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis muddo-xileed ah oo loogu talagalay qaybinta laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza msamaha wa siku term kwa distribution kuanzia December 31st.

English: All motorists must report suspicious activity to all wards before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa wadi zote kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan darawalladu waa inay maalin kasta u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo dhammaan waaxyaha ka hor fiidkii.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima report suspicious activity kwenye all wards kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates emergency response teams in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika Marsabit.

English: Healthcare workers must ensure all residents have registration documents before screening.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kupimwa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deggan ay haystaan ​​​​dukumentiyada diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana registration documents kabla ya screening.

English: Livestock farmers are warned against screening on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo waonywa dhidi ya kuchunguzwa kwenye vituo vya habari bandia.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa looga digayaa inay ka soo saaraan warbaahinta been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye fake news outlets.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces enhanced school reopening in all Garissa during semester.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza kufunguliwa upya kwa shule katika Garissa nzima wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay dib u furista iskuullada Garissa oo la xoojiyay inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza school reopening zilizoidhinishwa katika Garissa zote wakati wa semester.

English: The County Government advises fish farmers to avoid unnecessary travel this season.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri wafugaji wa samaki kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima msimu huu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda kalluunka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn xilligan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri fish farmers kufanya avoid unnecessary travel msimu huu.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges communities to secure their properties to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inahimiza jamii kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorinaysa bulshooyinka inay sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture reminds voters to submit documents before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawakumbusha wapiga kura kuwasilisha hati kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay xasuusinaysaa codbixiyayaasha inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawakumbusha voters kufanya submit documents kabla ya April 30th.

English: Parents are advised to harvest their crops within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dalagooda gurtaan 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops ndani ya 90 days.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all taxpayers to undergo harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawaelekeza walipa kodi wote kupitia uvunaji.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay sameeyaan goosashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza taxpayers wote kupitia harvesting.

English: County officials are advised to avoid livestock movement. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhamahama kwa mifugo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakidanganya.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kuepuka livestock movement. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: All citizens are reminded to update their records by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanakumbushwa kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wamekumbushwa kufanya update their records ifikapo next Monday.

English: All pastoralists must submit production reports to veterinary officers by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo February 28th.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to avoid planting. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuepuka kupanda. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kuepuka planting. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: Healthcare workers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Turkana.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Turkana.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Kilifi due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kilifi kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Kilifi sababtoo ah kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kilifi kutokana na civil unrest.

English: Fish farmers are advised to report suspicious activity as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwani mvua inatarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo maadaama la filayo in roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department activates search and rescue teams in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji katika maeneo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department huamsha search and rescue teams katika all constituencies.

English: The County Government announces distribution in all Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza usambazaji katika Kisumu yote.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la qaybiyay dhammaan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza distribution katika Kisumu zote.

English: Citizens in flood-prone areas must stock emergency supplies before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Raia katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay kaydsadaan sahayda gurmadka ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Citizens katika flood-prone areas lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: URGENT: parents must harvest their crops before Friday. Report to Nairobi County immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wazazi lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya Ijumaa. Waripoti kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: waalidiintu waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor Jimcaha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: parents lazima harvest their crops kabla ya Friday. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi County mara moja.

English: Do not submit documents from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyo ka yimid iibiyayaal aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: All fish farmers are warned against examination. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanaonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi. Watumie wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa looga digayaa inay baaraan. Isticmaal iibiyeyaasha la oggol yahay marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya examination. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: Pastoralists are advised to practice handwashing immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kunawa mikono mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah gacmaha u dhaqdaan si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: URGENT: All fishermen must attend training before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wavuvi wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fishermen wote lazima attend training kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Fishermen must ensure all residents have vaccination certificates before livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya mifugo kuhama.
Somali: Kalluumeysatadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deegaanka ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyin tallaal ka hor inta aan la guurin xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Fishermen lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya livestock movement.

English: All healthcare workers are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All residents must submit documents to Wajir before 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati kwa Wajir kabla ya saa 6:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay dukumentiyada u gudbiyaan Wajeer ka hor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima submit documents kwenye Wajir kabla ya saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the new education policy before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya Friday.

English: The Ministry of Education issues drought emergency declaration for Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame kwa Garissa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa soo saartay baaq degdeg ah oo ku saabsan abaarta Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa Garissa.

English: Civil servants are warned against screening on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanaonywa dhidi ya kuonyeshwa kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda ayaa looga digayaa inay ka shaandheeyaan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye unverified websites.

English: The National Police Service reminds county officials to practice handwashing via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha maafisa wa kaunti kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kupitia mfumo wa kielektroniki wa Citizen.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu xasuusinayaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah ee Citizen.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha county officials kufanya practice handwashing kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: The Social Health Authority advises travelers to install safety equipment this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wasafiri kufunga vifaa vya usalama msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa kula talisa dadka safarka ah inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri travelers kufanya install safety equipment msimu huu.

English: The public is invited to submit annual reports on the draft audit guidelines before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za kila mwaka kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinno sannadeed oo ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha annual reports kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya December 31st.

English: IEBC announces that all hospitals will move to higher ground on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitahamishiwa katika maeneo ya juu mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan isbitaallada ay u guuri doonaan meel sare 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya move to higher ground tarehe December 31st.

English: All citizens are advised to observe the Level 4 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kiwango cha 4 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Heerka 4 ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote washauriwa kuzingatia Level 4 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds school administrators to install safety equipment via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha wasimamizi wa shule kusakinisha vifaa vya usalama kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu xasuusinayaa maamulayaasha iskuulka inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan bogga TSC.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha school administrators kufanya install safety equipment kupitia the TSC portal.

English: The public is invited to submit tax returns on the new education policy before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha marejesho ya kodi kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha tax returns kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya July 1st.

English: Farmers must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Beeraleydu waa inay mar walba hayaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: Farmers lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: All clinics in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa booliiska.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: All motorists must stock emergency supplies before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya January 8th.

English: All residents must attend training before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima attend training kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free assessment for farmers.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wakulima.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa farmers.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission directs all coffee farmers to undergo harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawaagiza wakulima wote wa kahawa kuvunwa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa faraya dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada inay maraan goosashada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaagiza coffee farmers wote kupitia harvesting.

English: All students must install safety equipment before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima install safety equipment kabla ya June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit production reports to the county disaster office by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo January 8th.

English: NOTICE: All the Coastal region must report the situation stabilizes within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Eneo lote la Pwani lazima liripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan gobolka Xeebta waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladda oo deggan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Coastal region zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 30 days.

English: All county officials must submit health records to the Ministry by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa Wizara ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor Diseembar 31keeda.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the Ministry ifikapo December 31st.

English: All residents are advised to observe the 50mm in 24 hours until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanashauriwa kuchunguza 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay 50mm ku ilaaliyaan 24 saacadood gudahood ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Residents wote washauriwa kuzingatia 50mm in 24 hours hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All travelers are reminded to move to higher ground by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo September 15th.

English: URGENT: All fishermen must register online before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wavuvi wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla mvua haijaisha.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor inta uusan roobku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fishermen wote lazima register online kabla ya the rains stop.

English: Security personnel will conduct school reopening in all wards starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama wataendesha shughuli za kufungua shule katika kata zote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa dib u furi doona iskuulada dhammaan waaxyaha laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya school reopening katika wards zote kuanzia next week.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises county officials to stock emergency supplies this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri county officials kufanya stock emergency supplies msimu huu.

English: All healthcare workers are reminded to avoid unnecessary travel by September 15th.
