Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanakumbushwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces citizens new the public. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa muwaadiniinta ku dhawaaqday inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Friday.

English: Parents are reminded that the deadline for school reopening is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kufunguliwa kwa shule imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dib u furista iskuullada la dheereeyay ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Parents wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya school reopening imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: All coffee farmers must register online to the county education office before 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti kabla ya saa 6:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ka hor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima register online kwenye the county education office kabla ya saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the draft audit guidelines before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya March 15th.

English: Students are urged to secure their properties to stop the spread of dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanahimizwa kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya dengue.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: Students wamehimizwa kufanya secure their properties ili kusitisha kuenea kwa dengue fever.

English: URGENT: pastoralists must seek medical attention before September 15th. Report to Wajir immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya Septemba 15. Toa taarifa kwa Wajir mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Sebtembar 15. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Wajeer.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists lazima seek medical attention kabla ya September 15th. Ripoti kwenye Wajir mara moja.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to install safety equipment immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces citizens new the public. Applications open on the IEBC website from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawatangazia raia wapya umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta cusub dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Friday.

English: The Ministry of Health announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan barnaamijka e-Citizen isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia immediately.

English: All students are advised to observe the Level 4 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kiwango cha 4 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Heerka 4 ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Students wote washauriwa kuzingatia Level 4 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: URGENT: voters must evacuate immediately before February 28th. Report to the county education office immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wapiga kura lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya Februari 28. Watoe taarifa kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: codbixiyayaashu waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan ka hor Febraayo 28. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: voters lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya February 28th. Ripoti kwenye the county education office mara moja.

English: NOTICE: All the county education office must report the advisory is lifted within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi yote ya elimu ya kaunti lazima iripoti kwamba taarifa imeondolewa ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmadu waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaaday la-talinta 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the county education office zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The public is invited to submit health records on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha rekodi za afya kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan diiwaannada caafimaadka ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qoondaynta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha health records kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya April 30th.

English: All clinics in the county education office will remain closed until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti zitabaki zimefungwa hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika the county education office zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Fishermen are urged to boil drinking water to stop the spread of yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanahimizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya manjano.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada ayaa lagu booriyay inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamehimizwa kufanya boil drinking water ili kusitisha kuenea kwa yellow fever.

English: URGENT: All tea farmers must secure their properties before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima walinde mali zao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: tea farmers wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces that all schools will boil drinking water on April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza kwamba shule zote zitachemsha maji ya kunywa tarehe 1 Aprili.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan iskuulladu ay karkarin doonaan biyaha la cabbo 1-da Abriil.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza kwamba schools zote zitafanya boil drinking water tarehe April 1st.

English: The National Police Service launches disaster preparedness program in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa Nairobi ka bilaabay barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Nairobi.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all fishermen to stock emergency supplies by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wavuvi wote kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo saa 1:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan kalluumeysatada inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza fishermen wote kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All fishermen must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wavuvi wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababtoo ah roobab culus.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: fishermen wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces that all screening must be avoid unnecessary travel starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima ufanyike ili kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan baaritaannada laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn oo bilaabanaya Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza kwamba screening zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia September 15th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces that all school reopening must be practice handwashing starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inatangaza kwamba ufunguzi wote wa shule lazima ufanyike kwa kunawa mikono kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dib u furista iskuulada ay tahay in lagu dhaqmo dhaqidda gacmaha laga bilaabo Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza kwamba school reopening zote lazima practice handwashing kuanzia June 30th.

English: All schools in Eldoret will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote mjini Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada Eldoret way xirnaan doonaan ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The Ministry of Health advises parents to secure their properties this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wazazi kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay kula talinaysaa waalidiinta inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri parents kufanya secure their properties msimu huu.

English: School administrators are urged to seek medical attention to stop the spread of COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanahimizwa kutafuta matibabu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa COVID-19.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si loo joojiyo faafitaanka COVID-19.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamehimizwa kufanya seek medical attention ili kusitisha kuenea kwa COVID-19.

English: The Teachers Service Commission directs all county offices to implement the school feeding program starting financial year.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inaelekeza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa faraya dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia financial year.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises farmers to update their records to prevent cholera.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri wakulima kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia kipindupindu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay beeraleyda inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago daacuunka.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri farmers kufanya update their records ili kuzuia cholera.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces enhanced planting in all Garissa during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza upandaji bora katika Garissa yote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay beerista dhirta ee dhammaan Garissa inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza planting zilizoidhinishwa katika Garissa zote wakati wa festive season.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Wajir must secure their properties by 7:00 AM today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote huko Wajir lazima zihakikishe mali zao ifikapo saa 7:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal Wajeer waa inay sugaan hantidooda 7:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Wajir lazima secure their properties ifikapo saa 7:00 AM leo kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Western Kenya due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Magharibi mwa Kenya kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Galbeedka Kenya roobab mahiigaan ah awgood.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Western Kenya kutokana na heavy rains.

English: Taxpayers are urged to move to higher ground to stop the spread of yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanahimizwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya manjano.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare si ay u joojiyaan faafitaanka qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamehimizwa kufanya move to higher ground ili kusitisha kuenea kwa yellow fever.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces enhanced vaccination in all the nearest health facility during week.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza chanjo iliyoimarishwa katika vituo vyote vya afya vilivyo karibu wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza vaccination zilizoidhinishwa katika the nearest health facility zote wakati wa week.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces clean water to all drought-affected households in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza maji safi kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza clean water kwa drought-affected households wote katika Western Kenya.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct distribution in all trading centers starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitaendesha usambazaji katika vituo vyote vya biashara kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa qaybin doona dhammaan xarumaha ganacsiga laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya distribution katika trading centers zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: Students are advised to harvest their crops as further notice are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kwani taarifa zaidi inatarajiwa.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda maadaama la filayo ogeysiis dheeraad ah.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwani further notice zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority has deployed additional security personnel to maintain disaster preparedness during semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha maandalizi ya majanga wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa semester.

English: All schools in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces that all clinics will complete registration on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza kwamba kliniki zote zitakamilisha usajili mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay dhammayn doonaan diiwaangelinta Agoosto 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza kwamba clinics zote zitafanya complete registration tarehe August 1st.

English: The Ministry of Education announces assessment in all Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza tathmini katika Turkana yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn ku saabsan dhammaan Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza assessment katika Turkana zote.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit registration forms to the county health office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county health office ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces that all assessment must be practice handwashing starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inatangaza kwamba tathmini yote lazima iwe ya kunawa mikono kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qiimeynta ay tahay in lagu dhaqmo dhaqidda gacmaha laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza kwamba assessment zote lazima practice handwashing kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The National Drought Management Authority has deployed additional extension officers to maintain electoral integrity during month.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi katika mwezi huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro bisha.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa month.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to harvest their crops as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: All teachers are warned against inspection. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanaonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay kormeeraan. Isticmaal ilo biyo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameonywa dhidi ya inspection. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: School administrators are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: All dispensaries in all wards will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika kata zote zitabaki zimefungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal dhammaan waaxaha ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika all wards zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority issues security alert for Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa soo saartay digniin amni oo ku saabsan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatoa security alert kwa Nakuru.

English: URGENT: All farmers must avoid unnecessary travel before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan beeralaydu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: farmers wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of landslides exceeding 100mm in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu maporomoko ya ardhi yanayozidi 100mm katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa dhul-go' ka dhasha dhul-gariir ka badan 100mm oo ka dhaca xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya landslides zaidi ya 100mm katika the county education office.

English: All school administrators must practice handwashing before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha kahor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima practice handwashing kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The National Police Service warns of flooding exceeding 100mm in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa yaonya kuhusu mafuriko yanayozidi 100mm jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ka digaya daadad ka badan 100mm oo ka dhaca Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaonya flooding zaidi ya 100mm katika Nairobi.

English: NOTICE: All the Coastal region must report the advisory is lifted within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Eneo lote la Pwani lazima liripoti kwamba taarifa hiyo imeondolewa ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan gobolka Xeebta waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaaday la-talinta bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Coastal region zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya this month.

English: Travelers in flood-prone areas must vaccinate their animals before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah ee ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Travelers katika flood-prone areas lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya further notice.

English: The Kenya Red Cross launches livestock offtake program in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya lazindua mpango wa uondoaji wa mifugo huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ka bilowday barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaado Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inazindua livestock offtake program katika Marsabit.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded that the deadline for planting is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kupanda imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga beerista la kordhinayo ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya planting imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The Ministry of Health announces enhanced planting in all all constituencies during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza upandaji bora katika majimbo yote wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay beerista dhammaan degmooyinka xilli roobaadka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza planting zilizoidhinishwa katika all constituencies zote wakati wa rainy season.

English: Tea farmers must ensure all citizens have vaccination certificates before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya vaccination.

English: The Ministry of Health announces fertilizer prices at KSh 4,000 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza bei ya mbolea kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bacriminta KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza bei za fertilizer kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 90kg bag.

English: Fishermen are urged to register online to stop the spread of meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanahimizwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan internetka si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamehimizwa kufanya register online ili kusitisha kuenea kwa meningitis.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima ufunguliwe shule kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan dib u furista iskuullada ee qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie school reopening inayolazimishwa.

English: All teachers are warned against screening. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka hortagaan baaritaanka. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameonywa dhidi ya screening. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Agoosto 1.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority has deployed additional medical teams to maintain electoral integrity during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa shaqaaleysiisay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro muddada xil haynta.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa term.

English: The National Police Service warns against move to higher ground. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inaonya dhidi ya kuhamia maeneo ya juu. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ka digaya in loo guuro meelaha sare. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaonya dhidi ya move to higher ground. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: Students are advised to harvest their crops as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces that all inspection must be avoid unnecessary travel starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uepuke kusafiri bila lazima kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kormeerka laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn oo bilaabanaya Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia June 30th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces that all schools will report suspicious activity on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza kwamba shule zote zitaripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mnamo Juni 30.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan iskuulladu ay soo sheegi doonaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo bisha Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza kwamba schools zote zitafanya report suspicious activity tarehe June 30th.

English: URGENT: parents must seek medical attention before September 15th. Report to Nakuru immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wazazi lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya Septemba 15. Toa taarifa kwa Nakuru mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: waalidiintu waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Sebtembar 15. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Nakuru.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: parents lazima seek medical attention kabla ya September 15th. Ripoti kwenye Nakuru mara moja.

English: All travelers must attend training before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay ka qayb qaataan tababarka ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima attend training kabla ya February 28th.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapandishwe miti kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay maraan beero qasab ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: The Ministry of Education issues curfew notice for the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatoa notisi ya amri ya kutotoka nje kwa ajili ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa soo saartay ogeysiis bandow ah oo ku saabsan Dooxada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatoa curfew notice kwa the Rift Valley.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the draft audit guidelines before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The National Police Service activates disaster relief teams in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa mjini Kisumu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha gurmadka masiibooyinka ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service huamsha disaster relief teams katika Kisumu.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces clean water to all flood victims in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza maji safi kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza clean water kwa flood victims wote katika Marsabit.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all residents to verify their details by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawasihi wakazi wote kuthibitisha taarifa zao ifikapo alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor waaberiga maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza residents wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: All students must update their records to Mombasa before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao hadi Mombasa kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay diiwaankooda ku cusbooneysiiyaan Mombasa ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima update their records kwenye Mombasa kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises students to report suspicious activity this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawashauri wanafunzi kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliya ardayda inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri students kufanya report suspicious activity msimu huu.

English: Motorists are reminded that the deadline for distribution is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usambazaji imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee qaybinta la kordhiyay ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya distribution imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: All parents must secure their properties before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya January 8th.

English: Coffee farmers are warned against assessment on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa looga digayaa inay qiimeeyaan kanaallada aan rasmiga ahayn.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wameonywa dhidi ya assessment kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all parents to undergo livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawaagiza wazazi wote kuhamahama kutoka mifugo hadi nchi nyingine.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan waalidiinta inay maraan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza parents wote kupitia livestock movement.

English: The public is invited to submit health records on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha rekodi za afya kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan diiwaannada caafimaadka ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qoondaynta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha health records kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya July 1st.

English: All livestock farmers are warned against voter registration. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha. Isticmaal iibiyeyaasha la oggol yahay marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces the public new the public. Applications open on the IEBC website from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa dadweynaha ku dhawaaqaya inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Wednesday.

English: URGENT: All county officials must harvest their crops before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wavune mazao yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds county officials to register online via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha maafisa wa kaunti kujiandikisha mtandaoni kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay iska diiwaangeliyaan online iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga TSC.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha county officials kufanya register online kupitia the TSC portal.

English: The Ministry of Education activates emergency response teams in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Wajir.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education huamsha emergency response teams katika Wajir.

English: The Social Health Authority announces financial year amnesty for examination starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sanad-maaliyadeedka ah oo loogu talagalay imtixaannada oo bilaabanaya 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa examination kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free malaria screening for taxpayers.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa walipa kodi.

English: Tea farmers in landslide-prone areas must avoid unnecessary travel before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya taarifa zaidi.

Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika landslide-prone areas lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya further notice.

English: Taxpayers in flood-prone areas must move to higher ground before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers katika flood-prone areas lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na majanga huko Marsabit.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All livestock farmers must install safety equipment immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sababtoo ah qiimaynta khatarta amniga.

Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wanakumbushwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.

English: County officials in landslide-prone areas must move to higher ground before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla ya taarifa zaidi.

Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawashauri wavuvi kuwasilisha hati msimu huu.

Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Nakuru.

Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wameagizwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa la farayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn Jimcaha.

Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 1,700 kwa lita.

Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka Kaunti ya Nairobi kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.

Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono hadi Eldoret kabla ya saa 6:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay ku celceliyaan dhaqidda gacmaha ilaa Eldoret ka hor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.

Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inapiga marufuku upandaji miti kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.

English: Citizens are reminded that the deadline for school reopening is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dib u furista iskuullada la kordhiyay ilaa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya school reopening imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: The public is advised to evacuate immediately for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhama mara moja kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda si loo ogaado calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.

Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay si degdeg ah u goostaan ​​​​dalagyadooda sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.

English: All colleges in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal degmooyinka ay daadadku saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.

English: Do not practice handwashing from affected countries. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.

Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanahimizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia kuenea kwa mafua.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All tea farmers must submit documents immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: ONYO LA UMMA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wawasilishe hati mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya tishio la usalama.

Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia Ijumaa.

English: IEBC urges travelers to remain vigilant and report examination to the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawasihi wasafiri kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uchunguzi wao kwa Bonde la Ufa.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the county education office due to disease outbreak.

English: All livestock farmers must submit registration forms to county officials by December 31st.
