Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vyote katika Bonde la Ufa lazima viweke vifaa vya usalama ifikapo saa sita usiku wa leo kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Dooxada Rift waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada saqda dhexe ee maanta sababtoo ah cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: colleges zote katika the Rift Valley lazima install safety equipment ifikapo saa midnight leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority reminds fishermen to secure their properties via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawakumbusha wavuvi kulinda mali zao kupitia jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa xasuusinaysa kalluumeysatada inay hantidooda ku sugaan iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah ee Citizen.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawakumbusha fishermen kufanya secure their properties kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns against update their records. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya dhidi ya kusasisha rekodi zao. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa in la cusbooneysiiyo diiwaankooda. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya dhidi ya update their records. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of heavy rainfall exceeding 100mm in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi milimita 100 huko Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa roobab xooggan oo ka badan 100mm oo ka da'aya Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya 100mm katika Wajir.

English: URGENT: All students must harvest their crops before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wanafunzi wote lazima wavune mazao yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Civil servants must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan diiwaanka caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission issues evacuation order for the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatoa agizo la kuhama watu katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa soo saaray amar lagu daadgureynayo Dooxada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatoa evacuation order kwa the Rift Valley.

English: All police stations in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitasalia kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: All taxpayers must submit budget documents to the police by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa polisi ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay booliska u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the police ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces school reopening in all the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dib loo furayo iskuullada dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza school reopening katika the county education office zote.

English: The Ministry of Health urges communities to install safety equipment to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inahimiza jamii kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza jamii kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges travelers to remain vigilant and report screening to the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza wasafiri kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uchunguzi kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay feejignaadaan oo ay baaritaanka u soo sheegaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza travelers kuwa macho na kuripoti screening kwenye the county education office.

English: Students are warned against examination on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanaonywa dhidi ya mitihani kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa looga digayaa imtixaanada mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Students wameonywa dhidi ya examination kwenye unverified websites.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces residents new residents. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawatangazia wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Hay'adda Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday dadka deegaanka inay cusub yihiin. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan barnaamijka e-Citizen isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia immediately.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced livestock movement in all Eldoret during week.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kuimarika kwa uhamiaji wa mifugo katika Eldoret yote wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan Eldoret inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza livestock movement zilizoidhinishwa katika Eldoret zote wakati wa week.

English: The County Government directs all government offices to implement the digital literacy program starting month.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inaagiza ofisi zote za serikali kutekeleza mpango wa usomaji wa kidijitali kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay faray dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo bisha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaagiza government offices zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia month.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Rift Valley due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Bonde la Ufa kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Dooxada Rift sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the Rift Valley kutokana na security operations.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces vaccination in all Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza chanjo katika Nakuru yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal laga sameeyay dhammaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza vaccination katika Nakuru zote.

English: All county officials are warned against examination. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa looga digayaa baaritaanka. Isticmaal ilo biyo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameonywa dhidi ya examination. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: The National Police Service activates emergency response teams in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee ka howlgala Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service huamsha emergency response teams katika Nairobi County.

English: IEBC warns of strong winds exceeding 60km/h in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu upepo mkali unaozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa dabeylo xooggan oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya strong winds zaidi ya 60km/h katika the Coastal region.

English: All motorists must verify their details to Kilifi before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao hadi Kilifi kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan darawalladu waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda Kilifi ka hor saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima verify their details kwenye Kilifi kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: NOTICE: All the Coastal region must report the advisory is lifted within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Eneo lote la Pwani lazima liripoti kwamba taarifa hiyo imeondolewa ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan gobolka Xeebta waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaaday talada 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Coastal region zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: All county officials must submit tax returns to county officials by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta mas'uuliyiinta degmadu ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: County officials zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa county officials ifikapo Friday.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces the public new the public. Applications open on the IEBC website from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa dadweynaha ku wargelisay inay cusub yihiin. Codsiyada waxaa laga furi doonaa bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Friday.

English: The Social Health Authority activates disaster relief teams in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa hawlgelisa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority huamsha disaster relief teams katika Turkana.

English: The County Government announces all Kenyans new all Kenyans. Applications open on the TSC portal from Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza Wakenya wote wapya wote kuwa Wakenya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub inay yihiin Kenyan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Thursday.

English: Students are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mtihani imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: All health facilities in Nairobi County will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika Kaunti ya Nairobi vitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee degmada Nairobi ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika Nairobi County zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit production reports to the county agricultural office by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada ugu dambayn 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo February 28th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces planting in all all wards.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza kupanda katika kata zote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in beerista laga bilaabayo dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza planting katika all wards zote.

English: Civil servants are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: All school administrators are reminded to submit documents by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanakumbushwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wamekumbushwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All parents must move to higher ground before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wahamie katika eneo la juu kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay u guuraan meel sare ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya Friday.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all county officials to register online by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawasihi maafisa wote wa kaunti kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta gobolka inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza county officials wote kufanya register online ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges all pastoralists to attend training by 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawahimiza wafugaji wote kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza pastoralists wote kufanya attend training ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: IEBC announces term amnesty for planting starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza msamaha wa muda wa kupanda kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis muddo-xileed ah oo loogu talagalay beerista beeraha oo bilaabanaysa Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza msamaha wa siku term kwa planting kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Social Health Authority announces drought season amnesty for inspection starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya ukaguzi kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga abaaraha ah oo loogu talagalay kormeerka oo bilaabanaya Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa inspection kuanzia April 1st.

English: Tea farmers must carry annual reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wabebe ripoti za mwaka wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay sitaan warbixinno sannadeed mar walba.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wabebe annual reports wakati wote.

English: The National Police Service directs all school administrators to undergo planting.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawaagiza wasimamizi wote wa shule kupanda miti.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu farayaa dhammaan maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay sameeyaan beero.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza school administrators wote kupitia planting.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free registration at all Lamu this festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza usajili wa bure katika Lamu yote msimu huu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo laga sameeyo dhammaan Lamu xilligan ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza registration ya bure katika Lamu zote festive season hii.

English: All school administrators must submit annual reports to county officials by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa county officials ifikapo July 1st.

English: NOTICE: All Nakuru must report water levels subside within this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Nakuru wote lazima waripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Nakuru waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhaceen toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Nakuru zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya this week.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority advises travelers to practice handwashing this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawashauri wasafiri kunawa mikono msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa kula talisa dadka safarka ah inay xilligan ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inashauri travelers kufanya practice handwashing msimu huu.

English: The Ministry of Health activates medical response units in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgelisay cutubyo ka jawaabaya caafimaadka oo ku yaal Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha medical response units katika Nairobi County.

English: All farmers must evacuate immediately before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya February 28th.

English: NOTICE: All the county education office must report the advisory is lifted within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi yote ya elimu ya kaunti lazima iripoti kwamba ushauri umeondolewa ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Xafiiska waxbarashada degmada oo dhan waa inuu soo sheegaa in la-talinta la qaaday sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the county education office zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Social Health Authority announces that all universities will complete registration on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza kwamba vyuo vikuu vyote vitakamilisha usajili mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan jaamacadaha ay dhammeyn doonaan diiwaangelinta 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza kwamba universities zote zitafanya complete registration tarehe August 1st.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all harvesting must be move to higher ground starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inatangaza kwamba uvunaji wote lazima uhamishiwe kwenye ardhi ya juu kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan goosashada la geyn doono dhul sare laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima move to higher ground kuanzia September 15th.

English: The Social Health Authority activates emergency response teams in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika Nairobi County.

English: All fishermen are warned against school reopening. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuullada. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in Nakuru until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule huko Nakuru hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulada Nakuru ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika Nakuru mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: All students are reminded to move to higher ground by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanakumbushwa kuhamia katika eneo la juu ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay u guuraan meel sare marka la gaaro Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Students wote wamekumbushwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free inspection for taxpayers.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa walipa kodi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay canshuur bixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa taxpayers.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns of earthquakes exceeding Category 3 in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi kiwango cha 3 katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariirro ka gudbaya Qaybta 3aad ee xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya Category 3 katika the county education office.

English: Teachers must ensure all the public have registration documents before distribution.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wahakikishe umma wote una hati za usajili kabla ya kusambazwa.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyada diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la qaybin.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana registration documents kabla ya distribution.

English: All fish farmers are reminded to report suspicious activity by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanakumbushwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya report suspicious activity ifikapo Friday.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces enhanced evacuation in all Kilifi during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza uhamishaji ulioimarishwa katika Kilifi yote wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la kordhiyay daadgureynta dhammaan Kilifi xilliyada roobka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza evacuation zilizoidhinishwa katika Kilifi zote wakati wa rainy season.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free inspection for fishermen.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa wavuvi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay kalluumeysatada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa fishermen.

English: Travelers are advised to avoid assessment. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuepuka tathmini. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kuepuka assessment. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces wheat prices at KSh 3,300 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza bei ya ngano kuwa KSh 3,300 kwa tani.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha sarreenka KSh 3,300 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 3,300 kwa ton.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced inspection in all the police station during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika vituo vyote vya polisi wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer la xoojiyay oo lagu sameynayo dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska xilliyada roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika the police station zote wakati wa rainy season.

English: NOTICE: All the nearest health facility must report further notice within this month.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu lazima kiripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the nearest health facility zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya this month.

English: Travelers are advised to secure their properties within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hubiyaan hantidooda bishaan gudaheed.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties ndani ya this month.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority issues health advisory for all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya hutoa ushauri wa afya kwa majimbo yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay soo saartaa talo-bixin caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatoa health advisory kwa all constituencies.

English: All fish farmers must submit budget documents to veterinary officers by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa veterinary officers ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All fishermen are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All students must submit production reports to veterinary officers by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Students zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Ministry of Health urges fishermen to remain vigilant and report examination to Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawasihi wavuvi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uchunguzi kwa Marsabit.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku boorrisay kalluumeysatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay baaritaanka u soo gudbiyaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza fishermen kuwa macho na kuripoti examination kwenye Marsabit.

English: Fishermen in flood-prone areas must boil drinking water before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Fishermen katika flood-prone areas lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The public is advised to move to higher ground for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meel sare si ay u dareemaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo adag.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: The Ministry of Health advises fishermen to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent influenza.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wavuvi kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima ili kuzuia mafua.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa kula talinaysa kalluumeysatada inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago hargabka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri fishermen kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia influenza.

English: The Social Health Authority urges all farmers to update their records by midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawahimiza wakulima wote kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan beeraleyda inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza farmers wote kufanya update their records ifikapo saa midnight kila siku.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All citizens must stock emergency supplies immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: ONYO LA UMMA: Raia wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay si degdeg ah u kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: PUBLIC WARNING: citizens wote lazima stock emergency supplies mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: All parents are directed to submit documents by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wameagizwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa la farayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameagizwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The National Drought Management Authority directs all schools to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting month.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inaelekeza shule zote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia ujuzi kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa faray dhammaan dugsiyada inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida bisha bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaagiza schools zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia month.

English: The Ministry of Education directs all county offices to implement the digital literacy program starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaagiza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mpango wa usomaji wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay faray dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia rainy season.

English: All government offices in Nairobi will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali jijini Nairobi zitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotangazwa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee Nairobi ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika Nairobi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in all wards until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo katika kata zote hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka dhammaan waaxyaha ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika all wards mpaka the rains stop.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges all taxpayers to secure their properties by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawasihi walipa kodi wote kulinda mali zao alfajiri ya kila siku.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan canshuur-bixiyeyaasha inay sugaan hantidooda marka waagu baryo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza taxpayers wote kufanya secure their properties ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit budget documents to the county education office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe hati za bajeti kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe budget documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All Mombasa must report the situation stabilizes within this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Mombasa yote lazima iripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Mombasa waa inay soo sheegaan in xaaladdu ay degtay toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mombasa zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya this week.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds coffee farmers to vaccinate their animals via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuwachanja wanyama wao kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay tallaalaan xoolahooda iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya vaccinate their animals kupitia the mobile app.

English: Taxpayers in flood-prone areas must seek medical attention before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima watafute matibabu kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers katika flood-prone areas lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Students in border counties must avoid unnecessary travel before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi katika kaunti za mpakani lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Ardayda ku nool degmooyinka xuduudda waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aysan heerka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Students katika border counties lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises motorists to evacuate immediately this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri madereva kuhama mara moja msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay darawallada inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri motorists kufanya evacuate immediately msimu huu.

English: The National Police Service launches disaster preparedness program in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Nakuru.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ka bilaabay Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Nakuru.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges all travelers to practice handwashing by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawasihi wasafiri wote kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan dadka safarka ah inay maalin kasta ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha marka waagu baryo.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza travelers wote kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: The County Government issues evacuation order for Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatoa agizo la kuhamisha watu Kilifi.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa soo saartay amar lagu daadgureynayo dadka ku nool Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatoa evacuation order kwa Kilifi.

English: The National Police Service bans school reopening from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa mamnuucaya dib u furista iskuulada laga furo wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inakataza school reopening kutoka affected countries.

English: Teachers are warned against distribution on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka qayb qaataan kanaallada aan rasmiga ahayn.
Kiswahili: Teachers wameonywa dhidi ya distribution kwenye unofficial channels.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit registration forms to the county agricultural office by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo the end of month.

English: All civil servants are reminded to register online by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wamekumbushwa kufanya register online ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Ministry of Education urges fish farmers to remain vigilant and report harvesting to the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi wafugaji wa samaki kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay ku boorinaysaa beeralayda kalluunka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan goosashada beeraha xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza fish farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye the county education office.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces seeds prices at KSh 2,500 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza bei za mbegu kwa KSh 2,500 kwa tani.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha abuurka KSh 2,500 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza bei za seeds kwa KSh 2,500 kwa ton.

English: NOTICE: All Nairobi County must report security clearance is obtained within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kaunti yote ya Nairobi lazima iripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Degmada Nairobi waa inay soo sheegaan in la helo ogolaansho amni muddo 60 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Nairobi County zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya 60 days.

English: All citizens must attend training to Turkana before dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kwenda Turkana kabla ya alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarrada Turkana ka hor waaberiga maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima attend training kwenye Turkana kabla ya saa dawn kila siku.

English: All fish farmers must submit tax returns to the Ministry by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Wizara ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Wasaaradda dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the Ministry ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces voter registration in all Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza usajili wa wapiga kura katika Lamu yote.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee dhammaan Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza voter registration katika Lamu zote.

English: All taxpayers are warned against livestock movement. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama kwa mifugo. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: All county officials must submit health records to veterinary officers by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa veterinary officers ifikapo March 15th.

English: All teachers are reminded to report suspicious activity by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanakumbushwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya report suspicious activity ifikapo April 30th.

English: URGENT: All hospitals in Eldoret must update their records by 7:00 AM today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Hospitali zote mjini Eldoret lazima zisasishe rekodi zao ifikapo saa 7:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan isbitaallada Eldoret waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda 7:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira kacdoon dadweyne.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: hospitals zote katika Eldoret lazima update their records ifikapo saa 7:00 AM leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all voter registration must be seek medical attention starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima utafute matibabu kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ay tahay in la raadiyo daryeel caafimaad laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima seek medical attention kuanzia March 15th.

English: All colleges in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all dispensaries to implement the digital literacy program starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inaelekeza zahanati zote kutekeleza mpango wa usomaji wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza dispensaries zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia rainy season.

English: The Ministry of Education advises civil servants to secure their properties this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri watumishi wa umma kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri civil servants kufanya secure their properties msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces that all colleges will update their records on January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitasasisha rekodi zao mnamo Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay cusbooneysiin doonaan diiwaankooda Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya update their records tarehe January 8th, 2026.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces election period amnesty for school reopening starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis muddada doorashada ah oo loogu talagalay dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa school reopening kuanzia March 15th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges all coffee farmers to update their records by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi wakulima wote wa kahawa kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorinaya dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza coffee farmers wote kufanya update their records ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: All coffee farmers must evacuate immediately to Western Kenya before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wahame mara moja hadi Magharibi mwa Kenya kabla ya saa 2:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan Galbeedka Kenya ka hor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima evacuate immediately kwenye Western Kenya kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds taxpayers to register online via the IEBC website.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha walipa kodi kujiandikisha mtandaoni kupitia tovuti ya IEBC.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu xasuusinayaa canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay iska diiwaangeliyaan online iyagoo adeegsanaya mareegaha IEBC.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha taxpayers kufanya register online kupitia the IEBC website.

English: All police stations in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dheeraad ah laga soo saaro Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in Marsabit until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi huko Marsabit hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka Marsabit ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika Marsabit mpaka further notice.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free registration for pastoralists.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay xoolo dhaqatada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza registration ya bure kwa pastoralists.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid all wards due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka wodi zote kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow dhammaan waaxaha caafimaadka sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka all wards kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: Voters are advised to secure their properties immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya secure their properties mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: URGENT: All colleges in the Rift Valley must install safety equipment by 9:00 PM today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vyote katika Bonde la Ufa lazima viweke vifaa vya usalama ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Dooxada Rift waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada 9:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: colleges zote katika the Rift Valley lazima install safety equipment ifikapo saa 9:00 PM leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority bans evacuation from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yapiga marufuku uokoaji kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa mamnuucday in laga qaxo biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inakataza evacuation kutoka floodwaters.

English: The public is advised to avoid planting in the Rift Valley until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kupanda katika Bonde la Ufa hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista Dooxada Rift ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka planting katika the Rift Valley mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces school reopening in all Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika Mombasa nzima.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dib loo furayo iskuullada Mombasa oo dhan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza school reopening katika Mombasa zote.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges residents to remain vigilant and report harvesting to the police station.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawasihi wakazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorisay dadka deegaanka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in goosashada ay u soo baxaan saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza residents kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye the police station.

English: All travelers must evacuate immediately before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay isla markiiba ka baxaan ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya the end of month.

English: The public is advised to avoid screening in Eldoret until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi huko Eldoret hadi ushauri huo utakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Eldoret ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka screening katika Eldoret mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The County Government has deployed additional extension officers to maintain disaster preparedness during election period.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha maandalizi ya maafa wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay geysay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan kordhinta si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The County Government imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa election period.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all government offices to implement the digital literacy program starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inaelekeza ofisi zote za serikali kutekeleza mpango wa usomaji wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza government offices zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia drought season.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges all taxpayers to register online by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawahimiza walipa kodi wote kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah subaxdii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza taxpayers wote kufanya register online ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: URGENT: All county offices in Eldoret must complete registration by 5:00 PM today due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti mjini Eldoret lazima zikamilishe usajili ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada ee Eldoret waa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta 5:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira khatar argagixiso.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika Eldoret lazima complete registration ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Ministry of Education warns against register online. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaonya dhidi ya kujisajili mtandaoni. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ka digaysaa in la iska diiwaan geliyo internetka. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaonya dhidi ya register online. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya April 30th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all coffee farmers to complete registration by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wakulima wote wa kahawa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza coffee farmers wote kufanya complete registration ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges fish farmers to remain vigilant and report livestock movement to Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawahimiza wafugaji wa samaki kuwa macho na kuripoti kuhusu uhamiaji wa mifugo huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku boorisay beeralayda kalluunka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza fish farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti livestock movement kwenye Marsabit.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha karatasi za mitihani kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka ee Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya March 15th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre has deployed additional extension officers to maintain electoral integrity during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kimetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa financial year.

English: All taxpayers must boil drinking water before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya June 30th.

English: Security personnel will conduct inspection in all sub-counties starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama watafanya ukaguzi katika kaunti ndogo zote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa kormeer ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka hoos yimaada laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya inspection katika sub-counties zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The public is invited to submit health records on the new education policy before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha rekodi za afya kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan diiwaannada caafimaadka ee siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha health records kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya December 31st.

English: Citizens are urged to avoid unnecessary travel to stop the spread of tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanahimizwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kifua kikuu.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamehimizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kusitisha kuenea kwa tuberculosis.

English: County officials are advised to boil drinking water immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: NOTICE: All the nearest health facility must report water levels subside within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu lazima kiripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhacaan 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the nearest health facility zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 90 days.

English: Motorists must ensure all the public have examination admission letters before screening.
Kiswahili2: Madereva lazima wahakikishe kuwa umma wote una barua za kujiunga na mtihani kabla ya kupimwa.
Somali: Darawalada waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha ogolaanshaha imtixaanka ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Motorists lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya screening.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces assessment in all all wards.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza tathmini katika kata zote.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza assessment katika all wards zote.

English: IEBC announces month amnesty for examination starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza msamaha wa mwezi kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis bil ah oo loogu talagalay imtixaannada oo bilaabanaya 1-da Ogosto.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza msamaha wa siku month kwa examination kuanzia August 1st.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission reminds livestock farmers to evacuate immediately via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawakumbusha wafugaji kuhama mara moja kupitia SMS.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu xasuusinayaa beeralayda xoolaha inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya evacuate immediately kupitia SMS.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns against register online. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yaonya dhidi ya kujiandikisha mtandaoni. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa in laga diiwaan geliyo khadka internetka. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya dhidi ya register online. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: URGENT: All police stations in Nakuru must submit documents by dusk today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya polisi mjini Nakuru lazima viwasilishe hati ifikapo jioni leo kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee Nakuru waa inay maanta soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor makhribka sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: police stations zote katika Nakuru lazima submit documents ifikapo saa dusk leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: Fishermen are advised to complete registration within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kufanya complete registration ndani ya 60 days.

English: All county offices in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges communities to install safety equipment to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inahimiza jamii kuweka vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All travelers must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Wasafiri wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: travelers wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges all travelers to evacuate immediately by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wasafiri wote kuhama mara moja ifikapo saa 12:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan dadka safarka ah inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda marka la gaaro 6:00 galabnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza travelers wote kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The public is advised to avoid unnecessary travel for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn oo loogu talagalay calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kwa dalili za high fever.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges all fish farmers to verify their details by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawahimiza wafugaji wote wa samaki kuthibitisha maelezo yao ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorinaya dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza fish farmers wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa noon kila siku.

English: Teachers are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la dheereeyay ilaa Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces free extension services at all Marsabit this semester.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika Marsabit yote muhula huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo ka socda dhammaan Marsabit simistarkan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza extension services ya bure katika Marsabit zote semester hii.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all school administrators to undergo training.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawaelekeza wasimamizi wote wa shule kupata mafunzo.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay faray dhammaan maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay qaataan tababar.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza school administrators wote kupitia training.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces free inspection at all Eldoret this week.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Eldoret yote wiki hii.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa toddobaadkan ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya dhammaan Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Eldoret zote week hii.

English: Voters are advised to report suspicious activity within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo muddo 60 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya 60 days.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All travelers must complete registration immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wasafiri wote lazima wakamilishe usajili mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: travelers wote lazima complete registration mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Social Health Authority activates emergency response teams in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa hawlgelisa kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika Turkana.

English: Parents in drought-prone regions must evacuate immediately before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Parents katika drought-prone regions lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces that all examination must be secure their properties starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uhakikishwe mali zao kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan baaritaannada la sameeyo ay tahay in la sugo hantidooda laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza kwamba examination zote lazima secure their properties kuanzia September 15th.

English: All students are warned against planting. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa looga digayaa inay beeraan. Isticmaal kanaallo rasmi ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Students wote wameonywa dhidi ya planting. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in Garissa until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule huko Garissa hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulada Garissa ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhaco.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika Garissa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces tea prices at KSh 3,300 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza bei za chai kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha shaaha oo ah KSh 3,300 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 3,300 kwa 90kg bag.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free extension services for pastoralists.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay xoolo dhaqatada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza extension services ya bure kwa pastoralists.

English: All travelers are directed to avoid unnecessary travel by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wameagizwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la farayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wameagizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All voters are reminded to harvest their crops by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wanakumbushwa kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wamekumbushwa kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo Friday.

English: Do not register online from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Usijiandikishe mtandaoni kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha iska diiwaan gelin internetka iibiyeyaasha aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye register online kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: Voters are warned against planting on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanaonywa dhidi ya kueneza habari bandia kwenye vituo vya habari.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa looga digayaa inay ku beeraan warbaahinta been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Voters wameonywa dhidi ya planting kwenye fake news outlets.

English: Citizens must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wabebe rekodi za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: All fishermen must move to higher ground before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya January 8th.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Lamu until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo huko Lamu hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka Lamu ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika Lamu mpaka water levels subside.

English: All civil servants are warned against distribution. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa looga digayaa qaybinta. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to avoid livestock movement. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhamahama kwa mifugo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugaysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kuepuka livestock movement. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: The public is advised to avoid distribution in Lamu until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji huko Lamu hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta biyaha Lamu ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhaco.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka distribution katika Lamu mpaka water levels subside.

English: All tea farmers must stock emergency supplies before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya September 15th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces residents new the public. Applications open on the IEBC website from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawatangazia wakazi wapya umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqaya dadka deegaanka inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxaa laga furayaa bogga internetka ee IEBC isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia immediately.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces rice prices at KSh 1,700 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 1,700 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.

English: The Ministry of Health warns against seek medical attention. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inaonya dhidi ya kutafuta matibabu. Usitumie maji machafu.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Garissa due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Garissa kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
