English: The County Government announces beans prices at KSh 3,300 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.

Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kuwachanja wanyama wao msimu huu.

English: Fishermen are reminded to register for relief food distribution at Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Mandera.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee Mandheera.

English: The County Government reminds fishermen to update their records before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawakumbusha wavuvi kusasisha rekodi zao kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay xasuusinaysaa kalluumaysatada inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor Isniinta soo socota.

Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema huko Garissa.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Garissa.
Kiswahili: Parents wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye Garissa.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises fishermen to install safety equipment to prevent dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wavuvi kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia homa ya dengue.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa kalluumeysatada inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri fishermen kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia dengue fever.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all distribution must be harvest their crops starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba usambazaji wote lazima uvunwe kuanzia Machi 15.

Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanashauriwa kuchunguza 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.

Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha rekodi za afya kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.

Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada Isniinta soo socota.

English: The County Government announces that all screening must be vaccinate their animals starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba uchunguzi wote lazima uchanje wanyama wao kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan baaritaannada la tallaalayo xoolahooda laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to boil drinking water as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kadri hali inavyoimarika inavyotarajiwa.

English: URGENT: All parents must report suspicious activity before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wazazi wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.

Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inatangaza kwamba shughuli zote za kufunguliwa kwa shule lazima ziripotiwe kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.

Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza kwamba school reopening zote lazima report suspicious activity kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces pesticides prices at KSh 5,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza bei za dawa za kuulia wadudu kuwa KSh 5,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha sunta cayayaanka ee KSh 5,500 halkii litir.

Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Desemba 31.

Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.

Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya the end of month.

Kiswahili2: HARAKA: raia lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya Desemba 31. Watoe taarifa kwa wadi zote mara moja.

Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanashauriwa kunawa mikono mara moja ili kuzuia upotevu wa mazao baada ya mavuno.

English: URGENT: citizens must install safety equipment before the end of this week. Report to Eldoret immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: raia lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii. Watoe taarifa kwa Eldoret mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Muwaadiniintu waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Eldoret.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens lazima install safety equipment kabla ya the end of this week. Ripoti kwenye Eldoret mara moja.

English: IEBC warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Usijitibu mwenyewe.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha is-daaweynin.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: Tea farmers are advised to attend training immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga soo qayb galaan tababarka si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya attend training mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department directs all county offices to implement the digital literacy program starting festive season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inaelekeza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mpango wa usomaji wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia festive season.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free assessment for parents.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wazazi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay waalidiinta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa parents.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapate chanjo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan tallaal khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie vaccination inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates medical response units in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chaanzisha vitengo vya usaidizi wa kimatibabu huko Garissa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa hawlgelisa cutubyada gurmadka caafimaadka ee Garissa.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha medical response units katika Garissa.

English: IEBC announces free vaccination for school administrators.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa wasimamizi wa shule.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay maamulayaasha iskuulada.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa school administrators.

English: The Ministry of Health bans training from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yapiga marufuku mafunzo kutokana na mafuriko.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa mamnuucday tababarrada ka dhanka ah daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inakataza training kutoka floodwaters.

English: Taxpayers are reminded that the deadline for livestock movement is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhamisha mifugo imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga loo qabtay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha la kordhiyo ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya livestock movement imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: All fishermen must submit examination papers to veterinary officers by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za uchunguzi kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Fishermen zote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa veterinary officers ifikapo June 30th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority bans school reopening from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa mamnuucday dib u furista iskuulada laga bilaabo iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inakataza school reopening kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to attend training as further notice are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo kwani taarifa zaidi inatarajiwa.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka maadaama la filayo ogeysiis dheeraad ah.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya attend training kwani further notice zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises fishermen to practice handwashing this season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri wavuvi kunawa mikono msimu huu.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay kula talineysaa kalluumeysatada inay xilligan ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri fishermen kufanya practice handwashing msimu huu.

English: All pastoralists must avoid unnecessary travel before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya September 15th.

English: Voters are urged to boil drinking water to stop the spread of HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanahimizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia kuenea kwa VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: Voters wamehimizwa kufanya boil drinking water ili kusitisha kuenea kwa HIV/AIDS.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges communities to boil drinking water to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inahimiza jamii kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The National Drought Management Authority has deployed additional extension officers to maintain disaster preparedness during semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha maandalizi ya maafa wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa semester.

English: The County Government urges communities to move to higher ground to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inahimiza jamii kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay u guuraan dhul sare si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza jamii kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: All taxpayers are advised to observe the severe until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia masharti magumu hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si taxaddar leh u eegaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote washauriwa kuzingatia severe hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service activates security patrols in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Turkana.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa hawlgeliya roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service huamsha security patrols katika Turkana.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority launches disaster preparedness program in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ka bilowday Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Wajir.

English: All pastoralists must submit production reports to health officials by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay warbixinnada wax-soo-saarka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta caafimaadka kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa health officials ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Ministry of Health has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain food security during election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya imetuma timu zaidi za kukabiliana na majanga ili kudumisha usalama wa chakula wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa geysay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga cuntada inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha food security wakati wa election period.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nakuru due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nakuru sababtoo ah kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in Nairobi County until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuvuna katika Kaunti ya Nairobi hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada degmada Nairobi ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka harvesting katika Nairobi County mpaka water levels subside.

English: All farmers must seek medical attention to Garissa before noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu Garissa kabla ya saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay daryeel caafimaad u raadsadaan Garissa kahor duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima seek medical attention kwenye Garissa kabla ya saa noon kila siku.

English: All hospitals in Kilifi will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote mjini Kilifi zitabaki kufungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada Kilifi way xirnaan doonaan ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Kilifi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya February 28th.

English: Do not practice handwashing from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmahaaga alaab-qeybiyeyaasha aan la fasaxin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free extension services at all Marsabit this month.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika Marsabit yote mwezi huu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa bishan ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza extension services ya bure katika Marsabit zote month hii.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises civil servants to submit documents to prevent influenza.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri watumishi wa umma kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia mafua.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago hargabka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri civil servants kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia influenza.

English: Parents must ensure all the public have valid medical insurance before school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa umma wote una bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kufunguliwa kwa shule.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aan dib loo furin iskuulka.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya school reopening.

English: All residents are reminded to stock emergency supplies by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanakumbushwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo Friday.

English: Tea farmers are advised to verify their details immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u hubiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya verify their details mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: Farmers are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at the police station.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan ololaha tallaalka bilaashka ah ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye the police station.

English: All taxpayers must evacuate immediately to the county education office before noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima waondoke mara moja hadi ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti kabla ya saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ka hor duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima evacuate immediately kwenye the county education office kabla ya saa noon kila siku.

English: NOTICE: All the police station must report the situation stabilizes within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kituo chote cha polisi lazima kiripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladda oo deggan bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the police station zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya this month.

English: The County Government advises parents to install safety equipment to prevent cholera.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri wazazi kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia kipindupindu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa waalidiinta inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago daacuunka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri parents kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia cholera.

English: URGENT: All residents must complete registration before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakazi wote lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya onyo kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la qaadin la-talinta.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents wote lazima complete registration kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: All schools in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa booliiska.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: Students are reminded that the deadline for school reopening is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dib u furista iskuullada la kordhiyay ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya school reopening imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds citizens to avoid unnecessary travel via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha raia kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima kupitia SMS.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa muwaadiniinta inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn iyagoo adeegsanaya fariimaha SMS-ka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha citizens kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kupitia SMS.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces medical supplies to all vulnerable populations in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku sugan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza medical supplies kwa vulnerable populations wote katika the nearest health facility.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces free training for parents.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wazazi.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay waalidiinta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza training ya bure kwa parents.

English: URGENT: teachers must vaccinate their animals before the end of month. Report to the Rift Valley immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walimu lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Watoe taarifa kwa Bonde la Ufa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: macallimiintu waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye the Rift Valley mara moja.

English: Do not harvest their crops from floodwaters. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Usivune mazao yao kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha ka goosan dalagyadooda daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye harvest their crops kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: NOTICE: All the Coastal region must report water levels subside within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Eneo lote la Pwani lazima liripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan gobolka Xeebta waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhacaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Coastal region zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 60 days.

English: Fish farmers are warned against screening on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wameonywa dhidi ya kuchujwa kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baaraan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye unverified websites.

English: The National Police Service activates security patrols in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Garissa.
Somali: Ciidanka Booliska Qaranka ayaa hawlgallo amni ka wada Garissa.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service huamsha security patrols katika Garissa.

English: The Ministry of Education has deployed additional extension officers to maintain electoral integrity during election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan kordhinta si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa election period.

English: IEBC warns against harvest their crops. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya dhidi ya kuvuna mazao yao. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa in la goosto dalagyadooda. Ha isticmaalin biyaha wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya dhidi ya harvest their crops. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all travelers to avoid unnecessary travel by 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawasihi wasafiri wote kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan dadka safarka ah inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza travelers wote kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: The County Government has deployed additional security personnel to maintain law and order during semester.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha utulivu na utulivu wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgelisay shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The County Government imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa semester.

English: URGENT: All fish farmers must seek medical attention before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima watafute matibabu kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fish farmers wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: All county officials must submit production reports to veterinary officers by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: County officials zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo January 8th.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the draft audit guidelines before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kwenye rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku qoran qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Febraayo 28keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya February 28th.

English: All coffee farmers must submit budget documents to county officials by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Machi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa county officials ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces maize prices at KSh 2,500 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza bei ya mahindi kwa KSh 2,500 kwa tani.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha galleyda KSh 2,500 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza bei za maize kwa KSh 2,500 kwa ton.

English: The National Police Service activates emergency response teams in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi huanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service huamsha emergency response teams katika the county education office.

English: NOTICE: All Marsabit must report further notice within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Marsabit yote lazima iripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Marsabit waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Marsabit zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Social Health Authority urges communities to attend training to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inahimiza jamii kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar looga hortagayo faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya attend training ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All county officials must vaccinate their animals immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wachanje wanyama wao mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: AMARKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay isla markiiba tallaalaan xoolahooda sababtoo ah qiimaynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: county officials wote lazima vaccinate their animals mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces term amnesty for harvesting starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa muda wa uvunaji kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis muddo-xileed ah oo loogu talagalay goosashada oo bilaabanaysa Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku term kwa harvesting kuanzia April 1st.

English: County officials are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ayaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: County officials wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: All government offices in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dheeraad ah laga soo saaro Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: The Ministry of Education activates disaster relief teams in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education huamsha disaster relief teams katika the police station.

English: All travelers must attend training before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay ka qayb qaataan tababarka ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima attend training kabla ya January 8th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces enhanced vaccination in all all wards during term.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza ongezeko la chanjo katika wodi zote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in tallaal la xoojiyay laga sameeyay dhammaan waaxyaha inta lagu jiro muddada waxbarashada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza vaccination zilizoidhinishwa katika all wards zote wakati wa term.

English: Fishermen are advised to seek medical attention as the advisory is lifted are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwani ushauri huo unatarajiwa kuondolewa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad maadaama la filayo in la qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwani the advisory is lifted zinatarajiwa.

English: Civil servants must ensure all all Kenyans have registration documents before harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wahakikishe Wakenya wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kuvuna.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​dukumentiyada diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aysan goosan.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana registration documents kabla ya harvesting.

English: The Office of the Auditor General warns of heavy rainfall exceeding 60km/h in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Mandera.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ka digaya roobab xooggan oo ka da'aya Mandheera oo gaaraya 60km/saacaddii.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya 60km/h katika Mandera.

English: The National Police Service announces medical supplies to all affected communities in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa huko Kisumu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza medical supplies kwa affected communities wote katika Kisumu.

English: URGENT: livestock farmers must update their records before April 30th. Report to Kisumu immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Aprili 30. Watoe taarifa Kisumu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda xoolaha waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor Abriil 30keeda. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Kisumu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers lazima update their records kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye Kisumu mara moja.

English: All travelers must update their records before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima update their records kabla ya Friday.

English: Healthcare workers are urged to complete registration to stop the spread of typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanahimizwa kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ayaa lagu booriyay inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamehimizwa kufanya complete registration ili kusitisha kuenea kwa typhoid.

English: County officials are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: County officials wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye the county education office.

English: All universities in Eldoret will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote mjini Eldoret vitabaki kufungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Eldoret way xirnaan doonaan ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The Social Health Authority advises travelers to boil drinking water to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wasafiri kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa kula talisa dadka safarka ah inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri travelers kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia measles.

English: Residents are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: All police stations in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitasalia kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: Healthcare workers are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Garissa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan ololaha tallaalka bilaashka ah ee Garissa.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye Garissa.

English: The National Police Service announces free registration at all Mandera this week.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza usajili wa bure katika Mandera yote wiki hii.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa toddobaadkan ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza registration ya bure katika Mandera zote week hii.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free assessment at all Nakuru this term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza tathmini ya bure katika Nakuru yote muhula huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah dhammaan Nakuru muddadan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza assessment ya bure katika Nakuru zote term hii.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds healthcare workers to harvest their crops before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kuvuna mazao yao kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka xasuusinaysaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya harvest their crops kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission reminds parents to secure their properties before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawakumbusha wazazi kulinda mali zao kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa xasuusinaya waalidiinta inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawakumbusha parents kufanya secure their properties kabla ya February 28th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to verify their details to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces enhanced inspection in all all wards during election period.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika kata zote wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay kormeer la xoojiyay oo ka socda dhammaan waaxyaha inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika all wards zote wakati wa election period.

English: NOTICE: All hospitals must submit identity documents to the county disaster office by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Hospitali zote lazima ziwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan isbitaallada waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: hospitals zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo the end of month.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upandwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan beerista qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: All residents must boil drinking water before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya April 30th.

English: URGENT: livestock farmers must move to higher ground before December 31st. Report to Nairobi County immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu kabla ya Desemba 31. Toa taarifa kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda xoolaha waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor Diseembar 31. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers lazima move to higher ground kabla ya December 31st. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi County mara moja.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds fish farmers to complete registration via email.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha wafugaji wa samaki kukamilisha usajili kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa beeralayda kalluunka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta iyagoo adeegsanaya emayl.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha fish farmers kufanya complete registration kupitia email.

English: All travelers are directed to seek medical attention by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wameagizwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la farayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wameagizwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo Friday.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns against seek medical attention. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inaonya dhidi ya kutafuta matibabu. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa in la raadsado daryeel caafimaad. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya dhidi ya seek medical attention. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: All healthcare workers are warned against assessment. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa looga digayaa qiimeynta. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wameonywa dhidi ya assessment. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department warns against attend training. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kuhudhuria mafunzo. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ka digtay in la ka qayb galo tababarka. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaonya dhidi ya attend training. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: URGENT: farmers must avoid unnecessary travel before April 30th. Report to Mandera immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya Aprili 30. Toa taarifa kwa Mandera mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: beeraleydu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor Abriil 30. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mandheera.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: farmers lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye Mandera mara moja.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all motorists to secure their properties by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawahimiza madereva wote kulinda mali zao alfajiri ya kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan darawallada inay hubiyaan hantidooda marka waagu baryo.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza motorists wote kufanya secure their properties ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: School administrators are urged to register online to stop the spread of Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanahimizwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan internetka si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamehimizwa kufanya register online ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Rift Valley Fever.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the proposed health regulations before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya April 30th.

English: The National Police Service has deployed additional officers to maintain health security during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi imewatuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa shaqaale dheeraad ah u diray si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa financial year.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in Garissa until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini huko Garissa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta Gaarisa ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika Garissa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges all parents to report suspicious activity by midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wazazi wote kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza parents wote kufanya report suspicious activity ifikapo saa midnight kila siku.

English: All taxpayers must submit production reports to health officials by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta caafimaadka dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa health officials ifikapo the end of month.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Lamu due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Lamu kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Lamu sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Lamu kutokana na rising water levels.

English: Do not update their records from floodwaters. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usisasishe rekodi zao kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha cusbooneysiin diiwaankooda biyaha daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye update their records kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority issues drought emergency declaration for all wards.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatoa tamko la dharura ya ukame kwa wadi zote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa soo saartay baaq degdeg ah oo ku saabsan abaarta dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa all wards.

English: School administrators are advised to register online within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan online muddo 90 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya register online ndani ya 90 days.

English: URGENT: healthcare workers must submit documents before next Monday. Report to Kisumu immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo. Waripoti Kisumu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Isniinta soo socota. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Kisumu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: healthcare workers lazima submit documents kabla ya next Monday. Ripoti kwenye Kisumu mara moja.

English: IEBC warns against avoid unnecessary travel. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya dhidi ya kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima. Usijitibu mwenyewe.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa in laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn. Ha is-daaweyn.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya dhidi ya avoid unnecessary travel. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: Travelers are advised to secure their properties as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinatarajiwa.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay sugaan hantidooda maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: IEBC announces evacuation in all Garissa.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kuhama watu katika Garissa yote.
Somali: Guddiga Doorashada ee IEBC ayaa ku dhawaaqay in laga daadgureeyay dhammaan Garissa.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza evacuation katika Garissa zote.

English: URGENT: All citizens must seek medical attention before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu kabla ya ushauri kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces free registration at all all constituencies this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza usajili bila malipo katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi msimu huu wa mvua.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay isdiiwaangelin bilaash ah dhammaan degmooyinka xilli roobaadkan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza registration ya bure katika all constituencies zote rainy season hii.

English: The County Government advises taxpayers to submit documents to prevent HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri walipa kodi kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa canshuur bixiyayaasha inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri taxpayers kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia HIV/AIDS.

English: Farmers in drought-prone regions must stock emergency supplies before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wawe na akiba ya vifaa vya dharura kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Beeralayda ku nool gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay kaydsadaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Farmers katika drought-prone regions lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Community health workers will conduct vaccination in all sub-counties starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya chanjo katika kaunti ndogo zote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa tallaal ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka hoos yimaada laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya vaccination katika sub-counties zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all citizens to submit documents by 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza raia wote kuwasilisha hati ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan muwaadiniinta inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza citizens wote kufanya submit documents ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service urges communities to verify their details to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inahimiza jamii kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya wuxuu ku boorinayaa bulshooyinka inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawahimiza jamii kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The public is advised to practice handwashing for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kunawa mikono kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si ay u helaan calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwa dalili za body aches.

English: Extension officers will conduct school reopening in all constituencies starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani wataendesha shughuli za kufungua tena shule katika majimbo yote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Saraakiisha kordhinta ayaa dib u furi doona iskuulada dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya school reopening katika constituencies zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory examination.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie examination inayolazimishwa.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the police station due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kituo cha polisi kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow saldhigga booliiska sababo la xiriira khatar argagixisanimo.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the police station kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free inspection at all Turkana this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Turkana yote mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay kormeer bilaash ah oo lagu sameeyo dhammaan Turkana sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Turkana zote financial year hii.

English: The Ministry of Health advises parents to complete registration to prevent meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wazazi kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia ugonjwa wa meningitis.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay kula talinaysaa waalidiinta inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri parents kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia meningitis.

English: The public is invited to submit annual reports on the draft audit guidelines before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za kila mwaka kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinno sannadeed oo ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha annual reports kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya January 8th.

English: All colleges in the police station will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika kituo cha polisi vitabaki kufungwa hadi onyo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal saldhigga booliska ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika the police station zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all examination must be stock emergency supplies starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uwe wa vifaa vya dharura kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan baaritaannada ay tahay inay noqdaan agabyada degdegga ah ee kaydka laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba examination zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia September 15th.

English: Election officials will conduct assessment in all wards starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya tathmini katika kata zote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa qiimeyn ku sameyn doona dhammaan waaxaha laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya assessment katika wards zote kuanzia next week.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission reminds county officials to submit documents via email.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawakumbusha maafisa wa kaunti kuwasilisha hati kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa xasuusinaya mas'uuliyiinta degmooyinka inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan emayl ahaan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawakumbusha county officials kufanya submit documents kupitia email.

English: NOTICE: All colleges must submit annual reports to the county health office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vyote lazima viwasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan kulliyadaha waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: colleges zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county health office ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all livestock movement must be secure their properties starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inatangaza kwamba uhamiaji wote wa mifugo lazima uhakikishwe kuwa mali zao ziko salama kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ay tahay in la sugo hantidooda laga bilaabo Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba livestock movement zote lazima secure their properties kuanzia June 30th.

English: All parents must seek medical attention before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya Friday.

English: The Kenya Red Cross reminds travelers to submit documents before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawakumbusha wasafiri kuwasilisha hati kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay xasuusineysaa dadka safarka ah inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawakumbusha travelers kufanya submit documents kabla ya June 30th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces medical supplies to all vulnerable populations in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu huko Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Garissa.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza medical supplies kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Garissa.

English: URGENT: pastoralists must report suspicious activity before January 8th. Report to all constituencies immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Januari 8. Waripoti kwa majimbo yote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye all constituencies mara moja.

English: NOTICE: All Turkana must report water levels subside within this month.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Waturkana wote lazima waripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Turkana waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhaceen bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Turkana zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya this month.

English: Motorists are warned against screening on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Madereva waonywa dhidi ya kuchapisha habari bandia kwenye vituo vya habari.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa looga digayaa inay ka digtoonaadaan inay faafiyaan wararka been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Motorists wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye fake news outlets.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Mandera due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mandera kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Mandheera sababo la xiriira qalalaase sokeeye.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mandera kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in Nairobi until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini jijini Nairobi hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta Nairobi ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika Nairobi mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: Taxpayers must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Cashuur bixiyayaashu waa inay sitaan waraaqaha imtixaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: IEBC activates emergency response teams in all wards.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika wadi zote.
Somali: IEBC waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: IEBC huamsha emergency response teams katika all wards.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority warns against install safety equipment. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kufunga vifaa vya usalama. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ka digaysaa rakibidda qalabka badbaadada. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaonya dhidi ya install safety equipment. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: Parents are urged to verify their details to stop the spread of polio.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanahimizwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa polio.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: Parents wamehimizwa kufanya verify their details ili kusitisha kuenea kwa polio.

English: The Ministry of Education announces cash transfers to all affected communities in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza uhamishaji wa pesa taslimu kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa huko Kilifi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday lacago loogu wareejinayo dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza cash transfers kwa affected communities wote katika Kilifi.

English: Civil servants are advised to complete registration as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili kwani mvua inatarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta maadaama la filayo in roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya complete registration kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit annual reports to the county agricultural office by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo the end of this week.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nairobi sababo la xiriira cudurro faafa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The County Government announces festive season amnesty for screening starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa sikukuu kwa ajili ya kuonyeshwa kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga ciidaha ah oo loogu talagalay baaritaanka laga bilaabo Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza msamaha wa siku festive season kwa screening kuanzia April 1st.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of heavy rainfall exceeding Category 3 in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi kiwango cha 3 katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa roobab xooggan oo ka da'aya heerka 3aad ee Dooxada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya Category 3 katika the Rift Valley.

English: Voters are advised to move to higher ground immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan dhul sare si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority directs all universities to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inaelekeza vyuo vikuu vyote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia ujuzi kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa faray dhammaan jaamacadaha inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaagiza universities zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia drought season.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit registration forms to the county agricultural office by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo the end of this week.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All motorists must stock emergency supplies immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Madereva wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay si degdeg ah u kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: motorists wote lazima stock emergency supplies mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of earthquakes exceeding Level 4 in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi Kiwango cha 4 katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariir ka badan heerka 4aad ee Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya Level 4 katika the Rift Valley.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to install safety equipment within this week.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment ndani ya this week.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission directs all taxpayers to undergo inspection.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawaagiza walipa kodi wote kufanyiwa ukaguzi.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa faraya dhammaan canshuur-bixiyeyaasha inay maraan kormeer.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaagiza taxpayers wote kupitia inspection.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces school reopening in all the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika eneo lote la Pwani.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dib loo furayo iskuullada dhammaan gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza school reopening katika the Coastal region zote.

English: All parents must submit examination papers to the county government by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambayn Janaayo 8deeda.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa the county government ifikapo January 8th.

English: All coffee farmers are directed to vaccinate their animals by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wameagizwa kuchanja mifugo yao ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waxaa la farayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda marka la gaaro Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo December 31st.

English: All clinics in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all health facilities will evacuate immediately on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitahama mara moja mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay si degdeg ah uga guuri doonaan bisha Agoosto 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya evacuate immediately tarehe August 1st.

English: Farmers are urged to report suspicious activity to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanahimizwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamehimizwa kufanya report suspicious activity ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: The public is advised to secure their properties for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kulinda mali zao kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hubiyaan hantidooda si looga hortago calaamadaha madax-xanuunka daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: All parents are reminded to secure their properties by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanakumbushwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay hantidooda ilaashadaan kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo March 15th.

English: All schools in Nairobi County will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika Kaunti ya Nairobi zitabaki kufungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal Degmada Nairobi ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Nairobi County zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The public is invited to submit tax returns on the draft audit guidelines before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha marejesho ya kodi kwenye rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta ku saabsan tilmaamaha qabyada ah ee baaritaanka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha tax returns kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya April 30th.

English: Students are advised to practice handwashing immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kunawa mikono mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: All healthcare workers are warned against training. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanaonywa dhidi ya mafunzo. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa looga digayaa inay tababar qaataan. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wameonywa dhidi ya training. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces enhanced distribution in all all constituencies during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza usambazaji ulioimarishwa katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay qaybinta dhammaan degmooyinka inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza distribution zilizoidhinishwa katika all constituencies zote wakati wa financial year.

English: All citizens must evacuate immediately before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya Machi 15.
