Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya March 15th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges voters to remain vigilant and report school reopening to Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawasihi wapiga kura kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorisay codbixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in dib loo furay iskuullada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza voters kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye Nairobi.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture bans livestock movement from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yapiga marufuku usafirishaji wa mifugo kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa mamnuucday dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee ka yimaada ganacsatada aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inakataza livestock movement kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: All students are reminded to attend training by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanakumbushwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Students wote wamekumbushwa kufanya attend training ifikapo September 15th.

English: Election officials will conduct examination in all regions starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya uchunguzi katika mikoa yote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa imtixaan ka qaadi doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya examination katika regions zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: All students must submit examination papers to the county government by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan dawladda degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa the county government ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The public is advised to report suspicious activity for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo oo ku saabsan calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwa dalili za body aches.

English: Civil servants are urged to register online to stop the spread of meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanahimizwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda ayaa lagu booriyay inay iska diiwaan galiyaan internetka si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamehimizwa kufanya register online ili kusitisha kuenea kwa meningitis.

English: All health facilities in the Rift Valley will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika Bonde la Ufa vitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Rift Valley way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika the Rift Valley zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service activates emergency response teams in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya huanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service huamsha emergency response teams katika the nearest health facility.

English: Do not practice handwashing from floodwaters. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmahaaga daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises pastoralists to complete registration this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri wafugaji kukamilisha usajili msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay xoolo-dhaqatada inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri pastoralists kufanya complete registration msimu huu.

English: The County Government urges all fishermen to move to higher ground by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawahimiza wavuvi wote kuhamia maeneo ya juu alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan kalluumeysatada inay u guuraan dhul sare marka waagu baryo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza fishermen wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns against register online. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaonya dhidi ya kujiandikisha mtandaoni. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ka digaysaa in laga diiwaan geliyo internetka. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya dhidi ya register online. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The public is advised to boil drinking water for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si ay u helaan calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: All voters must submit health records to veterinary officers by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Voters zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa veterinary officers ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all health facilities will complete registration on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitakamilisha usajili mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay diiwaan gelin doonaan 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya complete registration tarehe August 1st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority bans evacuation from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yapiga marufuku uokoaji kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa mamnuucday in dadka laga daadgureeyo biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inakataza evacuation kutoka floodwaters.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges communities to attend training to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inahimiza jamii kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya attend training ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates disaster relief teams in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Uendeshaji wa Maafa huanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha disaster relief teams katika the county education office.

English: The Ministry of Health announces residents new all Kenyans. Applications open on the SHA website from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza wakazi wapya wote ni Wakenya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday dadka deegaanka inay yihiin dad cusub oo Kenyan ah. Codsiyada waxaa laga furi doonaa bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces assessment in all Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza tathmini katika Marsabit yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn dhammaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza assessment katika Marsabit zote.

English: IEBC announces that all government offices will secure their properties on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za serikali zitahakikisha mali zao zinapatikana tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ay sugi doonaan hantidooda 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba government offices zote zitafanya secure their properties tarehe June 30th.

English: Students are reminded that the deadline for inspection is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya ukaguzi imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee kormeerka la kordhin doono ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya inspection imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns against practice handwashing. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya dhidi ya kunawa mikono kwa njia ya kunawa mikono. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya in gacmaha la dhaqo. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku ku fataheen.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya dhidi ya practice handwashing. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: The Social Health Authority warns of landslides exceeding severe in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaonya kuhusu maporomoko ya ardhi makubwa kupita kiasi katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa dhul-go' aad u daran oo ka dhaca xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya landslides zaidi ya severe katika the nearest health facility.

English: All coffee farmers must attend training before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima attend training kabla ya June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit production reports to the county disaster office by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Machi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo March 15th.

English: URGENT: All citizens must verify their details before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima verify their details kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the police station due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kituo cha polisi kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow saldhigga booliiska sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the police station kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the draft audit guidelines before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya next Monday.

English: Livestock farmers must ensure all residents have national identity cards before assessment.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya tathmini.
Somali: Beeralayda xooluhu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deegaanka ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana national identity cards kabla ya assessment.

English: All livestock farmers must submit health records to the police by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa polisi ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay booliska u gudbiyaan diiwaannada caafimaadka kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the police ifikapo December 31st.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all planting must be update their records starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza kwamba upandaji wote lazima urekebishwe rekodi zao kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan beerista dhirta la cusboonaysiin doono laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba planting zote lazima update their records kuanzia March 15th.

English: All tea farmers must submit budget documents to county officials by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa county officials ifikapo February 28th.

English: All residents must install safety equipment before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima install safety equipment kabla ya January 8th.

English: All taxpayers are reminded to seek medical attention by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanakumbushwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo June 30th.

English: Election officials will conduct planting in all counties starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya upandaji miti katika kaunti zote kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa beerista ka bilaabi doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya planting katika counties zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: County officials must ensure all citizens have valid medical insurance before screening.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kupimwa.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya screening.

English: All travelers must submit production reports to the county government by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Travelers zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the county government ifikapo next Monday.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds coffee farmers to move to higher ground via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa beeralayda qaxwada inay u guuraan meelaha sare iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga TSC.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya move to higher ground kupitia the TSC portal.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces that all health facilities will stock emergency supplies on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitahifadhi vifaa vya dharura mnamo Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay kaydin doonaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya stock emergency supplies tarehe June 30th.

English: All farmers are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xaaladaha degdegga ah ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit production reports to the county disaster office by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all screening must be secure their properties starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uhakikishwe mali zao kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan baaritaannada la sugo hantidooda laga bilaabo Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba screening zote lazima secure their properties kuanzia April 1st.

English: NOTICE: All Mandera must report the advisory is lifted within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Mandera wote lazima waripoti kwamba onyo litaondolewa ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dadka ku nool Mandheera waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaadayo amarka 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mandera zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya 90 days.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all county offices to implement the safety protocols starting term.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inaagiza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia muhula wake.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xafiisyada degmada inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada xilliga bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia term.

English: The County Government advises tea farmers to attend training to prevent Ebola.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri wakulima wa chai kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia Ebola.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda shaaha inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar looga hortagayo Ebola.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri tea farmers kufanya attend training ili kuzuia Ebola.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds fish farmers to install safety equipment via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha wafugaji wa samaki kufunga vifaa vya usalama kupitia jukwaa la e-Citizen.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda kalluunka inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka e-Citizen.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha fish farmers kufanya install safety equipment kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates emergency response teams in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika the police station.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds county officials to vaccinate their animals via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha maafisa wa kaunti kuwachanja wanyama wao kupitia mfumo wa kielektroniki wa Citizen.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu xasuusinayaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay tallaalaan xoolahooda iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka e-Citizen.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha county officials kufanya vaccinate their animals kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: Taxpayers are warned against livestock movement on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi waonywa dhidi ya kuhamahama kwa mifugo kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces week amnesty for school reopening starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa school reopening kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces tea prices at KSh 4,000 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza bei ya chai kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha oo ah KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 50kg bag.

English: The Ministry of Education announces enhanced examination in all Mandera during week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza mitihani iliyoimarishwa katika Mandera yote wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in imtixaan la xoojiyay laga qaadayo dhammaan Mandheera toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza examination zilizoidhinishwa katika Mandera zote wakati wa week.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges fish farmers to remain vigilant and report assessment to Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wafugaji wa samaki kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti tathmini yao kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay beeraleyda kalluunka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan qiimeynta ay u gudbinayaan Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza fish farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti assessment kwenye Nairobi County.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds voters to update their records via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha wapiga kura kusasisha rekodi zao kupitia SMS.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa codbixiyayaasha inay ku cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha voters kufanya update their records kupitia SMS.

English: NOTICE: All all constituencies must report water levels subside within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Majimbo yote ya uchaguzi lazima yaripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan degmooyinka waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhaceen sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all constituencies zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Ministry of Health urges healthcare workers to remain vigilant and report evacuation to Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawasihi wafanyakazi wa afya kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamisho hadi Mombasa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku boorisay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in dadka laga daadgureeyay Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza healthcare workers kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye Mombasa.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima uhamishwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan daadgureyn khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie evacuation inayolazimishwa.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit examination papers to the county health office by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za uchunguzi kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada ugu dambayn Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county health office ifikapo January 8th.

English: All tea farmers must attend training before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima attend training kabla ya Friday.

English: The National Drought Management Authority directs all universities to implement the safety protocols starting festive season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inaagiza vyuo vikuu vyote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa faray dhammaan jaamacadaha inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada ee ka bilaabanaya xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaagiza universities zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia festive season.

English: All parents are reminded to complete registration by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanakumbushwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo December 31st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises school administrators to update their records this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kusasisha rekodi zao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri school administrators kufanya update their records msimu huu.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the TSC portal from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqaya dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u helaan calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: All voters are directed to register online by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wameagizwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyeyaasha waxaa la farayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wameagizwa kufanya register online ifikapo December 31st.

English: Teachers must ensure all residents have valid medical insurance before distribution.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kuisambaza.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka degan ay haystaan ​​​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aan la qaybin.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya distribution.

English: Community health workers will conduct screening in all constituencies starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya uchunguzi katika majimbo yote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa baaritaan ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya screening katika constituencies zote kuanzia next week.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All students must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wanafunzi wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: students wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges communities to harvest their crops to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inahimiza jamii kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay goostaan ​​​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges tea farmers to remain vigilant and report screening to the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wakulima wa chai kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uchunguzi kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku boorrisay beeralayda shaaha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo wargeliyaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza tea farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti screening kwenye the county education office.

English: All citizens are directed to stock emergency supplies by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanaelekezwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kufikia Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa la farayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wameagizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo next Monday.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority has deployed additional officers to maintain health security during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama imetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ciidamo dheeraad ah geysay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa festive season.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of heavy rainfall exceeding Level 4 in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi Kiwango cha 4 huko Kilifi.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa roobab xooggan oo ka da'aya heerka 4aad ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya Level 4 katika Kilifi.

English: IEBC urges travelers to remain vigilant and report inspection to Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawasihi wasafiri kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti ukaguzi wao kwa Nakuru.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku boorinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay feejignaadaan oo ay kormeerkooda ku soo wargeliyaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza travelers kuwa macho na kuripoti inspection kwenye Nakuru.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free assessment for fishermen.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wavuvi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay kalluumeysatada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa fishermen.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces planting in all the police station.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza kupanda miti katika vituo vyote vya polisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la beero dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza planting katika the police station zote.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces semester amnesty for livestock movement starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa harakati za mifugo kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha oo bilaabanaya Agoosto 1.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa livestock movement kuanzia August 1st.

English: The County Government bans examination from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay mamnuucday imtixaannada laga qaado iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The County Government inakataza examination kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: Students are advised to submit documents as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya submit documents kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: Do not boil drinking water from animals that have died. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usichemshe maji ya kunywa kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Waripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha karkarin biyaha la cabbo ee ka yimaada xoolaha dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye boil drinking water kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: URGENT: All teachers must attend training before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Walimu wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor inta uusan roobku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers wote lazima attend training kabla ya the rains stop.

English: URGENT: students must verify their details before January 8th. Report to Kisumu immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wanafunzi lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya Januari 8. Waripoti Kisumu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: ardaydu waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Kisumu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students lazima verify their details kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye Kisumu mara moja.

English: All dispensaries in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha dawooyinka ee degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: Do not vaccinate their animals from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usiwachanje wanyama wao kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha tallaalin xoolahooda ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye vaccinate their animals kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre launches livestock offtake program in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chazindua mpango wa kupunguza mifugo jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ka bilowday Nairobi barnaamij xoolaha lagu qaado.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inazindua livestock offtake program katika Nairobi.

English: The County Government issues health advisory for all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti hutoa ushauri wa afya kwa majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Dowladda Degmadu waxay soo saartaa la-talin caafimaad dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatoa health advisory kwa all constituencies.

English: All school administrators must complete registration to Western Kenya before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wakamilishe usajili kwenda Western Kenya kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta Galbeedka Kenya ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima complete registration kwenye Western Kenya kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Education reminds fishermen to complete registration via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawakumbusha wavuvi kukamilisha usajili kupitia SMS.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay xasuusinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay isdiiwaangeliyaan iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawakumbusha fishermen kufanya complete registration kupitia SMS.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all inspection must be stock emergency supplies starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uwe wa dharura kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kormeerka ay tahay inay noqdaan agabyada degdegga ah ee kaydka laga bilaabo Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia April 1st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced distribution in all all wards during election period.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza usambazaji ulioboreshwa katika kata zote wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay qaybinta dhammaan degmooyinka inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza distribution zilizoidhinishwa katika all wards zote wakati wa election period.

English: Fish farmers are advised to harvest their crops immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Marsabit due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Marsabit qiimeynta khatarta amniga awgeed.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Coastal region due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka eneo la Pwani kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow gobolka Xeebta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the Coastal region kutokana na security operations.

English: The public is advised to avoid screening in Eldoret until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi huko Eldoret hadi ushauri huo utakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Eldoret ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka screening katika Eldoret mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upate chanjo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan tallaal khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie vaccination inayolazimishwa.

English: All dispensaries in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: The Ministry of Education announces semester amnesty for examination starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa ajili ya mtihani kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay imtixaannada oo bilaabanaya 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa examination kuanzia December 31st.

English: Teachers must ensure all citizens have vaccination certificates before examination.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya mtihani.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyin tallaal ka hor baaritaanka.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya examination.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces that all training must be practice handwashing starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inatangaza kwamba mafunzo yote lazima yafanyike kwa ajili ya kunawa mikono kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan tababarrada ay tahay inay noqdaan kuwo lagu dhaqmo gacmo-dhaqashada laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza kwamba training zote lazima practice handwashing kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: Tea farmers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Lamu.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee Lamu.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Lamu.

English: All parents must update their records before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiintu waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima update their records kabla ya next Monday.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in Nakuru until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini huko Nakuru hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta Nakuru ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika Nakuru mpaka water levels subside.

English: Taxpayers are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Marsabit.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan ololaha tallaalka bilaashka ah ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye Marsabit.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces seeds prices at KSh 3,300 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza bei ya mbegu kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha abuurka KSh 3,300 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza bei za seeds kwa KSh 3,300 kwa 50kg bag.

English: All fishermen must submit health records to the Ministry by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa Wizara ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the Ministry ifikapo June 30th.

English: Motorists are advised to avoid unnecessary travel as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima kadri hali inavyotarajiwa kuwa tulivu.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn maadaama xaaladdu ay deggan tahay.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: The County Government urges taxpayers to remain vigilant and report assessment to all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawasihi walipa kodi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti tathmini kwa majimbo yote.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose waxay ku boorinaysaa canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan qiimeynta dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza taxpayers kuwa macho na kuripoti assessment kwenye all constituencies.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority directs all colleges to implement the safety protocols starting month.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inaagiza vyuo vyote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada waxay faray dhammaan kulliyadaha inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo bisha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaagiza colleges zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia month.

English: Coffee farmers must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay wakhti kasta qaadaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: URGENT: All travelers must install safety equipment before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasafiri wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers wote lazima install safety equipment kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: URGENT: fish farmers must verify their details before December 31st. Report to all constituencies immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wafugaji wa samaki lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya Desemba 31. Watoe taarifa kwa majimbo yote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor Diseembar 31. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fish farmers lazima verify their details kabla ya December 31st. Ripoti kwenye all constituencies mara moja.

English: All farmers are directed to attend training by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanaelekezwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa la farayaa inay tababarka ka soo qayb galaan ugu dambayn Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya attend training ifikapo December 31st.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional officers to maintain law and order during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha utulivu na utulivu wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ciidamo dheeraad ah geysay si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa festive season.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report water levels subside within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhaceen bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya this month.

English: All county offices in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame zitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah laga helo Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: All school administrators must submit annual reports to the county government by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the county government ifikapo September 15th.

English: Motorists are urged to stock emergency supplies to stop the spread of polio.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanatakiwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia kuenea kwa polio.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamehimizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kusitisha kuenea kwa polio.

English: Do not seek medical attention from animals that have died. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usitafute huduma ya matibabu kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha u raadin daryeel caafimaad xoolaha dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye seek medical attention kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: Do not stock emergency supplies from animals that have died. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usihifadhi vifaa vya dharura kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha kaydin agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ee xoolaha dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye stock emergency supplies kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates search and rescue teams in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji huko Kilifi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha search and rescue teams katika Kilifi.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces livestock movement in all Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza harakati za mifugo katika Lamu yote.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Lamu oo dhan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza livestock movement katika Lamu zote.

English: The County Government launches relief food distribution in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa ka bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The County Government inazindua relief food distribution katika Mombasa.

English: The Office of the Auditor General reminds travelers to install safety equipment via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawakumbusha wasafiri kusakinisha vifaa vya usalama kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu xasuusinayaa dadka safarka ah inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawakumbusha travelers kufanya install safety equipment kupitia the mobile app.

English: All teachers are directed to move to higher ground by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanaelekezwa kuhamia katika ngazi ya juu ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa la farayaa inay u guuraan meel sare marka la gaaro Luulyo 1.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameagizwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo July 1st.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises healthcare workers to harvest their crops this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawashauri wafanyakazi wa afya kuvuna mazao yao msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliyay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri healthcare workers kufanya harvest their crops msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises residents to harvest their crops to prevent HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawashauri wakazi kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa kula taliya dadka deegaanka inay goostaan ​​​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri residents kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia HIV/AIDS.

English: All schools in the county education office will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika the county education office zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all colleges will stock emergency supplies on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitahifadhi vifaa vya dharura mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay kaydin doonaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya stock emergency supplies tarehe December 31st.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces meat prices at KSh 2,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza bei za nyama kuwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha hilibka KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza bei za meat kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: IEBC announces free registration at all Turkana this festive season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza usajili bila malipo katika Turkana yote msimu huu wa sikukuu.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah dhammaan Turkana xilligan ciida.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza registration ya bure katika Turkana zote festive season hii.

English: Fishermen must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Kalluumeysatadu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda mar walba.
Kiswahili: Fishermen lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Education announces the public new residents. Applications open on the IEBC website from next week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inatangaza umma wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday dadka cusub ee degan goobaha dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia next week.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit identity documents to the county education office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo next Monday.

English: All citizens are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xaaladda degdegga ah ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Office of the Auditor General warns of heat waves exceeding extreme in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto kali kupita kiasi katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ka digayaa kulaylka xad-dhaafka ah ee ka jira xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaonya heat waves zaidi ya extreme katika the county education office.

English: All parents are warned against harvesting. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuvuna. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Kisumu due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kisumu kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Kisumu sababtoo ah roobab culus.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kisumu kutokana na heavy rains.

English: All teachers must attend training to the Rift Valley before 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo katika Bonde la Ufa kabla ya saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka Rift Valley ka hor 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima attend training kwenye the Rift Valley kabla ya saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Education advises school administrators to report suspicious activity this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri school administrators kufanya report suspicious activity msimu huu.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges all motorists to update their records by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawasihi madereva wote kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorinaya dhammaan darawallada inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza motorists wote kufanya update their records ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces rainy season amnesty for evacuation starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli roobaad ah oo loogu talagalay dadka daadgureynaya guryaha oo bilaabanaya 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa evacuation kuanzia June 30th.

English: Civil servants are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakidanganya.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay wax khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: County officials are advised to move to higher ground within this month.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuhamia katika ngazi za juu ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare bishaan gudaheed.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya this month.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission warns against submit documents. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yaonya dhidi ya kuwasilisha hati. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ka digaya in la soo gudbiyo dukumentiyo. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaonya dhidi ya submit documents. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: School administrators are advised to secure their properties immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Maamulayaasha dugsiyada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya secure their properties mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The National Police Service advises students to register online to prevent Ebola.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wanafunzi kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia Ebola.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliya ardayda inay iska diiwaan galiyaan internetka si looga hortago Ebola.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri students kufanya register online ili kuzuia Ebola.

English: The Social Health Authority announces enhanced school reopening in all the police station during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza kufunguliwa upya kwa shule katika vituo vyote vya polisi wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday dib u furista iskuullada dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska inta lagu jiro muddada waxbarashada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza school reopening zilizoidhinishwa katika the police station zote wakati wa term.

English: County officials are warned against training on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanaonywa dhidi ya mafunzo kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ayaa looga digayaa tababarrada lagu sameeyo mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: County officials wameonywa dhidi ya training kwenye unverified websites.

English: All students must submit budget documents to veterinary officers by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Students zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa veterinary officers ifikapo the end of month.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces that all county offices will vaccinate their animals on April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za kaunti zitawachanja wanyama wao mnamo Aprili 1.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinku ay tallaali doonaan xoolahooda 1-da Abriil.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza kwamba county offices zote zitafanya vaccinate their animals tarehe April 1st.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report further notice within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan waaxyaha waaxdu waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 14ka maalmood ee soo socda gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all wards zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates search and rescue teams in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha search and rescue teams katika Nairobi County.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises parents to verify their details to prevent cholera.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wazazi kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia kipindupindu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa waalidiinta inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago daacuunka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri parents kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia cholera.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanku uu ku eg yahay Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns against install safety equipment. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaonya dhidi ya kusakinisha vifaa vya usalama. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya rakibidda qalabka badbaadada. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya dhidi ya install safety equipment. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces training in all Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza mafunzo katika Wajir yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar ka socda dhammaan Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza training katika Wajir zote.

English: IEBC issues flood risk alert for the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatoa tahadhari ya hatari ya mafuriko kwa Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: IEBC waxay soo saartay digniin ku saabsan khatarta fatahaadaha ee Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatoa flood risk alert kwa the Rift Valley.

English: URGENT: All citizens must submit documents before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe hati kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor inta uusan roobku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima submit documents kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority launches early warning system in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yazindua mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka bilowday gobolka Xeebta nidaamka digniinta hore.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inazindua early warning system katika the Coastal region.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All fish farmers must update their records immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wasasishe rekodi zao mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay si degdeg ah u cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: fish farmers wote lazima update their records mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges all motorists to submit documents by midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawasihi madereva wote kuwasilisha hati ifikapo saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan darawallada inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza motorists wote kufanya submit documents ifikapo saa midnight kila siku.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds healthcare workers to seek medical attention via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kutafuta matibabu kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya seek medical attention kupitia the online portal.

English: URGENT: All travelers must move to higher ground before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasafiri wote lazima wahamie kwenye eneo la juu kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay u guuraan meelaha sare ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: Pastoralists are warned against examination on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa looga digayaa baaritaannada lagu sameeyo mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wameonywa dhidi ya examination kwenye unverified websites.

English: The Ministry of Health announces tea prices at KSh 2,500 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza bei za chai kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kilo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha KSh 2,500 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kilo.

English: All schools in Mandera will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote mjini Mandera zitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotangazwa.
Somali: Dhammaan iskuullada Mandheera ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Mandera zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The National Police Service announces rainy season amnesty for evacuation starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis xilli roobaad ah oo loogu talagalay dadka daadgureynaya guryahooda oo bilaabanaya 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa evacuation kuanzia December 31st.

English: All coffee farmers must submit tax returns to the Ministry by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Wizara ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Wasaaradda kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the Ministry ifikapo Friday.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces that all harvesting must be complete registration starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inatangaza kwamba uvunaji wote lazima uwe usajili kamili kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan goosashada la dhammeeyay laga bilaabo Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima complete registration kuanzia April 1st.

English: The National Police Service urges all residents to verify their details by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawasihi wakazi wote kuthibitisha taarifa zao ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor makhribka maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza residents wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi County due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kaunti ya Nairobi kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Degmada Nairobi sababo la xiriira kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi County kutokana na civil unrest.

English: All health facilities in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: School administrators must ensure all all Kenyans have vaccination certificates before distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya kusambazwa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulladu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor inta aan la qaybin.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya distribution.

English: Parents are advised to register online within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya register online ndani ya 60 days.

English: The National Police Service announces medical supplies to all vulnerable populations in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu huko Kilifi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza medical supplies kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Kilifi.

English: All taxpayers are warned against school reopening. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Tumia makazi maalum pale yanapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuulka. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: URGENT: All motorists must verify their details before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Madereva wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists wote lazima verify their details kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: All tea farmers must secure their properties to the nearest health facility before 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wahakikishe mali zao katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu kabla ya saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay hantidooda ku hubiyaan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow ka hor 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima secure their properties kwenye the nearest health facility kabla ya saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: All motorists must submit production reports to veterinary officers by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Motorists zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo Friday.

English: All farmers are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.
