English: All fishermen must evacuate immediately before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay isla markiiba qaxaan ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces wheat prices at KSh 5,500 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza bei ya ngano kuwa KSh 5,500 kwa kila gunia la kilo 90.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha sarreenka oo ah KSh 5,500 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 5,500 kwa 90kg bag.

English: All hospitals in the county education office will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti zitabaki kufungwa hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada ku yaal xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika the county education office zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All residents must attend training immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wakazi wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay si degdeg ah uga soo qayb galaan tababarka sababo la xiriira kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: residents wote lazima attend training mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All voters must vaccinate their animals immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wachanje wanyama wao mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay si degdeg ah u tallaalaan xoolahooda sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: voters wote lazima vaccinate their animals mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the TSC portal from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Friday.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department activates search and rescue teams in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji huko Mandera.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department huamsha search and rescue teams katika Mandera.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free malaria screening at all Eldoret this drought season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika Eldoret yote msimu huu wa ukame.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo ku saabsan duumada dhammaan Eldoret xilligan abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika Eldoret zote drought season hii.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to avoid planting. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuepuka kupanda. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kuepuka planting. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces assessment in all the police station.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza tathmini katika vituo vyote vya polisi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn ka socota dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza assessment katika the police station zote.

English: Do not complete registration from animals that have died. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usikamilishe usajili kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha buuxin diiwaangelinta xoolaha dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dawladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye complete registration kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Western Kenya until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo Magharibi mwa Kenya hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarrada Galbeedka Kenya ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika Western Kenya mpaka water levels subside.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku jira Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga ee Degmada ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya June 30th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission reminds travelers to update their records via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawakumbusha wasafiri kusasisha rekodi zao kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu xasuusinayaa dadka safarka ah inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka ee TSC.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawakumbusha travelers kufanya update their records kupitia the TSC portal.

English: The National Police Service announces that all harvesting must be stock emergency supplies starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inatangaza kwamba uvunaji wote lazima uwe wa vifaa vya dharura kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan goosashada ay tahay inay noqdaan agab gurmad ah oo kayd ah laga bilaabo Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia June 30th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ka digaysaa in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha cunin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: All travelers must submit registration forms to county officials by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Travelers zote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa county officials ifikapo September 15th.

English: County officials are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces enhanced voter registration in all Mandera during week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza kuimarishwa kwa usajili wa wapiga kura katika Mandera yote wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee dhammaan Mandheera toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza voter registration zilizoidhinishwa katika Mandera zote wakati wa week.

English: All voters must submit examination papers to the police by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani polisi ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan booliiska ugu dambayn 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Voters zote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa the police ifikapo February 28th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the county education office due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow xafiiska waxbarashada degmada sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the county education office kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: School administrators are advised to report suspicious activity within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo muddo 60 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya 60 days.

English: Residents are warned against evacuation on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wameonywa dhidi ya kuhama kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan goobaha ay ku kulmaan iyagoo adeegsanaya WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Residents wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates disaster relief teams in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha disaster relief teams katika the nearest health facility.

English: All motorists are warned against screening. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanaonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi. Watumie wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa looga digayaa inay baaraan. Isticmaal iibiyayaasha idman marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wameonywa dhidi ya screening. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in Turkana until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule huko Turkana hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulada Turkana ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika Turkana mpaka the rains stop.

English: Students must ensure all residents have national identity cards before inspection.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya ukaguzi.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka degan ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana national identity cards kabla ya inspection.

English: The County Government announces livestock movement in all Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza harakati za mifugo katika Garissa yote.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhaqdhaqa xoolaha oo ka socda Garissa oo dhan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza livestock movement katika Garissa zote.

English: All county officials must submit identity documents to veterinary officers by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: County officials zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa veterinary officers ifikapo February 28th.

English: All fish farmers are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanashauriwa kuzingatia mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges parents to remain vigilant and report examination to the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi wazazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uchunguzi wao kwa Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa waalidiinta ku boorriyay inay feejignaadaan oo ay baaritaanka u soo gudbiyaan Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza parents kuwa macho na kuripoti examination kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: Students are warned against training on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanaonywa dhidi ya mafunzo kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa looga digayaa inay ku tababaraan baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Students wameonywa dhidi ya training kwenye social media platforms.

English: The public is advised to submit documents for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwasilisha hati za dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo muujinaya calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya submit documents kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises voters to avoid unnecessary travel this season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri wapiga kura kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima msimu huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa codbixiyeyaasha inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri voters kufanya avoid unnecessary travel msimu huu.

English: All students are warned against evacuation. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan. Isticmaal iibiyayaal sharciyeysan meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Students wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: All students are advised to observe the extreme until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia hali iliyokithiri hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si taxaddar leh u eegaan ilaa ogeysiis dambe.
Kiswahili: Students wote washauriwa kuzingatia extreme hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upate chanjo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan tallaal khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie vaccination inayolazimishwa.

English: All taxpayers must submit production reports to county officials by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmooyinka Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa county officials ifikapo next Monday.

English: All motorists must submit tax returns to the police by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa polisi ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta booliiska dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the police ifikapo the end of this week.

English: IEBC urges all fish farmers to complete registration by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawahimiza wafugaji wote wa samaki kukamilisha usajili ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ugu dambayn duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza fish farmers wote kufanya complete registration ifikapo saa noon kila siku.

English: The public is advised to boil drinking water for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si ay u helaan calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwa dalili za high fever.

English: Do not practice handwashing from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmaha ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces planting in all Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza kupanda miti katika Nakuru yote.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la beero dhammaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza planting katika Nakuru zote.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises tea farmers to attend training this season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri wakulima wa chai kuhudhuria mafunzo msimu huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda shaaha inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri tea farmers kufanya attend training msimu huu.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises livestock farmers to evacuate immediately this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri wafugaji kuhama mara moja msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay beeralayda xoolaha inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri livestock farmers kufanya evacuate immediately msimu huu.

English: The National Police Service announces training in all Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza mafunzo katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay tababar ka socda dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza training katika Western Kenya zote.

English: All fishermen must submit tax returns to the Ministry by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Wizara ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Wasaaradda kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the Ministry ifikapo April 30th.

English: All county officials are warned against evacuation. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanaonywa dhidi ya uokoaji. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: NOTICE: All the nearest health facility must report security clearance is obtained within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu lazima kiripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow waa inay soo sheegaan in la helo ogolaansho amni 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the nearest health facility zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya 30 days.

English: Parents must carry annual reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wabebe ripoti za mwaka wakati wote.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay sitaan warbixinno sannadeed mar walba.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wabebe annual reports wakati wote.

English: IEBC announces that all health facilities will install safety equipment on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitaweka vifaa vya usalama mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay rakibi doonaan qalabka badbaadada 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya install safety equipment tarehe December 31st.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All coffee farmers must report suspicious activity immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay isla markiiba soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo oo ay ugu wacan tahay heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: coffee farmers wote lazima report suspicious activity mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces that all health facilities will update their records on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitasasisha rekodi zao mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay cusbooneysiin doonaan diiwaankooda Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya update their records tarehe December 31st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority directs all parents to undergo school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawaagiza wazazi wote kufungua shule.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa faray dhammaan waalidiinta inay dib u furaan iskuullada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaagiza parents wote kupitia school reopening.

English: County officials in border counties must vaccinate their animals before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ee gobollada xuduudda ku yaal waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: County officials katika border counties lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya further notice.

English: Teachers are advised to complete registration immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kufanya complete registration mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: Coffee farmers are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Marsabit due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Marsabit qiimeynta khatarta amniga awgeed.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: Motorists must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Madereva lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Darawalada waa inay sitaan waraaqaha baaritaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Motorists lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: The Teachers Service Commission launches disaster preparedness program in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na majanga mjini Kisumu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka bilaabay Kisumu barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Kisumu.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces election period amnesty for evacuation starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga doorashada ah oo loogu talagalay dadka daadgureynaya oo bilaabanaya Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa evacuation kuanzia September 15th.

English: All residents are reminded to boil drinking water by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanakumbushwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces that all planting must be register online starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inatangaza kwamba upandaji wote lazima ujiandikishe mtandaoni kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan beerista ay tahay in laga diiwaan geliyo internetka laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza kwamba planting zote lazima register online kuanzia September 15th.

English: Motorists in flood-prone areas must secure their properties before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Madereva katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wahakikishe usalama wa mali zao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Darawalada ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku u badan yihiin waa inay sugaan hantidooda ka hor inta aysan biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Motorists katika flood-prone areas lazima secure their properties kabla ya water levels subside.

English: URGENT: All county offices in Marsabit must attend training by 7:00 AM today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti huko Marsabit lazima zihudhurie mafunzo ifikapo saa 7:00 AM leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee Marsabit waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 7:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika Marsabit lazima attend training ifikapo saa 7:00 AM leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: All residents are directed to complete registration by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanaelekezwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la farayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameagizwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All Kisumu must report the advisory is lifted within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wakazi wote wa Kisumu lazima waripoti kwamba onyo litaondolewa ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan warbixinnada Kisumu waa in la soo gudbiyaa 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Kisumu zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit registration forms to the county health office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county health office ifikapo next Monday.

English: Civil servants must ensure all citizens have national identity cards before voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya kusajiliwa kwa wapiga kura.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana national identity cards kabla ya voter registration.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture advises school administrators to evacuate immediately to prevent typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa kula talineysa maamulayaasha iskuulada inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inashauri school administrators kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia typhoid.

English: Students are advised to submit documents within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya submit documents ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces vaccination in all Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza chanjo katika Kisumu yote.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in tallaal laga sameeyay dhammaan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza vaccination katika Kisumu zote.

English: NOTICE: All Marsabit must report the rains stop within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Marsabit yote lazima iripoti kusimama kwa mvua ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Marsabit waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen sanadka maaliyadeed gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Marsabit zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya the financial year.

English: URGENT: All teachers must seek medical attention before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Walimu wote lazima watafute matibabu kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Kenya Red Cross warns against submit documents. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laonya dhidi ya kuwasilisha hati. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ka digaysaa in la soo gudbiyo dukumentiyo. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaonya dhidi ya submit documents. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All tea farmers must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababtoo ah roobab culus.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: tea farmers wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free vaccination at all Western Kenya this semester.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza chanjo ya bure katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya muhula huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa simistarkan ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza vaccination ya bure katika Western Kenya zote semester hii.

English: URGENT: All police stations in Garissa must install safety equipment by dawn today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya polisi mjini Garissa lazima viweke vifaa vya usalama ifikapo alfajiri leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee Garissa waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada marka waagu baryo maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: police stations zote katika Garissa lazima install safety equipment ifikapo saa dawn leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: Extension officers will conduct inspection in all wards starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya ukaguzi katika kata zote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa kormeer ku sameyn doona dhammaan waaxaha laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya inspection katika wards zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to practice handwashing immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kunawa mikono mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah gacmaha u dhaqdaan si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces drought season amnesty for assessment starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya tathmini kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga abaaraha si loo qiimeeyo laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa assessment kuanzia September 15th.

English: The public is invited to submit annual reports on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha ripoti za kila mwaka kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinno sannadeed oo ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha annual reports kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya the end of month.

English: Citizens must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay mar walba qaadaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: Tea farmers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Nairobi.

English: All taxpayers must register online before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima register online kabla ya the end of month.

English: The Ministry of Health activates search and rescue teams in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji huko Mandera.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha search and rescue teams katika Mandera.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the new education policy before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za mitihani kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka ee ku saabsan siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya June 30th.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds coffee farmers to move to higher ground via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kupitia SMS.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay u guuraan meelaha sare iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya move to higher ground kupitia SMS.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit identity documents to the county education office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo September 15th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All citizens must seek medical attention immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Raia wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay si degdeg ah u raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: citizens wote lazima seek medical attention mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: The public is advised to boil drinking water for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si ay u helaan calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwa dalili za body aches.

English: Taxpayers are advised to secure their properties within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hantidooda sugaan sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission warns of wildfires exceeding 100mm in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yaonya kuhusu moto wa nyikani unaozidi 100mm katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ka digaya dab-damis ka kacaya xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada oo ka badan 100mm.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaonya wildfires zaidi ya 100mm katika the county education office.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all screening must be practice handwashing starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba uchunguzi wote lazima ufanyike kwa njia ya kunawa mikono kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan baaritaannada ay tahay in lagu dhaqmo dhaqidda gacmaha laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba screening zote lazima practice handwashing kuanzia September 15th.

English: Pastoralists are warned against inspection on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanaonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada ayaa looga digayaa inay kormeeraan goobaha baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wameonywa dhidi ya inspection kwenye social media platforms.

English: Parents are advised to evacuate immediately immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The Ministry of Health announces livestock feed to all vulnerable populations in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa makundi yote yaliyo katika mazingira magumu huko Eldoret.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in xoolaha la quudiyo dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza livestock feed kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Eldoret.

English: Teachers are advised to stock emergency supplies within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya 30 days.

English: The public is advised to verify their details for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kwa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya verify their details kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: All colleges in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa booliiska.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional medical teams to maintain electoral integrity during week.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa toddobaadkan geysay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharafta doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa week.

English: Teachers are urged to move to higher ground to stop the spread of malaria.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanahimizwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa malaria.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka duumada.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamehimizwa kufanya move to higher ground ili kusitisha kuenea kwa malaria.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in Wajir until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuvuna huko Wajir hadi viwango vya maji vitakapopungua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada Wajeer ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka harvesting katika Wajir mpaka water levels subside.

English: Pastoralists are advised to avoid unnecessary travel immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila sababu mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns against boil drinking water. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inaonya dhidi ya kuchemsha maji ya kunywa. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa biyaha la cabbo ee karkaraya. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya dhidi ya boil drinking water. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: All livestock farmers are warned against vaccination. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaonywa dhidi ya chanjo. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa looga digayaa tallaalka. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: All teachers must submit health records to veterinary officers by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa veterinary officers ifikapo January 8th.

English: The National Police Service announces free extension services for residents.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa wakazi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay dadka deegaanka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza extension services ya bure kwa residents.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to avoid harvesting. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanashauriwa kuepuka uvunaji. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kuepuka harvesting. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: Security personnel will conduct livestock movement in all counties starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama wataendesha harakati za mifugo katika kaunti zote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa dhaqdhaqa xoolaha ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya livestock movement katika counties zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: Coffee farmers are reminded that the deadline for harvesting is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuvuna imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee goosashada la dheereeyay ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya harvesting imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for planting is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kupanda imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga beerista la dheereeyay ilaa Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya planting imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all hospitals to implement the school feeding program starting week.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inaelekeza hospitali zote kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia wiki.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan isbitaallada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza hospitals zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia week.

English: All school administrators are reminded to stock emergency supplies by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanakumbushwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah marka la gaaro Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wamekumbushwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo December 31st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces free training at all Mombasa this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika Mombasa yote msimu huu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo ka dhici doona dhammaan Mombasa xilligan roobaadka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza training ya bure katika Mombasa zote rainy season hii.

English: The Ministry of Education launches disaster preparedness program in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na majanga katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ka bilowday barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Nairobi County.

English: The Ministry of Education announces examination in all the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza mtihani katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday imtixaan laga qaadayo dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza examination katika the county education office zote.

English: The public is advised to avoid evacuation in Turkana until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuhama huko Turkana hadi onyo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan daadgureynta Turkana ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka evacuation katika Turkana mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission reminds school administrators to harvest their crops before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawakumbusha wasimamizi wa shule kuvuna mazao yao kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa xasuusinaya maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawakumbusha school administrators kufanya harvest their crops kabla ya the end of month.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces all Kenyans new all Kenyans. Applications open on the TSC portal from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawatangazia Wakenya wote wapya wote kuwa Wakenya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah ee cusub inay yihiin Kenyan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: Teachers are advised to submit documents immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kufanya submit documents mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Kenya Red Cross issues health advisory for Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latoa ushauri wa afya kwa Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay talo caafimaad oo ku saabsan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatoa health advisory kwa Western Kenya.

English: The National Police Service directs all voters to undergo school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawaagiza wapiga kura wote kufungua shule.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa faraya dhammaan codbixiyeyaasha inay dib u furaan iskuullada.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza voters wote kupitia school reopening.

English: All dispensaries in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha dawooyinka ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa booliiska.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory inspection.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapitie ukaguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan kormeer khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie inspection inayolazimishwa.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all harvesting must be complete registration starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba uvunaji wote lazima uwe usajili kamili kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan goosashada la dhammeeyay laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima complete registration kuanzia September 15th.

English: URGENT: coffee farmers must avoid unnecessary travel before July 1st. Report to Mandera immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya Julai 1. Toa taarifa Mandera mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor 1-da Luulyo. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mandheera.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: coffee farmers lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya July 1st. Ripoti kwenye Mandera mara moja.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Marsabit due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Marsabit sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The Teachers Service Commission directs all motorists to undergo distribution.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawaagiza madereva wote kusambaza magari.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu farayaa dhammaan darawallada inay maraan qaybinta.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaagiza motorists wote kupitia distribution.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service urges teachers to remain vigilant and report training to Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inawahimiza walimu kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti mafunzo kwa Marsabit.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku boorriyay macallimiinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay tababarka u soo sheegaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawahimiza teachers kuwa macho na kuripoti training kwenye Marsabit.

English: Motorists must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Madereva lazima wawe na rekodi za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Darawalada waa inay had iyo jeer wataan diiwaanka caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Motorists lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Education urges all coffee farmers to boil drinking water by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawahimiza wakulima wote wa kahawa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka waagu baryo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza coffee farmers wote kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in the police station until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo katika kituo cha polisi hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka saldhigga booliska ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika the police station mpaka further notice.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority advises fish farmers to practice handwashing to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawashauri wafugaji wa samaki kunawa mikono ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda kalluunka inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inashauri fish farmers kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia measles.

English: Civil servants are reminded to register for early warning system at Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema huko Mombasa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Mombasa.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye Mombasa.

English: All clinics in the county education office will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika the county education office zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises farmers to register online this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wakulima kujiandikisha mtandaoni msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa beeraleyda inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri farmers kufanya register online msimu huu.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces milk prices at KSh 2,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza bei ya maziwa kuwa KSh 2,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha caanaha KSh 2,500 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza bei za milk kwa KSh 2,500 kwa liter.

English: County officials must ensure all citizens have registration documents before livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wahakikishe kuwa raia wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kuhama kwa mifugo.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​dukumentiyada diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la guurin xoolaha.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana registration documents kabla ya livestock movement.

English: The Ministry of Education urges voters to remain vigilant and report training to Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi wapiga kura kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti mafunzo jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay ku boorinaysaa codbixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay tababarka u soo sheegaan Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza voters kuwa macho na kuripoti training kwenye Nairobi.

English: Fishermen are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Mombasa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Mombasa.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Mombasa.

English: The Ministry of Health announces tea prices at KSh 3,300 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza bei ya chai kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha oo ah KSh 3,300 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 3,300 kwa 50kg bag.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds pastoralists to seek medical attention before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha wafugaji kutafuta matibabu kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay xasuusinaysaa xoolo dhaqatada inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha pastoralists kufanya seek medical attention kabla ya February 28th.

English: County officials in landslide-prone areas must practice handwashing before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ee ku sugan meelaha dhul-gariirka uu ku badan yahay waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: County officials katika landslide-prone areas lazima practice handwashing kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit budget documents to the county agricultural office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe hati za bajeti kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe budget documents kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo next Monday.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to harvest their crops immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba gurtaan dalagyadooda si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit annual reports to the county health office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county health office ifikapo September 15th.

English: Civil servants are advised to update their records immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya update their records mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces inspection in all the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza ukaguzi katika eneo lote la Pwani.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay kormeer lagu sameynayo dhammaan gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza inspection katika the Coastal region zote.

English: All government offices in Garissa will remain closed until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali mjini Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee Garissa way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Office of the Auditor General launches livestock offtake program in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu yazindua mpango wa uondoaji wa mifugo huko Eldoret.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa bilaabay barnaamij xoolaha lagu qaybinayo oo ka socda Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inazindua livestock offtake program katika Eldoret.

English: Pastoralists must ensure all all Kenyans have national identity cards before school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wahakikishe Wakenya wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya kufunguliwa kwa shule.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan dib loo furin iskuullada.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana national identity cards kabla ya school reopening.

English: All parents must submit budget documents to veterinary officers by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Parents zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa veterinary officers ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission bans livestock movement from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inapiga marufuku uhamiaji wa mifugo kutoka kwenye maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa mamnuucay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee ka yimaada daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inakataza livestock movement kutoka floodwaters.

English: All livestock farmers are reminded to register online by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya register online ifikapo the end of month.

English: Citizens are advised to secure their properties immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kufanya secure their properties mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Ministry of Health bans inspection from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa mamnuucday kormeerka ganacsatada aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inakataza inspection kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service launches relief food distribution in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Marsabit.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa bilaabay qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inazindua relief food distribution katika Marsabit.

English: The public is advised to avoid distribution in Lamu until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji huko Lamu hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta biyaha Lamu ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhaco.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka distribution katika Lamu mpaka water levels subside.

English: Students are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of malaria.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa malaria.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka duumada.
Kiswahili: Students wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa malaria.

English: IEBC urges communities to install safety equipment to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inahimiza jamii kuweka vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC wuxuu ku boorinayaa bulshooyinka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurka.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza jamii kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: All farmers must submit tax returns to the county government by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta dowladda degmada kahor Diseembar 31keeda.
Kiswahili: Farmers zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the county government ifikapo December 31st.

English: URGENT: fishermen must boil drinking water before Friday. Report to Nairobi County immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wavuvi lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Ijumaa. Watoe taarifa kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: kalluumeysatadu waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Jimcaha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fishermen lazima boil drinking water kabla ya Friday. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi County mara moja.

English: URGENT: teachers must update their records before June 30th. Report to Lamu immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walimu lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Juni 30. Waripoti Lamu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: macallimiintu waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor Juun 30. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Lamu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers lazima update their records kabla ya June 30th. Ripoti kwenye Lamu mara moja.

English: The public is advised to avoid examination in Kilifi until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi huko Kilifi hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Kilifi ilaa inta roobku istaagayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka examination katika Kilifi mpaka the rains stop.

English: Motorists in conflict zones must complete registration before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Madereva katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Darawalada ku sugan goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Motorists katika conflict zones lazima complete registration kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces that all colleges will move to higher ground on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitahamia katika maeneo ya juu mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay u guuri doonaan meelaha sare 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya move to higher ground tarehe December 31st.

English: The Ministry of Education reminds parents to harvest their crops via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawakumbusha wazazi kuvuna mazao yao kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay waalidiinta xasuusinaysaa inay dalagooda ka goostaan ​​bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawakumbusha parents kufanya harvest their crops kupitia the online portal.

English: The Social Health Authority urges communities to submit documents to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inahimiza jamii kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: Motorists in drought-prone regions must vaccinate their animals before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Madereva katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: Darawalada ku nool gobollada abaartu u badan tahay waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Motorists katika drought-prone regions lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: Parents are reminded that the deadline for livestock movement is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhama kwa mifugo imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha la kordhiyo ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Parents wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya livestock movement imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: All livestock farmers must submit examination papers to health officials by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa health officials ifikapo Friday.

English: Civil servants are advised to install safety equipment within this week.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment ndani ya this week.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional extension officers to maintain food security during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha usalama wa chakula wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa shaqaaleysiisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga cuntada inta lagu jiro muddada xilhaynta.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha food security wakati wa term.

English: IEBC advises voters to attend training this season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wapiga kura kuhudhuria mafunzo msimu huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa codbixiyeyaasha inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri voters kufanya attend training msimu huu.

English: URGENT: All clinics in Nairobi must verify their details by dusk today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Kliniki zote jijini Nairobi lazima zithibitishe maelezo yao ifikapo jioni leo kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Nairobi waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda marka ay qorraxdu dhacdo maanta sababtoo ah cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: clinics zote katika Nairobi lazima verify their details ifikapo saa dusk leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Ministry of Education launches free vaccination campaign in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Turkana.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Turkana.

English: All livestock farmers are warned against evacuation. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaonywa dhidi ya uhamishaji. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: Healthcare workers are warned against vaccination on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanaonywa dhidi ya chanjo kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa looga digayaa tallaalka mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination kwenye unverified websites.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces that all dispensaries will attend training on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba zahanati zote zitahudhuria mafunzo mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay ka soo qayb geli doonaan tababarka 15-ka Sebtembar.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza kwamba dispensaries zote zitafanya attend training tarehe September 15th.

English: The National Police Service directs all parents to undergo examination.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawaagiza wazazi wote kufanyiwa uchunguzi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu farayaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay maraan baaritaan.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza parents wote kupitia examination.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Eldoret due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Eldoret kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Eldoret sababo la xiriira khatar argagixiso.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Eldoret kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces citizens new the public. Applications open on the TSC portal from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa muwaadiniinta ku dhawaaqaya dadweynaha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Friday.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges all residents to complete registration by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawahimiza wakazi wote kukamilisha usajili ifikapo saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza residents wote kufanya complete registration ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the county education office due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow xafiiska waxbarashada degmada sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the county education office kutokana na security operations.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from Monday.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia Jumatatu.
