Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqaya dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia Monday.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces the public new the public. Applications open on the IEBC website from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa dadweynaha ku wargeliyay inay cusub yihiin. Codsiyada waxaa laga furi doonaa bogga internetka ee IEBC isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia immediately.

English: Motorists are reminded that the deadline for distribution is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usambazaji imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee qaybinta la kordhiyay ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya distribution imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: All police stations in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitasalia kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa mas'uuliyiinta degmadu.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: All fish farmers are directed to register online by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wameagizwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa la farayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya register online ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces term amnesty for distribution starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza msamaha wa muda kwa ajili ya usambazaji kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis muddo-xileed ah oo loogu talagalay qaybinta oo bilaabanaysa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku term kwa distribution kuanzia March 15th.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All fishermen must report suspicious activity immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wavuvi wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay si degdeg ah u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo oo ay sababeen roobab xooggan.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: fishermen wote lazima report suspicious activity mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: All health facilities in Garissa will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya huko Garissa vitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Gaarisa ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The County Government warns against boil drinking water. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya dhidi ya kuchemsha maji ya kunywa. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka digaysaa biyaha la cabbo ee karkaraya. Ha isticmaalin biyaha wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya dhidi ya boil drinking water. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: Taxpayers are advised to evacuate immediately immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Nakuru must vaccinate their animals by 8:00 AM today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote huko Nakuru lazima zichanje wanyama wao ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan farmashiyaha Nakuru waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Nakuru lazima vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya April 30th.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapate chanjo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan tallaal khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie vaccination inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre has deployed additional medical teams to maintain law and order during week.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kimetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha utulivu na sheria wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa geysay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa week.

English: The National Drought Management Authority has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain electoral integrity during election period.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame imetuma timu zaidi za kukabiliana na maafa ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa geysay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa election period.

English: Teachers in landslide-prone areas must update their records before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Walimu katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: Macallimiinta ku nool meelaha ay dhul-go'u ka dhacaan waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Teachers katika landslide-prone areas lazima update their records kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Kenya Red Cross bans planting from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya lapiga marufuku upandaji miti kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucday beerista beeraha ee ka yimaada ganacsatada aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inakataza planting kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: Travelers must ensure all citizens have vaccination certificates before screening.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya kupimwa.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyin tallaal ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Travelers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya screening.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the new education policy before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Janaayo 8deeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya January 8th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All voters must practice handwashing immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay si degdeg ah u dhaqdaan gacmaha sababtoo ah khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: voters wote lazima practice handwashing mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces maize prices at KSh 2,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza bei ya mahindi kuwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila gunia la kilo 50.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha galleyda oo ah KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza bei za maize kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku jira Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga ee Degmada ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya next Monday.

English: Citizens are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces rainy season amnesty for evacuation starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli roobaad ah oo loogu talagalay dadka daadgureynaya dhulka laga bilaabo 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa evacuation kuanzia December 31st.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in Western Kenya until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini katika Magharibi mwa Kenya hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta Galbeedka Kenya ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika Western Kenya mpaka water levels subside.

English: Voters must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura lazima wawe na kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Cod-bixiyeyaashu waa inay had iyo jeer haystaan ​​​​diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Voters lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces election period amnesty for livestock movement starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa harakati za mifugo kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Ururka Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis xilliga doorashada ah oo loogu talagalay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha oo bilaabanaya Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa livestock movement kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: All livestock farmers must practice handwashing to Mombasa before dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono hadi Mombasa kabla ya alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay gacmaha ku dhaqdaan Mombasa kahor waaberiga maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima practice handwashing kwenye Mombasa kabla ya saa dawn kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free vaccination for county officials.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa county officials.

English: Students are advised to avoid planting. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuepuka kupanda. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kuepuka planting. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: County officials are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la kordhiyay ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: County officials wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: NOTICE: All hospitals must submit annual reports to the county disaster office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Hospitali zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan isbitaallada waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: hospitals zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General bans screening from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yapiga marufuku uchunguzi dhidi ya maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu mamnuucayaa baaritaanka biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inakataza screening kutoka floodwaters.

English: All teachers must submit annual reports to the county government by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan dawladda degmada marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the county government ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises county officials to harvest their crops to prevent polio.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia polio.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay kula talisay mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri county officials kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia polio.

English: URGENT: All civil servants must boil drinking water before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: civil servants wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: Pastoralists are reminded that the deadline for planting is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kupanda imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga beerista la dheereeyay ilaa 1-da Abriil.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya planting imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: All police stations in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dheeraad ah laga soo saaro Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: Pastoralists are advised to harvest their crops as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: Fishermen are advised to practice handwashing immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kunawa mikono mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Ministry of Education advises residents to update their records to prevent cholera.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wakazi kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia kipindupindu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago daacuunka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri residents kufanya update their records ili kuzuia cholera.

English: All voters must submit health records to county officials by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Voters zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa county officials ifikapo next Monday.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to attend training as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo kadri hali inavyoimarika inavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka maadaama xaaladdu ay degi doonto.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya attend training kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye mfumo wa kielektroniki wa Citizen kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday muwaadiniin cusub oo dadweynaha ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of landslides exceeding extreme in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu maporomoko ya ardhi yaliyokithiri katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa dhul-go' ka dhaca dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya landslides zaidi ya extreme katika all constituencies.

English: All livestock farmers are reminded to avoid unnecessary travel by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanakumbushwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn marka la gaaro Luulyo 1.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo July 1st.

English: All schools in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: URGENT: parents must complete registration before July 1st. Report to Turkana immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wazazi lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Julai 1. Toa taarifa kwa Turkana mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: waalidiintu waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor Luulyo 1. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Turkana.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: parents lazima complete registration kabla ya July 1st. Ripoti kwenye Turkana mara moja.

English: Extension officers will conduct examination in all constituencies starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya uchunguzi katika majimbo yote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Saraakiisha kordhinta ayaa baaritaan ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya examination katika constituencies zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: The National Police Service advises civil servants to move to higher ground this season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri watumishi wa umma kuhamia maeneo ya juu msimu huu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliyay shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay u guuraan meelaha sare xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri civil servants kufanya move to higher ground msimu huu.

English: The Ministry of Education warns of earthquakes exceeding severe in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi makubwa mno Kisumu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariir aad u daran oo ka dhaca Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya severe katika Kisumu.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Garissa must stock emergency supplies by 8:00 AM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote huko Garissa lazima ziwe na vifaa vya dharura ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal Garissa waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Garissa lazima stock emergency supplies ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: All teachers are directed to practice handwashing by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wameagizwa kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa la farayaa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameagizwa kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo next Monday.

English: All residents must submit registration forms to veterinary officers by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa veterinary officers ifikapo January 8th.

English: Do not practice handwashing from affected countries. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmaha dhaqidda wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. U sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada dhacdooyinka noocaas ah.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: IEBC announces week amnesty for school reopening starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa school reopening kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces enhanced voter registration in all Kilifi during semester.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza kuimarishwa kwa usajili wa wapiga kura katika Kilifi nzima wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in la kordhiyay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee Kilifi oo dhan inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza voter registration zilizoidhinishwa katika Kilifi zote wakati wa semester.

English: IEBC announces all Kenyans new the public. Applications open on the TSC portal from Thursday.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawatangazia Wakenya wote wapya umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Thursday.

English: The public is advised to submit documents for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwasilisha hati za dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo muujinaya calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya submit documents kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upitie uhamisho wa lazima wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan dhaqdhaqaaq xoolo oo khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie livestock movement inayolazimishwa.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all hospitals will report suspicious activity on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitaripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mnamo Juni 30.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan isbitaallada ay soo sheegi doonaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo bisha Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya report suspicious activity tarehe June 30th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises fishermen to complete registration to prevent yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri wavuvi kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia homa ya manjano.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri fishermen kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia yellow fever.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in the police station until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo katika kituo cha polisi hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka saldhigga booliska ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika the police station mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission warns of landslides exceeding Category 3 in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yaonya kuhusu maporomoko ya ardhi yanayozidi Kundi la 3 katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ka digaya dhul-go' ka dhaca dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaonya landslides zaidi ya Category 3 katika all constituencies.

English: Do not move to higher ground from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usihamie kwenye eneo la juu kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha u dhaqaaqin meel sare oo ka fog iibiyeyaasha aan la fasaxin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dawladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye move to higher ground kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds citizens to stock emergency supplies before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha raia kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa xasuusinaya muwaadiniinta inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha citizens kufanya stock emergency supplies kabla ya Friday.

English: Parents must ensure all citizens have examination admission letters before screening.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana barua za kujiunga na mtihani kabla ya uchunguzi.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha ogolaanshaha imtixaanka ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya screening.

English: URGENT: All residents must avoid unnecessary travel before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakazi wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: Parents are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan olole tallaal oo bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: Parents wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: The public is advised to register online for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan khadka internetka si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo dhib ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya register online kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: The Ministry of Health advises residents to register online to prevent yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wakazi kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia homa ya manjano.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay kula talinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay iska diiwaan galiyaan internetka si looga hortago qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri residents kufanya register online ili kuzuia yellow fever.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All tea farmers must harvest their crops immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: ONYO LA UMMA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wavune mazao yao mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay si degdeg ah u gurtaan dalagyadooda sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: PUBLIC WARNING: tea farmers wote lazima harvest their crops mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: Farmers are advised to evacuate immediately as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja kwani mvua itaacha kunyesha.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan maadaama la filayo in roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: All civil servants are directed to move to higher ground by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanaelekezwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la farayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wameagizwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces clean water to all drought-affected households in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza maji safi kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza clean water kwa drought-affected households wote katika Marsabit.

English: The Kenya Red Cross launches livestock offtake program in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya lazindua mpango wa kuchukua mifugo katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa bilowday barnaamij lagu soo saarayo xoolaha oo laga hirgelinayo xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inazindua livestock offtake program katika the nearest health facility.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces all Kenyans new all Kenyans. Applications open on the SHA website from next week.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawatangaza Wakenya wote wapya kuwa Wakenya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqaya dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah ee cusub ee dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia next week.

English: The County Government has deployed additional medical teams to maintain electoral integrity during month.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi katika mwezi huu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay geysay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharafta doorashada inta lagu jiro bisha.
Kiswahili: The County Government imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa month.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture reminds livestock farmers to report suspicious activity before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawakumbusha wakulima wa mifugo kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda xoolaha inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya report suspicious activity kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The public is invited to submit tax returns on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha marejesho ya kodi kwenye Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Hindise-sharciyeedka Qoondaynta Dakhliga ee Degmada ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha tax returns kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya the end of month.

English: All universities in the nearest health facility will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu vitabaki kufungwa hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika the nearest health facility zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: Livestock farmers in landslide-prone areas must move to higher ground before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ee ku nool meelaha dhul-go'u u nugul yahay waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers katika landslide-prone areas lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Tea farmers must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay sitaan waraaqaha baaritaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: All school administrators must move to higher ground to the county education office before noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wahamie katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti hadi saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay u guuraan meel sare xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ka hor duhurnimada maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye the county education office kabla ya saa noon kila siku.

English: The public is advised to submit documents for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwasilisha hati za dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo muujinaya calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya submit documents kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges all travelers to vaccinate their animals by 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawahimiza wasafiri wote kuchanja wanyama wao ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan dadka safarka ah inay tallaalaan xoolahooda marka la gaaro 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza travelers wote kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All school administrators must evacuate immediately immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima waondoke mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan guryahooda sababo la xiriira roobab xooggan oo da'aya awgeed.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: school administrators wote lazima evacuate immediately mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The County Government advises travelers to complete registration this season.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri wasafiri kukamilisha usajili msimu huu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta xilligan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri travelers kufanya complete registration msimu huu.

English: County officials are urged to report suspicious activity to stop the spread of malaria.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanahimizwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia kuenea kwa malaria.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka duumada.
Kiswahili: County officials wamehimizwa kufanya report suspicious activity ili kusitisha kuenea kwa malaria.

English: The Ministry of Health urges all livestock farmers to move to higher ground by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawasihi wafugaji wote kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay u guuraan dhul sare 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza livestock farmers wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges communities to evacuate immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inahimiza jamii kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces screening in all Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza ukaguzi katika Lamu yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in baaritaan lagu sameynayo dhammaan Lamu.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza screening katika Lamu zote.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all motorists to undergo assessment.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawaagiza madereva wote kufanyiwa tathmini.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan darawallada inay maraan qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza motorists wote kupitia assessment.

English: The National Police Service announces week amnesty for planting starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa upandaji miti kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay beerista dhirta oo bilaabanaysa 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa planting kuanzia December 31st.

English: Taxpayers are warned against training on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi waonywa dhidi ya mafunzo kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa looga digayaa inay tababar ku qaataan kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wameonywa dhidi ya training kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: Tea farmers must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay sitaan foomamka diiwaangelinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: URGENT: All county officials must avoid unnecessary travel before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: All motorists must submit budget documents to county officials by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Motorists zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa county officials ifikapo September 15th.

English: Students are advised to secure their properties within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hubiyaan hantidooda 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya secure their properties ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Ministry of Health announces fertilizer prices at KSh 5,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza bei ya mbolea kwa KSh 5,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bacriminta KSh 5,500 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza bei za fertilizer kwa KSh 5,500 kwa liter.

English: URGENT: farmers must report suspicious activity before December 31st. Report to Mandera immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Desemba 31. Waripoti Mandera mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: beeraleydu waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Diseembar 31. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mandheera.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: farmers lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya December 31st. Ripoti kwenye Mandera mara moja.

English: URGENT: livestock farmers must register online before February 28th. Report to the county education office immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya Februari 28. Watoe taarifa kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda xoolaha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor Febraayo 28. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers lazima register online kabla ya February 28th. Ripoti kwenye the county education office mara moja.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapandishwe miti kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay maraan beero qasab ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces term amnesty for harvesting starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza msamaha wa muda wa uvunaji kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis muddo-xileed ah oo loogu talagalay goosashada oo bilaabanaysa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza msamaha wa siku term kwa harvesting kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces week amnesty for voter registration starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa usajili wa wapiga kura kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha oo bilaabanaysa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa voter registration kuanzia June 30th.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All travelers must stock emergency supplies immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wasafiri wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay isla markiiba kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: travelers wote lazima stock emergency supplies mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Kilifi until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo huko Kilifi hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka Kilifi ilaa inta roobku istaagayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika Kilifi mpaka the rains stop.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges all coffee farmers to register online by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawahimiza wakulima wote wa kahawa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada inay iska diiwaan galiyaan online-ka 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza coffee farmers wote kufanya register online ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: All county offices in Kisumu will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti mjini Kisumu zitabaki zimefungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee Kisumu way xirnaan doonaan ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika Kisumu zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: Motorists are advised to practice handwashing as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kunawa mikono kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: All citizens must submit identity documents to county officials by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa county officials ifikapo March 15th.

English: Parents are advised to avoid evacuation. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhamishwa. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan daadgureynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kuepuka evacuation. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: The Ministry of Health bans livestock movement from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yapiga marufuku mifugo kusafiri kutoka kwenye maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa mamnuucday dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee ka yimaada biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inakataza livestock movement kutoka floodwaters.

English: Farmers in border counties must stock emergency supplies before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima katika kaunti za mpakani lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: Beeralayda ku nool gobollada xuduudda waa inay kaydiyaan sahayda degdegga ah ka hor inta aan la helin oggolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Farmers katika border counties lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: NOTICE: All government offices must submit examination papers to the county disaster office by Friday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za serikali lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: government offices zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo Friday.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to avoid voter registration. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kuepuka voter registration. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All voters must install safety equipment immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: voters wote lazima install safety equipment mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces emergency shelter to all flood victims in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza makazi ya dharura kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko huko Kilifi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday inay hoy degdeg ah u fidin doonto dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ka dhacay Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza emergency shelter kwa flood victims wote katika Kilifi.

English: URGENT: All hospitals in Garissa must secure their properties by 8:00 AM today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Hospitali zote za Garissa lazima zihakikishe mali zao ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan isbitaallada Garissa waa inay sugaan hantidooda 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: hospitals zote katika Garissa lazima secure their properties ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: Residents are advised to stock emergency supplies within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya the financial year.

English: All fishermen are directed to boil drinking water by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wameagizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la farayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameagizwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo March 15th.

English: IEBC directs all health facilities to implement the safety protocols starting term.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inaelekeza vituo vyote vya afya kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia muhula wake.
Somali: IEBC waxay faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada xilliga bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaagiza health facilities zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia term.

English: All farmers must submit identity documents to the police by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa polisi ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay booliska u gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Farmers zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa the police ifikapo February 28th.

English: IEBC announces that all planting must be install safety equipment starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba upandaji wote lazima usakinishe vifaa vya usalama kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan beerista ay tahay in la rakibo qalabka badbaadada laga bilaabo Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba planting zote lazima install safety equipment kuanzia April 1st.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces wheat prices at KSh 5,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza bei ya ngano kwa KSh 5,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha sarreenka oo ah KSh 5,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 5,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory screening.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie screening inayolazimishwa.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces free registration for coffee farmers.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza usajili wa bure kwa wakulima wa kahawa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday inay si bilaash ah u diiwaangelin doonto beeraleyda qaxwada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza registration ya bure kwa coffee farmers.

English: The public is advised to report suspicious activity for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo haddii ay la kulmaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo adkaata.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: All coffee farmers are warned against vaccination. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanaonywa dhidi ya chanjo. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waxaa looga digayaa tallaalka. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: School administrators are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Rift Valley Fever.

English: The National Drought Management Authority issues curfew notice for Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa soo saartay ogeysiis bandow ah oo ku saabsan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatoa curfew notice kwa Marsabit.

English: The Social Health Authority warns of flooding exceeding Level 4 in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaonya kuhusu mafuriko yanayozidi Kiwango cha 4 katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa daadad ka gudbaya heerka 4aad ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya flooding zaidi ya Level 4 katika the nearest health facility.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report further notice within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan waaxaha waaxdu waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all wards zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 60 days.

English: Extension officers will conduct training in all villages starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya mafunzo katika vijiji vyote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa tababar ku qaban doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya training katika villages zote kuanzia Friday.

English: Students are reminded to register for early warning system at Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika eneo la Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye Western Kenya.

English: The County Government activates disaster relief teams in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha gurmadka masiibooyinka ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha disaster relief teams katika the police station.

English: Voters are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuchuja imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department launches livestock offtake program in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yazindua mpango wa kupunguza matumizi ya mifugo huko Kisumu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ka bilowday Kisumu barnaamij xoolaha lagu qaado.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inazindua livestock offtake program katika Kisumu.

English: Voters must ensure all all Kenyans have examination admission letters before assessment.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura lazima wahakikishe Wakenya wote wana barua za kujiunga na mtihani kabla ya tathmini.
Somali: Codbixiyayaashu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​waraaqaha ogolaanshaha imtixaanka ka hor inta aan la qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: Voters lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya assessment.

English: Parents must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay mar walba wataan waraaqaha baaritaanka.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: Residents are warned against inspection on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wameonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka ayaa looga digayaa inay baaritaan ku sameeyaan baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Residents wameonywa dhidi ya inspection kwenye social media platforms.

English: All teachers must update their records to Garissa before 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao hadi Garissa kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay diiwaankooda ku cusbooneysiiyaan Garissa ka hor 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima update their records kwenye Garissa kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: Tea farmers are warned against livestock movement on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanaonywa dhidi ya uhamiaji wa mifugo kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ayaa looga digay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye unverified websites.

English: Do not update their records from unverified sources. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usisasishe rekodi zao kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha cusboonaysiin diiwaankooda ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye update their records kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: All tea farmers must stock emergency supplies to Wajir before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura Wajir kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay kaydiyaan sahayda degdegga ah ee loo dirayo Wajeer ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima stock emergency supplies kwenye Wajir kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: School administrators in conflict zones must boil drinking water before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ee ku sugan goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: School administrators katika conflict zones lazima boil drinking water kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: NOTICE: All Garissa must report water levels subside within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Garissa yote lazima iripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Garissa waa inay soo sheegaan in heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Garissa zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 60 days.

English: URGENT: All fish farmers must harvest their crops before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wavune mazao yao kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan roobku istaagin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fish farmers wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the rains stop.

English: School administrators are advised to report suspicious activity within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya this month.

English: Students are urged to secure their properties to stop the spread of dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanahimizwa kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya dengue.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: Students wamehimizwa kufanya secure their properties ili kusitisha kuenea kwa dengue fever.

English: All civil servants are directed to boil drinking water by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa umma wameagizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la farayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wameagizwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo next Monday.

English: IEBC announces that all county offices will evacuate immediately on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za kaunti zitaondoka mara moja mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ay si degdeg ah uga guuri doonaan Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba county offices zote zitafanya evacuate immediately tarehe December 31st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all civil servants to register online by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawahimiza watumishi wote wa umma kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka marka la gaaro 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza civil servants wote kufanya register online ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: All coffee farmers must submit health records to the police by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa polisi ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay booliska u gudbiyaan diiwaanka caafimaadka kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the police ifikapo Friday.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns against complete registration. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inaonya dhidi ya usajili kamili. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa diiwaangelinta oo dhammaystiran. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya dhidi ya complete registration. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: All fish farmers must submit budget documents to the county government by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambayn Diseembar 31keeda.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the county government ifikapo December 31st.

English: School administrators are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Maamulayaasha dugsiyada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la dheereeyay ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: The Ministry of Health urges county officials to remain vigilant and report assessment to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawasihi maafisa wa kaunti kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti tathmini kwa wadi zote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku boorinaysa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan qiimeynta dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza county officials kuwa macho na kuripoti assessment kwenye all wards.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority launches subsidized fertilizer program in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yazindua mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa mjini Nakuru.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka bilowday Nakuru barnaamij bacrimin ah oo la kabayo.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inazindua subsidized fertilizer program katika Nakuru.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces screening in all Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza uchunguzi katika Eldoret yote.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in baaritaan lagu sameynayo dhammaan Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza screening katika Eldoret zote.

English: All tea farmers are directed to verify their details by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wanaagizwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa la farayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya verify their details ifikapo December 31st.

English: Citizens must ensure all all Kenyans have vaccination certificates before voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wahakikishe Wakenya wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya usajili wa wapiga kura.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya voter registration.

English: The Social Health Authority activates emergency response teams in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii huanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika the nearest health facility.

English: URGENT: All schools in Western Kenya must attend training by 3:00 PM today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Shule zote Magharibi mwa Kenya lazima zihudhurie mafunzo ifikapo saa 3:00 usiku leo ​​kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal Galbeedka Kenya waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 3:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: schools zote katika Western Kenya lazima attend training ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Ministry of Health announces wheat prices at KSh 2,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza bei ya ngano kwa KSh 2,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha qamadiga oo ah KSh 2,500 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 2,500 kwa liter.

English: Voters are advised to seek medical attention within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention ndani ya this month.

English: The public is invited to submit tax returns on the proposed health regulations before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha marejesho ya kodi kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha tax returns kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya next Monday.

English: All hospitals in Lamu will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote mjini Lamu zitabaki zimefungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada Lamu ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Lamu zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: Do not move to higher ground from affected countries. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usihamie maeneo ya juu kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha u guurin meelaha sare ee wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye move to higher ground kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The public is advised to register online for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan khadka internetka si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo dhib ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya register online kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: Travelers are advised to avoid screening. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kuepuka screening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: The public is advised to evacuate immediately for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhama mara moja kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda haddii ay qabaan calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately kwa dalili za high fever.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory screening.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie screening inayolazimishwa.

English: County officials are advised to complete registration as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili kadri viwango vya maji vinavyotarajiwa kupungua.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta maadaama la filayo in heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya complete registration kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: All farmers are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Fish farmers are advised to avoid unnecessary travel within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn bishaan gudaheed.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ndani ya this month.

English: URGENT: All county offices in Nairobi County must seek medical attention by 8:00 AM today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika Kaunti ya Nairobi lazima zitafute huduma ya matibabu ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee Degmada Nairobi waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika Nairobi County lazima seek medical attention ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional extension officers to maintain public safety during month.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa mwezi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa bishiiba hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo loogu talagalay kordhinta si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga dadweynaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa month.

English: The National Police Service advises tea farmers to verify their details to prevent tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wakulima wa chai kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia kifua kikuu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda shaaha inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri tea farmers kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia tuberculosis.

English: Voters must ensure all residents have national identity cards before training.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya mafunzo.
Somali: Codbixiyayaashu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deegaanka ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la tababarin.
Kiswahili: Voters lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana national identity cards kabla ya training.

English: URGENT: All county offices in all constituencies must install safety equipment by 8:00 AM today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika maeneo yote ya uchaguzi lazima ziweke vifaa vya usalama ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee dhammaan degmooyinka waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika all constituencies lazima install safety equipment ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na security operations.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Coastal region due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka eneo la Pwani kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow gobolka Xeebta roobab xooggan awgood.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the Coastal region kutokana na heavy rains.

English: All motorists must submit registration forms to veterinary officers by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
