Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa veterinary officers ifikapo next Monday.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces financial year amnesty for voter registration starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya usajili wa wapiga kura kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sannad-maaliyadeedka diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha oo bilaabanaysa Juun 30-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa voter registration kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises pastoralists to practice handwashing to prevent tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri wafugaji kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kifua kikuu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay xoolo-dhaqatada inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri pastoralists kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia tuberculosis.

English: The National Police Service urges all civil servants to evacuate immediately by midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawasihi watumishi wote wa umma kuhama mara moja ifikapo saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza civil servants wote kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo saa midnight kila siku.

English: All county officials are reminded to verify their details by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wamekumbushwa kufanya verify their details ifikapo December 31st.

English: The Ministry of Health announces cash transfers to all drought-affected households in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza uhamisho wa pesa taslimu kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Wajir.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday lacago loogu wareejinayo dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza cash transfers kwa drought-affected households wote katika Wajir.

English: Do not move to higher ground from animals that have died. Report such incidents to the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Usihamie kwenye ardhi ya juu kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Wizara.
Somali: Ha u dhaqaaqin meel sare oo ka fog xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Usifanye move to higher ground kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the Ministry.

English: URGENT: All colleges in all wards must practice handwashing by 7:00 AM today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vyote katika kata zote lazima vifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo saa 1:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal dhammaan waaxyaha waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha 7:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: colleges zote katika all wards lazima practice handwashing ifikapo saa 7:00 AM leo kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: Tea farmers are advised to update their records within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya update their records ndani ya 90 days.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces planting in all the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza kupanda mimea katika Bonde lote la Ufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la beero dhammaan Dooxada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza planting katika the Rift Valley zote.

English: Students must carry annual reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wabebe ripoti za mwaka wakati wote.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay sitaan warbixinno sannadeed mar walba.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wabebe annual reports wakati wote.

English: The public is advised to complete registration for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kukamilisha usajili wa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya complete registration kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: The National Police Service announces that all hospitals will move to higher ground on January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitahamishiwa katika maeneo ya juu mnamo Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan isbitaallada ay u guuri doonaan meelaha sare Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya move to higher ground tarehe January 8th, 2026.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges communities to secure their properties to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linahimiza jamii kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa bulshooyinka inay sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza jamii kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wafunguliwe shule kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan dib u furista iskuullada ee qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie school reopening inayolazimishwa.

English: All dispensaries in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha dawooyinka ee degmooyinka ay daadadku saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay mas'uuliyiinta degmadu.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: The Teachers Service Commission launches relief food distribution in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Wajir.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa bilaabay qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inazindua relief food distribution katika Wajir.

English: The Social Health Authority warns of flash floods exceeding severe in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaonya kuhusu mafuriko makubwa zaidi Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa daadad xooggan oo aad u daran oo ka dhaca Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya flash floods zaidi ya severe katika Mombasa.

English: URGENT: All pastoralists must evacuate immediately before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla mvua haijaisha.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya the rains stop.

English: All fish farmers must submit identity documents to county officials by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa county officials ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Ministry of Health announces free extension services at all Nairobi this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika Nairobi nzima mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan Nairobi sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza extension services ya bure katika Nairobi zote financial year hii.

English: Farmers are advised to avoid screening. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kuepuka screening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: County officials are advised to verify their details as the advisory is lifted are expected.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kwani ushauri huo unatarajiwa kuondolewa.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda maadaama la filayo in la qaado talada.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya verify their details kwani the advisory is lifted zinatarajiwa.

English: All taxpayers are advised to observe the Level 4 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kiwango cha 4 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan Heerka 4 ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Level 4 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Coffee farmers are urged to stock emergency supplies to stop the spread of tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanahimizwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kifua kikuu.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa lagu booriyay inay kaydiyaan agab degdeg ah si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamehimizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kusitisha kuenea kwa tuberculosis.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all inspection must be report suspicious activity starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kormeerka ay tahay in la soo sheego dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo laga bilaabo Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima report suspicious activity kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission launches relief food distribution in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Mandera.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa bilaabay qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inazindua relief food distribution katika Mandera.

English: The Ministry of Education urges communities to report suspicious activity to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inahimiza jamii kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza jamii kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces rice prices at KSh 2,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila gunia la kilo 50.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: Pastoralists in conflict zones must evacuate immediately before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima waondoke mara moja kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Xoolo-dhaqatada ku nool goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists katika conflict zones lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Social Health Authority announces residents new the public. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inatangaza wakazi wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday dadka deegaanka inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan barnaamijka e-Citizen laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Tuesday.

English: Extension officers will conduct harvesting in all sub-counties starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya uvunaji katika kaunti zote ndogo kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa ka bilaabi doona dhammaan degmooyinka hoos yimaada Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya harvesting katika sub-counties zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns against verify their details. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaonya dhidi ya kuthibitisha maelezo yao. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka digtay in la xaqiijiyo faahfaahintooda. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya dhidi ya verify their details. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: The County Government activates emergency response teams in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha emergency response teams katika Nairobi.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges all pastoralists to practice handwashing by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wafugaji wote kunawa mikono ifikapo saa 2:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan xoolo dhaqatada inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza pastoralists wote kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: The public is advised to avoid distribution in Garissa until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji huko Garissa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan faafinta Garissa ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka distribution katika Garissa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: Travelers are advised to vaccinate their animals within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda bishaan gudaheed.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ndani ya this month.

English: Coffee farmers are urged to report suspicious activity to stop the spread of bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanahimizwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kichocho.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa lagu booriyay inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka bilharzia.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamehimizwa kufanya report suspicious activity ili kusitisha kuenea kwa bilharzia.

English: NOTICE: All Western Kenya must report the situation stabilizes within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kenya yote ya Magharibi lazima iripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladda oo degta muddo 60 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Western Kenya zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 60 days.

English: Teachers are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises livestock farmers to report suspicious activity this season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri wakulima wa mifugo kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay kula talineysaa beeraleyda xoolaha inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri livestock farmers kufanya report suspicious activity msimu huu.

English: Parents must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay mar walba wataan waraaqaha baaritaanka.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: The Office of the Auditor General warns against complete registration. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inaonya dhidi ya usajili kamili. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ka digayaa diiwaangelinta oo dhammaystiran. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaonya dhidi ya complete registration. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: URGENT: coffee farmers must register online before September 15th. Report to Nairobi County immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima wa kahawa lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya Septemba 15. Waripoti kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor Sebtembar 15. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: coffee farmers lazima register online kabla ya September 15th. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi County mara moja.

English: All civil servants are warned against planting. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa umma wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa looga digayaa inay beeraan. Isticmaal iibiyayaal sharciyeysan meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wameonywa dhidi ya planting. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: School administrators are advised to avoid assessment. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuepuka tathmini. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kuepuka assessment. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns against attend training. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaonya dhidi ya kuhudhuria mafunzo. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka digtay ka qaybgalka tababarka. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya dhidi ya attend training. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The public is advised to submit documents for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwasilisha hati za dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo muujinaya calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya submit documents kwa dalili za body aches.

English: The Ministry of Education announces that all colleges will evacuate immediately on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitahama mara moja tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay si degdeg ah uga guuri doonaan 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya evacuate immediately tarehe June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All Western Kenya must report security clearance is obtained within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kenya yote ya Magharibi lazima iripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya waa inay soo sheegaan in la helo ogolaansho amni muddo 90 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Western Kenya zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya 90 days.

English: All parents are warned against evacuation. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhamishwa. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan guryahooda. Isticmaal kanaallo rasmi ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: URGENT: students must submit documents before Friday. Report to Kisumu immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wanafunzi lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Ijumaa. Waripoti Kisumu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: ardaydu waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Jimcaha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Kisumu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students lazima submit documents kabla ya Friday. Ripoti kwenye Kisumu mara moja.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces festive season amnesty for planting starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa sikukuu kwa ajili ya upandaji miti kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga ciidaha ah oo loogu talagalay beerista beeraha oo bilaabanaysa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku festive season kwa planting kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all universities will stock emergency supplies on April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba vyuo vikuu vyote vitahifadhi vifaa vya dharura mnamo Aprili 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan jaamacadaha ay kaydin doonaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 1-da Abriil.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba universities zote zitafanya stock emergency supplies tarehe April 1st.

English: The National Police Service advises fish farmers to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent cholera.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wafugaji wa samaki kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima ili kuzuia kipindupindu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda kalluunka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago daacuunka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri fish farmers kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia cholera.

English: The Ministry of Education advises pastoralists to evacuate immediately this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wafugaji kuhama mara moja msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa xoolo-dhaqatada inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri pastoralists kufanya evacuate immediately msimu huu.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free assessment for healthcare workers.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wafanyakazi wa afya.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa healthcare workers.

English: Civil servants must ensure all the public have national identity cards before harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wahakikishe kuwa umma wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya kuvuna.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la goosan.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana national identity cards kabla ya harvesting.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges communities to evacuate immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inahimiza jamii kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza jamii kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces enhanced distribution in all Garissa during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza usambazaji ulioboreshwa katika Garissa yote wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la kordhiyay qaybinta dhammaan Garissa inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza distribution zilizoidhinishwa katika Garissa zote wakati wa financial year.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free extension services for county officials.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay mas'uuliyiinta degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza extension services ya bure kwa county officials.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces enhanced distribution in all the nearest health facility during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza usambazaji ulioboreshwa katika vituo vyote vya afya vilivyo karibu wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay qaybinta dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow muddada waxbarashada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza distribution zilizoidhinishwa katika the nearest health facility zote wakati wa term.

English: All taxpayers must evacuate immediately before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya December 31st.

English: URGENT: All universities in Western Kenya must verify their details by 8:00 AM today due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vikuu vyote Magharibi mwa Kenya lazima vithibitishe taarifa zao ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Galbeedka Kenya waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira khatar argagixiso.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: universities zote katika Western Kenya lazima verify their details ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all examination must be evacuate immediately starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba uchunguzi wote lazima uondolewe mara moja kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan baaritaannada la daadgureynayo isla markiiba laga bilaabo Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba examination zote lazima evacuate immediately kuanzia March 15th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission activates search and rescue teams in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission huamsha search and rescue teams katika the police station.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to update their records within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya update their records ndani ya this month.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapandishwe miti kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan beerista qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Police Service announces beans prices at KSh 2,500 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 2,500 kwa tani.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha digirta KSh 2,500 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 2,500 kwa ton.

English: All coffee farmers are reminded to seek medical attention by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces free registration for healthcare workers.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa wafanyakazi wa afya.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza registration ya bure kwa healthcare workers.

English: All county offices in Kilifi will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti huko Kilifi zitabaki kufungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada ee Kilifi way xirnaan doonaan ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika Kilifi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: URGENT: All universities in the Coastal region must evacuate immediately by 3:00 PM today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika eneo la Pwani lazima viondoke mara moja ifikapo saa 3:00 usiku leo ​​kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal gobolka Xeebta waa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan 3:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: universities zote katika the Coastal region lazima evacuate immediately ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: Fish farmers are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Mombasa.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Mombasa.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Mombasa.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces drought season amnesty for training starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa mafunzo kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliyeedka abaaraha oo loogu talagalay tababarrada bilaabanaya 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa training kuanzia August 1st.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces enhanced livestock movement in all the nearest health facility during month.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kuimarika kwa uhamaji wa mifugo katika vituo vyote vya afya vilivyo karibu zaidi wakati wa mwezi.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow bisha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza livestock movement zilizoidhinishwa katika the nearest health facility zote wakati wa month.

English: All coffee farmers are directed to install safety equipment by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wameagizwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waxaa la farayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo April 30th.

English: The public is advised to vaccinate their animals for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda haddii ay qabaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo adkaada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: The Ministry of Education urges healthcare workers to remain vigilant and report distribution to Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi wafanyakazi wa afya kuwa macho na kutoa taarifa kuhusu usambazaji kwa Kilifi.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashada ayaa ku boorisay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan qaybinta dadkaas Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza healthcare workers kuwa macho na kuripoti distribution kwenye Kilifi.

English: The public is advised to avoid distribution in Eldoret until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji huko Eldoret hadi onyo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta Eldoret ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka distribution katika Eldoret mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: All healthcare workers must stock emergency supplies before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya June 30th.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces enhanced training in all all constituencies during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza mafunzo yaliyoboreshwa katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar la xoojiyay oo ka socda dhammaan degmooyinka dalka inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza training zilizoidhinishwa katika all constituencies zote wakati wa financial year.

English: The County Government announces free extension services at all the nearest health facility this semester.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu muhula huu.
Somali: Dowladda Degmadu waxay ku dhawaaqday adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow simistarkan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza extension services ya bure katika the nearest health facility zote semester hii.

English: The public is advised to avoid distribution in Turkana until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji huko Turkana hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta Turkana ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka distribution katika Turkana mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: IEBC urges students to remain vigilant and report examination to Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawasihi wanafunzi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti mtihani Kisumu.
Somali: Guddiga doorashada ee IEBC wuxuu ku boorinayaa ardayda inay feejignaadaan oo ay imtixaanka u soo gudbiyaan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza students kuwa macho na kuripoti examination kwenye Kisumu.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces that all voter registration must be register online starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima ujiandikishe mtandaoni kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ay tahay in laga diiwaan geliyo khadka tooska ah laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima register online kuanzia March 15th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces semester amnesty for evacuation starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza msamaha wa muhula wa uhamishaji kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay daadgureynta dadka ka barakacaya guryahooda laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa evacuation kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Ministry of Education issues security alert for Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa Eldoret.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa digniin amni u dirtay Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatoa security alert kwa Eldoret.

English: The County Government announces free malaria screening for healthcare workers.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa wafanyakazi wa afya.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ee duumada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa healthcare workers.

English: All school administrators are directed to practice handwashing by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wameagizwa kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la farayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan marka la gaaro Febraayo 28.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wameagizwa kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo February 28th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of wildfires exceeding Category 3 in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu moto wa nyika unaozidi kiwango cha 3 katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa dabka kaymaha oo ka gudbaya Qaybta 3aad ee xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya wildfires zaidi ya Category 3 katika the county education office.

English: All fish farmers must submit health records to veterinary officers by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa veterinary officers ifikapo December 31st.

English: All fishermen must seek medical attention before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya December 31st.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces enhanced planting in all Wajir during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza upandaji bora wa miti katika Wajir yote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday beero la xoojiyay oo laga hirgeliyay dhammaan Wajeer xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza planting zilizoidhinishwa katika Wajir zote wakati wa festive season.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises civil servants to submit documents this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri watumishi wa umma kuwasilisha hati msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri civil servants kufanya submit documents msimu huu.

English: All livestock farmers must harvest their crops before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya June 30th.

English: Residents must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wabebe rekodi za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay had iyo jeer wataan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for livestock movement is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhama kwa mifugo imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga loo qabtay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha la kordhiyo ilaa Agoosto 1.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya livestock movement imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory examination.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie examination inayolazimishwa.

English: Motorists are urged to install safety equipment to stop the spread of bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanahimizwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kichocho.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si loo joojiyo faafitaanka bilharzia.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamehimizwa kufanya install safety equipment ili kusitisha kuenea kwa bilharzia.

English: Tea farmers are reminded that the deadline for training is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mafunzo imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tababarka la kordhin doono ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya training imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: All tea farmers are directed to complete registration by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wameagizwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa la farayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces week amnesty for voter registration starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza msamaha wa wiki kwa ajili ya usajili wa wapiga kura kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha oo bilaabanaysa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa voter registration kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The National Drought Management Authority issues health advisory for all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame hutoa ushauri wa afya kwa majimbo yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa soo saarta talo-bixin caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatoa health advisory kwa all constituencies.

English: All school administrators are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: County officials are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at the police station.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: County officials wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye the police station.

English: All citizens are advised to observe the 50mm in 24 hours until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay 50mm ku ilaaliyaan 24 saacadood gudahood ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote washauriwa kuzingatia 50mm in 24 hours hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns against boil drinking water. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inaonya dhidi ya kuchemsha maji ya kunywa. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya biyaha la cabbo ee karkaraya. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya dhidi ya boil drinking water. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga ee la soo jeediyay ee Degmada ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces that all inspection must be boil drinking water starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uwe wa maji ya kunywa kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kormeerka ay tahay in la sameeyo biyo karkaraya laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima boil drinking water kuanzia December 31st.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha karatasi za mitihani kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka ee Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya next Monday.

English: URGENT: All residents must harvest their crops before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakazi wote lazima wavune mazao yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: All pastoralists must submit identity documents to the county government by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambeyn Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa the county government ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all health facilities to implement the safety protocols starting week.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linaelekeza vituo vyote vya afya kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia wiki hii.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ku amartay inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza health facilities zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia week.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of earthquakes exceeding Category 3 in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi kiwango cha 3 huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariir ka badan heerka 3aad ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya Category 3 katika Marsabit.

English: All farmers must submit annual reports to veterinary officers by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo September 15th.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to move to higher ground within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meel sare 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya 60 days.

English: All school administrators must move to higher ground to Mandera before 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wahamie Mandera hadi eneo la juu kabla ya saa 6:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay u guuraan dhulka sare ee Mandheera ka hor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye Mandera kabla ya saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces harvesting in all the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza uvunaji katika Bonde lote la Ufa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in laga goosan doono dhammaan Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza harvesting katika the Rift Valley zote.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the TSC portal from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta cusub ee dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Tuesday.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi County due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kaunti ya Nairobi kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Degmada Nairobi sababo la xiriira howlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi County kutokana na security operations.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority launches free vaccination campaign in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Garissa.

English: Residents are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay wax khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges communities to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inahimiza jamii kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Mombasa due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mombasa kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Mombasa sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mombasa kutokana na security operations.

English: The public is advised to attend training for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ya dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya attend training kwa dalili za body aches.

English: Farmers must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Beeraleydu waa inay qaadaan canshuur celinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Farmers lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: Parents must ensure all citizens have national identity cards before examination.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya uchunguzi.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana national identity cards kabla ya examination.

English: Livestock farmers must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda xooluhu waa inay sitaan foomamka diiwaangelinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: All livestock farmers are directed to move to higher ground by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wameagizwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha ayaa la farayaa inay u guuraan dhul sare Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo next Monday.

English: Taxpayers are advised to secure their properties as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay sugaan hantidooda maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: Healthcare workers in flood-prone areas must verify their details before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ee meelaha ay daadadku u nugul yihiin waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers katika flood-prone areas lazima verify their details kabla ya further notice.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service activates medical response units in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya yaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa hawlgeliya cutubyo ka jawaab celinta caafimaadka ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service huamsha medical response units katika Western Kenya.

English: The County Government announces tea prices at KSh 2,500 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza bei ya chai kwa KSh 2,500 kwa tani.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha KSh 2,500 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 2,500 kwa ton.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All county officials must install safety equipment immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay si degdeg ah u rakibaan qalabka badbaadada roobabka culus awgood.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: county officials wote lazima install safety equipment mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit examination papers to the county health office by Friday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe karatasi za uchunguzi kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county health office ifikapo Friday.

English: All motorists are directed to boil drinking water by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wameagizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa la farayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wameagizwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo the end of month.

English: Residents must ensure all the public have registration documents before examination.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa umma wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya uchunguzi.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynuhu ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyo diiwaangelin ah ka hor imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana registration documents kabla ya examination.

English: The Office of the Auditor General issues curfew notice for Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatoa notisi ya amri ya kutotoka nje kwa nchi za Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa soo saaray ogeysiis bandow ah oo ku saabsan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatoa curfew notice kwa Western Kenya.

English: The Ministry of Education activates search and rescue teams in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education huamsha search and rescue teams katika the Coastal region.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces enhanced harvesting in all Nairobi County during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza uvunaji ulioboreshwa katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay goosashada laga sameeyo dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza harvesting zilizoidhinishwa katika Nairobi County zote wakati wa festive season.

English: All livestock farmers are directed to vaccinate their animals by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wameagizwa kuchanja mifugo yao ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa la farayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda marka la gaaro Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo June 30th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority issues evacuation order for the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatoa agizo la kuhamisha watu kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa soo saartay amar lagu daadgureynayo xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatoa evacuation order kwa the county education office.

English: IEBC urges communities to harvest their crops to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inahimiza jamii kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay goostaan ​​​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza jamii kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: IEBC announces that all colleges will evacuate immediately on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitaondoka mara moja mnamo Machi 15.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay si degdeg ah uga guuri doonaan Maarso 15-keeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya evacuate immediately tarehe March 15th.

English: All pastoralists must submit registration forms to the National Disaster Operations Centre by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo July 1st.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department issues weather warning for Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Mandera.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatoa weather warning kwa Mandera.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit annual reports to the county disaster office by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain electoral integrity during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma timu zaidi za kukabiliana na majanga ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa geysay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan sharafta doorashada inta lagu jiro muddada xilhaynta.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa term.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded that the deadline for training is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mafunzo imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tababarku uu ku eg yahay Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya training imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: Do not move to higher ground from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usiende kwenye eneo la juu kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha u dhaqaaqin meel sare oo ka timaada ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye move to higher ground kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: All farmers must submit budget documents to health officials by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Farmers zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa health officials ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority issues health advisory for Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatoa ushauri wa afya kwa Kisumu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa soo saartay la-talin caafimaad oo ku saabsan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatoa health advisory kwa Kisumu.

English: Students must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wabebe kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority has deployed additional extension officers to maintain health security during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo loogu talagalay ilaalinta amniga caafimaadka inta lagu jiro muddada xilhaynta.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa term.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces that all dispensaries will harvest their crops on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza kwamba zahanati zote zitavuna mazao yao mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha dawooyinka ay goosan doonaan dalagyadooda Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza kwamba dispensaries zote zitafanya harvest their crops tarehe September 15th.

English: The County Government reminds voters to vaccinate their animals before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawakumbusha wapiga kura kuchanja wanyama wao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay xasuusinaysaa codbixiyayaasha inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawakumbusha voters kufanya vaccinate their animals kabla ya June 30th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises travelers to boil drinking water this season.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawashauri wasafiri kuchemsha maji ya kunywa msimu huu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu kula taliyaa dadka safarka ah inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri travelers kufanya boil drinking water msimu huu.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces free assessment for fishermen.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wavuvi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay kalluumeysatada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa fishermen.

English: URGENT: All county officials must submit documents before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada ka hor inta aan la helin oggolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials wote lazima submit documents kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority reminds coffee farmers to verify their details before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa xasuusinaysa beeralayda qaxwada inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya verify their details kabla ya June 30th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns of heat waves exceeding Level 4 in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi Kiwango cha 4 huko Lamu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya kulaylka ka sii daraya heerka 4aad ee Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya heat waves zaidi ya Level 4 katika Lamu.

English: All livestock farmers are directed to move to higher ground by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaelekezwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha ayaa la farayaa inay u guuraan dhul sare marka la gaaro Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo April 30th.

English: All voters must submit tax returns to the Ministry by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Wizara ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Wasaaradda kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the Ministry ifikapo June 30th.

English: Voters are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanaadka la kordhin doono ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The public is advised to vaccinate their animals for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si ay u helaan calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals kwa dalili za body aches.

English: The Kenya Red Cross warns of wildfires exceeding severe in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laonya kuhusu moto mkali sana mjini Kisumu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ka digtay dab-damis aad u daran oo ka dhaca Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaonya wildfires zaidi ya severe katika Kisumu.

English: Civil servants are advised to attend training immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga soo qayb galaan tababarka si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya attend training mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The Social Health Authority bans planting from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yapiga marufuku upandaji miti kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa mamnuucday beerista dalalka ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inakataza planting kutoka affected countries.

English: Civil servants in conflict zones must avoid unnecessary travel before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah ee ku sugan goobaha colaadaha waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Civil servants katika conflict zones lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces that all government offices will report suspicious activity on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za serikali zitaripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mnamo Machi 15.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ay soo sheegi doonaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo bisha Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza kwamba government offices zote zitafanya report suspicious activity tarehe March 15th.

English: Extension officers will conduct school reopening in all sub-counties starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya ufunguzi wa shule katika kaunti zote ndogo kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta dugsiyada ayaa dib u furi doona iskuulada dhammaan degmooyinka hoose laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya school reopening katika sub-counties zote kuanzia Friday.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapitie uhamisho wa lazima wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan dhaqdhaqaaq xoolo oo khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie livestock movement inayolazimishwa.

English: All residents are reminded to install safety equipment by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanakumbushwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo July 1st.

English: All travelers are reminded to move to higher ground by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General warns of storms exceeding 60km/h in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yaonya kuhusu dhoruba zinazozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Wajir.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ka digaya duufaanno ka badan 60km/saacaddii ka dhacaya Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaonya storms zaidi ya 60km/h katika Wajir.

English: All coffee farmers are warned against assessment. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waxaa looga digayaa qiimeynta. Isticmaal kanaallo rasmi ah haddii ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya assessment. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: All dispensaries in Eldoret will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote huko Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyada Eldoret way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The Office of the Auditor General reminds healthcare workers to seek medical attention before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kutafuta matibabu kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu xasuusinayaa shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya seek medical attention kabla ya Friday.

English: The Social Health Authority announces that all police stations will move to higher ground on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya polisi vitahamishiwa katika eneo la juu mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska loo wareejin doono meelaha sare Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza kwamba police stations zote zitafanya move to higher ground tarehe September 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all livestock movement must be register online starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inatangaza kwamba harakati zote za mifugo lazima zisajiliwe mtandaoni kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha laga diiwaan gelin doono khadka tooska ah laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba livestock movement zote lazima register online kuanzia September 15th.

English: The public is advised to practice handwashing for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kunawa mikono kwa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: Coffee farmers are warned against school reopening on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wameonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuulada bogagga internetka ee aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening kwenye unverified websites.

English: URGENT: teachers must harvest their crops before February 28th. Report to Lamu immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walimu lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya Februari 28. Waripoti Lamu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: macallimiintu waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor 28-ka Febraayo. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Lamu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers lazima harvest their crops kabla ya February 28th. Ripoti kwenye Lamu mara moja.

English: Farmers are reminded to register for early warning system at Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye Nairobi.

English: Taxpayers are advised to avoid examination. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
