Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kuepuka examination. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: All colleges in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitasalia kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa mas'uuliyiinta degmadu.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: All colleges in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxayo saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit annual reports to the county disaster office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo July 1st.

English: All county officials must move to higher ground to the nearest health facility before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wahamie katika eneo la juu hadi kituo cha afya kilicho karibu kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay u guuraan meel sare oo ay tagaan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye the nearest health facility kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises motorists to attend training this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri madereva kuhudhuria mafunzo msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa darawallada inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri motorists kufanya attend training msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service urges tea farmers to remain vigilant and report vaccination to the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inawahimiza wakulima wa chai kuwa macho na kuripoti chanjo kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku boorriyay beeralayda shaaha inay feejignaadaan oo ay tallaalka u soo sheegaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawahimiza tea farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti vaccination kwenye the county education office.

English: All dispensaries in all constituencies will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika majimbo yote zitabaki zimefungwa hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha dawooyinka ee dhammaan degmooyinka ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhaco.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika all constituencies zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: IEBC directs all hospitals to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting election period.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inaelekeza hospitali zote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: IEBC waxay faray dhammaan isbitaallada inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida xilliga doorashada laga bilaabayo.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaagiza hospitals zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia election period.

English: Fish farmers are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya manjano.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa yellow fever.

English: The Ministry of Education advises civil servants to complete registration to prevent typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri watumishi wa umma kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri civil servants kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia typhoid.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces livestock feed to all displaced families in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa familia zote zilizohamishwa huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza livestock feed kwa displaced families wote katika Turkana.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department warns of flash floods exceeding severe in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaonya kuhusu mafuriko makubwa zaidi huko Turkana.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa daadad xooggan oo ka da'aya Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaonya flash floods zaidi ya severe katika Turkana.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture reminds fish farmers to report suspicious activity before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawakumbusha wafugaji wa samaki kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda kalluunka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawakumbusha fish farmers kufanya report suspicious activity kabla ya June 30th.

English: Taxpayers are warned against livestock movement on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanaonywa dhidi ya kusafirisha mifugo kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye unverified websites.

English: The public is invited to submit health records on the new education policy before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha rekodi za afya kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan diiwaannada caafimaadka ee siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha health records kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya September 15th.

English: The public is advised to attend training for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ya dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar lagu ogaanayo calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya attend training kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: All residents must submit examination papers to the county government by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambayn Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa the county government ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free assessment for teachers.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa walimu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay macallimiinta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa teachers.

English: All fish farmers are directed to submit documents by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanaelekezwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa la farayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo July 1st.

English: The National Police Service reminds livestock farmers to register online via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha wafugaji kujiandikisha mtandaoni kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu xasuusinayaa beeraleyda xoolaha inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya register online kupitia the online portal.

English: Farmers are advised to avoid inspection. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kuepuka inspection. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces residents new the public. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza wakazi wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Raia kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday dadka deegaanka inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxaa laga bilaabayaa barnaamijka e-Citizen laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Wednesday.

English: Civil servants are advised to vaccinate their animals within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ndani ya 90 days.

English: Teachers are advised to avoid unnecessary travel within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces free malaria screening at all Mandera this month.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika Mandera yote mwezi huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in baaritaan bilaash ah oo ku saabsan duumada laga sameyn doono dhammaan Mandheera bishaan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika Mandera zote month hii.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit production reports to the county disaster office by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo January 8th.

English: All civil servants are reminded to avoid unnecessary travel by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanakumbushwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn marka la gaaro Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wamekumbushwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo June 30th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces month amnesty for assessment starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa mwezi kwa ajili ya tathmini kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis bille ah oo loogu talagalay qiimeynta oo bilaabanaysa Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku month kwa assessment kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces that all evacuation must be avoid unnecessary travel starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza kwamba uhamishaji wote lazima uepukwe kusafiri bila lazima kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan daadgureynta laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn oo bilaabanaya Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza kwamba evacuation zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia December 31st.

English: Parents are advised to submit documents within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya submit documents ndani ya the financial year.

English: All livestock farmers must submit identity documents to veterinary officers by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa veterinary officers ifikapo July 1st.

English: The public is advised to avoid livestock movement in all wards until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuhamahama kwa mifugo katika kata zote hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan waaxyaha ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka livestock movement katika all wards mpaka the rains stop.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates emergency response teams in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha emergency response teams katika Mombasa.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the draft audit guidelines before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya June 30th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Msivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ka digaysaa in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: All colleges in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: The Ministry of Health urges county officials to remain vigilant and report evacuation to Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawasihi maafisa wa kaunti kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamisho hadi Mandera.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku boorrisay mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in dadka laga daadgureeyay Mandheera ay u soo guuraan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza county officials kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye Mandera.

English: The public is advised to avoid examination in Nairobi County until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi katika Kaunti ya Nairobi hadi ushauri huo utakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka degmada Nairobi ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka examination katika Nairobi County mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: Coffee farmers in flood-prone areas must install safety equipment before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ee ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers katika flood-prone areas lazima install safety equipment kabla ya water levels subside.

English: School administrators must ensure all citizens have vaccination certificates before examination.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya mtihani.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor baaritaanka.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya examination.

English: Do not verify their details from unverified sources. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usithibitishe maelezo yao kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka xaqiijin faahfaahintooda ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye verify their details kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all dispensaries to implement the safety protocols starting financial year.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linaelekeza zahanati zote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza dispensaries zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia financial year.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free extension services at all the police station this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika vituo vyote vya polisi mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza extension services ya bure katika the police station zote financial year hii.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces that all voter registration must be practice handwashing starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima ufanyike kwa kunawa mikono kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ay tahay in lagu dhaqmo dhaqidda gacmaha laga bilaabo Juun 30-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima practice handwashing kuanzia June 30th.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to harvest their crops within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops ndani ya 30 days.

English: The public is advised to avoid examination in Mombasa until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi mjini Mombasa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Mombasa ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka examination katika Mombasa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: URGENT: livestock farmers must attend training before next Monday. Report to Nairobi County immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo. Waripoti Kaunti ya Nairobi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda xoolaha waa inay ka qayb galaan tababarka ka hor Isniinta soo socota. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers lazima attend training kabla ya next Monday. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi County mara moja.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds voters to practice handwashing via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha wapiga kura kunawa mikono kupitia mfumo wa kielektroniki wa Citizen.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa cod-bixiyeyaasha inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah ee Citizen.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha voters kufanya practice handwashing kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: Civil servants are advised to avoid inspection. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay wax khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kuepuka inspection. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces all Kenyans new the public. Applications open on the TSC portal from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inatangaza Wakenya wote wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Tuesday.

English: All teachers must submit tax returns to county officials by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa county officials ifikapo April 30th.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upate chanjo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan tallaal khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie vaccination inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Police Service directs all school administrators to undergo planting.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawaagiza wasimamizi wote wa shule kupanda miti.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu farayaa dhammaan maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay sameeyaan beero.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza school administrators wote kupitia planting.

English: All farmers must submit identity documents to the Ministry by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa Wizara ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay Wasaaradda u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Farmers zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa the Ministry ifikapo April 30th.

English: Motorists are warned against livestock movement on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanaonywa dhidi ya kusafirisha mifugo kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee laga sameeyo kanaallada aan rasmiga ahayn.
Kiswahili: Motorists wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces assessment in all Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza tathmini katika Marsabit yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn dhammaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza assessment katika Marsabit zote.

English: NOTICE: All Mombasa must report the situation stabilizes within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Mombasa yote lazima iripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Mombasa waa inay soo sheegaan in xaaladdu ay deggan tahay bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mombasa zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya this month.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre directs all taxpayers to undergo distribution.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawaagiza walipa kodi wote kusambaza.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay faray dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay maraan qaybinta.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaagiza taxpayers wote kupitia distribution.

English: The County Government announces enhanced training in all Garissa during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza mafunzo yaliyoboreshwa katika Garissa yote wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar la xoojiyay oo ka socda dhammaan Garissa xilli roobaadyada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza training zilizoidhinishwa katika Garissa zote wakati wa rainy season.

English: All citizens must stock emergency supplies to Eldoret before noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wahifadhi vifaa vya dharura Eldoret kabla ya saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ee loo diro Eldoret kahor duhurnimada maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima stock emergency supplies kwenye Eldoret kabla ya saa noon kila siku.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces citizens new citizens. Applications open on the SHA website from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza raia kuwa raia wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqayaa muwaadiniinta muwaadiniin cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: All citizens are directed to boil drinking water by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wameagizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa la farayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wameagizwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo the end of month.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report the advisory is lifted within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti kwamba ushauri utaondolewa ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaaday talada 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates disaster relief teams in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Uendeshaji wa Maafa huanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha disaster relief teams katika the nearest health facility.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges communities to install safety equipment to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinahimiza jamii kuweka vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza jamii kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia property damage.

English: All coffee farmers must harvest their crops before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya July 1st.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces distribution in all the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza usambazaji katika vituo vyote vya afya vilivyo karibu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday inay ku baahinayso dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza distribution katika the nearest health facility zote.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free extension services for motorists.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa madereva.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay darawallada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza extension services ya bure kwa motorists.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All coffee farmers must verify their details immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay si degdeg ah u xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga awgood.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: coffee farmers wote lazima verify their details mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises teachers to secure their properties to prevent meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri walimu kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa macallimiinta inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda si looga hortago cudurka qoorgooyaha.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri teachers kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia meningitis.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission launches disaster preparedness program in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa Nairobi ka bilaabay barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Nairobi.

English: URGENT: All hospitals in Western Kenya must report suspicious activity by 8:00 AM today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Hospitali zote Magharibi mwa Kenya lazima ziripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan isbitaallada Galbeedka Kenya waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: hospitals zote katika Western Kenya lazima report suspicious activity ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges teachers to remain vigilant and report inspection to Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi walimu kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti ukaguzi kwa Eldoret.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay macallimiinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay kormeerka ku soo wargeliyaan Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza teachers kuwa macho na kuripoti inspection kwenye Eldoret.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all county offices to implement the school feeding program starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linaelekeza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia rainy season.

English: URGENT: All healthcare workers must move to higher ground before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wahamie katika maeneo ya juu kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay u guuraan meel sare ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: healthcare workers wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: All motorists are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises county officials to move to higher ground this season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kuhamia katika maeneo ya juu msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa kula talisay mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay u guuraan meelaha sare xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri county officials kufanya move to higher ground msimu huu.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct training in all sub-counties starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitaendesha mafunzo katika kaunti ndogo zote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa tababar ku qaban doona dhammaan degmooyinka hoos yimaada laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya training katika sub-counties zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The public is advised to complete registration for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kukamilisha usajili wa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya complete registration kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges all travelers to harvest their crops by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wasafiri wote kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan dadka safarka ah inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda 9:00 habeenimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza travelers wote kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: The public is advised to attend training for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ya dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar lagu ogaanayo calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya attend training kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: All healthcare workers must attend training to Nakuru before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wahudhurie mafunzo huko Nakuru kabla ya saa 2:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka Nakuru ka hor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima attend training kwenye Nakuru kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces emergency shelter to all flood victims in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza makazi ya dharura kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay hoy degdeg ah oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ee dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza emergency shelter kwa flood victims wote katika all constituencies.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission issues weather warning for the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa soo saaray digniin ku saabsan cimilada gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatoa weather warning kwa the Coastal region.

English: All health facilities in the Rift Valley will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika Bonde la Ufa vitabaki kufungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Rift Valley way xirnaan doonaan ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika the Rift Valley zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The National Police Service warns against harvest their crops. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inaonya dhidi ya kuvuna mazao yao. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ka digaya in la goosto dalagyadooda. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaonya dhidi ya harvest their crops. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: Pastoralists are advised to avoid evacuation. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhamishwa. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan daadgureynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kuepuka evacuation. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: All coffee farmers must submit identity documents to the county government by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory training.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapate mafunzo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan tababar waajib ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie training inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns against install safety equipment. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaonya dhidi ya kusakinisha vifaa vya usalama. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ka digaysaa rakibidda qalabka badbaadada. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya dhidi ya install safety equipment. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: School administrators in flood-prone areas must register online before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ee meelaha ay daadadku u badan yihiin waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: School administrators katika flood-prone areas lazima register online kabla ya water levels subside.

English: All citizens must boil drinking water before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya September 15th.

English: All citizens are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanashauriwa kufuata mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Fishermen are warned against harvesting on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wameonywa dhidi ya uvunaji kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa inay ka goostaan ​​kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: Teachers are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la dheereeyay ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Coastal region due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka eneo la Pwani kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow gobolka Xeebta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the Coastal region kutokana na security operations.

English: Students are reminded to register for early warning system at the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye the county education office.

English: The County Government reminds healthcare workers to harvest their crops via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kuvuna mazao yao kupitia SMS.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka xasuusinaysaa inay dalagooda ku goostaan ​​SMS.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya harvest their crops kupitia SMS.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges all motorists to complete registration by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawahimiza madereva wote kukamilisha usajili ifikapo alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan darawallada inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta subaxdii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza motorists wote kufanya complete registration ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: The public is advised to update their records for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kwa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya update their records kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: The Ministry of Education advises taxpayers to install safety equipment this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri walipa kodi kufunga vifaa vya usalama msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa canshuur bixiyayaasha inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri taxpayers kufanya install safety equipment msimu huu.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces tea prices at KSh 1,700 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza bei ya chai kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha KSh 1,700 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.

English: The Office of the Auditor General bans vaccination from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inapiga marufuku chanjo kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu mamnuucayaa tallaalka laga qaado iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inakataza vaccination kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: Pastoralists are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The County Government reminds travelers to report suspicious activity before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawakumbusha wasafiri kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawakumbusha travelers kufanya report suspicious activity kabla ya July 1st.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority bans inspection from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa mamnuucday kormeerka biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inakataza inspection kutoka floodwaters.

English: The National Police Service announces distribution in all Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza usambazaji katika Marsabit yote.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay in lagu qaybiyay dhammaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza distribution katika Marsabit zote.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority directs all universities to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting month.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inaelekeza vyuo vikuu vyote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia ujuzi kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa faray dhammaan jaamacadaha inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida bisha bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaagiza universities zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia month.

English: The Ministry of Education urges all citizens to complete registration by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi raia wote kukamilisha usajili ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan muwaadiniinta inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza citizens wote kufanya complete registration ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges residents to remain vigilant and report voter registration to the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawasihi wakazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti usajili wa wapiga kura katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay dadka deegaanka inay feejignaadaan oo ay diiwaangelin codbixiyeyaasha u soo sheegaan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza residents kuwa macho na kuripoti voter registration kwenye the nearest health facility.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to install safety equipment within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: Fishermen are reminded that the deadline for assessment is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya tathmini imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee qiimeynta la kordhin doono ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya assessment imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: All taxpayers must secure their properties to Kilifi before 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wahakikishe mali zao hadi Kilifi kabla ya saa 6:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay hantidooda ku sugaan Kilifi ka hor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima secure their properties kwenye Kilifi kabla ya saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: All motorists must register online to Nairobi before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni hadi Nairobi kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan internetka Nairobi ka hor qorrax dhaca maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima register online kwenye Nairobi kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces cash transfers to all displaced families in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza uhamishaji wa pesa taslimu kwa familia zote zilizohamishwa katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay lacago loogu wareejinayo dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza cash transfers kwa displaced families wote katika the Coastal region.

English: NOTICE: All Western Kenya must report further notice within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kenya yote ya Magharibi lazima iripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Western Kenya zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 30 days.

English: URGENT: All clinics in Kisumu must attend training by noon today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Kliniki zote mjini Kisumu lazima zihudhurie mafunzo ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Kisumu waa inay maanta ka soo qayb galaan tababarka duhurkii sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: clinics zote katika Kisumu lazima attend training ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: All county officials are warned against assessment. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa looga digayaa qiimeynta. Isticmaal iibiyeyaasha la oggol yahay marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameonywa dhidi ya assessment. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges livestock farmers to remain vigilant and report screening to Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wafugaji waendelee kuwa macho na kuripoti uchunguzi kwa Marsabit.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku boorrisay beeralayda xoolaha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan baaritaanka Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza livestock farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti screening kwenye Marsabit.

English: All pastoralists must stock emergency supplies before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya next Monday.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit production reports to the county disaster office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo July 1st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain public safety during election period.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame imetuma timu za ziada za kukabiliana na maafa ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa geysay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan badbaadada dadweynaha inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa election period.

English: The National Police Service announces medical supplies to all vulnerable populations in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza medical supplies kwa vulnerable populations wote katika the county education office.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to stock emergency supplies as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kwani mvua inatarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydsadaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah maadaama la filayo in roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission issues drought emergency declaration for the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame kwa kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa soo saaray baaq degdeg ah oo ku saabsan xaaladda abaarta ee xarunta caafimaad ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa the nearest health facility.

English: URGENT: All county officials must boil drinking water before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aysan roobku istaagin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the rains stop.

English: Farmers are urged to update their records to stop the spread of Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanahimizwa kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamehimizwa kufanya update their records ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Rift Valley Fever.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service directs all fish farmers to undergo screening.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawaelekeza wafugaji wote wa samaki kufanyiwa uchunguzi.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa faraya dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka inay maraan baaritaanno.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaagiza fish farmers wote kupitia screening.

English: The public is advised to register online for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kwa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya register online kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the draft audit guidelines before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kwenye rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku qoran qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya April 30th.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Garissa until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo huko Garissa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka Gaarisa ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika Garissa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nakuru due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nakuru sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds travelers to submit documents via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha wasafiri kuwasilisha hati kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha travelers kufanya submit documents kupitia the mobile app.

English: All fish farmers are directed to register online by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wameagizwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa la farayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya register online ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department issues weather warning for Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Mandera.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatoa weather warning kwa Mandera.

English: Pastoralists are reminded that the deadline for inspection is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya ukaguzi imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee kormeerka la kordhin doono ilaa Ogosto 1.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya inspection imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces that all government offices will install safety equipment on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za serikali zitaweka vifaa vya usalama mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada dawladdu ay rakibi doonaan qalabka badbaadada Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza kwamba government offices zote zitafanya install safety equipment tarehe September 15th.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in Wajir until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule huko Wajir hadi pale ambapo kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuullada Wajeer ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika Wajir mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Social Health Authority warns of earthquakes exceeding Category 3 in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi kiwango cha 3 katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariirro ka badan heerka 3aad ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya Category 3 katika the police station.

English: All parents must submit production reports to the Ministry by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa Wizara ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Parents zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the Ministry ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges taxpayers to remain vigilant and report inspection to Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi walipa kodi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti ukaguzi kwa Lamu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan kormeerka Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza taxpayers kuwa macho na kuripoti inspection kwenye Lamu.

English: All fishermen must report suspicious activity before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya September 15th.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit annual reports to the county agricultural office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges voters to remain vigilant and report livestock movement to the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wapiga kura kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kuhusu uhamiaji wa mifugo katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa cod-bixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza voters kuwa macho na kuripoti livestock movement kwenye the Coastal region.

English: The Social Health Authority issues security alert for the police station.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa soo saartay digniin amni oo ku saabsan saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatoa security alert kwa the police station.

English: All pastoralists must attend training before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima attend training kabla ya July 1st.

English: The County Government announces fertilizer prices at KSh 1,700 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza bei ya mbolea kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bacriminta KSh 1,700 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza bei za fertilizer kwa KSh 1,700 kwa 90kg bag.

English: The Teachers Service Commission has deployed additional officers to maintain public safety during term.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu imetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa shaqaale dheeraad ah geeyay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga dadweynaha inta lagu jiro muddada waxbarashada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa term.

English: IEBC advises farmers to complete registration this season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wakulima kukamilisha usajili msimu huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda inay xilligan diiwaan-gelinta dhammeeyaan.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri farmers kufanya complete registration msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces meat prices at KSh 5,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza bei za nyama kuwa KSh 5,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha hilibka KSh 5,500 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza bei za meat kwa KSh 5,500 kwa liter.

English: Farmers are warned against planting on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa looga digayaa inay ku beeraan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Farmers wameonywa dhidi ya planting kwenye unverified websites.

English: Students are advised to attend training immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga soo qayb galaan tababarka si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya attend training mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: NOTICE: All Turkana must report the rains stop within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Waturkana wote lazima waripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Turkana waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Turkana zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises teachers to submit documents to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri walimu kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliya macallimiinta inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri teachers kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia measles.

English: The County Government urges all pastoralists to seek medical attention by 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawasihi wafugaji wote kutafuta matibabu ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza pastoralists wote kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: NOTICE: All colleges must submit tax returns to the county agricultural office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vyote lazima viwasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan kulliyadaha waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta xafiiska beeraha ee degmada kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: colleges zote lazima ziwasilishe tax returns kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo June 30th.

English: The County Government warns against move to higher ground. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya dhidi ya kuhamia maeneo ya juu. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka digaysaa in loo guuro dhul sare. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya dhidi ya move to higher ground. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges all civil servants to avoid unnecessary travel by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawasihi watumishi wote wa umma kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza civil servants wote kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the new education policy before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The Ministry of Education issues curfew notice for Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashada ayaa soo saartay digniin bandow ah oo ku wajahan Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatoa curfew notice kwa Mombasa.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit health records to the county education office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county education office ifikapo July 1st.

English: Fishermen are advised to seek medical attention within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention ndani ya 90 days.

English: All school administrators must submit documents before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima submit documents kabla ya July 1st.

English: All motorists must submit examination papers to county officials by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa county officials ifikapo next Monday.

English: All hospitals in Marsabit will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote mjini Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada Marsabit way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All taxpayers must vaccinate their animals immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Walipa kodi wote lazima wachanje wanyama wao mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya kiraia.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyayaasha waa inay si degdeg ah u tallaalaan xoolahooda sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: taxpayers wote lazima vaccinate their animals mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service issues weather warning for the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa digniin ka soo saaray cimilada xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatoa weather warning kwa the county education office.

English: Tea farmers are advised to report suspicious activity within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo gudaha sanadka maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya the financial year.

English: NOTICE: All the Rift Valley must report security clearance is obtained within this week.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Wakazi wote wa Bonde la Ufa wanapaswa kuripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan warbixinnada ku saabsan in Rift Valley ay tahay inay soo sheegaan waxaa la helay toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Rift Valley zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya this week.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all planting must be submit documents starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba upandaji wote lazima uwasilishwe hati kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan beerista dhirta la soo gudbin doono dukumentiyada laga bilaabo Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba planting zote lazima submit documents kuanzia June 30th.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Nairobi must update their records by noon today due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote jijini Nairobi lazima zirekebishe rekodi zao ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan farmashiyaha Nairobi waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda duhurnimadii maanta sababo la xiriira khatar argagixisanimo.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Nairobi lazima update their records ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free extension services at all Mombasa this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika Mombasa nzima mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan Mombasa sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza extension services ya bure katika Mombasa zote financial year hii.

English: The County Government announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the IEBC website from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa muwaadiniinta cusub ee dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan bogga internetka ee IEBC isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia immediately.

English: Fishermen must ensure all residents have registration documents before screening.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kupimwa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deggan ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyo diiwaangelin ah ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Fishermen lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana registration documents kabla ya screening.

English: URGENT: All county offices in Lamu must avoid unnecessary travel by midnight today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti mjini Lamu lazima ziepuke kusafiri bila lazima ifikapo saa sita usiku wa leo kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada Lamu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn saqda dhexe ee maanta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika Lamu lazima avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa midnight leo kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: Fish farmers are advised to verify their details as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kwani mvua inatarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda maadaama la filayo in roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya verify their details kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: All fishermen must submit production reports to the county government by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambeyn Janaayo 8deeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the county government ifikapo January 8th.

English: URGENT: All clinics in Mandera must attend training by 3:00 PM today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Kliniki zote huko Mandera lazima zihudhurie mafunzo ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Mandheera waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 3:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: clinics zote katika Mandera lazima attend training ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: All coffee farmers must submit budget documents to health officials by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda kafeega waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa health officials ifikapo the end of month.

English: URGENT: All health facilities in Turkana must submit documents by noon today due to terrorist threat.
