Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya afya huko Turkana lazima viwasilishe hati ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Turkana waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada duhurnimadii maanta sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: health facilities zote katika Turkana lazima submit documents ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The National Police Service reminds parents to practice handwashing before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha wazazi kunawa mikono kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa waalidiinta xasuusinaya inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha parents kufanya practice handwashing kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The County Government activates security patrols in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Wajir.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa hawlgalisay roondooyin amni oo ka dhacay Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha security patrols katika Wajir.

English: The County Government announces that all universities will complete registration on January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba vyuo vikuu vyote vitakamilisha usajili mnamo Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan jaamacaduhu ay dhammayn doonaan diiwaangelinta Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba universities zote zitafanya complete registration tarehe January 8th, 2026.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid all wards due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kaunti zote kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow dhammaan waaxaha sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka all wards kutokana na rising water levels.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All county officials must install safety equipment immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay si degdeg ah u rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: county officials wote lazima install safety equipment mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: All dispensaries in all wards will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika kata zote zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal dhammaan waaxaha way xirnaan doonaan ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika all wards zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: Do not attend training from animals that have died. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usihudhurie mafunzo kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka qayb gelin tababarka xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dawladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye attend training kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All civil servants must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: civil servants wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: All government offices in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay booliiska.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces harvesting in all all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza uvunaji katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in laga goosan doono dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza harvesting katika all constituencies zote.

English: All county officials are reminded to update their records by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wamekumbushwa kufanya update their records ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises coffee farmers to evacuate immediately to prevent HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliyay beeraleyda qaxwada inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri coffee farmers kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia HIV/AIDS.

English: Coffee farmers must ensure all the public have registration documents before evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima wahakikishe umma wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kuhamishwa.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyo diiwaangelin ah ka hor inta aan la daadgurayn.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana registration documents kabla ya evacuation.

English: The Ministry of Education announces citizens new the public. Applications open on the TSC portal from Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa muwaadiniinta ku dhawaaqday dadweynaha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Thursday.

English: The Social Health Authority advises students to update their records this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wanafunzi kusasisha rekodi zao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay kula talinaysaa ardayda inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri students kufanya update their records msimu huu.

English: Citizens are advised to avoid screening. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanashauriwa kuepuka kuchunguzwa. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kuepuka screening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: All school administrators must submit annual reports to veterinary officers by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo the end of month.

English: IEBC warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: URGENT: All health facilities in Mombasa must practice handwashing by noon today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya afya mjini Mombasa lazima vifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Mombasa waa inay maanta ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha duhurkii sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: health facilities zote katika Mombasa lazima practice handwashing ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The National Police Service announces citizens new all Kenyans. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inatangaza raia wapya wote wa Kenya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Raia kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta cusub ee dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Friday.

English: School administrators are urged to stock emergency supplies to stop the spread of malaria.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanahimizwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia kuenea kwa malaria.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ayaa lagu booriyay inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka duumada.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamehimizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kusitisha kuenea kwa malaria.

English: All citizens must install safety equipment to Marsabit before noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama huko Marsabit kabla ya saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan Marsabit ka hor duhurnimada maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima install safety equipment kwenye Marsabit kabla ya saa noon kila siku.

English: The public is advised to avoid screening in Nakuru until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi huko Nakuru hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Nakuru ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka screening katika Nakuru mpaka the rains stop.

English: The Ministry of Education announces school reopening in all Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dib loo furayo iskuulada ku yaal Galbeedka Kenya oo dhan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza school reopening katika Western Kenya zote.

English: All livestock farmers must submit production reports to the Ministry by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa Wizara ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the Ministry ifikapo February 28th.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Turkana must seek medical attention by 9:00 PM today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote huko Turkana lazima zitafute huduma ya matibabu ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan farmashiyaha Turkana waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad 9:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Turkana lazima seek medical attention ifikapo saa 9:00 PM leo kutokana na security operations.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces week amnesty for examination starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay baaritaanka oo bilaabanaya 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa examination kuanzia August 1st.

English: Taxpayers are urged to move to higher ground to stop the spread of meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanahimizwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare si ay u joojiyaan faafitaanka cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamehimizwa kufanya move to higher ground ili kusitisha kuenea kwa meningitis.

English: The County Government reminds livestock farmers to boil drinking water before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawakumbusha wafugaji kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda xoolaha inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya boil drinking water kabla ya next Monday.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct assessment in all counties starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitafanya tathmini katika kaunti zote kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa qiimeyn ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya assessment katika counties zote kuanzia Monday.

English: The Social Health Authority issues drought emergency declaration for Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame jijini Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa soo saartay baaq degdeg ah oo ku saabsan abaarta Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa Mombasa.

English: All healthcare workers must practice handwashing to the Rift Valley before 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono hadi Bonde la Ufa kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay gacmaha ku dhaqdaan Rift Valley ka hor 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima practice handwashing kwenye the Rift Valley kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: Fish farmers must ensure all citizens have national identity cards before examination.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya uchunguzi.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana national identity cards kabla ya examination.

English: The Ministry of Education urges all teachers to avoid unnecessary travel by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi walimu wote kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan macallimiinta inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza teachers wote kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free training at all the police station this semester.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika vituo vyote vya polisi muhula huu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay tababar bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska simistarkan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza training ya bure katika the police station zote semester hii.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges all county officials to seek medical attention by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawasihi maafisa wote wa kaunti kutafuta matibabu ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta gobolka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza county officials wote kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: All fish farmers are warned against school reopening. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanaonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuullada. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: All parents are directed to boil drinking water by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wameagizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa la farayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameagizwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo July 1st.

English: Residents must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay sitaan waraaqaha imtixaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: Parents in border counties must attend training before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool gobollada xuduudda waa inay ka qayb qaataan tababarka ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Parents katika border counties lazima attend training kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces residents new residents. Applications open on the IEBC website from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawatangazia wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqayaa dadka deegaanka inay cusub yihiin. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: All residents are reminded to complete registration by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanakumbushwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo the end of this week.

English: School administrators must ensure all residents have national identity cards before planting.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya kupanda.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka degan ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor inta aan la beerin.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana national identity cards kabla ya planting.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces livestock feed to all drought-affected households in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Kisumu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay quudinta xoolaha dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza livestock feed kwa drought-affected households wote katika Kisumu.

English: Do not update their records from affected countries. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usisasishe rekodi zao kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha cusbooneysiin diiwaankooda wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye update their records kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces that all school reopening must be avoid unnecessary travel starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza kwamba kufunguliwa tena kwa shule zote lazima kuepukwe kusafiri bila lazima kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan dib u furista iskuulada laga fogaado safarro aan loo baahnayn oo bilaabanaya Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza kwamba school reopening zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department issues security alert for the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay digniin amni oo ku saabsan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatoa security alert kwa the nearest health facility.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to install safety equipment to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuweka vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku boorisay bulshooyinka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: URGENT: fish farmers must complete registration before the end of month. Report to Mombasa immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wafugaji wa samaki lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Watoe taarifa Mombasa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mombasa.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fish farmers lazima complete registration kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye Mombasa mara moja.

English: IEBC urges all civil servants to attend training by 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawasihi watumishi wote wa umma kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 5:00 galabnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza civil servants wote kufanya attend training ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: URGENT: voters must attend training before April 30th. Report to the county education office immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wapiga kura lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya Aprili 30. Watoe taarifa kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: codbixiyayaashu waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor Abriil 30keeda. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: voters lazima attend training kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye the county education office mara moja.

English: Students are warned against inspection on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanaonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa looga digayaa inay kormeeraan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Students wameonywa dhidi ya inspection kwenye unverified websites.

English: URGENT: All government offices in Nairobi County must install safety equipment by 8:00 AM today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za serikali katika Kaunti ya Nairobi lazima ziweke vifaa vya usalama ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee Degmada Nairobi waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: government offices zote katika Nairobi County lazima install safety equipment ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: IEBC warns against install safety equipment. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya dhidi ya kufunga vifaa vya usalama. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa rakibidda qalabka badbaadada. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya dhidi ya install safety equipment. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: Do not update their records from animals that have died. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usisasishe rekodi zao kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha cusbooneysiin diiwaankooda xayawaanada dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye update their records kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free registration at all the police station this election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza usajili wa bure katika vituo vyote vya polisi katika kipindi hiki cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska xilligan doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza registration ya bure katika the police station zote election period hii.

English: NOTICE: All colleges must submit annual reports to the county education office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vyote lazima viwasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan kulliyadaha waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: colleges zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county education office ifikapo September 15th.

English: All citizens must submit budget documents to county officials by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Aprili.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmooyinka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa county officials ifikapo April 30th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid all wards due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka wodi zote kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow dhammaan waaxaha caafimaadka sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka all wards kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges communities to stock emergency supplies to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inahimiza jamii kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission issues security alert for the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa soo saaray digniin amni oo ku saabsan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatoa security alert kwa the nearest health facility.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku jira Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The Ministry of Health advises students to update their records to prevent dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wanafunzi kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia homa ya dengue.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay kula talinaysaa ardayda inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri students kufanya update their records ili kuzuia dengue fever.

English: NOTICE: All Kilifi must report water levels subside within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kilifi yote lazima iripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Kilifi waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhacaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Kilifi zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 30 days.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Lamu due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Lamu kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Lamu sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Lamu kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free malaria screening at all the county education office this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti msimu huu wa mvua.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay baaritaan bilaash ah oo lagu sameeyo dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada xilligan roobaadka.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika the county education office zote rainy season hii.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges coffee farmers to remain vigilant and report planting to all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi wakulima wa kahawa kuwa macho na kutoa taarifa za upandaji wa kahawa kwa majimbo yote.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay beeraleyda qaxwada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan beerista dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza coffee farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti planting kwenye all constituencies.

English: IEBC warns of heavy rainfall exceeding Level 4 in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi Kiwango cha 4 huko Wajir.
Somali: Guddiga Doorashada iyo Xuduudaha ee IEBC ayaa ka digaya roobab xooggan oo ka da'aya heerka 4aad ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya Level 4 katika Wajir.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the draft audit guidelines before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya December 31st.

English: The Social Health Authority urges communities to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inahimiza jamii kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku boorinaysa bulshooyinka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The Ministry of Education has deployed additional health workers to maintain electoral integrity during month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi katika mwezi huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro bisha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa month.

English: IEBC advises motorists to submit documents to prevent polio.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri madereva kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia polio.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa darawallada inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri motorists kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia polio.

English: NOTICE: All Garissa must report the rains stop within this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Garissa yote lazima iripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Garissa waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Garissa zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya this week.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises livestock farmers to seek medical attention this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wafugaji kutafuta matibabu msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliyay beeraleyda xoolaha inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri livestock farmers kufanya seek medical attention msimu huu.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Western Kenya due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Magharibi mwa Kenya kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Galbeedka Kenya sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Western Kenya kutokana na security operations.

English: NOTICE: All government offices must submit annual reports to the county agricultural office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za serikali lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada ugu dambayn Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: government offices zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo December 31st.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces livestock feed to all flood victims in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in xoolaha la quudiyo dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza livestock feed kwa flood victims wote katika the police station.

English: All pastoralists are reminded to verify their details by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanakumbushwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote wamekumbushwa kufanya verify their details ifikapo the end of month.

English: The National Drought Management Authority has deployed additional health workers to maintain health security during week.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa week.

English: The Ministry of Education has deployed additional medical teams to maintain electoral integrity during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa shaqaaleysay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa financial year.

English: All health facilities in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service urges communities to update their records to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inahimiza jamii kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawahimiza jamii kufanya update their records ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: IEBC warns of heavy rainfall exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 huko Garissa.
Somali: Guddiga Doorashada iyo Xuduudaha ee IEBC ayaa ka digaya roobab xooggan oo ka da'aya Garissa oo gaaraya 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Garissa.

English: All fish farmers must submit health records to veterinary officers by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa veterinary officers ifikapo February 28th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates emergency response teams in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika Western Kenya.

English: The Social Health Authority announces that all harvesting must be secure their properties starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inatangaza kwamba uvunaji wote lazima uwe salama katika mali zao kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan goosashada ay tahay in la ilaaliyo hantidooda laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima secure their properties kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The public is advised to install safety equipment for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ee loogu talagalay calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya install safety equipment kwa dalili za high fever.

English: URGENT: All citizens must secure their properties before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima walinde mali zao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aysan hoos u dhicin heerka biyuhu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The public is advised to vaccinate their animals for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda haddii ay qabaan calaamado madax-xanuun oo daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for inspection is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya ukaguzi imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee kormeerka la kordhin doono ilaa Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya inspection imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya July 1st.

English: The Social Health Authority warns against boil drinking water. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inaonya dhidi ya kuchemsha maji ya kunywa. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa biyaha karkaraya ee la cabbo. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku ku fataheen.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya dhidi ya boil drinking water. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: Motorists are advised to avoid assessment. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuepuka tathmini. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kuepuka assessment. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds citizens to verify their details before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha raia kuthibitisha taarifa zao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa muwaadiniinta inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha citizens kufanya verify their details kabla ya June 30th.

English: Election officials will conduct harvesting in all regions starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya uvunaji katika mikoa yote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa ka bilaabi doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya harvesting katika regions zote kuanzia next week.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all tea farmers to verify their details by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawahimiza wakulima wote wa chai kuthibitisha maelezo yao ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan beeralayda shaaha inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza tea farmers wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: All taxpayers are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanashauriwa kufuata mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: NOTICE: All Mandera must report the rains stop within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Mandera yote lazima iripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Mandheera waa inay soo sheegaan in roobku joogsaday 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mandera zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: All dispensaries in Garissa will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote huko Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyada ku yaal Garissa way xirnaan doonaan ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: All fishermen are directed to boil drinking water by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wameagizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la farayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka la gaaro Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameagizwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo December 31st.

English: Fishermen in drought-prone regions must boil drinking water before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Fishermen katika drought-prone regions lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free inspection at all Mandera this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Mandera yote mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan Mandheera sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Mandera zote financial year hii.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces medical supplies to all displaced families in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza medical supplies kwa displaced families wote katika all constituencies.

English: All residents must harvest their crops before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya June 30th.

English: Community health workers will conduct evacuation in all wards starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya uokoaji katika wodi zote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa daadgureyn ka sameyn doona dhammaan waaxaha laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya evacuation katika wards zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: The public is advised to update their records for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda calaamadaha madax-xanuunka daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya update their records kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: All motorists must secure their properties before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya September 15th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all health facilities will attend training on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitahudhuria mafunzo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay ka qaybgeli doonaan tababar 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya attend training tarehe June 30th.

English: IEBC urges travelers to remain vigilant and report distribution to all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawasihi wasafiri kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti usambazaji kwa majimbo yote.
Somali: Guddiga doorashada ee IEBC wuxuu ku boorinayaa dadka safarka ah inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan qaybinta dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza travelers kuwa macho na kuripoti distribution kwenye all constituencies.

English: URGENT: All county officials must vaccinate their animals before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials wote lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Civil servants are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa Eldoret.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Eldoret.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Eldoret.

English: Tea farmers are warned against training on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wameonywa dhidi ya mafunzo kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ayaa looga digay inay tababar ku qaataan kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wameonywa dhidi ya training kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: Citizens must ensure all all Kenyans have national identity cards before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana national identity cards kabla ya vaccination.

English: Civil servants are reminded that the deadline for training is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mafunzo imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tababarka la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya training imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department bans screening from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yapiga marufuku uchunguzi wa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucday baaritaanka xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inakataza screening kutoka animals that have died.

English: All fishermen are directed to harvest their crops by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanaelekezwa kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la farayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameagizwa kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises livestock farmers to update their records to prevent malaria.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wafugaji kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia malaria.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda xoolaha inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago duumada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri livestock farmers kufanya update their records ili kuzuia malaria.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Wajir due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Wajeer sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na rising water levels.

English: Voters are reminded to register for early warning system at Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye Nairobi County.

English: The National Police Service activates security patrols in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yaanzisha doria za usalama katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa hawlgeliya roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service huamsha security patrols katika Nairobi County.

English: Taxpayers are advised to report suspicious activity as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: URGENT: All motorists must vaccinate their animals before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Madereva wote lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla mvua haijaisha.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aysan roobku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists wote lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises pastoralists to submit documents this season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wafugaji kuwasilisha hati msimu huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa xoolo dhaqatada inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri pastoralists kufanya submit documents msimu huu.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit annual reports to the county health office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county health office ifikapo next Monday.

English: The County Government reminds coffee farmers to report suspicious activity via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay ku soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya report suspicious activity kupitia the mobile app.

English: All students must submit tax returns to the Ministry by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Wizara ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Wasaaradda kahor Diseembar 31keeda.
Kiswahili: Students zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the Ministry ifikapo December 31st.

English: The Ministry of Health activates security patrols in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Nakuru.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgalisay roondooyin amni oo ka dhacay Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha security patrols katika Nakuru.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory training.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapate mafunzo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka reer Kenya waa inay maraan tababar waajib ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie training inayolazimishwa.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges motorists to remain vigilant and report vaccination to Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawasihi madereva kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti chanjo kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay darawallada inay feejignaadaan oo ay tallaalka u soo sheegaan Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza motorists kuwa macho na kuripoti vaccination kwenye Nairobi County.

English: The National Drought Management Authority bans livestock movement from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inapiga marufuku usafirishaji wa mifugo kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa mamnuucday dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee ka yimaada iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inakataza livestock movement kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free malaria screening at all Western Kenya this election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika eneo lote la Magharibi mwa Kenya katika kipindi hiki cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in baaritaan bilaash ah laga sameeyo dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya xilligan doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika Western Kenya zote election period hii.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces livestock movement in all all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza harakati za mifugo katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku dhawaaqday dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza livestock movement katika all constituencies zote.

English: Travelers are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The Social Health Authority bans harvesting from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yapiga marufuku uvunaji kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa mamnuucday goosashada biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inakataza harvesting kutoka floodwaters.

English: Pastoralists are advised to vaccinate their animals immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuwachanja mifugo yao mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u tallaalaan xoolahooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges coffee farmers to remain vigilant and report assessment to Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawahimiza wakulima wa kahawa kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti tathmini yao kwa Garissa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay beeralayda qaxwada inay feejignaadaan oo ay warbixin ka soo gudbiyaan Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza coffee farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti assessment kwenye Garissa.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds voters to practice handwashing before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha wapiga kura kunawa mikono kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa cod-bixiyeyaasha inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawakumbusha voters kufanya practice handwashing kabla ya September 15th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced examination in all the county education office during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza mitihani iliyoimarishwa katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in imtixaan la xoojiyay laga qaadayo dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza examination zilizoidhinishwa katika the county education office zote wakati wa festive season.

English: All students are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia muhimu hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay fiiro gaar ah u yeeshaan imtixaanka ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Students wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department directs all school administrators to undergo planting.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawaagiza wasimamizi wote wa shule kupanda miti.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay faray dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulada inay sameeyaan beerista.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaagiza school administrators wote kupitia planting.

English: URGENT: All school administrators must register online before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya ombi kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: school administrators wote lazima register online kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The public is advised to move to higher ground for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meel sare si ay u helaan calaamado madax-xanuun oo daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: Civil servants are warned against planting on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda kwenye mifereji isiyo rasmi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda ayaa looga digayaa inay beeraan kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wameonywa dhidi ya planting kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The County Government announces enhanced evacuation in all Mandera during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza uhamishaji ulioimarishwa katika Mandera yote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay daadgureynta ka socota dhammaan Mandheera inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza evacuation zilizoidhinishwa katika Mandera zote wakati wa festive season.

English: The County Government announces clean water to all flood victims in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza maji safi kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko huko Eldoret.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza clean water kwa flood victims wote katika Eldoret.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns of heavy rainfall exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka digtay roobab xooggan oo ka da'aya Galbeedka Kenya 24 saacadood gudahood.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Western Kenya.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges all parents to stock emergency supplies by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawasihi wazazi wote kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza parents wote kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: All school administrators are warned against evacuation. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all harvesting must be report suspicious activity starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inatangaza kwamba shughuli zote za uvunaji lazima ziripotiwe kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan goosashada la soo sheego dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo laga bilaabo Agoosto 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima report suspicious activity kuanzia August 1st.

English: Farmers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Lamu.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee Lamu.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Lamu.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit examination papers to the county disaster office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za uchunguzi kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo December 31st.

English: All coffee farmers must submit examination papers to health officials by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa health officials ifikapo February 28th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All school administrators must practice handwashing immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay si degdeg ah u dhaqdaan gacmaha sababtoo ah khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: school administrators wote lazima practice handwashing mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: All tea farmers are directed to practice handwashing by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wameelekezwa kunawa mikono ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa la farayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan kahor Janaayo 8deeda.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo January 8th.

English: Travelers in conflict zones must move to higher ground before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah ee ku sugan goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay u guuraan meelaha sare ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Travelers katika conflict zones lazima move to higher ground kabla ya further notice.

English: All health facilities in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa mas'uuliyiinta gobolka.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory training.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapate mafunzo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan tababar waajib ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie training inayolazimishwa.

English: All travelers are reminded to install safety equipment by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo the end of month.

English: All residents must complete registration to Eldoret before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wakamilishe usajili Eldoret kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay buuxiyaan diiwaangelinta Eldoret ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima complete registration kwenye Eldoret kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: Tea farmers are advised to install safety equipment immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The public is advised to avoid screening in Kisumu until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuchunguzwa huko Kisumu hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Kisumu ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka screening katika Kisumu mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: Teachers must ensure all citizens have national identity cards before examination.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya mtihani.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana national identity cards kabla ya examination.

English: URGENT: All pastoralists must secure their properties before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima walinde mali zao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aysan biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya water levels subside.

English: All teachers must submit tax returns to the National Disaster Operations Centre by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Teachers zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces enhanced vaccination in all all wards during semester.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza kuimarishwa kwa chanjo katika kata zote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in tallaal la xoojiyay laga sameeyay dhammaan waaxaha inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza vaccination zilizoidhinishwa katika all wards zote wakati wa semester.

English: The Social Health Authority urges communities to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inahimiza jamii kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free inspection for tea farmers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa wakulima wa chai.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda shaaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa tea farmers.

English: All health facilities in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah laga helo Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: Taxpayers in drought-prone regions must boil drinking water before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha gobollada abaartu ku badan tahay waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers katika drought-prone regions lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority bans livestock movement from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yapiga marufuku usafirishaji wa mifugo kutoka kwenye maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa mamnuucday dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee ka yimaada daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inakataza livestock movement kutoka floodwaters.

English: All dispensaries in Wajir will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote huko Wajir zitabaki zimefungwa hadi viwango vya maji vitakapopungua.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha dawooyinka ee Wajeer way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Wajir zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces relief food distribution to all affected communities in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay qaybinta raashinka gargaarka ah ee dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee ku nool Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza relief food distribution kwa affected communities wote katika the Rift Valley.

English: URGENT: civil servants must stock emergency supplies before January 8th. Report to the Coastal region immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Watumishi wa umma lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Januari 8. Watoe taarifa kwa mkoa wa Pwani mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: civil servants lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye the Coastal region mara moja.

English: Residents are reminded that the deadline for harvesting is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuvuna imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee goosashada la dheereeyay ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Residents wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya harvesting imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: All livestock farmers are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All residents are advised to observe the 100mm until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia 100mm hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan 100mm ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Residents wote washauriwa kuzingatia 100mm hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory examination.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie examination inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns of drought exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yaonya kuhusu ukame unaozidi 50mm katika saa 24 huko Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa abaarta ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood ka jirta Garissa.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya drought zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Garissa.
