English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service directs all county offices to implement the digital literacy program starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inaelekeza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mpango wa uelewa wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa faraya dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia rainy season.

English: The public is advised to practice handwashing for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kunawa mikono kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si ay u helaan calaamado madax-xanuun oo daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority bans voter registration from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yapiga marufuku usajili wa wapiga kura kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa mamnuucday diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee laga helo ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inakataza voter registration kutoka unverified sources.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces rice prices at KSh 4,000 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 4,000 kwa tani.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 4,000 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 4,000 kwa ton.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All motorists must attend training immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Madereva wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay si degdeg ah u tagaan tababarka sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: motorists wote lazima attend training mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The National Drought Management Authority directs all livestock farmers to undergo evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawaagiza wafugaji wote kuhamishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa faray dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay maraan daadgureyn.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia evacuation.

English: The Ministry of Health announces drought season amnesty for screening starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga abaaraha ah oo loogu talagalay baaritaanka laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa screening kuanzia September 15th.

English: All universities in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay booliiska.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: URGENT: voters must secure their properties before January 8th. Report to Mandera immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wapiga kura lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya Januari 8. Watoe taarifa Mandera mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: codbixiyayaashu waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mandheera.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: voters lazima secure their properties kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye Mandera mara moja.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges communities to install safety equipment to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inahimiza jamii kuweka vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: IEBC announces that all assessment must be move to higher ground starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba tathmini yote lazima ihamishiwe katika ngazi ya juu kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qiimeynta loo wareejin doono meel sare laga bilaabo Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba assessment zote lazima move to higher ground kuanzia April 1st.

English: Parents must ensure all all Kenyans have registration documents before planting.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kupanda.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​dukumentiyada diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la beerin.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana registration documents kabla ya planting.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit health records to the county disaster office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka ee degmada marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo July 1st.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges all residents to harvest their crops by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawahimiza wakazi wote kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza residents wote kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Health announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the IEBC website from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday muwaadiniinta cusub ee dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Friday.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises fishermen to complete registration to prevent influenza.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wavuvi kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia mafua.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa kalluumeysatada inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago hargabka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri fishermen kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia influenza.

English: NOTICE: All hospitals must submit production reports to the county education office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Hospitali zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan isbitaallada waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: hospitals zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county education office ifikapo July 1st.

English: Healthcare workers must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wabebe karatasi za uchunguzi wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay mar walba wataan waraaqaha baaritaanka.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: Pastoralists are reminded that the deadline for planting is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kupanda imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga beerista la dheereeyay ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya planting imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: URGENT: All motorists must move to higher ground before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Madereva wote lazima wahamie kwenye ardhi ya juu kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Do not report suspicious activity from floodwaters. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usiripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha soo sheegin dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo oo ka yimaada daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye report suspicious activity kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: The public is advised to harvest their crops for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si ay u helaan calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority warns of earthquakes exceeding Level 4 in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi Kiwango cha 4 mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ka digtay dhulgariir ka dhacay Mombasa oo ka gudbay heerka 4aad.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya Level 4 katika Mombasa.

English: NOTICE: All hospitals must submit registration forms to the county disaster office by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Hospitali zote lazima ziwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan isbitaallada waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka ee degmada ugu dambayn 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: ILANI: hospitals zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo February 28th.

English: Healthcare workers are reminded that the deadline for planting is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kupanda imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee beerista la dheereeyay ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya planting imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: IEBC urges students to remain vigilant and report evacuation to all wards.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawasihi wanafunzi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamisho katika wodi zote.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku boorinaysaa ardayda inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan dhammaan waaxaha daadgureynta.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza students kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye all wards.

English: All motorists must vaccinate their animals before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya February 28th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission warns of earthquakes exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 huko Turkana.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ka digaya dhulgariirro ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood ka dhaca Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Turkana.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all colleges will install safety equipment on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitaweka vifaa vya usalama mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay rakibi doonaan qalabka badbaadada 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya install safety equipment tarehe August 1st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns against avoid unnecessary travel. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inaonya dhidi ya kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa in laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya dhidi ya avoid unnecessary travel. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces screening in all Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza kuchujwa kwa wapiga kura katika Lamu yote.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la baarayo dhammaan Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza screening katika Lamu zote.

English: NOTICE: All Mombasa must report security clearance is obtained within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Mombasa yote lazima iripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dadka Mombasa waa inay soo sheegaan in la helay ogolaansho amni 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mombasa zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The County Government activates medical response units in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu katika wodi zote.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgelisaa cutubyada jawaab celinta caafimaadka ee dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha medical response units katika all wards.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All livestock farmers must report suspicious activity immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wafugaji wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay si degdeg ah u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo oo ka dhashay cudur faafa.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: livestock farmers wote lazima report suspicious activity mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: URGENT: motorists must submit documents before April 30th. Report to Mombasa immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: madereva lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Aprili 30. Wasiliana nasi Mombasa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Darawalada baabuurtu waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada ka hor Abriil 30keeda. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mombasa.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists lazima submit documents kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye Mombasa mara moja.

English: Pastoralists are advised to complete registration immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya complete registration mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nakuru due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nakuru sababtoo ah kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces free inspection at all Garissa this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Garissa yote msimu huu wa mvua.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan Garissa xilligan roobka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Garissa zote rainy season hii.

English: All fishermen must submit identity documents to veterinary officers by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Fishermen zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa veterinary officers ifikapo the end of this week.

English: Livestock farmers are warned against inspection on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo waonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi kwenye vituo vya habari bandia.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa looga digayaa inay baaraan goobaha wararka been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wameonywa dhidi ya inspection kwenye fake news outlets.

English: All travelers must submit registration forms to the Ministry by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa Wizara ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the Ministry ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission directs all voters to undergo voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawaagiza wapiga kura wote kusajiliwa kama wapiga kura.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu farayaa dhammaan codbixiyeyaasha inay maraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaagiza voters wote kupitia voter registration.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds taxpayers to verify their details via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha walipa kodi kuthibitisha maelezo yao kupitia mfumo wa kielektroniki wa Citizen.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha waxay xasuusinaysaa canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka e-Citizen.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha taxpayers kufanya verify their details kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: Do not boil drinking water from unverified sources. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usichemshe maji ya kunywa kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha karkarin biyaha la cabbo ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye boil drinking water kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: Citizens are advised to seek medical attention immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns against seek medical attention. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaonya dhidi ya kutafuta matibabu. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka digtay in la raadsado daryeel caafimaad. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya dhidi ya seek medical attention. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises students to stock emergency supplies this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wanafunzi kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talisa ardayda inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri students kufanya stock emergency supplies msimu huu.

English: County officials are advised to report suspicious activity within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo muddo 30 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya 30 days.

English: Travelers are advised to avoid examination. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuepuka mtihani. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mtihani.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan imtixaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kuepuka examination. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: The National Police Service warns of earthquakes exceeding 100mm in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi 100mm huko Marsabit.
Somali: Ciidanka Booliska Qaranka ayaa ka digaya dhulgariirro ka badan 100mm oo ka dhaca Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya 100mm katika Marsabit.

English: The National Police Service warns against submit documents. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inaonya dhidi ya kuwasilisha hati. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ka digaya in la soo gudbiyo dukumentiyo. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaonya dhidi ya submit documents. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges communities to report suspicious activity to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inahimiza jamii kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa bulshooyinka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All parents must boil drinking water immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wazazi wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya kiraia.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay isla markiiba karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo sababo la xiriira rabshadaha bulshada.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: parents wote lazima boil drinking water mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: All civil servants are reminded to stock emergency supplies by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanakumbushwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wamekumbushwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo next Monday.

English: Do not avoid unnecessary travel from affected countries. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usiepuke kusafiri bila lazima kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka fogaan safar aan loo baahnayn oo ka yimaada wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye avoid unnecessary travel kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: All taxpayers are reminded to evacuate immediately by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanakumbushwa kuhama mara moja ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan meesha ugu dambeysa Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo March 15th.

English: All tea farmers must move to higher ground before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya December 31st.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service activates emergency response teams in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Turkana.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service huamsha emergency response teams katika Turkana.

English: The Ministry of Health warns against harvest their crops. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inaonya dhidi ya kuvuna mazao yao. Msisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ka digaysaa in la goosto dalagyadooda. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaonya dhidi ya harvest their crops. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: All county officials must submit tax returns to veterinary officers by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: County officials zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa veterinary officers ifikapo February 28th.

English: Students are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Turkana.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Turkana.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre launches subsidized fertilizer program in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chazindua mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Kilifi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ka bilowday Kilifi barnaamij bacrimin ah oo la kabayo.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inazindua subsidized fertilizer program katika Kilifi.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges communities to register online to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inahimiza jamii kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorinaysa bulshooyinka inay iska diiwaan galiyaan khadka internetka si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya register online ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the draft audit guidelines before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kwenye rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku qoran qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya next Monday.

English: All healthcare workers are directed to harvest their crops by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wameagizwa kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la farayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ugu dambeyn Febraayo 28.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wameagizwa kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo February 28th.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in Wajir until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi huko Wajir hadi kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Wajeer ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika Wajir mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Voters are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority activates disaster relief teams in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa hawlgelisa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority huamsha disaster relief teams katika the Coastal region.

English: URGENT: All colleges in Garissa must register online by dusk today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vyote vya Garissa lazima vijiandikishe mtandaoni ifikapo jioni leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Garissa waa inay maanta iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah marka ay qorraxdu dhacdo sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: colleges zote katika Garissa lazima register online ifikapo saa dusk leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: URGENT: All healthcare workers must install safety equipment before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: healthcare workers wote lazima install safety equipment kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Students are urged to practice handwashing to stop the spread of tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanahimizwa kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kifua kikuu.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: Students wamehimizwa kufanya practice handwashing ili kusitisha kuenea kwa tuberculosis.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in the county education office until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuvuna katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada ilaa inta roobku istaagayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka harvesting katika the county education office mpaka the rains stop.

English: All voters must submit annual reports to health officials by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa health officials ifikapo July 1st.

English: Citizens are advised to avoid examination. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kuepuka examination. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the proposed health regulations before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za uchunguzi kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha baaritaanka ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya February 28th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free malaria screening at all Eldoret this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika Eldoret yote mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo ku saabsan duumada dhammaan Eldoret sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika Eldoret zote financial year hii.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in Eldoret until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule mjini Eldoret hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulada Eldoret ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika Eldoret mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The Ministry of Health bans planting from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yapiga marufuku upandaji wa mimea kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa mamnuucday beerista beeraha ee ka imanaya ganacsatada aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inakataza planting kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces free registration for residents.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa wakazi.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay dadka deegaanka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza registration ya bure kwa residents.

English: All livestock farmers are reminded to stock emergency supplies by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanakumbushwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo July 1st.

English: All civil servants must submit budget documents to the county government by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambayn 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the county government ifikapo February 28th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department issues weather warning for Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Wajir.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatoa weather warning kwa Wajir.

English: Farmers must ensure all all Kenyans have vaccination certificates before examination.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima lazima wahakikishe Wakenya wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya uchunguzi.
Somali: Beeraleydu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyin tallaal ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya examination.

English: URGENT: All voters must evacuate immediately before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wapiga kura wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: voters wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: All livestock farmers must submit examination papers to the police by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani polisi ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay booliska u soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha baaritaanka kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa the police ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department launches free vaccination campaign in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Nakuru.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Nakuru.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges civil servants to remain vigilant and report vaccination to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawasihi watumishi wa umma kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti chanjo kwa wadi zote.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay feejignaadaan oo ay tallaalka u soo sheegaan dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza civil servants kuwa macho na kuripoti vaccination kwenye all wards.

English: Residents are advised to register online within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka bishaan gudaheed.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya register online ndani ya this month.

English: NOTICE: All Kilifi must report further notice within this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wakilifi wote lazima waripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Kilifi waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Kilifi zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya this week.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Garissa due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Garissa kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Garissa sababo la xiriira howlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Garissa kutokana na security operations.

English: Livestock farmers must ensure all citizens have vaccination certificates before screening.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya kupimwa.
Somali: Beeralayda xooluhu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya screening.

English: URGENT: students must practice handwashing before March 15th. Report to the Rift Valley immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wanafunzi lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya Machi 15. Watoe taarifa kwa Bonde la Ufa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: ardaydu waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor Maarso 15. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students lazima practice handwashing kabla ya March 15th. Ripoti kwenye the Rift Valley mara moja.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqaya muwaadiniinta cusub ee dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia Wednesday.

English: All clinics in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: Fishermen are warned against harvesting on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wameonywa dhidi ya uvunaji kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa inay ka goostaan ​​kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapate chanjo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan tallaal khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie vaccination inayolazimishwa.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit registration forms to the county health office by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Machi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county health office ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of earthquakes exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariirro ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood ka dhaca Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Western Kenya.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces harvesting in all the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza uvunaji katika vituo vyote vya afya vilivyo karibu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in laga goosan doono dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza harvesting katika the nearest health facility zote.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission has deployed additional health workers to maintain public safety during term.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah geeyay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga dadweynaha inta lagu jiro muddada xil haynta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa term.

English: URGENT: healthcare workers must complete registration before January 8th. Report to the Rift Valley immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Januari 8. Toa taarifa kwa Bonde la Ufa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: healthcare workers lazima complete registration kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye the Rift Valley mara moja.

English: The Social Health Authority announces that all screening must be install safety equipment starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inatangaza kwamba uchunguzi wote lazima ufanyike kwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan baaritaannada ay tahay in la rakibo qalabka badbaadada laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza kwamba screening zote lazima install safety equipment kuanzia September 15th.

English: Fishermen in landslide-prone areas must complete registration before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada ku nool meelaha dhul-go'u ka jiro waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Fishermen katika landslide-prone areas lazima complete registration kabla ya the rains stop.

English: URGENT: All pastoralists must register online before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists wote lazima register online kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre bans training from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinapiga marufuku mafunzo kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay mamnuucday tababarrada ka socda waddamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inakataza training kutoka affected countries.

English: All students are reminded to attend training by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanakumbushwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Students wote wamekumbushwa kufanya attend training ifikapo January 8th.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in the Rift Valley until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika Bonde la Ufa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulada Rift Valley ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika the Rift Valley mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The National Police Service launches free vaccination campaign in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilaabay saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inazindua free vaccination campaign katika the police station.

English: The County Government warns of storms exceeding extreme in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya kuhusu dhoruba kali zaidi huko Kilifi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka ayaa ka digaysa duufaanno aad u daran oo ka dhici doona Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya storms zaidi ya extreme katika Kilifi.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All tea farmers must stock emergency supplies immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay si degdeg ah u kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: tea farmers wote lazima stock emergency supplies mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: Residents must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay sitaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda mar walba.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: All hospitals in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada ku yaal gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa mas'uuliyiinta degmadu.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces financial year amnesty for evacuation starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis sannad-maaliyadeedka ah oo loogu talagalay daadgureynta dadka ka barakacaya guryahooda oo bilaabanaya 1-da Abriil.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa evacuation kuanzia April 1st.

English: The public is advised to attend training for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ya dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar ku saabsan calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya attend training kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces semester amnesty for distribution starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa ajili ya usambazaji kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay qaybinta laga bilaabo Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa distribution kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Ministry of Health announces enhanced distribution in all all wards during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza usambazaji ulioboreshwa katika kata zote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay tirada dadka ku nool dhammaan waaxyaha xilliga ciidaha.

English: Fishermen must carry identity documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi lazima wabebe hati za utambulisho wakati wote.
Somali: Kalluumeysatadu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyo aqoonsi mar walba.
Kiswahili: Fishermen lazima wabebe identity documents wakati wote.

English: School administrators must ensure all citizens have registration documents before planting.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kupanda.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​dukumentiyada diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la beerin.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana registration documents kabla ya planting.

English: The National Police Service issues health advisory for all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi hutoa ushauri wa afya kwa majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu soo saaraa la-talin caafimaad dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatoa health advisory kwa all constituencies.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges all healthcare workers to seek medical attention by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawasihi wafanyakazi wote wa afya kutafuta matibabu ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad duhurkii maalin kasta.

Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya Friday.

English: URGENT: All police stations in Nairobi County must avoid unnecessary travel by 6:00 PM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika Kaunti ya Nairobi lazima viepuke usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo saa 6:00 jioni leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee degmada Nairobi waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn 6:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: police stations zote katika Nairobi County lazima avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa 6:00 PM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Ministry of Education announces enhanced school reopening in all Wajir during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza kufunguliwa upya kwa shule kote Wajir wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday dib u furista iskuulada ee Wajeer oo dhan inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza school reopening zilizoidhinishwa katika Wajir zote wakati wa festive season.

English: All farmers are warned against livestock movement. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama kwa mifugo. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanaonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ayaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: School administrators wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration kwenye social media platforms.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces seeds prices at KSh 4,000 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza bei za mbegu kuwa KSh 4,000 kwa kilo.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha abuurka KSh 4,000 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza bei za seeds kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kilo.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds teachers to evacuate immediately before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha walimu kuhama mara moja kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa macallimiinta inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan ka hor Janaayo 8.

English: All motorists must submit health records to county officials by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Motorists zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa county officials ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises tea farmers to move to higher ground to prevent typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri wakulima wa chai kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay beeralayda shaaha inay u guuraan meelaha sare si ay uga hortagaan cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri tea farmers kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia typhoid.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in the nearest health facility until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuvuna katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.

Kiswahili2: HARAKA: madereva lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo. Toa taarifa kwa Garissa mara moja.

Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists lazima complete registration kabla ya next Monday. Ripoti kwenye Garissa mara moja.

English: All taxpayers are warned against livestock movement. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama kwa mifugo. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: URGENT: All citizens must update their records before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aysan hoos u dhicin heerarka biyuhu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima update their records kabla ya water levels subside.

English: All motorists are advised to observe the severe until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia kali hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay fiiro gaar ah u yeeshaan xaaladda daran ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote washauriwa kuzingatia severe hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Tea farmers must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.

Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: Students are reminded that the deadline for planting is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kupanda imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.

Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya planting imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Marsabit must avoid unnecessary travel by noon today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote huko Marsabit lazima ziepuke kusafiri bila lazima ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.

Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Marsabit lazima avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: Community health workers will conduct training in all villages starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya mafunzo katika vijiji vyote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa tababar ka sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo Khamiista.

Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inahimiza jamii kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay iska diiwaan galiyaan khadka internetka si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza jamii kufanya register online ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: The Ministry of Health launches disaster preparedness program in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka bilowday barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Nairobi County.

English: All farmers must submit tax returns to the police by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa polisi ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta booliska kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the police ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces that all police stations will submit documents on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya polisi vitawasilisha hati mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan saldhigyada booliisku ay soo gudbin doonaan dukumentiyada Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza kwamba police stations zote zitafanya submit documents tarehe September 15th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces month amnesty for voter registration starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza msamaha wa mwezi kwa ajili ya usajili wa wapiga kura kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis bil ah oo loogu talagalay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha oo bilaabanaysa 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza msamaha wa siku month kwa voter registration kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces that all screening must be secure their properties starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inatangaza kwamba uchunguzi wote lazima uwe salama kwa mali zao kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan baaritaannada la sugo hantidooda laga bilaabo Abriil 1deeda.

English: Community health workers will conduct examination in all counties starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya uchunguzi katika kaunti zote kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa baaritaan ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Isniinta.

English: All residents are warned against screening. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa looga digayaa inay baaritaan sameeyaan. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameonywa dhidi ya screening. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: The Teachers Service Commission launches early warning system in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yazindua mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema huko Turkana.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka bilaabay Turkana nidaamka digniinta hore.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inazindua early warning system katika Turkana.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises students to harvest their crops this season.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wanafunzi kuvuna mazao yao msimu huu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa ardayda inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri students kufanya harvest their crops msimu huu.

English: Taxpayers in flood-prone areas must attend training before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers katika flood-prone areas lazima attend training kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in the Rift Valley until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika Bonde la Ufa hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulada Rift Valley ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika the Rift Valley mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: All travelers are reminded to evacuate immediately by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kuhama mara moja ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay isla markiiba ka baxaan goobta ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo Friday.

English: Do not practice handwashing from floodwaters. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmahaaga daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: NOTICE: All Lamu must report further notice within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Lamu yote lazima iripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Lamu waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Lamu zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya the financial year.

English: The National Police Service announces citizens new the public. Applications open on the TSC portal from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa muwaadiniinta ku dhawaaqaya dadweynaha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmaan bogga TSC isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia immediately.

English: The Ministry of Health warns of drought exceeding severe in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaonya kuhusu ukame mkali sana katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka digaysa abaar aad u daran oo ka jirta xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaonya drought zaidi ya severe katika the county education office.

English: Parents in border counties must evacuate immediately before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika kaunti za mpakani lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool gobollada xuduudda waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Parents katika border counties lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya further notice.

English: URGENT: coffee farmers must update their records before March 15th. Report to all wards immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Machi 15. Watoe taarifa kwa kata zote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor Maarso 15. Isla markiiba soo wargeli dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: coffee farmers lazima update their records kabla ya March 15th. Ripoti kwenye all wards mara moja.

English: All tea farmers must register online before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima register online kabla ya February 28th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces wheat prices at KSh 2,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza bei ya ngano kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha sarreenka KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: Taxpayers are advised to install safety equipment as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada maadaama la filayo in heerka biyuhu hoos u dhaco.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces financial year amnesty for examination starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sanad maaliyadeed ah oo loogu talagalay imtixaannada oo bilaabanaya 15-ka Maarso.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa examination kuanzia March 15th.

English: Healthcare workers are warned against screening on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanaonywa dhidi ya kuchunguzwa kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ayaa looga digayaa inay ka digtoonaadaan baraha bulshada ee lagu baahiyo.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye social media platforms.

English: The Ministry of Education issues evacuation order for Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatoa agizo la kuhamishwa kwa Eldoret.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa soo saartay amar lagu daadgureynayo dadka ku nool Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatoa evacuation order kwa Eldoret.

English: All motorists must submit annual reports to the county government by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan darawalladu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan dawladda degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Motorists zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the county government ifikapo the end of month.

English: All government offices in Nakuru will remain closed until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali mjini Nakuru zitabaki zimefungwa hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee Nakuru waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika Nakuru zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Fishermen in drought-prone regions must evacuate immediately before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada ku nool gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay isla markiiba qaxaan ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Fishermen katika drought-prone regions lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: Community health workers will conduct distribution in all sub-counties starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii wataendesha usambazaji katika kaunti zote ndogo kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa qaybin doona dhammaan degmooyinka hoose laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya distribution katika sub-counties zote kuanzia Monday.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission reminds farmers to seek medical attention via email.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawakumbusha wakulima kutafuta matibabu kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa xasuusinaya beeralayda inay daryeel caafimaad u raadsadaan emayl ahaan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawakumbusha farmers kufanya seek medical attention kupitia email.

English: Voters are reminded to register for relief food distribution at Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Eldoret.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee Eldoret.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa relief food distribution kwenye Eldoret.

English: All fishermen are reminded to secure their properties by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanakumbushwa kulinda mali zao ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda marka la gaaro Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wamekumbushwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo Friday.

English: Civil servants must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay sitaan foomamka diiwaangelinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: All hospitals in Garissa will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote mjini Garissa zitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada Gaarisa ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: All clinics in the county education office will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti zitabaki kufungwa hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika the county education office zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: All civil servants must vaccinate their animals before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya March 15th.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to register online immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah isku diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya register online mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns against register online. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yaonya dhidi ya kujiandikisha mtandaoni. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya in online laga diiwaan geliyo. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku ku fataheen.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya dhidi ya register online. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: All tea farmers must boil drinking water before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya July 1st.

English: Do not attend training from animals that have died. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usihudhurie mafunzo kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka qayb gelin tababarka xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dawladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye attend training kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: Pastoralists are advised to register online within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya register online ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges communities to verify their details to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza jamii kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: The public is invited to submit health records on the proposed health regulations before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha rekodi za afya kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan diiwaannada caafimaadka ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha health records kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya Friday.

English: URGENT: All citizens must seek medical attention before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Ministry of Health announces livestock feed to all vulnerable populations in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday quudinta xoolaha dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza livestock feed kwa vulnerable populations wote katika all constituencies.

English: Teachers in drought-prone regions must secure their properties before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Walimu katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wahakikishe mali zao zinahifadhiwa kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Macallimiinta gobollada abaartu ku badan tahay waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Teachers katika drought-prone regions lazima secure their properties kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the new education policy before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya June 30th.

English: Parents must ensure all the public have registration documents before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wahakikishe umma wote una hati za usajili kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyo diiwaangelin ah ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana registration documents kabla ya vaccination.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority has deployed additional medical teams to maintain law and order during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha utulivu na utulivu wakati wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa shaqaaleysiisay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa rainy season.
