English: NOTICE: All colleges must submit examination papers to the county education office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vyote lazima viwasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan kulliyadaha waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: colleges zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county education office ifikapo December 31st.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nairobi sababo la xiriira roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi kutokana na heavy rains.

English: URGENT: All livestock farmers must boil drinking water before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: All fish farmers must submit documents before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima submit documents kabla ya next Monday.

English: The public is advised to avoid planting in Nairobi until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kupanda miti jijini Nairobi hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista Nairobi ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka planting katika Nairobi mpaka further notice.

English: Civil servants must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay mar walba hayaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: Travelers in border counties must secure their properties before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri katika kaunti za mpakani lazima walinde mali zao kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah ee ku sugan gobollada xuduudda waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Travelers katika border counties lazima secure their properties kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all harvesting must be boil drinking water starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba mavuno yote lazima yawe ya kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan goosashada ay tahay inay noqoto biyo karkaraya laga bilaabo Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima boil drinking water kuanzia April 1st.

English: Do not stock emergency supplies from unverified sources. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usihifadhi vifaa vya dharura kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha kaydin agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ee ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye stock emergency supplies kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report water levels subside within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan waaxyaha waaxdu waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhaceen 14ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all wards zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The Kenya Red Cross bans planting from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya lapiga marufuku upandaji miti kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucday beerista ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inakataza planting kutoka unverified sources.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates emergency response teams in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika Wajir.

English: All residents are directed to vaccinate their animals by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wameagizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la farayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda kahor Janaayo 8deeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameagizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo January 8th.

English: The public is advised to harvest their crops for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kwa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dalagooda u goostaan ​​calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit tax returns to the county disaster office by Friday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta xafiiska masiibooyinka ee degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe tax returns kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo Friday.

English: Residents are reminded to register for early warning system at the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: Residents wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye the nearest health facility.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces financial year amnesty for vaccination starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya chanjo kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis sanad-maaliyadeedka tallaalka oo bilaabanaya 15-ka Maarso.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa vaccination kuanzia March 15th.

English: All travelers are reminded to seek medical attention by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces enhanced training in all Eldoret during term.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza mafunzo yaliyoimarishwa katika Eldoret yote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar la xoojiyay oo ka socda dhammaan Eldoret inta lagu jiro muddada waxbarashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza training zilizoidhinishwa katika Eldoret zote wakati wa term.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Rift Valley due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Bonde la Ufa kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Dooxada Rift-ka roobabka culus awgood.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the Rift Valley kutokana na heavy rains.

English: Teachers in conflict zones must stock emergency supplies before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Walimu katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wawe na akiba ya vifaa vya dharura kabla ya kiwango cha maji kupungua.
Somali: Macallimiinta ku sugan goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Teachers katika conflict zones lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Security personnel will conduct examination in all regions starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama watafanya uchunguzi katika maeneo yote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa baaritaan ka sameyn doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya examination katika regions zote kuanzia Friday.

English: All county offices in the Rift Valley will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika Bonde la Ufa zitabaki kufungwa hadi ombi hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada ee Rift Valley way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika the Rift Valley zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: All voters are directed to install safety equipment by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wameagizwa kusakinisha vifaa vya usalama ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa la farayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wameagizwa kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo March 15th.

English: All fishermen must submit tax returns to the county government by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta dowladda degmada marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the county government ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission launches relief food distribution in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa bilaabay qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inazindua relief food distribution katika the county education office.

English: All tea farmers must submit budget documents to the police by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa polisi ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay booliska u gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the police ifikapo March 15th.

English: All coffee farmers must seek medical attention before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the end of month.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all county offices will secure their properties on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za kaunti zitahakikisha mali zao zinapatikana tarehe 31 Desemba.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinku ay ammaankooda sugi doonaan Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba county offices zote zitafanya secure their properties tarehe December 31st.

English: School administrators are advised to complete registration as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili kadri hali inavyotulia inavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta maadaama xaaladdu ay degeyso.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya complete registration kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: Election officials will conduct evacuation in all trading centers starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya uokoaji katika vituo vyote vya biashara kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa ka sameyn doona daadgureyn dhammaan xarumaha ganacsiga laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya evacuation katika trading centers zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission activates security patrols in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaanzisha doria za usalama mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa hawlgaliyay roondooyin amni oo ka dhacay Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission huamsha security patrols katika Mombasa.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All taxpayers must install safety equipment immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Walipa kodi wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: taxpayers wote lazima install safety equipment mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges livestock farmers to remain vigilant and report livestock movement to Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wafugaji wa mifugo kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kuhusu uhamiaji wa mifugo Mandera.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku boorrisay beeraleyda xoolaha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza livestock farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti livestock movement kwenye Mandera.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Western Kenya due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Magharibi mwa Kenya kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Galbeedka Kenya sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Western Kenya kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The public is advised to avoid screening in Mandera until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuchunguzwa huko Mandera hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Mandheera ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka screening katika Mandera mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Parents are advised to avoid assessment. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuepuka tathmini. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kuepuka assessment. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: URGENT: tea farmers must evacuate immediately before Friday. Report to all wards immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima wa chai lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya Ijumaa. Watoe taarifa kwa wadi zote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay ka guuraan isla markiiba ka hor Jimcaha. Isla markiiba soo wargeli dhammaan waaxaha.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: tea farmers lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya Friday. Ripoti kwenye all wards mara moja.

English: IEBC advises parents to boil drinking water to prevent typhoid.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wazazi kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia homa ya matumbo.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa waalidiinta inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri parents kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia typhoid.

English: Citizens must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay sitaan canshuur celinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Education urges all voters to move to higher ground by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi wapiga kura wote kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan codbixiyayaasha inay u guuraan meel sare marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza voters wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority launches disaster preparedness program in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa bilowday barnaamij u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inazindua disaster preparedness program katika all constituencies.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima waondolewe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay maraan daadgureyn khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie evacuation inayolazimishwa.

English: Travelers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Mandera.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Mandera.

English: Healthcare workers must carry annual reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wabebe ripoti za mwaka wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay wakhti kasta wataan warbixinnada sanadlaha ah.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers lazima wabebe annual reports wakati wote.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit health records to the county health office by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county health office ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The National Police Service urges communities to attend training to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inahimiza jamii kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza jamii kufanya attend training ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns against report suspicious activity. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inaonya dhidi ya kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa in la soo sheego dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya dhidi ya report suspicious activity. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the new education policy before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za mitihani kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka ee siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya April 30th.

English: Citizens are advised to move to higher ground as the advisory is lifted are expected.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kwani ushauri huo unatarajiwa kuondolewa.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare maadaama la filayo in la qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwani the advisory is lifted zinatarajiwa.

English: Fishermen in conflict zones must seek medical attention before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada ku nool goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Fishermen katika conflict zones lazima seek medical attention kabla ya water levels subside.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory screening.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie screening inayolazimishwa.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges communities to practice handwashing to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inahimiza jamii kunawa mikono ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: URGENT: All schools in Kisumu must report suspicious activity by dusk today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Shule zote mjini Kisumu lazima ziripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo jioni leo kutokana na mlipuko wa ugonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan iskuulada Kisumu waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo marka ay qorraxdu dhacdo maanta sababo la xiriira cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: schools zote katika Kisumu lazima report suspicious activity ifikapo saa dusk leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces that all school reopening must be avoid unnecessary travel starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza kwamba kufunguliwa tena kwa shule zote lazima kuepukwe kusafiri bila lazima kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dib u furista iskuulada laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn oo bilaabanaya Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza kwamba school reopening zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia June 30th.

English: Taxpayers are advised to verify their details within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Cashuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya verify their details ndani ya 30 days.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Nairobi until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo jijini Nairobi hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarrada ka socda Nairobi ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka training katika Nairobi mpaka further notice.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates medical response units in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha vitengo vya kukabiliana na matatizo ya kimatibabu katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay cutubyo ka jawaab celin caafimaad oo ku yaal xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha medical response units katika the county education office.

English: All teachers must secure their properties to Kilifi before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wahakikishe mali zao hadi Kilifi kabla ya saa 2:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay hantidooda ku sugaan Kilifi ka hor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima secure their properties kwenye Kilifi kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: Fish farmers are urged to report suspicious activity to stop the spread of Ebola.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanahimizwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Ebola.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa lagu booriyay inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka Ebola.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamehimizwa kufanya report suspicious activity ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Ebola.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges teachers to remain vigilant and report evacuation to Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawasihi walimu kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamisho hadi Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay macallimiinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in la daadgureeyo oo ay geeyaan Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza teachers kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye Nairobi County.

English: URGENT: county officials must avoid unnecessary travel before June 30th. Report to Eldoret immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni. Toa taarifa kwa Eldoret mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor Juun 30. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Eldoret.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya June 30th. Ripoti kwenye Eldoret mara moja.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit health records to the county agricultural office by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo the end of month.

English: All county offices in all wards will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika kata zote zitabaki kufungwa hadi ombi hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada ee dhammaan waaxyaha way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika all wards zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: NOTICE: All dispensaries must submit annual reports to the county agricultural office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Zahanati zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan farmashiyaha waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada ugu dambayn Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: dispensaries zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo June 30th.

English: Farmers are advised to avoid harvesting. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuepuka kuvuna. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kuepuka harvesting. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the proposed health regulations before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya September 15th.

English: All teachers are warned against distribution. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay qaybiyaan. Isticmaal ilo biyo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: URGENT: All hospitals in Nakuru must submit documents by 9:00 PM today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Hospitali zote mjini Nakuru lazima ziwasilishe hati ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan isbitaallada Nakuru waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada 9:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: hospitals zote katika Nakuru lazima submit documents ifikapo saa 9:00 PM leo kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free training at all Mandera this term.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika Mandera yote muhula huu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay tababar bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya dhammaan Mandheera xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza training ya bure katika Mandera zote term hii.

English: All voters must submit registration forms to the county government by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambayn Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Voters zote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the county government ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service urges coffee farmers to remain vigilant and report vaccination to the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inawahimiza wakulima wa kahawa kuwa macho na kuripoti chanjo kwa kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay feejignaadaan oo ay tallaalka u soo sheegaan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawahimiza coffee farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti vaccination kwenye the nearest health facility.

English: Pastoralists in landslide-prone areas must verify their details before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya mvua kusimama.
Somali: Xoola-dhaqatada ku nool meelaha dhul-go'u ka jiro waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists katika landslide-prone areas lazima verify their details kabla ya the rains stop.

English: Pastoralists are reminded to register for early warning system at the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari mapema katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye the nearest health facility.

English: Fish farmers are urged to evacuate immediately to stop the spread of meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanahimizwa kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa lagu booriyay inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamehimizwa kufanya evacuate immediately ili kusitisha kuenea kwa meningitis.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free registration at all Nairobi County this drought season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza usajili wa bure katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi msimu huu wa ukame.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi xilligan abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza registration ya bure katika Nairobi County zote drought season hii.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority launches subsidized fertilizer program in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yazindua mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Mandera.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ka bilowday Mandheera barnaamij bacrimin ah oo la kabayo.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inazindua subsidized fertilizer program katika Mandera.

English: Teachers are warned against assessment on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay qiimeeyaan baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Teachers wameonywa dhidi ya assessment kwenye social media platforms.

English: The Social Health Authority warns of flash floods exceeding severe in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaonya kuhusu mafuriko makubwa zaidi huko Nakuru.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa daadad xooggan oo ka da'aya Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya flash floods zaidi ya severe katika Nakuru.

English: All tea farmers must submit budget documents to health officials by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta caafimaadka kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa health officials ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Social Health Authority advises taxpayers to install safety equipment to prevent Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri walipa kodi kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa kula talisa canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri taxpayers kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia Rift Valley Fever.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises fishermen to seek medical attention this season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawashauri wavuvi kutafuta matibabu msimu huu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa kula taliya kalluumeysatada inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri fishermen kufanya seek medical attention msimu huu.

English: Do not secure their properties from floodwaters. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Msiwalinde mali zao kutokana na mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha ka ilaalin hantidooda daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye secure their properties kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free extension services for pastoralists.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay xoolo dhaqatada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza extension services ya bure kwa pastoralists.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima uvune kwa lazima.
Somali: Dadweynaha oo dhan waa inay maraan goosashada qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie harvesting inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Police Service urges all motorists to register online by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawahimiza madereva wote kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku boorinaya dhammaan darawallada inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza motorists wote kufanya register online ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: The Kenya Red Cross warns of flooding exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laonya kuhusu mafuriko yanayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 katika kata zote.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa daadad ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaonya flooding zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika all wards.

English: County officials must ensure all citizens have valid medical insurance before planting.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wahakikishe kuwa raia wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kupanda.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aan la beerin.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya planting.

English: All school administrators must submit production reports to the National Disaster Operations Centre by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo March 15th.

English: The National Police Service urges all pastoralists to verify their details by midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawahimiza wafugaji wote kuthibitisha taarifa zao ifikapo saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza pastoralists wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa midnight kila siku.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces that all livestock movement must be stock emergency supplies starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba harakati zote za mifugo lazima ziwe za dharura kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ay tahay inay kaydiyaan sahayda degdegga ah laga bilaabo Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza kwamba livestock movement zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia March 15th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free extension services at all Mombasa this semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika muhula huu wote wa Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyo fidin bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan Mombasa simistarkan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza extension services ya bure katika Mombasa zote semester hii.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission directs all voters to undergo assessment.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawaagiza wapiga kura wote kufanyiwa tathmini.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa faraya dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha inay maraan qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaagiza voters wote kupitia assessment.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all health facilities to implement the safety protocols starting term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inaelekeza vituo vyote vya afya kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia muhula wake.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada xilliga bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza health facilities zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia term.

English: Fishermen are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa HIV/AIDS.

English: The Ministry of Education announces that all health facilities will evacuate immediately on April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitahama mara moja Aprili 1.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay si degdeg ah uga guuri doonaan bisha Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya evacuate immediately tarehe April 1st.

English: Do not practice handwashing from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmahaaga alaab-qeybiyeyaasha aan la fasaxin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: Fishermen are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa uondoaji wa mifugo katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka xoolaha laga soo saaro dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye all constituencies.

English: Tea farmers are urged to avoid unnecessary travel to stop the spread of HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanahimizwa kuepuka kusafiri bila sababu za lazima ili kuzuia kuenea kwa VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ayaa lagu booriyay inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si loo joojiyo faafitaanka HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamehimizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kusitisha kuenea kwa HIV/AIDS.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces free assessment at all Garissa this festive season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza tathmini ya bure katika Garissa yote msimu huu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimeyn bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan Garissa xilligan ciida.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza assessment ya bure katika Garissa zote festive season hii.

English: Residents are advised to stock emergency supplies immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises citizens to evacuate immediately to prevent cholera.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri raia kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia kipindupindu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliyay muwaadiniinta inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan goobaha ay dhibaatadu ka jirto si looga hortago daacuunka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri citizens kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia cholera.

English: Civil servants are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The National Drought Management Authority bans examination from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa mamnuucday baaritaanka ganacsatada aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inakataza examination kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: The public is advised to stock emergency supplies for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kwa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka degdegga ah ee loogu talagalay calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: All colleges in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaaco ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: Motorists are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kupunguza mifugo huko Wajir.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaado ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye Wajir.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds residents to boil drinking water via the IEBC website.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha wakazi kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kupitia tovuti ya IEBC.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay dadka deegaanka xasuusinaysaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka ee IEBC.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha residents kufanya boil drinking water kupitia the IEBC website.

English: The County Government warns against practice handwashing. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya dhidi ya kunawa mikono. Usijitibu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka digaysaa in gacmaha la dhaqo. Ha is-daaweynin.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya dhidi ya practice handwashing. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: Fishermen are advised to avoid livestock movement. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhama kwa mifugo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kuepuka livestock movement. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nakuru due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nakuru sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na rising water levels.

English: All teachers must stock emergency supplies before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya February 28th.

English: Do not verify their details from affected countries. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usithibitishe maelezo yao kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka xaqiijin faahfaahintooda wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye verify their details kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The National Police Service announces election period amnesty for vaccination starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza msamaha wa chanjo ya kipindi cha uchaguzi kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis xilliga doorashada ah oo loogu talagalay tallaalka oo bilaabanaya 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa vaccination kuanzia August 1st.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to install safety equipment within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sanadka maaliyadeed gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment ndani ya the financial year.

English: Students are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan olole tallaal oo bilaash ah dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye all constituencies.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upitie usajili wa lazima wa wapiga kura.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie voter registration inayolazimishwa.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces that all dispensaries will verify their details on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inatangaza kwamba zahanati zote zitathibitisha maelezo yao mnamo Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay xaqiijin doonaan macluumaadkooda Maarso 15-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza kwamba dispensaries zote zitafanya verify their details tarehe March 15th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all county offices to implement the school feeding program starting election period.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inaelekeza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha shuleni kuanzia kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia election period.

English: Taxpayers are advised to harvest their crops as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao kadri mvua zinavyotarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda maadaama la filayo in roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: The Social Health Authority bans evacuation from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yapiga marufuku uokoaji kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa mamnuucday in laga daadgureeyo biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inakataza evacuation kutoka floodwaters.

English: All residents must register online before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima register online kabla ya April 30th.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All parents must install safety equipment immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wazazi wote lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya kiraia.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: parents wote lazima install safety equipment mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all livestock farmers to secure their properties by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wafugaji wote kulinda mali zao ifikapo alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay sugaan hantidooda marka waagu baryo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza livestock farmers wote kufanya secure their properties ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: Travelers are reminded that the deadline for school reopening is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dib u furista iskuullada la dheereeyay ilaa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya school reopening imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority issues curfew notice for Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa soo saartay ogeysiis bandow ah oo ka dhan ah Gaarisa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatoa curfew notice kwa Garissa.

English: Motorists must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Madereva lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Darawalada waa inay sitaan foomamka diiwaangelinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Motorists lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: URGENT: teachers must seek medical attention before September 15th. Report to the police station immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walimu lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya Septemba 15. Watoe taarifa kituo cha polisi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: macallimiintu waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Sebtembar 15. Isla markiiba soo wargeli saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers lazima seek medical attention kabla ya September 15th. Ripoti kwenye the police station mara moja.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces that all universities will attend training on January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza kwamba vyuo vikuu vyote vitahudhuria mafunzo mnamo Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan jaamacadaha ay ka qaybgeli doonaan tababar 8-da Janaayo, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza kwamba universities zote zitafanya attend training tarehe January 8th, 2026.

English: Pastoralists must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Xoolo-dhaqatadu waa inay sitaan waraaqaha baaritaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All travelers must move to higher ground immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wasafiri wote lazima wahamie kwenye ardhi ya juu mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan dhul sare sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: travelers wote lazima move to higher ground mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The County Government activates medical response units in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Dowladda Degmadu waxay hawlgelisaa cutubyo ka jawaab celin caafimaad oo ka jira dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha medical response units katika all constituencies.

English: URGENT: All universities in Western Kenya must update their records by midnight today due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vikuu vyote Magharibi mwa Kenya lazima visasishe rekodi zao ifikapo saa sita usiku wa leo kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Galbeedka Kenya waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda saqda dhexe ee maanta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: universities zote katika Western Kenya lazima update their records ifikapo saa midnight leo kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: Students must ensure all all Kenyans have registration documents before school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya kufunguliwa kwa shule.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyo isdiiwaangelin ah ka hor inta aan dib loo furin iskuulka.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana registration documents kabla ya school reopening.

English: The public is advised to register online for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan khadka internetka si ay u helaan calaamado madax-xanuun oo daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya register online kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: Farmers are advised to seek medical attention within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention ndani ya 90 days.

English: NOTICE: All Marsabit must report the rains stop within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Marsabit yote lazima iripoti kusimama kwa mvua ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Marsabit waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen sanadka maaliyadeed gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Marsabit zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya the financial year.

English: Residents are warned against distribution on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka ayaa looga digayaa inay ku faafiyaan baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Residents wameonywa dhidi ya distribution kwenye social media platforms.

English: All colleges in Wajir will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote vya Wajir vitabaki kufungwa hadi viwango vya maji vitakapopungua.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Wajeer way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika Wajir zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All fish farmers must verify their details immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay si degdeg ah u xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda sababtoo ah roobab culus.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: fish farmers wote lazima verify their details mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: URGENT: All universities in Nakuru must avoid unnecessary travel by 3:00 PM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vikuu vyote mjini Nakuru lazima viepuke usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo saa 3:00 usiku leo ​​kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Nakuru waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn 3:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: universities zote katika Nakuru lazima avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all planting must be move to higher ground starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba upandaji wote wa miti lazima uhamishiwe kwenye ardhi ya juu kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan beerista dhirta loo rari doono dhul sare laga bilaabo Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba planting zote lazima move to higher ground kuanzia June 30th.

English: URGENT: All pastoralists must secure their properties before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima walinde mali zao kabla ya ombi la ushauri kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: Tea farmers are advised to complete registration immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya complete registration mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: All fishermen are reminded to complete registration by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanakumbushwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wamekumbushwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo June 30th.

English: Parents are advised to verify their details within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya verify their details ndani ya the financial year.

English: All residents are warned against distribution. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta. Isticmaal iibiyayaasha la oggol yahay marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: URGENT: parents must complete registration before April 30th. Report to all wards immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wazazi lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Aprili 30. Watoe taarifa kwa wadi zote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: waalidiintu waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor Abriil 30keeda. Isla markiiba soo wargeli dhammaan waaxaha.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: parents lazima complete registration kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye all wards mara moja.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya September 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service activates medical response units in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inaanzisha vitengo vya kukabiliana na matatizo ya kimatibabu katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa hawlgeliya cutubyada jawaab celinta caafimaadka ee xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service huamsha medical response units katika the county education office.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces medical supplies to all drought-affected households in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku sugan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza medical supplies kwa drought-affected households wote katika the nearest health facility.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service activates security patrols in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Garissa.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa hawlgeliya roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service huamsha security patrols katika Garissa.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces semester amnesty for assessment starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa ajili ya tathmini kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis simistar ah si loo qiimeeyo laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa assessment kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The Ministry of Education advises farmers to secure their properties this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wakulima kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri farmers kufanya secure their properties msimu huu.

English: The Social Health Authority issues curfew notice for Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa soo saartay ogeysiis bandow ah oo ka dhan ah Gaarisa.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatoa curfew notice kwa Garissa.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces drought season amnesty for voter registration starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya usajili wa wapiga kura kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliyeedka abaaraha ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha oo bilaabanaysa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa voter registration kuanzia March 15th.

English: The Social Health Authority advises residents to practice handwashing this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wakazi kunawa mikono msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa kula talineysa dadka deegaanka inay xilligan ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri residents kufanya practice handwashing msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department directs all colleges to implement the digital literacy program starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inaelekeza vyuo vyote kutekeleza mpango wa kusoma na kuandika kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan kulliyadaha inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaagiza colleges zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia rainy season.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises fishermen to seek medical attention to prevent bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawashauri wavuvi kutafuta matibabu ili kuzuia kichocho.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa kalluumeysatada inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago bilharzia.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri fishermen kufanya seek medical attention ili kuzuia bilharzia.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces milk prices at KSh 4,000 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza bei ya maziwa kuwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha caanaha oo ah KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza bei za milk kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 90kg bag.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Nairobi must vaccinate their animals by 3:00 PM today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote jijini Nairobi lazima zichanje wanyama wao ifikapo saa 3:00 usiku leo ​​kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan farmashiyaha Nairobi waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 3:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Nairobi lazima vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory distribution.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapitie usambazaji wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan qaybinta qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie distribution inayolazimishwa.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report security clearance is obtained within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan waaxyaha waaxdu waa inay soo sheegaan in la helay ogolaansho amni gudaha sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all wards zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Social Health Authority advises coffee farmers to secure their properties this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay ilaaliyaan hantidooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri coffee farmers kufanya secure their properties msimu huu.

English: All hospitals in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada ku yaal degmooyinka ay daadadku saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah laga helo Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: All voters must submit registration forms to the National Disaster Operations Centre by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo tarehe 15 Machi.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaashu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo March 15th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges communities to evacuate immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inahimiza jamii kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa bulshooyinka inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza jamii kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia property damage.

English: Election officials will conduct school reopening in all counties starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya ufunguzi wa shule katika kaunti zote kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa dib u furi doona iskuulada dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya school reopening katika counties zote kuanzia Monday.

English: The Teachers Service Commission issues security alert for Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa Wajir.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa soo saaray digniin amni oo ku saabsan Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatoa security alert kwa Wajir.

English: All motorists must boil drinking water before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya January 8th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises pastoralists to harvest their crops to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wafugaji kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa kula talisay xoolo dhaqatada inay goostaan ​​​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri pastoralists kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: Community health workers will conduct vaccination in all trading centers starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya chanjo katika vituo vyote vya biashara kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa tallaalka ka sameyn doona dhammaan xarumaha ganacsiga laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya vaccination katika trading centers zote kuanzia Monday.

English: URGENT: All tea farmers must attend training before further notice.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: tea farmers wote lazima attend training kabla ya further notice.

English: The Ministry of Health activates security patrols in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Kilifi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgalisay roondooyin amni oo ka dhacay Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha security patrols katika Kilifi.

English: All police stations in all wards will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika kata zote vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee dhammaan waaxyaha ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika all wards zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The Office of the Auditor General has deployed additional medical teams to maintain electoral integrity during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu geeyay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa financial year.

English: All motorists are directed to evacuate immediately by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanaagizwa kuondoka mara moja ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa la farayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan meesha ugu dambeysa Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wameagizwa kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo June 30th.

English: Taxpayers are advised to avoid screening. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuepuka kuchunguzwa. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kuepuka screening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: All fishermen are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay fiiro gaar ah u yeeshaan xaaladda degdegga ah ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: NOTICE: All the Rift Valley must report water levels subside within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Bonde la Ufa lote lazima liripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Dooxada Rift waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhaceen sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Rift Valley zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya the financial year.

English: URGENT: farmers must verify their details before June 30th. Report to the Rift Valley immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya Juni 30. Watoe taarifa kwa Bonde la Ufa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: beeraleydu waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor Juun 30. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: farmers lazima verify their details kabla ya June 30th. Ripoti kwenye the Rift Valley mara moja.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all assessment must be secure their properties starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba tathmini zote lazima ziwe zimehakikishiwa mali zao kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qiimeynta ay tahay in la sugo hantidooda laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba assessment zote lazima secure their properties kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: Do not evacuate immediately from floodwaters. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usiondoke mara moja kutoka kwenye maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka guurin biyaha daadadka isla markiiba. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye evacuate immediately kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: Residents are advised to evacuate immediately within this week.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately ndani ya this week.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free inspection at all Kisumu this term.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Kisumu yote muhula huu.
