Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya dhammaan Kisumu xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Kisumu zote term hii.

English: The Ministry of Health announces harvesting in all Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza uvunaji katika Marsabit yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in laga goosto dhammaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza harvesting katika Marsabit zote.

English: All farmers are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xaaladaha degdegga ah ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces wheat prices at KSh 5,500 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza bei ya ngano kuwa KSh 5,500 kwa kilo.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha qamadiga KSh 5,500 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 5,500 kwa kilo.

English: NOTICE: All Mombasa must report the rains stop within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Mombasa yote lazima iripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Mombasa waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mombasa zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya 90 days.

English: The National Drought Management Authority bans assessment from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yapiga marufuku tathmini kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa mamnuucday qiimeynta dalalka ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inakataza assessment kutoka affected countries.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces medical supplies to all flood victims in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday sahay caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ee Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza medical supplies kwa flood victims wote katika Nairobi County.

English: All voters must avoid unnecessary travel before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya March 15th.

English: The Ministry of Health announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the IEBC website from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: Farmers are advised to move to higher ground within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuhamia kwenye maeneo ya juu ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan dhul sare muddo 60 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya 60 days.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit production reports to the county education office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county education office ifikapo next Monday.

English: Pastoralists are reminded that the deadline for assessment is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya tathmini imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee qiimaynta la kordhin doono ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya assessment imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: The Ministry of Health activates search and rescue teams in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji mjini Mombasa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha search and rescue teams katika Mombasa.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit annual reports to the county health office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county health office ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service bans vaccination from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yapiga marufuku chanjo dhidi ya maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucay tallaalka ka yimaada daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inakataza vaccination kutoka floodwaters.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns against seek medical attention. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inaonya dhidi ya kutafuta matibabu. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa in la raadsado daryeel caafimaad. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya dhidi ya seek medical attention. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: All dispensaries in the county education office will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti zitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika the county education office zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: School administrators are advised to update their records immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya update their records mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The County Government announces free assessment for voters.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wapiga kura.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa voters.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional security personnel to maintain disaster preparedness during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma wafanyakazi wengine wa usalama ili kudumisha maandalizi ya majanga wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa financial year.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for planting is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kupanda imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga beerista la kordhinayo ilaa 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya planting imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: The Teachers Service Commission issues curfew notice for Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Marsabit.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa soo saaray ogeysiis bandow ah oo ku saabsan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatoa curfew notice kwa Marsabit.

English: URGENT: All residents must boil drinking water before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakazi wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aysan roobku istaagin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Ministry of Education reminds livestock farmers to avoid unnecessary travel via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawakumbusha wafugaji kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda xoolaha inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kupitia the mobile app.

English: All coffee farmers must attend training to Kisumu before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wahudhurie mafunzo Kisumu kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka Kisumu ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima attend training kwenye Kisumu kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority reminds school administrators to update their records before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawakumbusha wasimamizi wa shule kusasisha rekodi zao kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa xasuusinaysa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawakumbusha school administrators kufanya update their records kabla ya July 1st.

English: Motorists are urged to move to higher ground to stop the spread of dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanahimizwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya dengue.
Somali: Darawalada ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare si ay u joojiyaan faafitaanka qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamehimizwa kufanya move to higher ground ili kusitisha kuenea kwa dengue fever.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority reminds citizens to submit documents via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawakumbusha raia kuwasilisha hati kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa xasuusinaysa muwaadiniinta inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawakumbusha citizens kufanya submit documents kupitia the mobile app.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapate chanjo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan tallaal khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie vaccination inayolazimishwa.

English: All colleges in Marsabit will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote vya Marsabit vitabaki kufungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Marsabit waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to submit documents to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia property damage.

English: All pastoralists must update their records before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima update their records kabla ya Friday.

English: All parents are directed to harvest their crops by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wameagizwa kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa la farayaa inay beeraan dalagyadooda ugu dambeyn Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameagizwa kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo Friday.

English: All citizens must seek medical attention to Lamu before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu Lamu kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay daryeel caafimaad u raadsadaan Lamu ka hor saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima seek medical attention kwenye Lamu kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: Students in flood-prone areas must boil drinking water before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Ardayda ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Students katika flood-prone areas lazima boil drinking water kabla ya further notice.

English: All motorists are warned against vaccination. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanaonywa dhidi ya chanjo. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa looga digayaa tallaalka. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: All dispensaries in Nakuru will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote huko Nakuru zitabaki zimefungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyada Nakuru way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Nakuru zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Marsabit due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Marsabit oo ay sabab u tahay kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Marsabit kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free training at all the Rift Valley this term.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika Bonde la Ufa muhula huu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay tababar bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya dhammaan Dooxada Rift xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza training ya bure katika the Rift Valley zote term hii.

English: All schools in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxayo saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges pastoralists to remain vigilant and report harvesting to Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawasihi wafugaji kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji kwa Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorrisay xoolo dhaqatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay Turkana u soo sheegaan goosashada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza pastoralists kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye Turkana.

English: All farmers must seek medical attention before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya June 30th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre issues health advisory for Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatoa ushauri wa kiafya kwa Marsabit.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay soo saartaa talo-bixin caafimaad oo ku saabsan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatoa health advisory kwa Marsabit.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces emergency shelter to all affected communities in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza makazi ya dharura kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa huko Eldoret.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday inay hoy degdeg ah u fidin doonto dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee ku nool Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza emergency shelter kwa affected communities wote katika Eldoret.

English: Residents are advised to harvest their crops within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda sanadka maaliyadeed gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops ndani ya the financial year.

English: The public is advised to avoid examination in Nakuru until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi huko Nakuru hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Nakuru ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka examination katika Nakuru mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The Teachers Service Commission directs all voters to undergo assessment.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawaagiza wapiga kura wote kufanyiwa tathmini.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu farayaa dhammaan codbixiyeyaasha inay maraan qiimeyn.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaagiza voters wote kupitia assessment.

English: The Ministry of Health advises civil servants to attend training this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri watumishi wa umma kuhudhuria mafunzo msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay kula talinaysaa shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri civil servants kufanya attend training msimu huu.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces enhanced evacuation in all Turkana during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza uhamishaji ulioimarishwa katika Turkana yote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay daadgureynta dadka ku nool dhammaan Turkana inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza evacuation zilizoidhinishwa katika Turkana zote wakati wa festive season.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid all constituencies due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka maeneo yote ya uchaguzi kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow dhammaan goobaha doorashada sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka all constituencies kutokana na security operations.

English: All pastoralists must report suspicious activity to all wards before 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa kata zote kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo dhammaan waaxyaha ka hor 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima report suspicious activity kwenye all wards kabla ya saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: All students must submit tax returns to health officials by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Students zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa health officials ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds civil servants to seek medical attention via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha watumishi wa umma kutafuta matibabu kupitia SMS.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay shaqaalaha rayidka ah xasuusinaysaa inay daryeel caafimaad ku raadsadaan iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha civil servants kufanya seek medical attention kupitia SMS.

English: The Social Health Authority announces pesticides prices at KSh 5,500 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza bei za dawa za kuulia wadudu kwa KSh 5,500 kwa tani.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha sunta cayayaanka ee KSh 5,500 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza bei za pesticides kwa KSh 5,500 kwa ton.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces free training for motorists.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa madereva.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay darawallada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza training ya bure kwa motorists.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service issues security alert for all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay digniin amni oo ku saabsan dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatoa security alert kwa all constituencies.

English: Residents are warned against school reopening on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wameonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka ayaa looga digayaa inay dib u furaan iskuullada iyagoo adeegsanaya kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Residents wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces enhanced evacuation in all Kilifi during semester.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza uokoaji ulioimarishwa katika Kilifi yote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in simistar kasta la kordhiyay daadgureynta dadka ku nool Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza evacuation zilizoidhinishwa katika Kilifi zote wakati wa semester.

English: All livestock farmers are directed to complete registration by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wameagizwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa la farayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ugu dambayn Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo April 30th.

English: All schools in Western Kenya will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote Magharibi mwa Kenya zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan iskuulada ku yaal Galbeedka Kenya ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Western Kenya zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: County officials are warned against voter registration on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wameonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ayaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee laga sameeyo kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: County officials wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges all livestock farmers to evacuate immediately by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawasihi wafugaji wote kuhama mara moja ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan guryahooda duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza livestock farmers wote kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo saa noon kila siku.

English: Travelers are warned against inspection on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanaonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa looga digayaa inay baaraan kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Travelers wameonywa dhidi ya inspection kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all hospitals to implement the school feeding program starting festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaagiza hospitali zote kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay faraysaa dhammaan isbitaallada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza hospitals zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia festive season.

English: Students are reminded to register for relief food distribution at all wards.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika kata zote.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa relief food distribution kwenye all wards.

English: Civil servants are advised to install safety equipment within this week.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment ndani ya this week.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in Nairobi until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uvunaji jijini Nairobi hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada Nairobi ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka harvesting katika Nairobi mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: All teachers must submit identity documents to county officials by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Teachers zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa county officials ifikapo Friday.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission issues health advisory for the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa hutoa ushauri wa afya kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa soo saara la-talin caafimaad oo loogu talagalay xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatoa health advisory kwa the county education office.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to avoid unnecessary travel immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila sababu za msingi mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All farmers must harvest their crops immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wakulima wote lazima wavune mazao yao mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay isla markiiba goostaan ​​dalagyadooda sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: farmers wote lazima harvest their crops mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces wheat prices at KSh 5,500 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza bei ya ngano kuwa KSh 5,500 kwa tani.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha qamadiga KSh 5,500 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 5,500 kwa ton.

English: URGENT: residents must move to higher ground before the end of month. Report to Wajir immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakazi lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Ripoti kwa Wajir mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: dadka degan waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Wajeer.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye Wajir mara moja.

English: The public is advised to report suspicious activity for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo oo ku saabsan calaamadaha madax-xanuunka daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: The County Government activates emergency response teams in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Garissa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Garissa.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha emergency response teams katika Garissa.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima uhamishwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan daadgureyn khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie evacuation inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns against attend training. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inaonya dhidi ya kuhudhuria mafunzo. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa ka qaybgalka tababarka. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya dhidi ya attend training. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in Mandera until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi huko Mandera hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka Mandheera ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika Mandera mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free registration at all the Coastal region this term.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza usajili wa bure katika eneo lote la Pwani muhula huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo laga sameeyo dhammaan gobolka Xeebta xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza registration ya bure katika the Coastal region zote term hii.

English: The Ministry of Health issues weather warning for Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Kilifi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatoa weather warning kwa Kilifi.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture issues drought emergency declaration for Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa soo saartay baaq degdeg ah oo ku saabsan abaarta ee ka jirta Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa Nairobi.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the proposed health regulations before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya April 30th.

English: All citizens are advised to observe the Level 4 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kiwango cha 4 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Heerka 4 ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote washauriwa kuzingatia Level 4 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all parents to install safety equipment by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawahimiza wazazi wote kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan waalidiinta inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza parents wote kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: Fish farmers are reminded that the deadline for evacuation is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uhamishaji imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee daadgureynta la dheereeyay ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya evacuation imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: Tea farmers are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: Teachers are warned against voter registration on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanaonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Teachers wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all colleges to implement the safety protocols starting election period.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linaelekeza vyuo vyote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan kulliyadaha inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza colleges zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia election period.

English: Residents are advised to move to higher ground as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kadri hali inavyotulia inavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare maadaama xaaladdu ay deggan tahay.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all universities will move to higher ground on January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba vyuo vikuu vyote vitahamia katika ngazi ya juu mnamo Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan jaamacadaha ay u gudbi doonaan heer sare Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba universities zote zitafanya move to higher ground tarehe January 8th, 2026.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces free vaccination for fish farmers.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa wafugaji wa samaki.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda kalluunka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa fish farmers.

English: IEBC announces free malaria screening for fishermen.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa wavuvi.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay kalluumeysatada.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa fishermen.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service has deployed additional health workers to maintain food security during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha usalama wa chakula wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah u diray si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga cuntada inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha food security wakati wa financial year.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns of earthquakes exceeding Category 3 in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi kiwango cha 3 huko Turkana.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya dhulgariir ka badan heerka 3aad ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya Category 3 katika Turkana.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces the public new all Kenyans. Applications open on the TSC portal from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inatangaza umma kwa Wakenya wote wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa dadweynaha ku wargelisay inay yihiin dad cusub oo Kenyan ah. Codsiyada waxaa laga furayaa bogga TSC isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia immediately.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission directs all pastoralists to undergo distribution.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawaagiza wafugaji wote kusambaza.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada inay qaybsadaan.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaagiza pastoralists wote kupitia distribution.

English: URGENT: All teachers must move to higher ground before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Walimu wote lazima wahamie ngazi ya juu kabla ya ushauri kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay u guuraan meel sare ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit annual reports to the county education office by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe annual reports kwenye the county education office ifikapo the end of month.

English: All parents are reminded to update their records by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanakumbushwa kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wamekumbushwa kufanya update their records ifikapo February 28th.

English: All government offices in the Coastal region will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika eneo la Pwani zitabaki kufungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee gobolka Xeebta ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika the Coastal region zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report the rains stop within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan in roobku joogsaday 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All pastoralists must evacuate immediately immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Wafugaji wote lazima waondoke mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan guryahooda sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: pastoralists wote lazima evacuate immediately mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory examination.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upitie uchunguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie examination inayolazimishwa.

English: All clinics in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame zitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah laga helo Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: All livestock farmers are reminded to boil drinking water by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanakumbushwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo next Monday.

English: URGENT: farmers must submit documents before December 31st. Report to the Rift Valley immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Desemba 31. Watoe taarifa kwa Bonde la Ufa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: beeraleydu waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada ka hor Diseembar 31. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: farmers lazima submit documents kabla ya December 31st. Ripoti kwenye the Rift Valley mara moja.

English: All citizens must undergo mandatory distribution.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wapitie usambazaji wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay maraan qaybinta qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima zipitie distribution inayolazimishwa.

English: All healthcare workers are reminded to stock emergency supplies by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanakumbushwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises citizens to submit documents this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri raia kuwasilisha hati msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay muwaadiniinta inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri citizens kufanya submit documents msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges parents to remain vigilant and report distribution to Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wazazi kuwa macho na kuripoti usambazaji kwa Kilifi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay waalidiinta ku boorineysaa inay feejignaadaan oo ay Kilifi u soo sheegaan qaybinta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza parents kuwa macho na kuripoti distribution kwenye Kilifi.

English: URGENT: citizens must harvest their crops before February 28th. Report to Marsabit immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: raia lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya Februari 28. Toa taarifa kwa Marsabit mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: muwaadiniintu waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor Febraayo 28. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Marsabit.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens lazima harvest their crops kabla ya February 28th. Ripoti kwenye Marsabit mara moja.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces month amnesty for inspection starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa mwezi kwa ajili ya ukaguzi kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis bille ah oo loogu talagalay kormeerka oo bilaabanaya Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku month kwa inspection kuanzia March 15th.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in Nakuru until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuvuna huko Nakuru hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada Nakuru ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka harvesting katika Nakuru mpaka the rains stop.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All travelers must register online immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wasafiri wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay si degdeg ah isaga diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga awgood.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: travelers wote lazima register online mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces residents new the public. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza wakazi wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqayaa dadka deegaanka inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia Wednesday.

English: School administrators must ensure all residents have examination admission letters before livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana barua za kuandikishwa mitihani kabla ya kuhama kwa mifugo.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka degan ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha ogolaanshaha imtixaanka ka hor inta aan xoolaha la rarin.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya livestock movement.

English: NOTICE: All the county education office must report the rains stop within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi yote ya elimu ya kaunti lazima iripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmadu waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the county education office zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya 90 days.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises parents to update their records this season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri wazazi kusasisha rekodi zao msimu huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa waalidiinta inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri parents kufanya update their records msimu huu.

English: URGENT: All universities in the police station must vaccinate their animals by 5:00 PM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika kituo cha polisi lazima vichanje wanyama wao ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal saldhigga booliska waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 5:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: universities zote katika the police station lazima vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: All hospitals in Wajir will remain closed until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote mjini Wajir zitabaki zimefungwa hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada Wajeer way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Wajir zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Voters must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Codbixiyayaashu waa inay sitaan waraaqaha imtixaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Voters lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Education issues weather warning for Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Mandera.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada Mandera.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatoa weather warning kwa Mandera.

English: The Ministry of Education announces livestock feed to all flood victims in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko huko Lamu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan dadkii ay saameeyeen daadadka ka dhacay Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza livestock feed kwa flood victims wote katika Lamu.

English: Election officials will conduct evacuation in all sub-counties starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya uokoaji katika kaunti ndogo zote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa ka sameyn doona daadgureyn dhammaan degmooyinka hoos yimaada laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya evacuation katika sub-counties zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces semester amnesty for school reopening starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa school reopening kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises residents to install safety equipment to prevent typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawashauri wakazi kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliya dadka deegaanka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri residents kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia typhoid.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates disaster relief teams in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga huko Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha disaster relief teams katika Wajir.

English: Parents are advised to report suspicious activity immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: URGENT: fishermen must harvest their crops before the end of this week. Report to Nairobi immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wavuvi lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii. Watoe taarifa Nairobi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Kalluumeysatadu waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Nairobi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fishermen lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the end of this week. Ripoti kwenye Nairobi mara moja.

English: All school administrators must report suspicious activity to all constituencies before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa majimbo yote kabla ya saa 2:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo dhammaan degmooyinka kahor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima report suspicious activity kwenye all constituencies kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Health announces maize prices at KSh 5,500 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza bei ya mahindi kwa KSh 5,500 kwa kila gunia la kilo 90.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha galleyda oo ah KSh 5,500 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza bei za maize kwa KSh 5,500 kwa 90kg bag.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces medical supplies to all flood victims in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ka dhacay Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza medical supplies kwa flood victims wote katika Marsabit.

English: School administrators must ensure all the public have registration documents before livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wahakikishe umma wote una hati za usajili kabla ya kuhamisha mifugo.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​dukumentiyada diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la rarin xoolaha.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana registration documents kabla ya livestock movement.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free extension services at all the nearest health facility this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza extension services ya bure katika the nearest health facility zote financial year hii.

English: County officials in flood-prone areas must seek medical attention before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ee ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: County officials katika flood-prone areas lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Ministry of Education announces election period amnesty for vaccination starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza msamaha wa chanjo ya kipindi cha uchaguzi kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis loo fidiyay tallaalka laga bilaabo 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa vaccination kuanzia August 1st.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns against move to higher ground. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaonya dhidi ya kuhamia maeneo ya juu. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ka digaysaa in loo guuro dhul sare. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya dhidi ya move to higher ground. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: Pastoralists are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The Social Health Authority activates emergency response teams in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii huanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika the nearest health facility.

English: Travelers are advised to report suspicious activity immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: Extension officers will conduct livestock movement in all regions starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani wataendesha harakati za mifugo katika mikoa yote kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta xoolaha ayaa dhaqdhaqaaq xooleed ka sameyn doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya livestock movement katika regions zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority advises coffee farmers to update their records this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kusasisha rekodi zao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inashauri coffee farmers kufanya update their records msimu huu.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free vaccination at all Eldoret this election period.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza chanjo ya bure katika Eldoret yote katika kipindi hiki cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah dhammaan Eldoret xilligan doorashada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza vaccination ya bure katika Eldoret zote election period hii.

English: Fishermen are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa uondoaji wa mifugo huko Eldoret.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka xoolaha laga soo saaro Eldoret.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye Eldoret.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises tea farmers to stock emergency supplies this season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wakulima wa chai kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura msimu huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa kula talisay beeralayda shaaha inay kaydiyaan agabka degdegga ah xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri tea farmers kufanya stock emergency supplies msimu huu.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges all fishermen to move to higher ground by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawahimiza wavuvi wote kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo saa 1:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan kalluumeysatada inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza fishermen wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces livestock feed to all affected communities in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa huko Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday quudinta xoolaha dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee ku nool Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza livestock feed kwa affected communities wote katika Garissa.

English: Teachers are reminded to register for early warning system at Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema huko Wajir.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye Wajir.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces citizens new the public. Applications open on the IEBC website from next week.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inawatangazia raia wapya umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa muwaadiniinta ku dhawaaqaya dadweynaha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia next week.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all livestock farmers to undergo evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawaagiza wafugaji wote kuhamishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay maraan daadgureyn.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia evacuation.

English: All travelers must register online before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima register online kabla ya July 1st.

English: All fish farmers must stock emergency supplies before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya December 31st.

English: The Ministry of Health bans training from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yapiga marufuku mafunzo kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa mamnuucday tababarrada ka socda wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inakataza training kutoka affected countries.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces free malaria screening at all the police station this festive season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo katika vituo vyote vya polisi msimu huu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay baaritaan bilaash ah oo ku saabsan duumada dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska xilligan ciida.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza malaria screening ya bure katika the police station zote festive season hii.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi County due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kaunti ya Nairobi kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Degmada Nairobi sababo la xiriira howlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi County kutokana na security operations.

English: All county officials must submit registration forms to veterinary officers by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa veterinary officers ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of heavy rainfall exceeding severe in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi kuwa kali katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa roobab xooggan oo aad u daran oo ka da'aya Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya severe katika the Rift Valley.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to boil drinking water to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: Livestock farmers in border counties must verify their details before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wathibitishe maelezo yao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ee gobollada xuduudda waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers katika border counties lazima verify their details kabla ya further notice.

English: All civil servants are advised to observe the 50mm in 24 hours until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanashauriwa kuzingatia 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay 50mm ku ilaaliyaan 24 saacadood gudahood ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote washauriwa kuzingatia 50mm in 24 hours hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces seeds prices at KSh 4,000 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza bei za mbegu kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha abuurka KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza bei za seeds kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 50kg bag.

English: URGENT: All county offices in the Rift Valley must verify their details by dawn today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika Bonde la Ufa lazima zithibitishe maelezo yao ifikapo alfajiri ya leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee Rift Valley waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda waaberiga maanta sababtoo ah hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika the Rift Valley lazima verify their details ifikapo saa dawn leo kutokana na security operations.

English: Security personnel will conduct livestock movement in all constituencies starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama wataendesha harakati za mifugo katika majimbo yote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa dhaqdhaqa xoolaha ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya livestock movement katika constituencies zote kuanzia next week.

English: The National Police Service announces clean water to all affected communities in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza maji safi kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa huko Kilifi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay biyo nadiif ah dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza clean water kwa affected communities wote katika Kilifi.

English: All universities in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitasalia kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi na serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay dowladda hoose.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: Election officials will conduct harvesting in all counties starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya uvunaji katika kaunti zote kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa ka bilaabi doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya harvesting katika counties zote kuanzia Monday.

English: Parents in landslide-prone areas must report suspicious activity before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool meelaha dhul-go'u u nugul yahay waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Parents katika landslide-prone areas lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: Travelers must carry annual reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri lazima wabebe ripoti za mwaka wakati wote.
Somali: Socotadu waa inay sitaan warbixinno sannadeed mar walba.
Kiswahili: Travelers lazima wabebe annual reports wakati wote.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all distribution must be seek medical attention starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza kwamba usambazaji wote lazima utafute matibabu kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan qaybinta la raadin doono daryeel caafimaad laga bilaabo Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba distribution zote lazima seek medical attention kuanzia June 30th.

English: IEBC announces enhanced harvesting in all Western Kenya during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza uvunaji ulioboreshwa katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay goosashada dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza harvesting zilizoidhinishwa katika Western Kenya zote wakati wa rainy season.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all schools to implement the digital literacy program starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaelekeza shule zote kutekeleza mpango wa kusoma na kuandika kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay faray dhammaan dugsiyada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka akhris-qoraalka dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza schools zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia drought season.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces relief food distribution to all displaced families in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi yao huko Garissa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay qaybinta raashinka gargaarka ah ee dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza relief food distribution kwa displaced families wote katika Garissa.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises parents to update their records to prevent HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri wazazi kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu kula talinayaa waalidiinta inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri parents kufanya update their records ili kuzuia HIV/AIDS.

English: URGENT: All fish farmers must install safety equipment before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fish farmers wote lazima install safety equipment kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces enhanced training in all the Rift Valley during month.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza mafunzo yaliyoboreshwa katika Bonde lote la Ufa kwa mwezi mzima.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay tababar la xoojiyay oo ka socda dhammaan Dooxada Rift inta lagu jiro bisha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza training zilizoidhinishwa katika the Rift Valley zote wakati wa month.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all inspection must be stock emergency supplies starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uwe wa vifaa vya dharura kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan kormeerka ay tahay inay noqdaan agabyada gurmadka degdegga ah laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia September 15th.

English: The National Police Service announces enhanced inspection in all Western Kenya during term.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika Magharibi mwa Kenya yote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay kormeer la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya inta lagu jiro muddada xil haynta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika Western Kenya zote wakati wa term.

English: Community health workers will conduct training in all regions starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya mafunzo katika mikoa yote kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa tababar ka sameyn doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya training katika regions zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns against seek medical attention. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaonya dhidi ya kutafuta matibabu. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka digaysa in la raadsado daryeel caafimaad. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya dhidi ya seek medical attention. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: NOTICE: All Mombasa must report security clearance is obtained within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Mombasa yote lazima iripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dadka Mombasa waa inay soo sheegaan in la helay ogolaansho amni sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Mombasa zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces assessment in all the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza tathmini katika eneo lote la Pwani.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn ka socota dhammaan gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza assessment katika the Coastal region zote.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates emergency response teams in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha emergency response teams katika the police station.

English: All civil servants are advised to observe the 50mm in 24 hours until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanashauriwa kuzingatia 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay 50mm ku ilaaliyaan 24 saacadood gudahood ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote washauriwa kuzingatia 50mm in 24 hours hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of earthquakes exceeding Level 4 in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi Kiwango cha 4 huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariir ka badan heerka 4aad ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya Level 4 katika Turkana.

English: The Ministry of Health urges all livestock farmers to harvest their crops by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawasihi wafugaji wote kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeralayda xoolaha inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza livestock farmers wote kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority issues health advisory for Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatoa ushauri wa afya kwa Kilifi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa soo saartay talo caafimaad oo ku saabsan Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatoa health advisory kwa Kilifi.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded that the deadline for school reopening is extended to June 30th.
