Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kufunguliwa kwa shule imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dib u furista iskuullada la kordhin doono ilaa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya school reopening imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: Fishermen are advised to report suspicious activity as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwani mvua inatarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo maadaama la filayo in roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges all residents to update their records by 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza wakazi wote kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza residents wote kufanya update their records ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: URGENT: civil servants must vaccinate their animals before June 30th. Report to Nakuru immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Watumishi wa umma lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni. Toa taarifa Nakuru mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor Juun 30. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Nakuru.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: civil servants lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya June 30th. Ripoti kwenye Nakuru mara moja.

English: All teachers must submit registration forms to the county government by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan dawladda degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the county government ifikapo the end of month.

English: The National Police Service issues drought emergency declaration for Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame kwa Eldoret.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa soo saaray baaq degdeg ah oo ku saabsan abaarta ee Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa Eldoret.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre directs all citizens to undergo distribution.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawaagiza raia wote kupitia usambazaji.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay faray dhammaan muwaadiniinta inay maraan qaybinta.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaagiza citizens wote kupitia distribution.

English: The Ministry of Education urges all parents to seek medical attention by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi wazazi wote kutafuta matibabu ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad maalinta qorrax dhaca.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza parents wote kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: All police stations in all wards will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika kata zote vitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee dhammaan waaxyaha ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika all wards zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces drought season amnesty for harvesting starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya uvunaji kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis xilliga abaaraha ah oo loogu talagalay goosashada beeraha oo bilaabanaysa Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa harvesting kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced screening in all Turkana during drought season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza uboreshaji wa ukaguzi katika Turkana yote wakati wa msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan Turkana inta lagu jiro xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza screening zilizoidhinishwa katika Turkana zote wakati wa drought season.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all fishermen to undergo distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawaagiza wavuvi wote kusambaza samaki.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faray dhammaan kalluumeysatada inay maraan qaybinta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza fishermen wote kupitia distribution.

English: All clinics in the Rift Valley will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika Bonde la Ufa zitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal Dooxada Rift ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika the Rift Valley zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department reminds taxpayers to secure their properties via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawakumbusha walipa kodi kulinda mali zao kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa canshuur bixiyayaasha inay hantidooda ku sugaan abka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawakumbusha taxpayers kufanya secure their properties kupitia the mobile app.

English: All coffee farmers are warned against planting. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waxaa looga digayaa inay beeraan. Isticmaal kanaallo rasmi ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya planting. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: Civil servants are advised to evacuate immediately within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately ndani ya 30 days.

English: All voters must report suspicious activity to Wajir before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa Wajir kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay Wajeer u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima report suspicious activity kwenye Wajir kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces free inspection at all the Coastal region this drought season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika maeneo yote ya Pwani msimu huu wa ukame.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan gobolka Xeebta xilligan abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza inspection ya bure katika the Coastal region zote drought season hii.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all county offices to implement the safety protocols starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linaelekeza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia rainy season.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges communities to verify their details to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linahimiza jamii kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa bulshooyinka inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza jamii kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: Pastoralists are advised to harvest their crops within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda muddo 90 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops ndani ya 90 days.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre issues security alert for the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatoa tahadhari ya usalama kwa Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa soo saartay digniin amni oo ku saabsan Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatoa security alert kwa the Rift Valley.

English: Community health workers will conduct assessment in all villages starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya tathmini katika vijiji vyote kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa qiimeyn ku sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya assessment katika villages zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free training at all Marsabit this rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika Marsabit yote msimu huu wa mvua.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay tababar bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya dhammaan Marsabit xilligan roobaadka.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza training ya bure katika Marsabit zote rainy season hii.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces week amnesty for assessment starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa ajili ya tathmini kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay qiimeynta oo bilaabanaysa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa assessment kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces free vaccination at all Nairobi this semester.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza chanjo ya bure katika muhula huu wote wa Nairobi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo ka dhici doona dhammaan Nairobi simistarkan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza vaccination ya bure katika Nairobi zote semester hii.

English: NOTICE: All Kilifi must report the rains stop within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kilifi yote lazima iripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dadka deggan Kilifi waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Kilifi zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya this month.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces training in all Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza mafunzo katika Nairobi nzima.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay tababar ka socda dhammaan Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza training katika Nairobi zote.

English: The Teachers Service Commission directs all tea farmers to undergo harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawaagiza wakulima wote wa chai kuvunwa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa faraya dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay maraan goosashada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaagiza tea farmers wote kupitia harvesting.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All farmers must complete registration immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wakulima wote lazima wakamilishe usajili mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya tishio la usalama.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: farmers wote lazima complete registration mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces free vaccination for school administrators.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa wasimamizi wa shule.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay maamulayaasha iskuulada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa school administrators.

English: The Ministry of Education reminds coffee farmers to stock emergency supplies via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kupitia jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah ee Citizen.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya stock emergency supplies kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: The County Government announces all Kenyans new citizens. Applications open on the SHA website from next week.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza Wakenya wote kuwa raia wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa dhammaan muwaadiniinta cusub ee Kenya. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo usbuuca soo socda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia next week.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges all coffee farmers to move to higher ground by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawahimiza wakulima wote wa kahawa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo saa 1:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorinaya dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza coffee farmers wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: URGENT: motorists must seek medical attention before September 15th. Report to Turkana immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: madereva lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu kabla ya Septemba 15. Toa taarifa kwa Turkana mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Darawalada baabuurtu waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Sebtembar 15. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Turkana.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists lazima seek medical attention kabla ya September 15th. Ripoti kwenye Turkana mara moja.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces seeds prices at KSh 4,000 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza bei za mbegu kuwa KSh 4,000 kwa kilo.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha abuurka KSh 4,000 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza bei za seeds kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kilo.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit registration forms to the county agricultural office by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Aprili.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada ugu dambayn Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority has deployed additional health workers to maintain food security during semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha usalama wa chakula wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga cuntada inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha food security wakati wa semester.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority launches free vaccination campaign in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inazindua free vaccination campaign katika the police station.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces beans prices at KSh 2,500 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha digirta KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 90kg bag.

English: Election officials will conduct assessment in all counties starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya tathmini katika kaunti zote kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa qiimeyn ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya assessment katika counties zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: URGENT: parents must complete registration before September 15th. Report to all constituencies immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wazazi lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Septemba 15. Watoe taarifa kwa majimbo yote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: waalidiintu waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor Sebtembar 15. Isla markiiba soo wargeli dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: parents lazima complete registration kabla ya September 15th. Ripoti kwenye all constituencies mara moja.

English: The Office of the Auditor General activates emergency response teams in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Nakuru.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu hawlgeliyaa kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General huamsha emergency response teams katika Nakuru.

English: URGENT: All farmers must update their records before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: farmers wote lazima update their records kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: All tea farmers are directed to complete registration by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wameagizwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa la farayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces enhanced vaccination in all the county education office during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza chanjo iliyoimarishwa katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza vaccination zilizoidhinishwa katika the county education office zote wakati wa festive season.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service directs all tea farmers to undergo livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawaelekeza wakulima wote wa chai kuhamahama kutoka kwa mifugo.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa faraya dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay maraan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaagiza tea farmers wote kupitia livestock movement.

English: All government offices in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee ku yaal goobaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: All government offices in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee ku yaal goobaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay dowladda hoose.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: URGENT: All travelers must report suspicious activity before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasafiri wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers wote lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority issues health advisory for Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatoa ushauri wa afya kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa soo saartay talo caafimaad oo ku saabsan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatoa health advisory kwa Nakuru.

English: All health facilities in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Wajir due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Wajeer sababo la xiriira kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na civil unrest.

English: All voters are reminded to practice handwashing by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wanakumbushwa kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan marka la gaaro 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wamekumbushwa kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo July 1st.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Eldoret.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan olole tallaal oo bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya Eldoret.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye Eldoret.

English: The Teachers Service Commission has deployed additional officers to maintain law and order during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu imewatuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha sheria na utulivu wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa shaqaale dheeraad ah geeyay si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa financial year.

English: All dispensaries in the nearest health facility will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu zitabaki zimefungwa hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika the nearest health facility zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The Ministry of Health announces free malaria screening for coffee farmers.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa wakulima wa kahawa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda qaxwada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa coffee farmers.

English: Coffee farmers in border counties must seek medical attention before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa katika kaunti za mpakani lazima watafute matibabu kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Beeralayda kafeega ee ku nool gobollada xuduudda waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers katika border counties lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority advises coffee farmers to install safety equipment this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kufunga vifaa vya usalama msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa kula talisa beeralayda qaxwada inay xilligan rakibaan qalabka badbaadada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inashauri coffee farmers kufanya install safety equipment msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges communities to stock emergency supplies to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorisay bulshooyinka inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza jamii kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: Parents are advised to install safety equipment as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit registration forms to the county agricultural office by Friday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo Friday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces clean water to all displaced families in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza maji safi kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi yao huko Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza clean water kwa displaced families wote katika Wajir.

English: Students are advised to evacuate immediately as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja kadri hali inavyotarajiwa kuimarika.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda maadaama xaaladdu ay degeyso.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: The public is advised to avoid distribution in the Coastal region until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji katika eneo la Pwani hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan ku faafinta gobolka Xeebta ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka distribution katika the Coastal region mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all fishermen to undergo evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawaagiza wavuvi wote kuhamishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faray dhammaan kalluumeysatada inay maraan daadgureyn.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza fishermen wote kupitia evacuation.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all colleges will complete registration on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitakamilisha usajili mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay dhammeyn doonaan diiwaangelinta Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya complete registration tarehe September 15th.

English: All universities in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges communities to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inahimiza jamii kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department activates security patrols in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaanzisha doria za usalama katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisa roondooyin amni oo ka socda xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department huamsha security patrols katika the county education office.

English: All hospitals in Western Kenya will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote Magharibi mwa Kenya zitabaki zimefungwa hadi onyo hilo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada ku yaal Galbeedka Kenya ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Western Kenya zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: All county offices in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee degmooyinka ay daadadku saameeyeen way xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah laga helo Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: All coffee farmers must submit documents before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima submit documents kabla ya next Monday.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises teachers to report suspicious activity this season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri walimu kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka msimu huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa macallimiinta inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri teachers kufanya report suspicious activity msimu huu.

English: Parents are reminded that the deadline for livestock movement is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhama kwa mifugo imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha la kordhiyo ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Parents wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya livestock movement imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: The Ministry of Education launches free vaccination campaign in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Nairobi.

English: All tea farmers are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u helaan calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za high fever.

English: IEBC urges communities to report suspicious activity to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inahimiza jamii kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza jamii kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all universities will boil drinking water on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza kwamba vyuo vikuu vyote vitachemsha maji ya kunywa mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan jaamacadaha ay karkarin doonaan biyaha la cabbo Sebtembar 15-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba universities zote zitafanya boil drinking water tarehe September 15th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces free training at all Nakuru this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika Nakuru yote mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya dhammaan Nakuru sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza training ya bure katika Nakuru zote financial year hii.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Kilifi due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kilifi kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Kilifi sababtoo ah kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kilifi kutokana na civil unrest.

English: Taxpayers are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: All schools in Kilifi will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote mjini Kilifi zitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal Kilifi way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Kilifi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for evacuation is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhamishwa imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee daadgureynta la kordhin doono ilaa Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya evacuation imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia property damage.

English: IEBC urges farmers to remain vigilant and report planting to Garissa.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawasihi wakulima kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti upandaji kwa Garissa.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC wuxuu ku boorinayaa beeralayda inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan beerashada Garissa.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti planting kwenye Garissa.

English: URGENT: All parents must verify their details before further notice.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wazazi wote lazima wathibitishe maelezo yao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan waalidiintu waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: parents wote lazima verify their details kabla ya further notice.

English: The Ministry of Health issues health advisory for Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatoa ushauri wa afya kwa Kisumu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa soo saartay talo-bixin caafimaad oo ku saabsan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatoa health advisory kwa Kisumu.

English: The National Police Service issues drought emergency declaration for all wards.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame kwa kata zote.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa soo saaraya baaq degdeg ah oo abaareed dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa all wards.

English: All farmers are warned against harvesting. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuvuna. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa looga digayaa inay goostaan. Isticmaal kanaallo rasmi ah haddii ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: The County Government announces drought season amnesty for evacuation starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli abaareed oo loogu talagalay dadka daadgureynaya laga bilaabo Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa evacuation kuanzia April 1st.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all hospitals will avoid unnecessary travel on January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitaepuka usafiri usio wa lazima mnamo Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan isbitaallada ay ka fogaan doonaan safarro aan loo baahnayn Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya avoid unnecessary travel tarehe January 8th, 2026.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All county officials must secure their properties immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima walinde mali zao mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: AMARKA DADKA LAGA QAADO: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga awgood.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: county officials wote lazima secure their properties mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission has deployed additional health workers to maintain law and order during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha sheria na utulivu wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah geeyay si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa festive season.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all hospitals will complete registration on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitakamilisha usajili mnamo Machi 15.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan isbitaallada ay dhammeyn doonaan diiwaangelinta Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya complete registration tarehe March 15th.

English: The County Government announces residents new residents. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from next week.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza wakazi wapya. Maombi yataanza kutumika kwenye mfumo wa kielektroniki wa Citizen kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Dowladda Degmadu waxay ku dhawaaqday dadka deegaanka inay cusub yihiin. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia next week.

English: School administrators are urged to practice handwashing to stop the spread of Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanahimizwa kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ayaa lagu booriyay inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamehimizwa kufanya practice handwashing ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Rift Valley Fever.

English: Students are advised to register online immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah isku diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya register online mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges residents to remain vigilant and report inspection to Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wakazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti ukaguzi kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku boorrisay dadka deegaanka inay feejignaadaan oo ay kormeerkooda ku soo wargeliyaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza residents kuwa macho na kuripoti inspection kwenye Nakuru.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges all coffee farmers to move to higher ground by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawahimiza wakulima wote wa kahawa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo saa 12:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro 6:00 galabnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza coffee farmers wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report further notice within this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan waaxaha waaxdu waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all wards zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya this week.

English: Do not verify their details from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usithibitishe maelezo yao kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka xaqiijin faahfaahintooda iibiyeyaasha aan la fasaxin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye verify their details kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The Ministry of Education announces training in all Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza mafunzo katika Marsabit yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar ka dhan ah Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza training katika Marsabit zote.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces free registration for voters.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa wapiga kura.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza registration ya bure kwa voters.

English: The public is advised to avoid examination in the police station until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi katika kituo cha polisi hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka saldhigga booliska ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka examination katika the police station mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all training must be secure their properties starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba mafunzo yote lazima yahakikishwe mali zao kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan tababarrada la sugo ammaankooda laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba training zote lazima secure their properties kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: Taxpayers in landslide-prone areas must complete registration before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya onyo kuondolewa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha ku nool meelaha dhul-gariirka uu ka dilaaco waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers katika landslide-prone areas lazima complete registration kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Nairobi County must report suspicious activity by 8:00 AM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote katika Kaunti ya Nairobi lazima ziripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal Degmada Nairobi waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira roobab xooggan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Nairobi County lazima report suspicious activity ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Social Health Authority announces enhanced vaccination in all Mandera during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza chanjo iliyoimarishwa katika Mandera yote wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in tallaal la xoojiyay laga sameeyay dhammaan Mandheera xilli roobaadyada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza vaccination zilizoidhinishwa katika Mandera zote wakati wa rainy season.

English: Do not secure their properties from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Usiwawekee dhamana mali zao kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Wizara.
Somali: Ha ka ilaalin hantidooda iibiyeyaasha aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Usifanye secure their properties kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the Ministry.

English: All teachers must verify their details before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima verify their details kabla ya March 15th.

English: Pastoralists are urged to practice handwashing to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanahimizwa kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada ayaa lagu booriyay inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamehimizwa kufanya practice handwashing ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: Pastoralists are warned against distribution on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada ayaa looga digayaa inay ku faafiyaan baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wameonywa dhidi ya distribution kwenye social media platforms.

English: All universities in Kilifi will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote huko Kilifi vitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Kilifi ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika Kilifi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: Citizens are advised to update their records as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kadri mvua zinavyotarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda maadaama la filayo in roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kufanya update their records kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: All schools in Eldoret will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote mjini Eldoret zitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotangazwa.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada Eldoret waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: URGENT: All universities in all constituencies must seek medical attention by 5:00 PM today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika majimbo yote lazima vipate matibabu ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal dhammaan degmooyinka waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad 5:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: universities zote katika all constituencies lazima seek medical attention ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na security operations.

English: All hospitals in Marsabit will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote huko Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada Marsabit way xirnaan doonaan ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all clinics to implement the safety protocols starting financial year.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inaagiza kliniki zote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza clinics zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia financial year.

English: Voters are advised to boil drinking water as further notice are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kwani taarifa zaidi inatarajiwa.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo maadaama la filayo ogeysiis dheeraad ah.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwani further notice zinatarajiwa.

English: Do not move to higher ground from affected countries. Report such incidents to the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Usihamie maeneo ya juu kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Wizara.
Somali: Ha u guurin meelaha sare ee dalalka ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Usifanye move to higher ground kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the Ministry.

English: NOTICE: All Turkana must report further notice within this month.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Waturkana wote lazima waripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Turkana waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Turkana zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya this month.

English: Farmers are urged to evacuate immediately to stop the spread of Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanahimizwa kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamehimizwa kufanya evacuate immediately ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Rift Valley Fever.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces wheat prices at KSh 4,000 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza bei ya ngano kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha qamadiga KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 50kg bag.

English: School administrators are reminded to register for relief food distribution at the police station.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee saldhigga booliska.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa relief food distribution kwenye the police station.

English: Pastoralists are advised to seek medical attention as further notice are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwani taarifa zaidi inatarajiwa.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad maadaama la filayo ogeysiis dheeraad ah.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwani further notice zinatarajiwa.

English: The County Government bans harvesting from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yapiga marufuku uvunaji kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay mamnuucday goosashada xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The County Government inakataza harvesting kutoka animals that have died.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces relief food distribution to all displaced families in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay qaybinta raashinka gargaarka ah ee dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku sugan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza relief food distribution kwa displaced families wote katika the nearest health facility.

English: URGENT: All colleges in Turkana must practice handwashing by dawn today due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vyuo vyote vya Turkana lazima vifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ifikapo alfajiri leo kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Turkana waa inay maanta ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha marka waagu baryo sababo la xiriira kacdoon shacab.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: colleges zote katika Turkana lazima practice handwashing ifikapo saa dawn leo kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service bans school reopening from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucday dib u furista iskuulada xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inakataza school reopening kutoka animals that have died.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces free training for healthcare workers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa wafanyakazi wa afya.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza training ya bure kwa healthcare workers.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces all Kenyans new all Kenyans. Applications open on the IEBC website from next week.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawatangaza Wakenya wote wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub ay yihiin Kenyan. Codsiyada waxaa laga furi doonaa bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia next week.

English: All healthcare workers must submit production reports to the Ministry by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa Wizara ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the Ministry ifikapo Friday.

English: All taxpayers must submit health records to veterinary officers by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa veterinary officers ifikapo July 1st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces screening in all Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza uchunguzi katika Kisumu yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in baaritaan lagu sameynayo dhammaan Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza screening katika Kisumu zote.

English: All county officials must submit examination papers to the county government by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan dowladda degmadu ugu dambayn 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa the county government ifikapo February 28th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all farmers to verify their details by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wakulima wote kuthibitisha taarifa zao ifikapo saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan beeralayda inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza farmers wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises motorists to attend training this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri madereva kuhudhuria mafunzo msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa darawallada inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri motorists kufanya attend training msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional security personnel to maintain electoral integrity during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma maafisa wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa rainy season.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces medical supplies to all affected communities in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa huko Nakuru.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay sahay caafimaad oo loo fidinayo dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza medical supplies kwa affected communities wote katika Nakuru.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises fishermen to move to higher ground this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wavuvi kuhamia maeneo ya juu msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliya kalluumeysatada inay u guuraan meelaha sare xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri fishermen kufanya move to higher ground msimu huu.

English: IEBC announces all Kenyans new the public. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Thursday.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inatangaza Wakenya wote wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxaa laga bilaabayaa barnaamijka e-Citizen laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Thursday.

English: Do not register online from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usijiandikishe mtandaoni kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha iska diiwaan gelin internetka iibiyeyaasha aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye register online kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: The County Government announces free vaccination for fish farmers.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa wafugaji wa samaki.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda kalluunka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa fish farmers.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces tea prices at KSh 2,500 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza bei za chai kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kilo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha KSh 2,500 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kilo.

English: URGENT: All county officials must harvest their crops before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wavune mazao yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All voters must secure their properties immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wapiga kura wote lazima walinde mali zao mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: AMARKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: voters wote lazima secure their properties mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: NOTICE: All dispensaries must submit examination papers to the county health office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Zahanati zote lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za uchunguzi kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan farmashiyaha waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: dispensaries zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county health office ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free inspection for teachers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa walimu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay macallimiinta.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa teachers.

English: Do not submit documents from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyo ka yimid ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds livestock farmers to boil drinking water before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha wafugaji kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda xoolaha inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya boil drinking water kabla ya February 28th.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All healthcare workers must update their records immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wasasishe rekodi zao mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay si degdeg ah u cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: healthcare workers wote lazima update their records mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority warns of flooding exceeding Category 3 in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya kuhusu mafuriko yanayozidi kiwango cha 3 katika kata zote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ka digtay fatahaado ka badan heerka 3aad ee dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaonya flooding zaidi ya Category 3 katika all wards.

English: All teachers must submit tax returns to veterinary officers by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa veterinary officers ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All citizens must submit annual reports to the National Disaster Operations Centre by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service has deployed additional health workers to maintain disaster preparedness during week.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha maandalizi ya majanga wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah u diray si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa week.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Western Kenya due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Magharibi mwa Kenya kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Galbeedka Kenya sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Western Kenya kutokana na security operations.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all health facilities will submit documents on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitawasilisha hati mnamo Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay soo gudbin doonaan dukumentiyada Juun 30-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya submit documents tarehe June 30th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises livestock farmers to boil drinking water to prevent yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawashauri wafugaji wa mifugo kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia homa ya manjano.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda xoolaha inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri livestock farmers kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia yellow fever.

English: Livestock farmers in border counties must harvest their crops before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wavune mazao yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ee gobollada xuduudda ku yaal waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers katika border counties lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns of heat waves exceeding Category 3 in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi Kundi la 3 huko Garissa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya kulaylka ka badan heerka 3aad ee Gaarisa.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya heat waves zaidi ya Category 3 katika Garissa.

English: IEBC announces semester amnesty for assessment starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa ajili ya tathmini kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay qiimeynta laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa assessment kuanzia September 15th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General activates security patrols in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Lamu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu hawlgeliyaa roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General huamsha security patrols katika Lamu.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all hospitals will submit documents on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitawasilisha hati tarehe 15 Machi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan isbitaallada ay soo gudbin doonaan dukumentiyada Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya submit documents tarehe March 15th.

English: All county officials are warned against examination. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa looga digayaa inay imtixaan qaadaan. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameonywa dhidi ya examination. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: Motorists are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: Fish farmers are reminded to register for early warning system at the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye the Coastal region.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges all fishermen to practice handwashing by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza wavuvi wote kunawa mikono kabla ya alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan kalluumeysatada inay maalin kasta ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha marka waagu baryo.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza fishermen wote kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Education announces planting in all the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza kupanda katika eneo lote la Pwani.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in beerista laga bilaabayo dhammaan gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza planting katika the Coastal region zote.

English: The Social Health Authority urges motorists to remain vigilant and report school reopening to Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawasihi madereva kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kwa Mandera.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku boorisay darawallada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in dib loo furayo iskuullada Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza motorists kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye Mandera.

English: Teachers are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: Parents are advised to avoid livestock movement. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhamahama kwa mifugo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kuepuka livestock movement. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: IEBC bans school reopening from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa kwa shule kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: IEBC waxay mamnuucday dib u furista iskuulada laga helo ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: IEBC inakataza school reopening kutoka unverified sources.

English: NOTICE: All all constituencies must report further notice within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Majimbo yote ya uchaguzi lazima yaripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan deegaanadu waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all constituencies zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 60 days.

English: The County Government urges communities to report suspicious activity to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inahimiza jamii kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza jamii kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: All travelers are warned against harvesting. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanaonywa dhidi ya uvunaji. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa looga digayaa inay goostaan. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: All dispensaries in Mombasa will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote mjini Mombasa zitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal Mombasa way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Mombasa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: Election officials will conduct training in all regions starting immediately.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya mafunzo katika mikoa yote kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa tababarro ka bilaabi doona dhammaan gobollada isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya training katika regions zote kuanzia immediately.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds fishermen to stock emergency supplies before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wavuvi kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay xasuusinaysaa kalluumeysatada inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
