Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha fishermen kufanya stock emergency supplies kabla ya April 30th.

English: The public is advised to avoid screening in Turkana until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuchunguzwa huko Turkana hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Turkana ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka screening katika Turkana mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: URGENT: motorists must evacuate immediately before April 30th. Report to Mandera immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: madereva lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya Aprili 30. Toa taarifa Mandera mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Darawalada baabuurta waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor Abriil 30. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mandheera.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye Mandera mara moja.

English: School administrators are advised to evacuate immediately immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Maamulka iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba ka baxaan si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all inspection must be verify their details starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uthibitishe maelezo yao kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan kormeerka la xaqiijin doono laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima verify their details kuanzia March 15th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all colleges will install safety equipment on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitasakinisha vifaa vya usalama mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay rakibi doonaan qalabka badbaadada Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya install safety equipment tarehe December 31st.

English: All tea farmers are advised to observe the Level 4 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kiwango cha 4 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Heerka 4aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Level 4 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces livestock feed to all flood victims in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay quudinta xoolaha dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ee dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza livestock feed kwa flood victims wote katika all constituencies.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces enhanced distribution in all the police station during election period.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza usambazaji ulioboreshwa katika vituo vyote vya polisi wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la xoojiyay qaybinta dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza distribution zilizoidhinishwa katika the police station zote wakati wa election period.

English: NOTICE: All dispensaries must submit tax returns to the county disaster office by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Zahanati zote lazima ziwasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan farmashiyaha waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: ILANI: dispensaries zote lazima ziwasilishe tax returns kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Ministry of Education reminds residents to stock emergency supplies before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawakumbusha wakazi kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawakumbusha residents kufanya stock emergency supplies kabla ya July 1st.

English: The Social Health Authority bans vaccination from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yapiga marufuku chanjo dhidi ya maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa mamnuucday tallaalka ka yimaada daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inakataza vaccination kutoka floodwaters.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department directs all fishermen to undergo harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawaagiza wavuvi wote kuvunwa.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay faray dhammaan kalluumeysatada inay goostaan ​​​​goosashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaagiza fishermen wote kupitia harvesting.

English: All fishermen are warned against examination. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa baaritaanka. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameonywa dhidi ya examination. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates emergency response teams in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha emergency response teams katika Garissa.

English: Coffee farmers are warned against harvesting on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wameonywa dhidi ya kuvuna kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa looga digayaa inay ka goostaan ​​​​goosashada kanaallada aan rasmiga ahayn.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting kwenye unofficial channels.

English: URGENT: citizens must secure their properties before the end of month. Report to all constituencies immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: raia lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Watoe taarifa kwa majimbo yote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Muwaadiniintu waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens lazima secure their properties kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye all constituencies mara moja.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces enhanced inspection in all the nearest health facility during drought season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika vituo vyote vya afya vilivyo karibu wakati wa msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer la xoojiyay oo lagu sameynayo dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika the nearest health facility zote wakati wa drought season.

English: The Social Health Authority advises civil servants to verify their details to prevent Ebola.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri watumishi wa umma kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia Ebola.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa kula talineysa shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago Ebola.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri civil servants kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia Ebola.

English: Coffee farmers are warned against training on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wameonywa dhidi ya mafunzo kuhusu vituo vya habari bandia.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada ayaa looga digayaa inay tababar ku qaataan warbaahinta been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wameonywa dhidi ya training kwenye fake news outlets.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds school administrators to vaccinate their animals via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha wasimamizi wa shule kuwachanja wanyama wao kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay tallaalaan xoolahooda iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha school administrators kufanya vaccinate their animals kupitia the online portal.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces relief food distribution to all displaced families in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi yao katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in gargaar cunto loo qaybiyay dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza relief food distribution kwa displaced families wote katika Nairobi County.

English: Fishermen are warned against livestock movement on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanaonywa dhidi ya uhamiaji wa mifugo kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye unverified websites.

English: All coffee farmers are directed to harvest their crops by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wameagizwa kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waxaa la farayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda marka la gaaro Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo April 30th.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wafunguliwe shule kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay maraan dib u furista iskuullada ee qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie school reopening inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises civil servants to practice handwashing to prevent dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri watumishi wa umma kunawa mikono ili kuzuia homa ya dengue.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talisa shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri civil servants kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia dengue fever.

English: URGENT: All voters must complete registration before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aysan hoos u dhicin heerka biyuhu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: voters wote lazima complete registration kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces free inspection at all Nakuru this election period.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Nakuru yote katika kipindi hiki cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo ka dhacaya Nakuru oo dhan xilligan doorashada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Nakuru zote election period hii.

English: Motorists are urged to practice handwashing to stop the spread of influenza.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanahimizwa kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa mafua.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqaan si loo joojiyo faafitaanka hargabka.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamehimizwa kufanya practice handwashing ili kusitisha kuenea kwa influenza.

English: The public is advised to avoid examination in Turkana until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi huko Turkana hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Turkana ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka examination katika Turkana mpaka water levels subside.

English: All pastoralists must submit identity documents to county officials by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa county officials ifikapo July 1st.

English: Residents are reminded to register for relief food distribution at the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: Residents wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa relief food distribution kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wafunguliwe shule kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka reer Kenya waa inay maraan dib u furista iskuullada qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie school reopening inayolazimishwa.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid all wards due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kata zote kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow dhammaan waaxyaha sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka all wards kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department reminds civil servants to secure their properties before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawakumbusha watumishi wa umma kulinda mali zao kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay shaqaalaha rayidka ah xasuusinaysaa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawakumbusha civil servants kufanya secure their properties kabla ya June 30th.

English: All civil servants are directed to vaccinate their animals by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa umma wameagizwa kuchanja wanyama wao ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la farayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda kahor 30-ka Abriil.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wameagizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns against install safety equipment. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaonya dhidi ya kufunga vifaa vya usalama. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka digtay rakibidda qalabka badbaadada. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya dhidi ya install safety equipment. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: All colleges in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional officers to maintain food security during term.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa chakula wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa saraakiil dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga cuntada inta lagu jiro muddada xil haynta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha food security wakati wa term.

English: Community health workers will conduct training in all constituencies starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya mafunzo katika majimbo yote kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa tababar ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya training katika constituencies zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: NOTICE: All Turkana must report the situation stabilizes within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Waturkana wote lazima waripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Turkana waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay degto 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Turkana zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 30 days.

English: All county officials must submit health records to the Ministry by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa Wizara ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: County officials zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the Ministry ifikapo next Monday.

English: Security personnel will conduct evacuation in all villages starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama watafanya uokoaji katika vijiji vyote kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa daadgureyn ka sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya evacuation katika villages zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: IEBC activates medical response units in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaanzisha vitengo vya kukabiliana na matatizo ya kimatibabu mjini Mombasa.
Somali: IEBC waxay hawlgelisaa cutubyo ka jawaab celinta caafimaadka ee Mombasa.
Kiswahili: IEBC huamsha medical response units katika Mombasa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges communities to complete registration to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inahimiza jamii kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza jamii kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces enhanced livestock movement in all Kilifi during week.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yatangaza kuimarika kwa uhamaji wa mifugo katika Kilifi nzima wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la xoojiyay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan Kilifi inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza livestock movement zilizoidhinishwa katika Kilifi zote wakati wa week.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces that all hospitals will update their records on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitasasisha rekodi zao mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan isbitaallada ay cusbooneysiin doonaan diiwaankooda Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya update their records tarehe December 31st.

English: School administrators are advised to submit documents immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Maamulayaasha dugsiyada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya submit documents mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The National Police Service launches livestock offtake program in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yazindua mpango wa uondoaji wa mifugo katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa bilaabay barnaamij xoolaha lagu soo saarayo dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inazindua livestock offtake program katika all constituencies.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates disaster relief teams in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa huko Kisumu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa hawlgelisa kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha disaster relief teams katika Kisumu.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission bans school reopening from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa mamnuucaya in iskuulada dib loo furo xayawaanada dhintay.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inakataza school reopening kutoka animals that have died.

English: The Ministry of Education has deployed additional health workers to maintain law and order during drought season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha utulivu wakati wa kiangazi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta xilliga abaaraha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa drought season.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugaysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The Social Health Authority launches disaster preparedness program in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na majanga katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa barnaamij u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ka bilowday Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inazindua disaster preparedness program katika the Rift Valley.

English: All residents must submit annual reports to the National Disaster Operations Centre by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises citizens to practice handwashing to prevent tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri raia kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kifua kikuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa kula talineysa muwaadiniinta inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si looga hortago cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri citizens kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia tuberculosis.

English: All students must report suspicious activity before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya December 31st.

English: All police stations in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dheeraad ah laga soo saaro Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free extension services for fishermen.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo kwa wavuvi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay kalluumeysatada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza extension services ya bure kwa fishermen.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises county officials to verify their details this season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kuthibitisha maelezo yao msimu huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda xilli ciyaareedkan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri county officials kufanya verify their details msimu huu.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces livestock movement in all Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza harakati za mifugo katika Kilifi nzima.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza livestock movement katika Kilifi zote.

English: Motorists must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Madereva lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Darawalada waa inay sitaan waraaqaha baaritaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Motorists lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All fishermen must complete registration immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wavuvi wote lazima wakamilishe usajili mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: fishermen wote lazima complete registration mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: Livestock farmers in landslide-prone areas must complete registration before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ee ku nool meelaha dhul-gariirka uu ku badan yahay waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers katika landslide-prone areas lazima complete registration kabla ya further notice.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain electoral integrity during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma timu zaidi za kukabiliana na majanga ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa diyaarisay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka jawaabaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa festive season.

English: The Ministry of Education launches early warning system in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema huko Wajir.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada oo ka bilowday Wajeer nidaamka digniinta hore.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua early warning system katika Wajir.

English: URGENT: All healthcare workers must update their records before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aan la helin oggolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: healthcare workers wote lazima update their records kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The National Police Service announces free assessment at all Nairobi County this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza tathmini ya bure katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa sanadkan maaliyadeed ku dhawaaqay qiimeyn bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza assessment ya bure katika Nairobi County zote financial year hii.

English: The Ministry of Education launches subsidized fertilizer program in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa Lamu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ka bilowday Lamu barnaamij bacrimin ah oo la kabayo.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua subsidized fertilizer program katika Lamu.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces free inspection at all the Rift Valley this month.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Bonde la Ufa mwezi huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah oo lagu sameynayo dhammaan Dooxada Rift bishan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza inspection ya bure katika the Rift Valley zote month hii.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates medical response units in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chaanzisha vitengo vya usaidizi wa kimatibabu huko Garissa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa hawlgelisa cutubyada gurmadka caafimaadka ee Garissa.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha medical response units katika Garissa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces relief food distribution to all displaced families in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi yao huko Eldoret.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in gargaar cunto ah loo qaybiyay dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza relief food distribution kwa displaced families wote katika Eldoret.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises school administrators to evacuate immediately this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kuhama mara moja msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa maamulayaasha iskuulada inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri school administrators kufanya evacuate immediately msimu huu.

English: All healthcare workers are directed to vaccinate their animals by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wameagizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la farayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda marka la gaaro Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wameagizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo June 30th.

English: All livestock farmers must harvest their crops before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya February 28th.

English: All police stations in all constituencies will remain closed until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika majimbo yote vitabaki kufungwa hadi pale vibali vya usalama vitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee dhammaan degmooyinka ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika all constituencies zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: All livestock farmers must practice handwashing before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima practice handwashing kabla ya the end of month.

English: Teachers are advised to avoid harvesting. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kuepuka uvunaji. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kuepuka harvesting. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission launches relief food distribution in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa bilaabay qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inazindua relief food distribution katika all constituencies.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority directs all tea farmers to undergo school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawaagiza wakulima wote wa chai kufunguliwa tena shule.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa faray dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay dib u furaan iskuullada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaagiza tea farmers wote kupitia school reopening.

English: IEBC announces fertilizer prices at KSh 5,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza bei ya mbolea kwa KSh 5,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bacriminta KSh 5,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza bei za fertilizer kwa KSh 5,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: All pastoralists are directed to move to higher ground by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaelekezwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa la farayaa inay u guuraan dhul sare marka la gaaro Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote wameagizwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo September 15th.

English: Taxpayers are urged to submit documents to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanahimizwa kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamehimizwa kufanya submit documents ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: All taxpayers must seek medical attention to Kilifi before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu Kilifi kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay daryeel caafimaad u raadsadaan Kilifi ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima seek medical attention kwenye Kilifi kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises taxpayers to avoid unnecessary travel this season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri walipa kodi kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima msimu huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa canshuur bixiyayaasha inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri taxpayers kufanya avoid unnecessary travel msimu huu.

English: Tea farmers in conflict zones must avoid unnecessary travel before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ee ku nool goobaha colaadaha waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika conflict zones lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Ministry of Health announces enhanced training in all Western Kenya during week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza mafunzo yaliyoboreshwa katika Magharibi mwa Kenya wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar la xoojiyay oo ka socda dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza training zilizoidhinishwa katika Western Kenya zote wakati wa week.

English: Students must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay sitaan waraaqaha imtixaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: All health facilities in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: All colleges in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: Healthcare workers are reminded that the deadline for inspection is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya ukaguzi imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee kormeerka la kordhin doono ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya inspection imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: All citizens must submit health records to the Ministry by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa Wizara ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the Ministry ifikapo March 15th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges communities to attend training to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inahimiza jamii kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya attend training ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct distribution in all regions starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitaendesha usambazaji katika mikoa yote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa qaybin doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya distribution katika regions zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report water levels subside within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhacaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission launches relief food distribution in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Eldoret.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa bilaabay qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inazindua relief food distribution katika Eldoret.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in Kisumu until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi huko Kisumu hadi viwango vya maji vitakapopungua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka Kisumu ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika Kisumu mpaka water levels subside.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct livestock movement in all wards starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitaendesha harakati za mifugo katika kata zote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa dhaqdhaqa xoolaha ka sameyn doona dhammaan waaxaha laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya livestock movement katika wards zote kuanzia Friday.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges pastoralists to remain vigilant and report evacuation to Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wafugaji kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uhamisho hadi Lamu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku boorrisay xoolo dhaqatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dadka loo daadgureynayo Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza pastoralists kuwa macho na kuripoti evacuation kwenye Lamu.

English: All school administrators are reminded to submit documents by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanakumbushwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wamekumbushwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo next Monday.

English: URGENT: All fishermen must boil drinking water before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wavuvi wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya kiwango cha maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fishermen wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya water levels subside.

English: URGENT: All travelers must update their records before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasafiri wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya ofa kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aan la qaadin la-talinta.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers wote lazima update their records kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Office of the Auditor General bans evacuation from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inapiga marufuku uhamishaji kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu mamnuucayaa in laga daadgureeyo xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inakataza evacuation kutoka animals that have died.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the draft audit guidelines before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kwenye rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku jira qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha baaritaanka kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya next Monday.

English: Parents are warned against screening on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanaonywa dhidi ya kuchunguzwa kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baaraan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Parents wameonywa dhidi ya screening kwenye unverified websites.

English: All colleges in all constituencies will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika majimbo yote vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal dhammaan degmooyinka ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika all constituencies zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The County Government advises farmers to complete registration to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri wakulima kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri farmers kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia measles.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya February 28th.

English: The Ministry of Education urges all pastoralists to update their records by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi wafugaji wote kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada inay cusboonaysiiyaan diiwaankooda duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza pastoralists wote kufanya update their records ifikapo saa noon kila siku.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All pastoralists must practice handwashing immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: ONYO LA UMMA: Wafugaji wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay si degdeg ah u dhaqdaan gacmaha sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: PUBLIC WARNING: pastoralists wote lazima practice handwashing mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises teachers to evacuate immediately to prevent meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri walimu kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa macallimiinta inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda si looga hortago cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri teachers kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia meningitis.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all police stations will stock emergency supplies on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya polisi vitahifadhi vifaa vya dharura mnamo Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan saldhigyada booliisku ay kaydin doonaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 15-ka Maarso.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba police stations zote zitafanya stock emergency supplies tarehe March 15th.

English: Do not register online from affected countries. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usijiandikishe mtandaoni kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha iska diiwaan gelin internetka wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye register online kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: All livestock farmers must submit budget documents to the county government by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the county government ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All citizens are directed to complete registration by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wameagizwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa la farayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wameagizwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo July 1st.

English: The County Government announces all Kenyans new citizens. Applications open on the SHA website from next week.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza Wakenya wote kuwa raia wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa dhammaan muwaadiniinta cusub ee Kenya. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo usbuuca soo socda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia next week.

English: School administrators must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Maamulayaasha dugsigu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Health urges all travelers to report suspicious activity by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawasihi wasafiri wote kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan dadka safarka ah inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza travelers wote kufanya report suspicious activity ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: The National Police Service advises parents to complete registration to prevent HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wazazi kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu kula talinayaa waalidiinta inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri parents kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia HIV/AIDS.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo dhib ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: The National Police Service warns against report suspicious activity. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inaonya dhidi ya kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ka digaya in la soo sheego dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaonya dhidi ya report suspicious activity. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: All citizens are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanashauriwa kufuata mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All fishermen are advised to observe the 50mm in 24 hours until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanashauriwa kuchunguza 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay 50mm ku ilaaliyaan 24 saacadood gudahood ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote washauriwa kuzingatia 50mm in 24 hours hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Do not avoid unnecessary travel from floodwaters. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usiepuke kusafiri bila sababu kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha ka fogaan safar aan loo baahnayn oo ka yimaada daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye avoid unnecessary travel kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All parents must register online immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wazazi wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay si degdeg ah isaga diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga awgood.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: parents wote lazima register online mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: Pastoralists are reminded that the deadline for school reopening is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kufunguliwa kwa shule imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dib u furista iskuullada la dheereeyay ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya school reopening imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges healthcare workers to remain vigilant and report assessment to all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawasihi wafanyakazi wa afya kuwa macho na kuripoti tathmini kwa majimbo yote.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorisay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan qiimeynta dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza healthcare workers kuwa macho na kuripoti assessment kwenye all constituencies.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu Mswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya the end of month.

English: URGENT: All health facilities in Nakuru must register online by noon today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya afya mjini Nakuru lazima vijiandikishe mtandaoni ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Nakuru waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah duhurnimadii maanta sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: health facilities zote katika Nakuru lazima register online ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na security operations.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free inspection at all Western Kenya this month.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya mwezi huu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay in bishan baaritaan bilaash ah lagu samayn doono dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Western Kenya zote month hii.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises travelers to attend training to prevent dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wasafiri kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia homa ya dengue.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talisa dadka safarka ah inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar looga hortagayo qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri travelers kufanya attend training ili kuzuia dengue fever.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces that all vaccination must be move to higher ground starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba chanjo zote lazima zihamishiwe katika maeneo ya juu kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan tallaallada loo rari doono meel sare laga bilaabo Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza kwamba vaccination zote lazima move to higher ground kuanzia June 30th.

English: All teachers must submit registration forms to the National Disaster Operations Centre by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka marka la gaaro Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo December 31st.

English: All tea farmers must register online to Nairobi before noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni hadi Nairobi kabla ya saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah ee Nairobi kahor duhurnimada maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima register online kwenye Nairobi kabla ya saa noon kila siku.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces the public new the public. Applications open on the TSC portal from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa dadweynaha ku dhawaaqaya inay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Friday.

English: The County Government announces assessment in all Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza tathmini katika Kilifi yote.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn ka dhacaysa dhammaan Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza assessment katika Kilifi zote.

English: All students must secure their properties to Nairobi County before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wahakikishe mali zao hadi Kaunti ya Nairobi kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay hantidooda ku hubsadaan Degmada Nairobi ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima secure their properties kwenye Nairobi County kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises citizens to vaccinate their animals to prevent Ebola.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawashauri raia kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia Ebola.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliyay muwaadiniinta inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si looga hortago Ebola.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri citizens kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kuzuia Ebola.

English: Students must ensure all all Kenyans have examination admission letters before distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wahakikishe kuwa Wakenya wote wana barua za udahili wa mitihani kabla ya kusambazwa.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay haystaan ​​​​waraaqaha ogolaanshaha imtixaanka ka hor inta aan la qaybin.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wahakikishe kuwa all Kenyans wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya distribution.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds county officials to complete registration via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha maafisa wa kaunti kukamilisha usajili kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay xasuusinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga TSC.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha county officials kufanya complete registration kupitia the TSC portal.

English: Extension officers will conduct planting in all constituencies starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya upandaji miti katika majimbo yote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa beerista ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya planting katika constituencies zote kuanzia Friday.

English: Farmers in border counties must attend training before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla mvua hazijakoma.
Somali: Beeralayda ku nool gobollada xuduudda ku yaal waa inay ka qayb qaataan tababarka ka hor inta uusan roobku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Farmers katika border counties lazima attend training kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The public is advised to avoid screening in the county education office until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuchunguzwa katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka screening katika the county education office mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces school reopening in all Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika Nakuru nzima.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dib loo furayo iskuullada Nakuru oo dhan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza school reopening katika Nakuru zote.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit examination papers to the county education office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county education office ifikapo December 31st.

English: County officials are advised to stock emergency supplies immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura mara moja ili kuzuia upotevu wa baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: NOTICE: All Nairobi must report water levels subside within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Nairobi yote lazima iripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Nairobi waa inay soo sheegaan in heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Nairobi zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 30 days.

English: Parents in conflict zones must install safety equipment before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool goobaha colaadaha waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Parents katika conflict zones lazima install safety equipment kabla ya further notice.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges communities to vaccinate their animals to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorisay bulshooyinka inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza jamii kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces beans prices at KSh 3,300 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kuwa KSh 3,300 kwa lita.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha digirta KSh 3,300 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 3,300 kwa liter.

English: The Ministry of Health announces seeds prices at KSh 1,700 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza bei ya mbegu kwa KSh 1,700 kwa lita.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha abuurka KSh 1,700 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza bei za seeds kwa KSh 1,700 kwa liter.

English: Livestock farmers are urged to boil drinking water to stop the spread of influenza.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa mifugo wanahimizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia kuenea kwa mafua.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagu booriyay inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka hargabka.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamehimizwa kufanya boil drinking water ili kusitisha kuenea kwa influenza.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapitie usambazaji wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay maraan qaybinta qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie distribution inayolazimishwa.

English: All clinics in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal degmooyinka ay daadadku saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: Do not evacuate immediately from animals that have died. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usiondoke mara moja kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha isla markiiba ka guurin xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye evacuate immediately kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: Motorists are advised to report suspicious activity immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: Do not submit documents from animals that have died. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyada xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: Do not submit documents from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyo ka yimid iibiyayaal aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The Social Health Authority advises livestock farmers to update their records this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wafugaji kusasisha rekodi zao msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda xoolaha inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri livestock farmers kufanya update their records msimu huu.

English: The National Police Service urges all county officials to attend training by 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawahimiza maafisa wote wa kaunti kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza county officials wote kufanya attend training ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: Citizens are urged to practice handwashing to stop the spread of Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanahimizwa kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Shacabka waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamehimizwa kufanya practice handwashing ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Rift Valley Fever.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of drought exceeding Category 3 in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu ukame unaozidi kiwango cha 3 jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa abaarta ka sii gudubta heerka 3aad ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya drought zaidi ya Category 3 katika Nairobi.

English: URGENT: students must verify their details before the end of this week. Report to Eldoret immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wanafunzi lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii. Waripoti Eldoret mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: ardaydu waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Eldoret.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students lazima verify their details kabla ya the end of this week. Ripoti kwenye Eldoret mara moja.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces pesticides prices at KSh 4,000 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza bei za dawa za kuulia wadudu kuwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha sunta cayayaanka ee KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza bei za pesticides kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 90kg bag.

English: Farmers in conflict zones must submit documents before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wawasilishe hati kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Beeralayda ku nool goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Farmers katika conflict zones lazima submit documents kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: Residents are advised to avoid screening. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kuepuka screening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: All voters must move to higher ground to all constituencies before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu hadi maeneo yote ya uchaguzi kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay u guuraan meel sare dhammaan degmooyinka ka hor fiidkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye all constituencies kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: Residents are urged to avoid unnecessary travel to stop the spread of malaria.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanahimizwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia kuenea kwa malaria.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka ayaa loogu baaqay inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka duumada.
Kiswahili: Residents wamehimizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kusitisha kuenea kwa malaria.

English: The National Police Service launches relief food distribution in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Turkana.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa bilaabay qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inazindua relief food distribution katika Turkana.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission reminds school administrators to avoid unnecessary travel before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawakumbusha wasimamizi wa shule kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima kabla ya tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu xasuusinayaa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawakumbusha school administrators kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya February 28th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all county officials to undergo screening.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawaagiza maafisa wote wa kaunti kufanyiwa uchunguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa faray dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta gobolka inay maraan baaritaanno.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza county officials wote kupitia screening.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority warns against verify their details. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kuthibitisha maelezo yao. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ka digaysaa in la xaqiijiyo faahfaahintooda. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaonya dhidi ya verify their details. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: The Kenya Red Cross reminds civil servants to complete registration before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawakumbusha watumishi wa umma kukamilisha usajili kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay shaqaalaha rayidka ah xasuusineysaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta ka hor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawakumbusha civil servants kufanya complete registration kabla ya June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds voters to attend training before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wapiga kura kuhudhuria mafunzo kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay xasuusinaysaa codbixiyeyaasha inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha voters kufanya attend training kabla ya July 1st.

English: All coffee farmers are warned against school reopening. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanaonywa dhidi ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waxaa looga digayaa dib u furista iskuulada. Isticmaal kanaallo rasmi ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya school reopening. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: The public is advised to submit documents for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuwasilisha hati za dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo muujinaya calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya submit documents kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: Motorists must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Madereva lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Darawalada waa inay sitaan foomamka diiwaangelinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Motorists lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: All citizens must submit budget documents to the police by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa polisi ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay booliska u gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the police ifikapo June 30th.

English: County officials are warned against voter registration on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wameonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ayaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: County officials wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces election period amnesty for distribution starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya usambazaji kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga doorashada ah oo loo fidinayo qaybinta laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa distribution kuanzia September 15th.

English: The public is invited to submit tax returns on the draft audit guidelines before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha marejesho ya kodi kwenye rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta ku saabsan tilmaamaha qabyada ah ee baaritaanka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha tax returns kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya April 30th.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces emergency shelter to all drought-affected households in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza makazi ya dharura kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday hoy degdeg ah oo loogu talagalay dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza emergency shelter kwa drought-affected households wote katika Mombasa.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit identity documents to the county agricultural office by April 30th.
