Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Aprili.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada ugu dambayn Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo April 30th.

English: All pastoralists are directed to practice handwashing by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaelekezwa kunawa mikono ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa la farayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan marka la gaaro Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote wameagizwa kufanya practice handwashing ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission launches free vaccination campaign in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Wajir.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilaabay Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Wajir.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional officers to maintain health security during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa shaqaaleysiisay saraakiil dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka inta lagu jiro muddada xilhaynta.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa term.

English: The County Government warns of drought exceeding extreme in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya kuhusu ukame uliokithiri sana huko Turkana.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolka ayaa ka digaysa abaar aad u daran oo ka jirta Turkana.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya drought zaidi ya extreme katika Turkana.

English: Teachers are advised to register online immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni mara moja ili kuzuia upotevu wa mazao baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah isku diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kufanya register online mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority bans inspection from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa mamnuucday baaritaanka xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inakataza inspection kutoka animals that have died.

English: All fish farmers are reminded to register online by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya register online ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department reminds livestock farmers to evacuate immediately via the IEBC website.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawakumbusha wafugaji kuhama mara moja kupitia tovuti ya IEBC.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa beeralayda xoolaha inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka ee IEBC.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya evacuate immediately kupitia the IEBC website.

English: The Ministry of Health issues weather warning for Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Garissa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatoa weather warning kwa Garissa.

English: Travelers are advised to avoid vaccination. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuepuka chanjo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska ilaaliyaan tallaalka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kuepuka vaccination. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: Civil servants are advised to report suspicious activity within this month.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya this month.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority bans vaccination from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama imepiga marufuku chanjo kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa mamnuucday tallaalka ka imanaya waddamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inakataza vaccination kutoka affected countries.

English: Do not update their records from affected countries. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usisasishe rekodi zao kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha cusbooneysiin diiwaankooda dalalka ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye update their records kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces maize prices at KSh 1,700 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza bei ya mahindi kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha galleyda KSh 1,700 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza bei za maize kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.

English: Civil servants are advised to avoid unnecessary travel immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: Tea farmers are warned against vaccination on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wameonywa dhidi ya chanjo kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ayaa looga digayaa tallaalka kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: Residents must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay sitaan foomamka diiwaangelinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: Farmers are warned against examination on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa looga digayaa inay baaritaan ku sameeyaan kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Farmers wameonywa dhidi ya examination kwenye unofficial channels.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report further notice within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan waaxaha waaxdu waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all wards zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 30 days.

English: All fish farmers are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Motorists are advised to submit documents immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya submit documents mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all inspection must be stock emergency supplies starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uwe wa vifaa vya dharura kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan kormeerka ay tahay inay noqdaan agabyada gurmadka degdegga ah laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Teachers Service Commission directs all farmers to undergo evacuation.

English: The Ministry of Health warns against attend training. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inaonya dhidi ya kuhudhuria mafunzo. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka digtay ka qaybgalka tababarka. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaonya dhidi ya attend training. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: All school administrators are directed to vaccinate their animals by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wameagizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la farayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda kahor 30-ka Abriil.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote wameagizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo April 30th.

English: Do not report suspicious activity from floodwaters. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usiripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha soo sheegin dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo oo ka imanaya daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dawladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye report suspicious activity kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges communities to report suspicious activity to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza jamii kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: URGENT: residents must avoid unnecessary travel before January 8th. Report to Kilifi immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakazi lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya Januari 8. Toa taarifa Kilifi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: dadka deegaanka waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Kilifi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye Kilifi mara moja.

English: Residents are advised to stock emergency supplies within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah bishaan gudaheed.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya this month.

English: The County Government warns of wildfires exceeding critical in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya kuhusu moto wa nyikani unaozidi kuwa mbaya katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka digaysaa in dab-damis aad u daran uu ka dhaco xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya wildfires zaidi ya critical katika the nearest health facility.

English: The Ministry of Education advises taxpayers to submit documents to prevent tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri walipa kodi kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kifua kikuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa canshuur bixiyayaasha inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri taxpayers kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia tuberculosis.

English: Motorists are reminded that the deadline for inspection is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya ukaguzi imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee kormeerka la kordhin doono ilaa Ogosto 1.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya inspection imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: URGENT: All civil servants must harvest their crops before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wavune mazao yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: civil servants wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The public is advised to practice handwashing for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kunawa mikono kwa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si ay u helaan calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: All voters must harvest their crops to Mombasa before 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wavune mazao yao hadi Mombasa kabla ya saa 12:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay dalagooda u goostaan ​​Mombasa ka hor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima harvest their crops kwenye Mombasa kabla ya saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates medical response units in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa huanzisha vitengo vya usaidizi wa kimatibabu katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay hawlgelisaa cutubyada wax ka qabashada caafimaadka ee ku yaal xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha medical response units katika the nearest health facility.

English: NOTICE: All all constituencies must report the situation stabilizes within this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Majimbo yote ya uchaguzi lazima yaripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan degmooyinka waa inay soo sheegaan in xaaladdu ay degtay toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all constituencies zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya this week.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns of wildfires exceeding 100mm in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chaonya kuhusu moto wa nyikani unaozidi milimita 100 katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ka digaysa dab-damisyo ka kacaya Degmada Nairobi oo ka badan 100mm.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya wildfires zaidi ya 100mm katika Nairobi County.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional disaster response teams to maintain public safety during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma timu za ziada za kukabiliana na majanga ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa geysay kooxo dheeraad ah oo ka hortagaya masiibooyinka si ay u ilaaliyaan badbaadada dadweynaha xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka disaster response teams wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa festive season.

English: URGENT: fish farmers must install safety equipment before the end of month. Report to Turkana immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wafugaji wa samaki lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Watoe taarifa kwa Turkana mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Turkana.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fish farmers lazima install safety equipment kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye Turkana mara moja.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces distribution in all the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza usambazaji katika eneo lote la Pwani.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay in qaybinta laga sameeyay dhammaan gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza distribution katika the Coastal region zote.

English: School administrators are advised to avoid examination. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuepuka mitihani. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan imtixaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kuepuka examination. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The Teachers Service Commission issues drought emergency declaration for Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatoa tamko la dharura la ukame kwa Mandera.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa soo saaray baaq degdeg ah oo ku saabsan abaarta ka jirta Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatoa drought emergency declaration kwa Mandera.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises voters to report suspicious activity to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri wapiga kura kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay kula talineysaa codbixiyeyaasha inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri voters kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia measles.

English: All residents must move to higher ground to the Coastal region before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu hadi eneo la Pwani kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay u guuraan dhul sare oo u dhow gobolka Xeebta ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye the Coastal region kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: The Kenya Red Cross issues weather warning for Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Kilifi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatoa weather warning kwa Kilifi.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises travelers to complete registration to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wasafiri kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa dadka safarka ah inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri travelers kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia measles.

English: All health facilities in Nairobi will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya jijini Nairobi vitabaki kufungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Nairobi ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika Nairobi zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The public is advised to avoid voter registration in the Rift Valley until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura katika Bonde la Ufa hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee Rift Valley ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka voter registration katika the Rift Valley mpaka further notice.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges communities to complete registration to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inahimiza jamii kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free malaria screening for students.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa wanafunzi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay baaritaan bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay ardayda oo loogu talagalay duumada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa students.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to move to higher ground to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay u dhaqaaqaan meelaha sare si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: All fishermen are directed to secure their properties by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wameagizwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la farayaa inay sugaan hantidooda Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameagizwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo Friday.

English: All county officials are directed to stock emergency supplies by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wameagizwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la farayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameagizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges communities to attend training to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorisay bulshooyinka inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza jamii kufanya attend training ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit examination papers to the county disaster office by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za uchunguzi kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces free vaccination for fishermen.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa wavuvi.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay kalluumeysatada.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa fishermen.

English: All colleges in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro vitasalia kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi na serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay dowladda degmadu.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: All parents must submit documents to Mandera before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati kwa Mandera kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay dukumentiyada u soo gudbiyaan Mandheera ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima submit documents kwenye Mandera kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: Healthcare workers must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wabebe kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay had iyo jeer hayaan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: IEBC advises citizens to seek medical attention to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri raia kutafuta matibabu ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talineysaa muwaadiniinta inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri citizens kufanya seek medical attention ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: The public is advised to move to higher ground for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meel sare si ay u dareemaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo adag.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All parents must report suspicious activity immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wazazi wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay isla markiiba soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo oo ay ugu wacan tahay heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: parents wote lazima report suspicious activity mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: Do not submit documents from unverified sources. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyo ka yimid ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: All universities in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: The National Drought Management Authority directs all taxpayers to undergo training.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawaagiza walipa kodi wote kupata mafunzo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa faray dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay tababar qaataan.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaagiza taxpayers wote kupitia training.

English: Voters are advised to practice handwashing immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kunawa mikono mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u dhaqdaan gacmaha si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The National Police Service announces clean water to all displaced families in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza maji safi kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi yao huko Lamu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay biyo nadiif ah dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Lamu.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza clean water kwa displaced families wote katika Lamu.

English: Civil servants must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda mar walba.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Kilifi due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kilifi kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Kilifi sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kilifi kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku jira Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga ee Degmada ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya March 15th.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges pastoralists to remain vigilant and report harvesting to the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza wafugaji kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji kwa Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa xoolo-dhaqatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan goosashada ay u dirayaan Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza pastoralists kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces that all training must be seek medical attention starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba mafunzo yote lazima yatafute huduma ya matibabu kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan tababarrada la raadin doono daryeel caafimaad laga bilaabo 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza kwamba training zote lazima seek medical attention kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises students to boil drinking water this season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inawashauri wanafunzi kuchemsha maji ya kunywa msimu huu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ardayda kula taliyay inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri students kufanya boil drinking water msimu huu.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces that all schools will move to higher ground on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza kwamba shule zote zitahamia katika ngazi ya juu mnamo Machi 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan iskuullada ay u guuri doonaan meelaha sare bisha Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza kwamba schools zote zitafanya move to higher ground tarehe March 15th.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture reminds school administrators to move to higher ground via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawakumbusha wasimamizi wa shule kuhamia katika ngazi za juu kupitia SMS.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay xasuusinaysaa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay u guuraan meelaha sare iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawakumbusha school administrators kufanya move to higher ground kupitia SMS.

English: The public is advised to avoid voter registration in the police station until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura katika kituo cha polisi hadi onyo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee saldhigga booliiska ilaa laga qaadayo talada.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka voter registration katika the police station mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All coffee farmers must harvest their crops immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wavune mazao yao mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya tishio la usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay si degdeg ah u gurtaan dalagyadooda sababtoo ah qiimaynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: coffee farmers wote lazima harvest their crops mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces cash transfers to all drought-affected households in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza uhamisho wa pesa taslimu kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Kisumu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday lacago loogu wareejinayo dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza cash transfers kwa drought-affected households wote katika Kisumu.

English: IEBC directs all school administrators to undergo harvesting.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawaagiza wasimamizi wote wa shule kupitia uvunaji.
Somali: IEBC waxay faray dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka inay sameeyaan goosashada.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaagiza school administrators wote kupitia harvesting.

English: Farmers must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Beeraleydu waa inay sitaan waraaqaha baaritaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Farmers lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Education warns of earthquakes exceeding critical in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi makubwa kupita kiasi katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay ka digaysaa dhulgariirro aad u daran oo ka dhaca dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya critical katika all constituencies.

English: The National Police Service urges healthcare workers to remain vigilant and report school reopening to the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawasihi wafanyakazi wa afya kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku boorriyay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan dib u furista iskuulka xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza healthcare workers kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye the nearest health facility.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges all motorists to attend training by midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi madereva wote kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan darawallada inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza motorists wote kufanya attend training ifikapo saa midnight kila siku.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds travelers to seek medical attention via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wasafiri kutafuta matibabu kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka ee TSC.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha travelers kufanya seek medical attention kupitia the TSC portal.

English: Fishermen are warned against livestock movement on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanaonywa dhidi ya uhamiaji wa mifugo kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye unverified websites.

English: Pastoralists are advised to avoid unnecessary travel within this week.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ndani ya this week.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all screening must be avoid unnecessary travel starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima uepukwe kusafiri bila lazima kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan baaritaannada laga fogaado safarro aan loo baahnayn oo bilaabanaya 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba screening zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia June 30th.

English: Farmers in border counties must harvest their crops before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: Beeralayda ku nool gobollada xuduudda waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Farmers katika border counties lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises farmers to report suspicious activity this season.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wakulima kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka msimu huu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa beeraleyda inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri farmers kufanya report suspicious activity msimu huu.

English: IEBC advises fish farmers to install safety equipment this season.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wafugaji wa samaki kufunga vifaa vya usalama msimu huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda kalluunka inay xilligan rakibaan qalabka badbaadada.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri fish farmers kufanya install safety equipment msimu huu.

English: The County Government announces election period amnesty for school reopening starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis muddada doorashada ah oo ku aaddan dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa school reopening kuanzia June 30th.

English: All residents must submit identity documents to the National Disaster Operations Centre by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo March 15th.

English: Do not move to higher ground from floodwaters. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Usihamie kwenye ardhi ya juu kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha u guurin dhul sare oo ka fog biyaha daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye move to higher ground kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: Tea farmers in drought-prone regions must boil drinking water before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika maeneo yenye ukame lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ee gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika drought-prone regions lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The public is advised to avoid training in Kisumu until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo huko Kisumu hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka Kisumu ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.

English: All students must submit identity documents to the National Disaster Operations Centre by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department reminds farmers to harvest their crops via email.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawakumbusha wakulima kuvuna mazao yao kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay beeralayda xasuusinaysaa inay dalagooda ku goostaan ​​emayl ahaan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawakumbusha farmers kufanya harvest their crops kupitia email.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority bans distribution from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yapiga marufuku usambazaji kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa mamnuucday qaybinta biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inakataza distribution kutoka floodwaters.

English: The Social Health Authority announces that all harvesting must be complete registration starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inatangaza kwamba uvunaji wote lazima uwe usajili kamili kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan goosashada ay tahay inay si dhammaystiran u diiwaan gashan tahay laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima complete registration kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: Citizens are advised to avoid voter registration. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kuepuka voter registration. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza bei za nyama kwa KSh 3,300 kwa tani.

Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza bei za meat kwa KSh 3,300 kwa ton.

English: The Ministry of Education warns against update their records. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaonya dhidi ya kusasisha rekodi zao. Msisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ka digaysaa in la cusbooneysiiyo diiwaankooda. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.

English: Do not practice handwashing from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmahaaga alaab-qeybiyeyaasha aan la fasaxin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: Travelers are advised to register online as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kadri hali inavyotulia inavyotarajiwa.

Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya register online kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: The public is advised to install safety equipment for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si loo yareeyo calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya install safety equipment kwa dalili za persistent cough.

Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wachanje mifugo yao kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya December 31st.

English: URGENT: travelers must evacuate immediately before April 30th. Report to Marsabit immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wasafiri lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya Aprili 30. Toa taarifa kwa Marsabit mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: dadka safarka ah waa inay isla markiiba ka baxaan ka hor Abriil 30keeda. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Marsabit.

English: All residents must submit production reports to veterinary officers by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.

Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns against verify their details. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inaonya dhidi ya kuthibitisha maelezo yao. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.

Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya dhidi ya verify their details. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces enhanced inspection in all Garissa during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika Garissa yote wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.

Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika Garissa zote wakati wa financial year.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces drought season amnesty for distribution starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa usambazaji kuanzia Agosti 1.

English: The public is advised to attend training for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo kwa ajili ya dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar ku saabsan calaamadaha neefsashada oo adkaata.

English: URGENT: civil servants must complete registration before March 15th. Report to all wards immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Watumishi wa umma lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Machi 15. Waripoti kwa wadi zote mara moja.

English: IEBC directs all government offices to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting month.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inaagiza ofisi zote za serikali kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: IEBC waxay faray dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida bisha bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaagiza government offices zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia month.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report water levels subside within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.

Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya next Monday.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all school administrators to undergo screening.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawaagiza wasimamizi wote wa shule kufanyiwa uchunguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faray dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulada inay maraan baaritaan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza school administrators wote kupitia screening.

English: All residents must vaccinate their animals to Kilifi before 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawachanje wanyama wao hadi Kilifi kabla ya saa 6:00 jioni kila siku.

English: Parents in conflict zones must register online before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool meelaha colaaduhu ka jiraan waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan online ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced vaccination in all the county education office during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza chanjo iliyoimarishwa katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in tallaal la xoojiyay laga sameeyay dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza vaccination zilizoidhinishwa katika the county education office zote wakati wa financial year.

English: URGENT: coffee farmers must secure their properties before the end of month. Report to all wards immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wa kahawa lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Watoe taarifa kwa kata zote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda qaxwada waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba soo wargeli dhammaan waaxaha.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: coffee farmers lazima secure their properties kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye all wards mara moja.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All fishermen must install safety equipment immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: ONYO KWA UMMA: Wavuvi wote lazima wafunge vifaa vya usalama mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.

English: URGENT: All school administrators must secure their properties before water levels subside.

Kiswahili: HARAKA: school administrators wote lazima secure their properties kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The National Police Service advises residents to evacuate immediately to prevent bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wakazi kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia kichocho.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliyay dadka deegaanka inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago bilharzia.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri residents kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia bilharzia.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service launches livestock offtake program in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yazindua mpango wa kuchukua mifugo kutoka kwa mifugo katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa bilaabay barnaamij xoolaha lagu soo saaro oo ka socda Dooxada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inazindua livestock offtake program katika the Rift Valley.

English: Do not submit documents from affected countries. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumentiyo ka yimid wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the police station due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kituo cha polisi kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow saldhigga booliiska sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the police station kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The public is advised to practice handwashing for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kunawa mikono kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si ay u helaan calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwa dalili za body aches.

English: Teachers in conflict zones must report suspicious activity before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Walimu katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Macallimiinta ku sugan goobaha colaadaha waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Teachers katika conflict zones lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya the rains stop.

English: Fish farmers are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Kilifi.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Kilifi.

English: All parents are warned against voter registration. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission directs all colleges to implement the digital literacy program starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inaelekeza vyuo vyote kutekeleza mpango wa uandishi wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa faraya dhammaan kulliyadaha inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaagiza colleges zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia drought season.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises pastoralists to install safety equipment to prevent meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri wafugaji kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa xoolo-dhaqatada inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago cudurka qoorgooyaha.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri pastoralists kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia meningitis.

English: Do not evacuate immediately from animals that have died. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usiondoke mara moja kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha isla markiiba ka guurin xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye evacuate immediately kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: All clinics in Mandera will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote huko Mandera zitabaki zimefungwa hadi onyo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Mandheera ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa laga qaado talada.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika Mandera zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: Travelers must ensure all the public have registration documents before inspection.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri lazima wahakikishe umma wote wana hati za usajili kabla ya ukaguzi.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynuhu ay haystaan ​​​​dukumeentiyo diiwaangelin ah ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Travelers lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana registration documents kabla ya inspection.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all vaccination must be practice handwashing starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza kwamba chanjo zote lazima zifanyike kwa kunawa mikono kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan tallaallada ay tahay in lagu dhaqo gacmaha laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba vaccination zote lazima practice handwashing kuanzia March 15th.

English: All travelers are reminded to move to higher ground by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises parents to submit documents this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wazazi kuwasilisha hati msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliya waalidiinta inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri parents kufanya submit documents msimu huu.

English: Travelers in border counties must stock emergency supplies before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah ee ku sugan gobollada xuduudda waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor inta aan la helin oggolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Travelers katika border counties lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: URGENT: All taxpayers must attend training before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Walipa kodi wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya ushauri kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: taxpayers wote lazima attend training kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: Travelers must carry identity documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri lazima wabebe hati za utambulisho wakati wote.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waa inay sitaan dukumentiyo aqoonsi mar walba.
Kiswahili: Travelers lazima wabebe identity documents wakati wote.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free inspection for county officials.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa county officials.

English: URGENT: All livestock farmers must harvest their crops before further notice.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya further notice.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all police stations to implement the digital literacy program starting semester.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linaelekeza vituo vyote vya polisi kutekeleza mpango wa uandishi wa habari kidijitali kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ku amartay inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka qorista iyo qorista dijitaalka ah ee bilowga simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza police stations zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia semester.

English: Voters are advised to move to higher ground within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kuhamia katika ngazi za juu ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare muddo 90 maalmood gudahood ah.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya 90 days.

English: All taxpayers must submit tax returns to the Ministry by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Wizara ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Wasaaradda dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers zote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the Ministry ifikapo the end of month.

English: Teachers are warned against distribution on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay faafiyaan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Teachers wameonywa dhidi ya distribution kwenye unverified websites.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges citizens to remain vigilant and report distribution to Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza raia kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti usambazaji kwa Eldoret.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa muwaadiniinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan qaybinta dadkaas Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza citizens kuwa macho na kuripoti distribution kwenye Eldoret.

English: Coffee farmers are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: URGENT: travelers must report suspicious activity before Friday. Report to Mombasa immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wasafiri lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Ijumaa. Waripoti Mombasa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: dadka safarka ah waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Jimcaha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Mombasa.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya Friday. Ripoti kwenye Mombasa mara moja.

English: All schools in Mombasa will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote mjini Mombasa zitabaki kufungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotangazwa.
Somali: Dhammaan iskuullada Mombasa ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Mombasa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The Kenya Red Cross bans evacuation from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya lapiga marufuku uhamishaji kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucday in laga daadgureeyo ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inakataza evacuation kutoka unverified sources.

English: URGENT: All county offices in Nakuru must boil drinking water by 8:00 AM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti mjini Nakuru lazima zichemshe maji ya kunywa ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmada Nakuru waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika Nakuru lazima boil drinking water ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The National Police Service warns against register online. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inaonya dhidi ya kujiandikisha mtandaoni. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ka digaya in la iska diiwaan geliyo internetka. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaonya dhidi ya register online. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: County officials must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay wakhti kasta qaadaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: The public is advised to avoid vaccination in the Coastal region until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka chanjo katika eneo la Pwani hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tallaalka gobolka Xeebta ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka vaccination katika the Coastal region mpaka further notice.

English: The public is advised to complete registration for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kukamilisha usajili kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya complete registration kwa dalili za high fever.

English: All citizens must submit registration forms to county officials by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa county officials ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Office of the Auditor General bans assessment from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inapiga marufuku tathmini kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu mamnuucayaa qiimeynta laga qaado iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inakataza assessment kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: Livestock farmers are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa huko Kilifi.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Kilifi.

English: All taxpayers are reminded to update their records by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanakumbushwa kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya update their records ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission bans livestock movement from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inapiga marufuku usafirishaji wa mifugo kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa mamnuucay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee ka imanaya waddamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inakataza livestock movement kutoka affected countries.

English: Tea farmers are reminded that the deadline for planting is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kupanda imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga beerista la kordhinayo ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya planting imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture launches relief food distribution in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Garissa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inazindua relief food distribution katika Garissa.

English: The Ministry of Health activates security patrols in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha doria za usalama katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgelisa roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Dooxada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha security patrols katika the Rift Valley.

English: IEBC urges taxpayers to remain vigilant and report livestock movement to Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawasihi walipa kodi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kuhusu uhamiaji wa mifugo katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC wuxuu ku boorinayaa canshuur bixiyayaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza taxpayers kuwa macho na kuripoti livestock movement kwenye Nairobi County.

English: The public is invited to submit production reports on the proposed health regulations before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha ripoti za uzalishaji kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha production reports kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya April 30th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all assessment must be evacuate immediately starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba tathmini zote lazima ziondolewe mara moja kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qiimeynta la daadgureynayo isla markiiba laga bilaabo Agoosto 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba assessment zote lazima evacuate immediately kuanzia August 1st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority issues curfew notice for Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa soo saartay ogeysiis bandow ah oo ka dhan ah Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatoa curfew notice kwa Nairobi County.

English: URGENT: All teachers must vaccinate their animals before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Walimu wote lazima wawachanje wanyama wao kabla ya kiwango cha maji kupungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers wote lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Teachers are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: All hospitals in the Coastal region will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote katika eneo la Pwani zitabaki zimefungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada gobolka Xeebta ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika the Coastal region zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: All civil servants are reminded to boil drinking water by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanakumbushwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka la gaaro 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wamekumbushwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo July 1st.

English: URGENT: All coffee farmers must move to higher ground before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: coffee farmers wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces meat prices at KSh 3,300 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza bei za nyama kuwa KSh 3,300 kwa kilo.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha hilibka KSh 3,300 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza bei za meat kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kilo.

English: All fishermen are directed to secure their properties by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wameagizwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la farayaa inay sugaan hantidooda Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wameagizwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo Friday.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanku uu ku eg yahay Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: Fish farmers are urged to avoid unnecessary travel to stop the spread of yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanahimizwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya manjano.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa lagu booriyay inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si loo joojiyo faafitaanka qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamehimizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kusitisha kuenea kwa yellow fever.

English: All travelers must submit health records to the police by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa polisi ifikapo Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay booliska u gudbiyaan diiwaanka caafimaadka kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Travelers zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the police ifikapo February 28th.

English: URGENT: All hospitals in all wards must harvest their crops by 5:00 PM today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Hospitali zote katika wodi zote lazima zivune mazao yao ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan isbitaallada dhammaan waaxyaha waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda 5:00 PM maanta sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: hospitals zote katika all wards lazima harvest their crops ifikapo saa 5:00 PM leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: URGENT NOTICE: All livestock farmers must move to higher ground immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: OGAYSIIS DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan dhul sare sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: URGENT NOTICE: livestock farmers wote lazima move to higher ground mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All residents must report suspicious activity immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wakazi wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay si degdeg ah u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo oo ay ugu wacan tahay hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: residents wote lazima report suspicious activity mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: All schools in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay booliiska.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: URGENT: All livestock farmers must update their records before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers wote lazima update their records kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: IEBC launches disaster preparedness program in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na majanga mjini Nakuru.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC ayaa bilaabay barnaamij u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: IEBC inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Nakuru.

English: The National Police Service directs all hospitals to implement the safety protocols starting semester.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inaagiza hospitali zote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu farayaa dhammaan isbitaallada inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo simistarka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza hospitals zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia semester.

English: All parents must submit documents before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima submit documents kabla ya April 30th.

English: The National Police Service advises students to install safety equipment to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wanafunzi kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu kula talinayaa ardayda inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri students kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: The public is advised to avoid evacuation in Kilifi until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuhama huko Kilifi hadi kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan daadgureynta Kilifi ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka evacuation katika Kilifi mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The County Government announces free vaccination for teachers.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa walimu.
