Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay macallimiinta.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa teachers.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces citizens new all Kenyans. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza raia wapya wote wa Kenya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa muwaadiniinta cusub ee dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: All fish farmers are advised to observe the extreme until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanashauriwa kuzingatia hali iliyokithiri hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si taxaddar leh u eegaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia extreme hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The public is advised to register online for diarrhea symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kwa dalili za kuhara.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha shubanka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya register online kwa dalili za diarrhea.

English: Voters in conflict zones must practice handwashing before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: Codbixiyeyaasha ku sugan goobaha colaadaha waa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Voters katika conflict zones lazima practice handwashing kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: All pastoralists must submit registration forms to county officials by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists zote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa county officials ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of earthquakes exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi yanayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariirro ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood ka dhaca Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika Western Kenya.

English: The Teachers Service Commission directs all county offices to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting semester.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inaagiza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia muhula wa kwanza.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida simistarka bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia semester.

English: Do not verify their details from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usithibitishe maelezo yao kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha ka xaqiijin faahfaahintooda ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye verify their details kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The Ministry of Education launches free vaccination campaign in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo mjini Kisumu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Kisumu.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of strong winds exceeding 100mm in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu upepo mkali unaozidi milimita 100 huko Turkana.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa dabeylo xooggan oo ka badan 100mm oo ka dhacaya Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya strong winds zaidi ya 100mm katika Turkana.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges motorists to remain vigilant and report examination to Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi madereva kuwa macho na kuripoti uchunguzi wao kwa Lamu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay darawallada inay feejignaadaan oo ay baaritaanka Lamu ku soo wargeliyaan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza motorists kuwa macho na kuripoti examination kwenye Lamu.

English: All clinics in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: The County Government launches livestock offtake program in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yazindua mpango wa ufugaji wa mifugo huko Turkana.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka bilowday barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaado Turkana.
Kiswahili: The County Government inazindua livestock offtake program katika Turkana.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the draft audit guidelines before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kwenye rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku qoran qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha hanti-dhawrka ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya June 30th.

English: Citizens are urged to practice handwashing to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanahimizwa kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Shacabka waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamehimizwa kufanya practice handwashing ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Kilifi due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kilifi kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Kilifi sababo la xiriira roobab culus.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Kilifi kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Ministry of Health issues curfew notice for Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Marsabit.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa soo saartay ogeysiis bandow ah oo ku saabsan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatoa curfew notice kwa Marsabit.

English: Residents are urged to update their records to stop the spread of meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanahimizwa kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa meningitis.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: Residents wamehimizwa kufanya update their records ili kusitisha kuenea kwa meningitis.

English: Healthcare workers are warned against harvesting on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wameonywa dhidi ya kuvuna kwenye vituo vya habari bandia.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ayaa looga digayaa inay ka goostaan ​​​​wararka been abuurka ah ee laga soo saaro goobaha wararka.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting kwenye fake news outlets.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces free inspection at all all wards this festive season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika kata zote msimu huu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan bilaash ah dhammaan waaxyaha xilligan ciida.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza inspection ya bure katika all wards zote festive season hii.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns of earthquakes exceeding severe in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chaonya kuhusu matetemeko ya ardhi makubwa zaidi huko Marsabit.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ka digaysa dhulgariirro aad u daran oo ka dhaca Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya earthquakes zaidi ya severe katika Marsabit.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all harvesting must be verify their details starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza kwamba uvunaji wote lazima uthibitishwe taarifa zao kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan goosashada la xaqiijin doono laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima verify their details kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: All fish farmers must stock emergency supplies to the Rift Valley before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura katika Bonde la Ufa kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay kaydiyaan sahayda degdegga ah ee Dooxada Rift ka hor fiidkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima stock emergency supplies kwenye the Rift Valley kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces enhanced livestock movement in all Wajir during election period.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza kuimarika kwa harakati za mifugo katika Wajir nzima wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Wajeer oo dhan inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza livestock movement zilizoidhinishwa katika Wajir zote wakati wa election period.

English: The Office of the Auditor General reminds healthcare workers to update their records via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kusasisha rekodi zao kupitia jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu xasuusinayaa shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah ee Citizen.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya update their records kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: IEBC announces free registration at all the Rift Valley this month.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza usajili wa bure katika Bonde la Ufa mwezi huu.
Somali: Guddiga Doorashada ee IEBC ayaa bishan ku dhawaaqay isdiiwaangelin bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza registration ya bure katika the Rift Valley zote month hii.

English: The County Government announces medical supplies to all affected communities in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa jamii zote zilizoathiriwa katika wadi zote.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan bulshooyinka ay dhibaatadu saameysey ee ku nool dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza medical supplies kwa affected communities wote katika all wards.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges communities to stock emergency supplies to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inahimiza jamii kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: Tea farmers must carry annual reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wabebe ripoti za mwaka wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay sitaan warbixinno sannadeed mar walba.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wabebe annual reports wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Education directs all government offices to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaagiza ofisi zote za serikali kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia ujuzi kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay faray dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaagiza government offices zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia drought season.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges communities to submit documents to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inahimiza jamii kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza jamii kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: All schools in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame zitabaki kufungwa hadi Wizara itakapotoa taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All pastoralists must report suspicious activity immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wafugaji wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay si degdeg ah u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo oo ay sababeen roobab xooggan.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: pastoralists wote lazima report suspicious activity mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: Taxpayers are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanku uu ku eg yahay Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission issues evacuation order for Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatoa agizo la kuhamishwa Mombasa.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa soo saaray amar lagu daadgureynayo dadka ku nool Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatoa evacuation order kwa Mombasa.

English: IEBC reminds tea farmers to submit documents via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawakumbusha wakulima wa chai kuwasilisha hati kupitia jukwaa la e-Citizen.
Somali: IEBC waxay xasuusineysaa beeraleyda shaaha inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka e-Citizen.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawakumbusha tea farmers kufanya submit documents kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: URGENT: residents must report suspicious activity before April 30th. Report to the police station immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakazi lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Aprili 30. Waripoti kituo cha polisi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: dadka deegaanka waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Abriil 30keeda. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye the police station mara moja.

English: Voters are urged to update their records to stop the spread of bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanahimizwa kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kichocho.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka bilharzia.
Kiswahili: Voters wamehimizwa kufanya update their records ili kusitisha kuenea kwa bilharzia.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All parents must harvest their crops immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wazazi wote lazima wavune mazao yao mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya tishio la usalama.
Somali: AMARKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay isla markiiba gurtaan dalagyadooda sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: parents wote lazima harvest their crops mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission bans distribution from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yapiga marufuku usambazaji kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa mamnuucaya qaybinta biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inakataza distribution kutoka floodwaters.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates disaster relief teams in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha disaster relief teams katika the county education office.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges communities to practice handwashing to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inahimiza jamii kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces wheat prices at KSh 2,500 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza bei ya ngano kuwa KSh 2,500 kwa tani.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha qamadiga KSh 2,500 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 2,500 kwa ton.

English: The Office of the Auditor General has deployed additional security personnel to maintain public safety during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali imewatuma maafisa wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah u diray si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga dadweynaha xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa festive season.

English: The Social Health Authority announces distribution in all Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza usambazaji katika Kilifi yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dadka laga qaybin doono dhammaan Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza distribution katika Kilifi zote.

English: All fishermen are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay fiiro gaar ah u yeeshaan xaaladda degdegga ah ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises students to install safety equipment to prevent influenza.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wanafunzi kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia mafua.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa ardayda inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago hargabka.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri students kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia influenza.

English: The Ministry of Education directs all clinics to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaagiza kliniki zote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay faray dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida bisha bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaagiza clinics zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia month.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all hospitals to implement the digital literacy program starting festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaagiza hospitali zote kutekeleza mpango wa uelewa wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay faraysaa dhammaan isbitaallada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza hospitals zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia festive season.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nairobi sababo la xiriira qalalaase sokeeye.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi kutokana na civil unrest.

English: All universities in Eldoret will remain closed until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vikuu vyote mjini Eldoret vitasalia kufungwa hadi pale kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan jaamacadaha ku yaal Eldoret waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Universities zote katika Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority advises pastoralists to move to higher ground to prevent typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawashauri wafugaji kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa kula talinaysa xoolo dhaqatada inay u guuraan meelaha sare si looga hortago cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inashauri pastoralists kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia typhoid.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces meat prices at KSh 4,000 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza bei za nyama kuwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha hilibka KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza bei za meat kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 50kg bag.

English: The County Government activates security patrols in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Lamu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay hawlgalinaysaa roondooyin amni oo ka socda Lamu.
Kiswahili: The County Government huamsha security patrols katika Lamu.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces voter registration in all Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza usajili wa wapiga kura katika Nakuru nzima.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee dhammaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza voter registration katika Nakuru zote.

English: The public is advised to avoid examination in Nairobi until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi jijini Nairobi hadi kibali cha usalama kitakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Nairobi ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka examination katika Nairobi mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: All farmers are warned against vaccination. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanaonywa dhidi ya chanjo. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa looga digayaa tallaalka. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: Community health workers will conduct vaccination in all counties starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya chanjo katika kaunti zote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa tallaalka ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya vaccination katika counties zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: Fish farmers are advised to secure their properties immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns of flooding exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yaonya kuhusu mafuriko yanayozidi 50mm katika saa 24 katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya daadad ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood ka dhaca Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya flooding zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika the Rift Valley.

English: The public is advised to report suspicious activity for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo haddii ay la kulmaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo adkaata.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: Taxpayers are reminded that the deadline for distribution is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usambazaji imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee qaybinta la kordhin doono ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya distribution imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: Voters in flood-prone areas must verify their details before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku u nugul yihiin waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Voters katika flood-prone areas lazima verify their details kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: URGENT: All citizens must verify their details before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniintu waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima verify their details kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The Office of the Auditor General warns of strong winds exceeding Category 3 in Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yaonya kuhusu upepo mkali unaozidi kiwango cha 3 huko Lamu.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ka digaya dabeylo xooggan oo ka gudbaya Qaybta 3aad ee Lamu.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaonya strong winds zaidi ya Category 3 katika Lamu.

English: All government offices in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa mas'uuliyiinta degmadu.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces distribution in all Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza usambazaji katika Turkana yote.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday inay ku baahsan tahay dhammaan Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza distribution katika Turkana zote.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds parents to register online before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wazazi kujiandikisha mtandaoni kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay waalidiinta xasuusineysaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha parents kufanya register online kabla ya December 31st.

English: NOTICE: All Kilifi must report the advisory is lifted within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Wakilifi wote lazima waripoti kwamba onyo litaondolewa ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Kilifi waa inay soo sheegaan in la qaadayo la-talinta 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Kilifi zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya 30 days.

English: Healthcare workers are urged to attend training to stop the spread of cholera.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanahimizwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kipindupindu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ayaa lagu booriyay inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar lagu joojinayo faafitaanka daacuunka.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamehimizwa kufanya attend training ili kusitisha kuenea kwa cholera.

English: IEBC has deployed additional security personnel to maintain disaster preparedness during term.
Kiswahili2: IEBC imetuma wafanyakazi wa ziada wa usalama ili kudumisha maandalizi ya maafa wakati wa kipindi cha utekelezaji.
Somali: IEBC waxay hawlgelisay shaqaale amni oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro muddada kama dambaysta ah.
Kiswahili: IEBC imeweka security personnel wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa term.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all schools to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting term.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaelekeza shule zote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay faray dhammaan dugsiyada inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida xilliga bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza schools zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia term.

English: The public is advised to stock emergency supplies for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka degdegga ah si loo ogaado calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: Farmers are advised to vaccinate their animals immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba tallaalaan xoolahooda si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: URGENT: farmers must report suspicious activity before the end of this week. Report to Lamu immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii. Waripoti Lamu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: beeraleydu waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Lamu.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: farmers lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya the end of this week. Ripoti kwenye Lamu mara moja.

English: All residents must submit budget documents to the Ministry by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa Wizara ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay Wasaaradda u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ugu dambayn Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the Ministry ifikapo January 8th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority directs all county offices to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting semester.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inaelekeza ofisi zote za kaunti kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia muhula wa kwanza.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa faray dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida simistarka bilowga ah.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaagiza county offices zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia semester.

English: All police stations in all wards will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika kata zote vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee dhammaan waaxyaha ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika all wards zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: URGENT: All government offices in Eldoret must vaccinate their animals by 8:00 AM today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za serikali mjini Eldoret lazima zichanje wanyama wao ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee Eldoret waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababo la xiriira howlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: government offices zote katika Eldoret lazima vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na security operations.

English: Pastoralists are advised to attend training immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga soo qayb galaan tababarka si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya attend training mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: All students must submit examination papers to veterinary officers by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: Students zote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa veterinary officers ifikapo June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All Nairobi must report water levels subside within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Nairobi yote lazima iripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Nairobi waa inay soo sheegaan in heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Nairobi zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 60 days.

English: Motorists are warned against distribution on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Madereva waonywa dhidi ya usambazaji kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Darawalada ayaa looga digayaa inay ku faafiyaan kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Motorists wameonywa dhidi ya distribution kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: All civil servants are reminded to report suspicious activity by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanakumbushwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakisan yahay dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wamekumbushwa kufanya report suspicious activity ifikapo the end of this week.

English: IEBC bans inspection from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: IEBC waxay mamnuucday kormeerka shirkadaha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: IEBC inakataza inspection kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: URGENT: All residents must evacuate immediately before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakazi wote lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya onyo kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay ka guuraan isla markiiba ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service has deployed additional health workers to maintain disaster preparedness during election period.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha maandalizi ya majanga wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa election period.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces enhanced livestock movement in all all constituencies during term.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza kuimarika kwa harakati za mifugo katika majimbo yote wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee dhammaan degmooyinka dalka inta lagu jiro muddada xil haynta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza livestock movement zilizoidhinishwa katika all constituencies zote wakati wa term.

English: The Social Health Authority advises residents to boil drinking water this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wakazi kuchemsha maji ya kunywa msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa dadka deegaanka kula talineysa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri residents kufanya boil drinking water msimu huu.

English: The County Government announces relief food distribution to all drought-affected households in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame katika kata zote.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in gargaar cunto loo qaybiyay dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza relief food distribution kwa drought-affected households wote katika all wards.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All voters must complete registration immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wakamilishe usajili mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan codbixiyeyaashu waa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta sababo la xiriira rabshado sokeeye.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: voters wote lazima complete registration mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Ministry of Education advises voters to vaccinate their animals to prevent Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawashauri wapiga kura kuchanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay kula talinaysaa codbixiyayaasha inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si looga hortago cudurka Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inashauri voters kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kuzuia Rift Valley Fever.

English: School administrators are reminded that the deadline for evacuation is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhamishwa imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee daadgureynta la kordhin doono ilaa Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya evacuation imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit examination papers to the county health office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan iskuulladu waa inay waraaqaha imtixaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county health office ifikapo July 1st.

English: The Social Health Authority announces free inspection for coffee farmers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa wakulima wa kahawa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda qaxwada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa coffee farmers.

English: Civil servants are advised to avoid assessment. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuepuka tathmini. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kuepuka assessment. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces the public new all Kenyans. Applications open on the TSC portal from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inatangaza kwa umma Wakenya wote wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa dadweynaha ku dhawaaqaya kuwa cusub ee dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan bogga TSC isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia immediately.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upandwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan beerista qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: Livestock farmers are urged to submit documents to stop the spread of polio.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanahimizwa kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kuenea kwa polio.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamehimizwa kufanya submit documents ili kusitisha kuenea kwa polio.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces drought season amnesty for planting starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa upandaji kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga abaarta ah oo loogu talagalay beerashada beeraha oo bilaabanaysa Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa planting kuanzia April 1st.

English: Voters must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Codbixiyeyaashu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: Voters lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces school reopening in all Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika Turkana yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dib loo furayo iskuullada dhammaan Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza school reopening katika Turkana zote.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all health facilities will report suspicious activity on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitaripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay soo sheegi doonaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya report suspicious activity tarehe December 31st.

English: URGENT: All school administrators must move to higher ground before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wahamie katika ngazi za juu kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay u guuraan meel sare ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: school administrators wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: All students must boil drinking water before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya next Monday.

English: All school administrators must report suspicious activity before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya December 31st.

English: The County Government advises fish farmers to complete registration to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri wafugaji wa samaki kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda kalluunka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri fish farmers kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia measles.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises livestock farmers to attend training to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wafugaji kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talinaysa beeraleyda xoolaha inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar looga hortagayo jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri livestock farmers kufanya attend training ili kuzuia measles.

English: The Ministry of Education reminds healthcare workers to secure their properties via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawakumbusha wafanyakazi wa afya kulinda mali zao kupitia jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay xasuusinaysaa shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay hantidooda ku sugaan iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah ee Citizen.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawakumbusha healthcare workers kufanya secure their properties kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces enhanced examination in all the county education office during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza mitihani iliyoimarishwa katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday imtixaan la xoojiyay oo laga qaadayo dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza examination zilizoidhinishwa katika the county education office zote wakati wa festive season.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service reminds voters to secure their properties before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inawakumbusha wapiga kura kulinda mali zao kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa xasuusinaya codbixiyeyaasha inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawakumbusha voters kufanya secure their properties kabla ya Friday.

English: All fishermen must report suspicious activity to the nearest health facility before 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu kabla ya saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay ku wargeliyaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow ka hor 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima report suspicious activity kwenye the nearest health facility kabla ya saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u helaan calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za high fever.

English: The Ministry of Education announces meat prices at KSh 4,000 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza bei ya nyama kuwa KSh 4,000 kwa tani.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha hilibka KSh 4,000 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza bei za meat kwa KSh 4,000 kwa ton.

English: All students are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Students wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: IEBC announces rice prices at KSh 3,300 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kilo.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 3,300 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kilo.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises citizens to stock emergency supplies to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawashauri raia kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa muwaadiniinta inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri citizens kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kuzuia measles.

English: Civil servants are reminded that the deadline for harvesting is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuvuna imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee goosashada la kordhiyo ilaa Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya harvesting imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: The public is advised to install safety equipment for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si loogu daweeyo madax-xanuun daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya install safety equipment kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: NOTICE: All health facilities must submit registration forms to the county health office by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya afya lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: health facilities zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county health office ifikapo the end of month.

English: Motorists are advised to boil drinking water immediately to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa mara moja ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water mara moja ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: The Ministry of Education announces coffee prices at KSh 4,000 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza bei ya kahawa kwa KSh 4,000 kwa tani.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha qaxwada KSh 4,000 halkii tan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza bei za coffee kwa KSh 4,000 kwa ton.

English: The Ministry of Education announces relief food distribution to all flood victims in Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko huko Kilifi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in gargaar cunto ah loo qaybiyay dhammaan dadkii ay saameeyeen daadadka ka dhacay Kilifi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza relief food distribution kwa flood victims wote katika Kilifi.

English: The Social Health Authority urges all county officials to verify their details by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawasihi maafisa wote wa kaunti kuthibitisha taarifa zao ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor makhribka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza county officials wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: IEBC announces seeds prices at KSh 1,700 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza bei ya mbegu kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha abuurka KSh 1,700 kiilokiiba.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza bei za seeds kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Wajir due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Wajeer roobab xooggan awgood.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Social Health Authority bans school reopening from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa mamnuucday dib u furista iskuulada laga furo wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inakataza school reopening kutoka affected countries.

English: The Office of the Auditor General reminds livestock farmers to install safety equipment via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawakumbusha wafugaji kufunga vifaa vya usalama kupitia jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu xasuusinayaa beeraleyda xoolaha inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah ee Citizen.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya install safety equipment kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: The County Government announces that all hospitals will practice handwashing on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitafanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan isbitaallada ay dhaqan gelin doonaan dhaqidda gacmaha 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya practice handwashing tarehe June 30th.

English: All travelers must report suspicious activity to Kilifi before 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kwa Kilifi kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay Kilifi u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima report suspicious activity kwenye Kilifi kabla ya saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory inspection.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapitie ukaguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay maraan kormeer khasab ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie inspection inayolazimishwa.

English: Election officials will conduct planting in all regions starting Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi watafanya upandaji miti katika maeneo yote kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa beerista ka bilaabi doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya planting katika regions zote kuanzia Thursday.

English: The Ministry of Education launches relief food distribution in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee ka socota Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua relief food distribution katika Nairobi County.

English: All livestock farmers are warned against harvesting. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaonywa dhidi ya uvunaji. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa looga digayaa inay goostaan. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: All clinics in Eldoret will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote mjini Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Eldoret ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service bans voter registration from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inapiga marufuku usajili wa wapiga kura kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucaya diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee ka timaadda iibiyeyaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inakataza voter registration kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: The County Government announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the SHA website from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Dowladda Degmadu waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa muwaadiniinta cusub ee dadweynaha. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee SHA laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia Wednesday.

English: All dispensaries in Marsabit will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote huko Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyaha ku yaal Marsabit way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces relief food distribution to all flood victims in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qaybin cunto gargaar ah oo loo sameeyay dhammaan dadkii ku waxyeeloobay daadadka ee ku sugan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza relief food distribution kwa flood victims wote katika the county education office.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission directs all dispensaries to implement the school feeding program starting week.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaagiza zahanati zote kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia wiki.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa faraya dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada laga bilaabo toddobaadka.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaagiza dispensaries zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia week.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to complete registration as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili kwani mvua inatarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta maadaama la filayo in roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya complete registration kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces that all evacuation must be move to higher ground starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba uokoaji wote lazima uhamishwe hadi maeneo ya juu kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan daadgureynta loo rari doono dhul sare laga bilaabo 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza kwamba evacuation zote lazima move to higher ground kuanzia August 1st.

English: All tea farmers must install safety equipment to Lamu before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama Lamu kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan Lamu ka hor fiidkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima install safety equipment kwenye Lamu kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Education announces beans prices at KSh 5,500 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kuwa KSh 5,500 kwa kilo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha digirta KSh 5,500 kiilo kiilo.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 5,500 kwa kilo.

English: IEBC announces vaccination in all the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza chanjo katika Bonde lote la Ufa.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in tallaal laga fulin doono dhammaan Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza vaccination katika the Rift Valley zote.

English: NOTICE: All Nairobi County must report further notice within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kaunti yote ya Nairobi lazima iripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Degmada Nairobi waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Nairobi County zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 60 days.

English: NOTICE: All hospitals must submit production reports to the county education office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Hospitali zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan isbitaallada waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: hospitals zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county education office ifikapo next Monday.

English: All civil servants are reminded to verify their details by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanakumbushwa kuthibitisha taarifa zao ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wamekumbushwa kufanya verify their details ifikapo September 15th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority warns of heat waves exceeding 100mm in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi 100mm huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ka digaysa hirarka kulaylka oo ka badan 100mm ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaonya heat waves zaidi ya 100mm katika Turkana.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns of heat waves exceeding 100mm in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi 100mm katika kata zote.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ka digaysaa hirarka kulaylka oo ka badan 100mm dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya heat waves zaidi ya 100mm katika all wards.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces that all schools will stock emergency supplies on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza kwamba shule zote zitahifadhi vifaa vya dharura mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan iskuulladu ay kaydin doonaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza kwamba schools zote zitafanya stock emergency supplies tarehe September 15th.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report the situation stabilizes within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti hali hiyo ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay degto 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 60 days.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns against complete registration. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inaonya dhidi ya usajili kamili. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa diiwaangelinta oo dhammaystiran. Ha isticmaalin biyaha wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya dhidi ya complete registration. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges all residents to seek medical attention by midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wakazi wote kutafuta matibabu ifikapo saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza residents wote kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo saa midnight kila siku.

English: All healthcare workers are warned against harvesting. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanaonywa dhidi ya uvunaji. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: All motorists must update their records before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima update their records kabla ya March 15th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns against register online. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya dhidi ya kujisajili mtandaoni. Usijitibu mwenyewe.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya in la iska diiwaan geliyo internetka. Ha is-daaweynin.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya dhidi ya register online. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: Students must ensure all residents have national identity cards before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka degan ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana national identity cards kabla ya vaccination.

English: The National Police Service issues curfew notice for Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Waturkana.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa soo saaray ogeysiis bandow ah oo ku saabsan Turkana.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatoa curfew notice kwa Turkana.

English: The Social Health Authority announces tea prices at KSh 4,000 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza bei ya chai kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 90kg bag.

English: Civil servants must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay sitaan foomamka diiwaangelinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: NOTICE: All Turkana must report the rains stop within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Waturkana wote lazima waripoti kusimama kwa mvua ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Turkana waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen sanadka maaliyadeed gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Turkana zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya the financial year.

English: All residents are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanashauriwa kufuata mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Residents wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Mombasa due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mombasa kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Mombasa sababo la xiriira khatar argagixiso.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mombasa kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: All residents are directed to boil drinking water by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wameagizwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la farayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameagizwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Social Health Authority issues health advisory for Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatoa ushauri wa afya kwa Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa soo saartay talo bixin caafimaad oo ku saabsan Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatoa health advisory kwa Wajir.

English: All fish farmers must move to higher ground to Mandera before 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wahamie maeneo ya juu hadi Mandera kabla ya saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay u guuraan dhul sare oo u dhow Mandheera ka hor 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye Mandera kabla ya saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all teachers to undergo harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawaagiza walimu wote kupitia uvunaji.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay faraysaa dhammaan macallimiinta inay sameeyaan beerashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza teachers wote kupitia harvesting.

English: The County Government announces relief food distribution to all vulnerable populations in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qaybin gargaar ah oo cunto ah oo loo fidinayo dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza relief food distribution kwa vulnerable populations wote katika the Coastal region.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit health records to the county health office by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada ugu dambayn 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county health office ifikapo February 28th.

English: The National Police Service directs all teachers to undergo school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawaagiza walimu wote kufunguliwa tena kwa shule.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa faraya dhammaan macallimiinta inay dib u furaan iskuullada.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza teachers wote kupitia school reopening.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit budget documents to the county education office by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe hati za bajeti kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ugu dambayn 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe budget documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo February 28th.

English: URGENT: All livestock farmers must complete registration before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla viwango vya maji havijapungua.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers wote lazima complete registration kabla ya water levels subside.

English: IEBC warns against practice handwashing. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya dhidi ya kunawa mikono kwa njia ya kunawa mikono. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: IEBC waxay ka digaysaa dhaqidda gacmaha. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya dhidi ya practice handwashing. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: URGENT: All students must verify their details before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wanafunzi wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students wote lazima verify their details kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in the county education office until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti hadi ushauri utakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika the county education office mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: The Kenya Red Cross reminds school administrators to vaccinate their animals before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawakumbusha wasimamizi wa shule kuwachanja wanyama wao kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay xasuusineysaa maamulayaasha iskuulada inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawakumbusha school administrators kufanya vaccinate their animals kabla ya the end of this week.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds fishermen to move to higher ground before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha wavuvi kuhamia maeneo ya juu kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa kalluumeysatada inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha fishermen kufanya move to higher ground kabla ya September 15th.

English: The National Police Service bans assessment from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yapiga marufuku tathmini dhidi ya maji ya mafuriko.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa mamnuucaya qiimeynta ka timaadda daadadka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inakataza assessment kutoka floodwaters.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service bans training from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yapiga marufuku mafunzo kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucay tababarrada laga helo ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inakataza training kutoka unverified sources.

English: All farmers must submit tax returns to the National Disaster Operations Centre by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre ifikapo July 1st.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces semester amnesty for voter registration starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa ajili ya uandikishaji wa wapiga kura kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha oo bilaabanaysa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa voter registration kuanzia September 15th.

English: Motorists are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Wajir.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Wajir.

English: IEBC announces free extension services at all all constituencies this week.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika majimbo yote wiki hii.
Somali: IEBC waxay toddobaadkan ku dhawaaqday adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza extension services ya bure katika all constituencies zote week hii.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo dhib ah.
