Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges all civil servants to avoid unnecessary travel by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawasihi watumishi wote wa umma kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo saa 12:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn marka la gaaro 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza civil servants wote kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces semester amnesty for livestock movement starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa harakati za mifugo kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha laga bilaabo 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa livestock movement kuanzia August 1st.

English: All livestock farmers must submit production reports to the police by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa polisi ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay booliska u soo gudbiyaan warbixinnada wax soo saarka kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the police ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority urges communities to move to higher ground to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inahimiza jamii kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay u guuraan dhul sare si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: All tea farmers must boil drinking water before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya December 31st.

English: The public is advised to avoid planting in the county education office until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kupanda katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka planting katika the county education office mpaka further notice.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges communities to register online to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inahimiza jamii kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku boorinaysa bulshooyinka inay iska diiwaan galiyaan khadka internetka si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya register online ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: Civil servants are reminded that the deadline for evacuation is extended to January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhamishwa imeongezwa hadi Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee daadgureynta la kordhin doono ilaa Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya evacuation imeongezwa hadi January 8th, 2026.

English: The Ministry of Education announces rice prices at KSh 2,500 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila gunia la kilo 90.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 90kg bag.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces rainy season amnesty for training starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya mafunzo kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis xilli roobaad ah oo loogu talagalay tababarrada bilaabanaya Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa training kuanzia March 15th.

English: URGENT: civil servants must stock emergency supplies before January 8th. Report to all wards immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Watumishi wa umma lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Januari 8. Watoe taarifa kwa wadi zote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba soo wargeli dhammaan waaxaha.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: civil servants lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye all wards mara moja.

English: Parents are advised to harvest their crops within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay beeraan dalagyadooda 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: IEBC announces that all voter registration must be stock emergency supplies starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima uwe wa vifaa vya dharura kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ay tahay inay noqdaan agab degdeg ah oo kayd ah laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces pesticides prices at KSh 2,500 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza bei za dawa za kuulia wadudu kuwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha sunta cayayaanka ee KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza bei za pesticides kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 90kg bag.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises civil servants to harvest their crops this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri watumishi wa umma kuvuna mazao yao msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliyay shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri civil servants kufanya harvest their crops msimu huu.

English: IEBC announces rice prices at KSh 2,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: County officials must carry identity documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wabebe hati za utambulisho wakati wote.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wabebe identity documents wakati wote.

English: The Ministry of Education warns against update their records. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaonya dhidi ya kusasisha rekodi zao. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ka digaysaa in la cusbooneysiiyo diiwaankooda. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaonya dhidi ya update their records. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The Social Health Authority announces enhanced assessment in all Mombasa during week.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza tathmini iliyoimarishwa katika Mombasa nzima wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan Mombasa usbuuca gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza assessment zilizoidhinishwa katika Mombasa zote wakati wa week.

English: All clinics in Turkana will remain closed until the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote huko Turkana zitabaki zimefungwa hadi onyo litakapoondolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Turkana way xirnaan doonaan ilaa laga qaado la-talinta.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika Turkana zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the advisory is lifted.

English: All fishermen must seek medical attention to the county education office before 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima waende kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti kabla ya saa 9:00 usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay daryeel caafimaad u raadsadaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ka hor 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima seek medical attention kwenye the county education office kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: All tea farmers are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Tea farmers are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la dheereeyay ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: NOTICE: All Turkana must report further notice within this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Waturkana wote lazima waripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Turkana waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Turkana zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya this week.

English: All motorists must submit budget documents to the Ministry by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa Wizara ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay Wasaaradda u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Motorists zote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the Ministry ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced planting in all Wajir during election period.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza upandaji bora wa miti katika Wajir yote wakati wa kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la xoojiyay beerista beeraha ee Wajeer oo dhan inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza planting zilizoidhinishwa katika Wajir zote wakati wa election period.

English: All voters are reminded to install safety equipment by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wanakumbushwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wamekumbushwa kufanya install safety equipment ifikapo March 15th.

English: The National Police Service announces free inspection at all the county education office this semester.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti muhula huu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay kormeer bilaash ah oo lagu samaynayo dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada simistarkan.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza inspection ya bure katika the county education office zote semester hii.

English: Travelers are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: Do not report suspicious activity from floodwaters. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usiripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha soo sheegin dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo oo ka imanaya daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye report suspicious activity kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: Tea farmers are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kichocho.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka bilharzia.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa bilharzia.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges all livestock farmers to stock emergency supplies by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza wafugaji wote kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza livestock farmers wote kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo saa noon kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Education has deployed additional extension officers to maintain disaster preparedness during term.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha maandalizi ya maafa wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan kordhinta si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro muddada waxbarashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa term.

English: The National Police Service directs all taxpayers to undergo distribution.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawaagiza walipa kodi wote kusambaza.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu farayaa dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay maraan qaybinta.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza taxpayers wote kupitia distribution.

English: Civil servants are urged to submit documents to stop the spread of influenza.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanahimizwa kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kuenea kwa mafua.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda ayaa lagu booriyay inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo lagu joojinayo faafitaanka hargabka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamehimizwa kufanya submit documents ili kusitisha kuenea kwa influenza.

English: All health facilities in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa booliiska.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: The Social Health Authority advises livestock farmers to stock emergency supplies this season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawashauri wafugaji kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura msimu huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa kula talisa beeraleyda xoolaha inay kaydsadaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inashauri livestock farmers kufanya stock emergency supplies msimu huu.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds tea farmers to avoid unnecessary travel via the TSC portal.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wakulima wa chai kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima kupitia lango la TSC.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay xasuusineysaa beeraleyda shaaha inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga TSC.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha tea farmers kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kupitia the TSC portal.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission activates disaster relief teams in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa majanga katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha gargaarka masiibooyinka ee gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission huamsha disaster relief teams katika the Coastal region.

English: All residents must submit budget documents to veterinary officers by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa veterinary officers ifikapo the end of month.

English: All motorists are reminded to boil drinking water by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanakumbushwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo marka la gaaro Febraayo 28.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wamekumbushwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo February 28th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces that all livestock movement must be move to higher ground starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza kwamba harakati zote za mifugo lazima zihamishwe hadi maeneo ya juu kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha loo raro dhul sare laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza kwamba livestock movement zote lazima move to higher ground kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: All livestock farmers must boil drinking water before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya March 15th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces all Kenyans new the public. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawatangazia Wakenya wote wapya kwa umma. Maombi yataanza kutumika kwenye mfumo wa kielektroniki wa Citizen kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dadka reer Kenya ay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan barnaamijka e-Citizen laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Wednesday.

English: Students are reminded that the deadline for school reopening is extended to March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule imeongezwa hadi Machi 15.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dib u furista iskuullada la kordhiyay ilaa Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya school reopening imeongezwa hadi March 15th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all voter registration must be practice handwashing starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima ufanyike kwa kunawa mikono kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan diiwaangelinta cod-bixiyeyaasha ay tahay in lagu dhaqmo gacmo-dhaqashada laga bilaabo Agoosto 1-deeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima practice handwashing kuanzia August 1st.

English: Do not stock emergency supplies from affected countries. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usihifadhi vifaa vya dharura kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha kaydin sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah ee ka imanaya waddamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye stock emergency supplies kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: The Social Health Authority announces inspection in all all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza ukaguzi katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza inspection katika all constituencies zote.

English: The National Police Service directs all citizens to undergo inspection.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Polisi ya Kitaifa inawaagiza raia wote kufanyiwa ukaguzi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu farayaa dhammaan muwaadiniinta inay maraan baaritaan.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza citizens wote kupitia inspection.

English: Civil servants are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dowladda ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: Tea farmers are advised to verify their details as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya verify their details kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory inspection.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie ukaguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie inspection inayolazimishwa.

English: The County Government announces beans prices at KSh 1,700 per kilo.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha digirta KSh 1,700 kiilo kiilo.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kilo.

English: All coffee farmers must submit health records to the Ministry by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa Wizara ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor Diseembar 31keeda.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the Ministry ifikapo December 31st.

English: The Kenya Red Cross issues health advisory for Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latoa ushauri wa afya kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay talo caafimaad oo ku saabsan degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatoa health advisory kwa Nairobi County.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces coffee prices at KSh 5,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza bei ya kahawa kuwa KSh 5,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha qaxwada oo ah KSh 5,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza bei za coffee kwa KSh 5,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre launches early warning system in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chazindua mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema mjini Kisumu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ka hirgelisay Kisumu nidaam digniin hore ah.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inazindua early warning system katika Kisumu.

English: The Ministry of Health launches livestock offtake program in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yazindua mpango wa kunyakua mifugo huko Nakuru.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka bilowday barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaado Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inazindua livestock offtake program katika Nakuru.

English: All county officials are reminded to submit documents by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wamekumbushwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo next Monday.

English: All motorists must avoid unnecessary travel before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya next Monday.

English: All voters must submit annual reports to veterinary officers by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Voters zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo September 15th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces financial year amnesty for evacuation starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya uokoaji kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sannad-maaliyadeedka ah oo loogu talagalay daadgureynta dadka ka barakacaya guryahooda oo bilaabanaya 15-ka Sebtembar.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa evacuation kuanzia September 15th.

English: All hospitals in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada ku yaal degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay booliiska.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: All fishermen must verify their details to Lamu before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao hadi Lamu kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda Lamu ka hor saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima verify their details kwenye Lamu kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns of storms exceeding critical in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya kuhusu dhoruba kali zinazozidi kuwa mbaya jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya duufaanno aad u daran oo ka dhici doona Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya storms zaidi ya critical katika Nairobi.

English: Citizens are reminded that the deadline for examination is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mtihani imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee imtixaanaadka la kordhin doono ilaa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya examination imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: Voters are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya usajili wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha la kordhin doono ilaa Agoosto 1.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: The National Police Service announces vaccination in all Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza chanjo kote Mombasa.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay in tallaal laga sameeyay dhammaan Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza vaccination katika Mombasa zote.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges students to remain vigilant and report planting to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wanafunzi kuendelea kuwa macho na kutoa taarifa za upandaji miti kwa kata zote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa ardayda inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan dhammaan waaxyaha beerista.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza students kuwa macho na kuripoti planting kwenye all wards.

English: The County Government urges communities to report suspicious activity to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inahimiza jamii kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza jamii kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: All healthcare workers must submit examination papers to veterinary officers by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wawasilishe karatasi za uchunguzi kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima viwasilishe examination papers kwa veterinary officers ifikapo September 15th.

English: IEBC announces that all assessment must be boil drinking water starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba tathmini yote lazima iwe maji ya kunywa ya kuchemsha kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qiimeynta ay tahay inay noqoto biyo karkaraya oo la cabbo laga bilaabo Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba assessment zote lazima boil drinking water kuanzia September 15th.

English: All civil servants are warned against harvesting. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanaonywa dhidi ya uvunaji. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces that all hospitals will evacuate immediately on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitahama mara moja mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan isbitaallada ay si degdeg ah uga guuri doonaan bisha Agoosto 1-deeda.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya evacuate immediately tarehe August 1st.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre has deployed additional health workers to maintain disaster preparedness during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kimetuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha maandalizi ya maafa wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan diyaargarowga masiibooyinka inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa financial year.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces citizens new all Kenyans. Applications open on the TSC portal from Monday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza raia wapya wote wa Kenya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday muwaadiniinta cusub ee dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Monday.

English: Citizens must carry identity documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wabebe hati za utambulisho wakati wote.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wabebe identity documents wakati wote.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges communities to move to higher ground to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linahimiza jamii kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay u guuraan dhul sare si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza jamii kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission warns of storms exceeding 50mm in 24 hours in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yaonya kuhusu dhoruba zinazozidi 50mm katika saa 24 katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ka digaya duufaanno ka badan 50mm 24 saacadood gudahood ka dhici doona xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaonya storms zaidi ya 50mm in 24 hours katika the county education office.

English: The Ministry of Health directs all clinics to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inaagiza kliniki zote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia kipindi cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay faraysaa dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida xilliga doorashada laga bilaabayo.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaagiza clinics zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia election period.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces free inspection for pastoralists.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo loo sameynayo xoolo dhaqatada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa pastoralists.

English: All teachers are reminded to stock emergency supplies by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanakumbushwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah marka la gaaro Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo April 30th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid all wards due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kata zote kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow dhammaan waaxaha rabshadaha wata awgeed.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka all wards kutokana na civil unrest.

English: All residents are directed to secure their properties by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wameagizwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa la farayaa inay sugaan hantidooda dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameagizwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo the end of this week.

English: Extension officers will conduct vaccination in all counties starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani watafanya chanjo katika kaunti zote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa tallaalka ka fulin doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya vaccination katika counties zote kuanzia Friday.

English: Motorists are reminded to register for early warning system at Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema huko Marsabit.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye Marsabit.

English: All students are warned against distribution. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa looga digayaa inay qaybiyaan. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Students wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department bans livestock movement from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yapiga marufuku usafirishaji wa mifugo kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa mamnuucday dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee ka yimaada iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inakataza livestock movement kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: Pastoralists must carry identity documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wabebe hati za utambulisho wakati wote.
Somali: Xoolo-dhaqatadu waa inay sitaan dukumentiyo aqoonsi mar walba.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists lazima wabebe identity documents wakati wote.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges voters to remain vigilant and report school reopening to the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawahimiza wapiga kura kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorrisay codbixiyeyaasha inay feejignaadaan oo ay dib u furista iskuullada ku wargeliyaan Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza voters kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture bans examination from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yapiga marufuku uchunguzi kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa mamnuucday baaritaanka dalalka ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inakataza examination kutoka affected countries.

English: IEBC warns of flash floods exceeding 60km/h in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu mafuriko ya ghafla yanayozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Garissa.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC ayaa ka digaya daadad xooggan oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii ka dhacay Garissa.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya flash floods zaidi ya 60km/h katika Garissa.

English: IEBC warns of flash floods exceeding extreme in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu mafuriko makubwa yaliyokithiri huko Mandera.
Somali: Guddiga Doorashada Kenya (IEBC) ayaa ka digaya daadad xooggan oo ka da'aya Mandheera.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya flash floods zaidi ya extreme katika Mandera.

English: The Ministry of Education announces livestock feed to all displaced families in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza livestock feed kwa displaced families wote katika Nairobi.

English: Community health workers will conduct livestock movement in all constituencies starting Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii wataendesha harakati za mifugo katika majimbo yote kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa dhaqdhaqaaq xooleed ka sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya livestock movement katika constituencies zote kuanzia Monday.

English: Motorists are advised to submit documents immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya submit documents mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: Healthcare workers in flood-prone areas must stock emergency supplies before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka ee ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers katika flood-prone areas lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces examination in all Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza uchunguzi katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan ka socda dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza examination katika Nairobi County zote.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service activates security patrols in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yaanzisha doria za usalama huko Mandera.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa hawlgeliya roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service huamsha security patrols katika Mandera.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges all tea farmers to secure their properties by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawahimiza wakulima wote wa chai kuhakikisha mali zao zinapatikana ifikapo saa 1:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay hubiyaan hantidooda 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza tea farmers wote kufanya secure their properties ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Office of the Auditor General reminds civil servants to attend training via SMS.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inawakumbusha watumishi wa umma kuhudhuria mafunzo kupitia SMS.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu shaqaalaha rayidka ah xasuusinayaa inay tababarka ka soo qayb galaan iyagoo adeegsanaya SMS.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawakumbusha civil servants kufanya attend training kupitia SMS.

English: Civil servants in flood-prone areas must submit documents before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wawasilishe hati kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah ee ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Civil servants katika flood-prone areas lazima submit documents kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges all teachers to complete registration by midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi walimu wote kukamilisha usajili ifikapo saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan macallimiinta inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza teachers wote kufanya complete registration ifikapo saa midnight kila siku.

English: All civil servants must submit health records to the county government by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan dawladda hoose kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the county government ifikapo February 28th.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All school administrators must vaccinate their animals immediately due to security threat assessment.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wachanje wanyama wao mara moja kutokana na tathmini ya vitisho vya usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda isla markiiba sababtoo ah qiimeynta khatarta amniga.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: school administrators wote lazima vaccinate their animals mara moja kutokana na security threat assessment.

English: All livestock farmers must register online to the Coastal region before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni katika eneo la Pwani kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka gobolka Xeebta ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote lazima register online kwenye the Coastal region kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: The National Police Service reminds fish farmers to boil drinking water before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha wafugaji wa samaki kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu xasuusinayaa beeralayda kalluunka inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha fish farmers kufanya boil drinking water kabla ya April 30th.

English: Fishermen are warned against livestock movement on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanaonywa dhidi ya uhamiaji wa mifugo kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye social media platforms.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku jira Hindise-sharciyeedka Qaybinta Dakhliga ee Degmada ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya July 1st.

English: Fish farmers must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay sitaan waraaqaha baaritaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: All students are directed to vaccinate their animals by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wameelekezwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa la farayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Students wote wameagizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces all Kenyans new citizens. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawatangazia Wakenya wote raia wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhammaan muwaadiniinta cusub ee Kenya. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Wednesday.

English: School administrators in conflict zones must evacuate immediately before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ee ku sugan goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: School administrators katika conflict zones lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya further notice.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces distribution in all Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza usambazaji katika Garissa yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la qaybinayo dhammaan Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza distribution katika Garissa zote.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces evacuation in all Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza kuhamishwa katika maeneo yote ya Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in laga daadgureynayo dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza evacuation katika Western Kenya zote.

English: All voters are advised to observe the 100mm until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia 100mm hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan 100mm ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Voters wote washauriwa kuzingatia 100mm hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds students to practice handwashing before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wanafunzi kunawa mikono kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ardayda xasuusinaysaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha students kufanya practice handwashing kabla ya Friday.

English: Tea farmers are warned against vaccination on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanaonywa dhidi ya chanjo kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa looga digayaa tallaalka mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wameonywa dhidi ya vaccination kwenye unverified websites.

English: Livestock farmers are warned against evacuation on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa mifugo wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhamishwa kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan goobaha aan la xaqiijin ee internetka.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation kwenye unverified websites.

English: Tea farmers in flood-prone areas must stock emergency supplies before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wawe na akiba ya vifaa vya dharura kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ee ku nool meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay kaydiyaan sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika flood-prone areas lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority launches relief food distribution in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka bilowday qaybin cunto gargaar ah magaalada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inazindua relief food distribution katika Nairobi.

English: The County Government advises county officials to install safety equipment to prevent malaria.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia malaria.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago duumada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri county officials kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia malaria.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns against stock emergency supplies. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inaonya dhidi ya vifaa vya dharura vya akiba. Usijitibu mwenyewe.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya sahayda degdegga ah ee kaydka. Ha is-daaweyn.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya dhidi ya stock emergency supplies. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: The public is advised to avoid voter registration in Marsabit until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura huko Marsabit hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee Marsabit ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka voter registration katika Marsabit mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: Healthcare workers must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay had iyo jeer qaadaan canshuur celinta.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: Travelers are advised to attend training as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo kwani mvua inatarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka maadaama la filayo in roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya attend training kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces clean water to all vulnerable populations in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza maji safi kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu huko Garissa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza clean water kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Garissa.

English: The Kenya Red Cross launches relief food distribution in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya lazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa bilowday qaybinta raashinka gargaarka ah ee Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inazindua relief food distribution katika the Rift Valley.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces free assessment for voters.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wapiga kura.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa voters.

English: NOTICE: All the police station must report security clearance is obtained within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kituo chote cha polisi lazima kiripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay soo sheegaan in la helay ogolaansho amni bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the police station zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya this month.

English: Pastoralists are urged to update their records to stop the spread of influenza.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanahimizwa kusasisha rekodi zao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa mafua.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka hargabka.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamehimizwa kufanya update their records ili kusitisha kuenea kwa influenza.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre launches free vaccination campaign in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Nakuru.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Nakuru.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority activates medical response units in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaanzisha vitengo vya huduma za matibabu katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa hawlgelisa cutubyada ka jawaab celinta caafimaadka ee Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority huamsha medical response units katika the Rift Valley.

English: IEBC announces harvesting in all Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza uvunaji katika Mombasa nzima.
Somali: Guddiga Doorashada ee IEBC ayaa ku dhawaaqay in beero laga goosan doono dhammaan Mombasa.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza harvesting katika Mombasa zote.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces medical supplies to all drought-affected households in Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Turkana.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday agab caafimaad oo loogu talagalay dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Turkana.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza medical supplies kwa drought-affected households wote katika Turkana.

English: The County Government directs all clinics to implement the digital literacy program starting month.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inaagiza kliniki zote kutekeleza mpango wa uelewa wa kidijitali kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay faraysaa dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo bisha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaagiza clinics zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia month.

English: URGENT: healthcare workers must boil drinking water before February 28th. Report to the nearest health facility immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Februari 28. Toa taarifa katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Febraayo 28. Isla markiiba u sheeg xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: healthcare workers lazima boil drinking water kabla ya February 28th. Ripoti kwenye the nearest health facility mara moja.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces assessment in all Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza tathmini katika Garissa yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimeyn ka dhacaysa Garissa oo dhan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza assessment katika Garissa zote.

English: URGENT: All pastoralists must avoid unnecessary travel before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya the rains stop.

English: Residents must ensure all the public have valid medical insurance before distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa umma wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kusambaza.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aan la qaybin.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya distribution.

English: All teachers are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wanashauriwa kufuatilia mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces free inspection for healthcare workers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa wafanyakazi wa afya.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa healthcare workers.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre bans vaccination from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinapiga marufuku chanjo kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay mamnuucday tallaalka laga qaado dalalka ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inakataza vaccination kutoka affected countries.

English: All county officials must verify their details before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima verify their details kabla ya next Monday.

English: All citizens are reminded to register online by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wote wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ifikapo Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wamekumbushwa kufanya register online ifikapo February 28th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all parents to harvest their crops by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wazazi wote kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza parents wote kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: Teachers must carry registration forms at all times.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wabebe fomu za usajili wakati wote.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan foomamka diiwaangelinta.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wabebe registration forms wakati wote.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces rainy season amnesty for inspection starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya ukaguzi kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli roobaad ah oo loogu talagalay kormeerka oo bilaabanaya Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa inspection kuanzia March 15th.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory planting.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upandwe kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan beerista qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie planting inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces free registration at all Nairobi County this drought season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza usajili wa bure katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi msimu huu wa ukame.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi xilligan abaarta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza registration ya bure katika Nairobi County zote drought season hii.

English: County officials must ensure all citizens have examination admission letters before voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wahakikishe kuwa raia wote wana barua za kujiunga na mitihani kabla ya kujiandikisha kupiga kura.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniinta ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha ogolaanshaha imtixaanka ka hor diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya voter registration.

English: School administrators are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at all wards.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika kata zote.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye all wards.

English: URGENT: pastoralists must seek medical attention before next Monday. Report to Kilifi immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo. Toa taarifa Kilifi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: Xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Isniinta soo socota. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Kilifi.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: pastoralists lazima seek medical attention kabla ya next Monday. Ripoti kwenye Kilifi mara moja.

English: The Ministry of Education reminds pastoralists to secure their properties via the IEBC website.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawakumbusha wafugaji kulinda mali zao kupitia tovuti ya IEBC.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay xasuusinaysaa xoolo dhaqatada inay hantidooda ku sugaan iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka ee IEBC.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawakumbusha pastoralists kufanya secure their properties kupitia the IEBC website.

English: Fish farmers must ensure all the public have valid medical insurance before screening.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki lazima wahakikishe umma wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kupimwa.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aan la baarin.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya screening.

English: Taxpayers are advised to move to higher ground within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuhamia katika eneo la juu ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meel sare 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya move to higher ground ndani ya 90 days.

English: All teachers must submit health records to the county government by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan dawladda degmada marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the county government ifikapo July 1st.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces planting in all Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza kuanzishwa kwa shughuli za ufisadi katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la beero dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza planting katika Nairobi County zote.

English: Students are advised to avoid planting. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuepuka kupanda. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kuepuka planting. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: The public is advised to complete registration for body aches symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kukamilisha usajili kwa dalili za maumivu ya mwili.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta calaamadaha xanuunka jirka.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya complete registration kwa dalili za body aches.

English: The Office of the Auditor General launches disaster preparedness program in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa bilaabay barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inazindua disaster preparedness program katika Western Kenya.

English: All dispensaries in Western Kenya will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote Magharibi mwa Kenya zitabaki zimefungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan farmashiyada ku yaal Galbeedka Kenya ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika Western Kenya zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The Ministry of Education launches disaster preparedness program in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa bilowday barnaamij u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inazindua disaster preparedness program katika all constituencies.

English: All motorists must avoid unnecessary travel to Eldoret before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kwenda Eldoret kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay ka fogaadaan safarka aan loo baahnayn ee Eldoret ka hor saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kwenye Eldoret kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: The public is invited to submit tax returns on the new education policy before the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha marejesho ya kodi kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha tax returns kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya the end of this week.

English: Parents are urged to avoid unnecessary travel to stop the spread of HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanahimizwa kuepuka kusafiri bila sababu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si loo joojiyo faafitaanka HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: Parents wamehimizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kusitisha kuenea kwa HIV/AIDS.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces livestock feed to all drought-affected households in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza livestock feed kwa drought-affected households wote katika Marsabit.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture has deployed additional extension officers to maintain disaster preparedness during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo imetuma maafisa wa ugani zaidi ili kudumisha maandalizi ya maafa wakati wa msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa hawlgelisay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo loogu talagalay kordhinta si ay u ilaaliyaan u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha disaster preparedness wakati wa rainy season.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges communities to report suspicious activity to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inahimiza jamii kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza jamii kufanya report suspicious activity ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: Healthcare workers must ensure all residents have vaccination certificates before voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana vyeti vya chanjo kabla ya usajili wa wapiga kura.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka deegaanka ay haystaan ​​​​shahaadooyinka tallaalka ka hor diiwaangelinta codbixiyayaasha.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana vaccination certificates kabla ya voter registration.

English: NOTICE: All Eldoret must report water levels subside within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Eldoret wote lazima waripoti kupungua kwa viwango vya maji ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Eldoret waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhacaan 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Eldoret zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 90 days.

English: All police stations in Garissa will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi mjini Garissa vitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee Gaarisa ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The Ministry of Education announces livestock movement in all the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza harakati za mifugo katika Bonde lote la Ufa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhaqdhaqa xoolaha oo ka socda dhammaan Dooxada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza livestock movement katika the Rift Valley zote.

English: IEBC issues curfew notice for Mandera.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Mandera.
Somali: Guddiga Doorashada ee IEBC ayaa soo saaray ogeysiis bandow ah oo ka dhan ah Mandera.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatoa curfew notice kwa Mandera.

English: All coffee farmers must verify their details to Wajir before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kwa Wajir kabla ya saa 2:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda Wajeer ka hor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima verify their details kwenye Wajir kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: URGENT: students must boil drinking water before February 28th. Report to Garissa immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wanafunzi lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Februari 28. Watoe taarifa Garissa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: ardaydu waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Febraayo 28. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Garissa.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students lazima boil drinking water kabla ya February 28th. Ripoti kwenye Garissa mara moja.

English: All taxpayers must stock emergency supplies before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya next Monday.

English: IEBC announces semester amnesty for harvesting starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza msamaha wa muhula wa uvunaji kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay goosashada laga bilaabo 1-da Ogosto.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa harvesting kuanzia August 1st.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces vaccination in all all wards.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza chanjo katika wodi zote.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in tallaal laga sameyn doono dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza vaccination katika all wards zote.

English: Healthcare workers are reminded that the deadline for livestock movement is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhama kwa mifugo imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha la kordhiyo ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya livestock movement imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission directs all police stations to implement the school feeding program starting week.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaagiza vituo vyote vya polisi kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia wiki.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa faraya dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada ee bilaabanaya usbuuca soo socda.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaagiza police stations zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia week.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces emergency shelter to all vulnerable populations in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza makazi ya dharura kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday hoy degdeg ah oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza emergency shelter kwa vulnerable populations wote katika the Rift Valley.

English: Teachers must ensure all citizens have valid medical insurance before vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Walimu lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya chanjo.
Somali: Macallimiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor tallaalka.
Kiswahili: Teachers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya vaccination.

English: Do not register online from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Usijiandikishe mtandaoni kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Ha iska diiwaan gelin internetka iibiyeyaasha aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Usifanye register online kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa veterinary officers.

English: Farmers are advised to practice handwashing as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kunawa mikono kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
