Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all harvesting must be harvest their crops starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba mavuno yote lazima yavunwe kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan goosashada ay tahay inay goosato dalagyadooda laga bilaabo Juun 30-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba harvesting zote lazima harvest their crops kuanzia June 30th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Lamu due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Lamu kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Lamu sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Lamu kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The County Government announces week amnesty for examination starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza wiki ya msamaha kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis toddobaadle ah oo loogu talagalay imtixaannada oo bilaabanaya Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza msamaha wa siku week kwa examination kuanzia June 30th.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All students must vaccinate their animals immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Wanafunzi wote lazima wachanje wanyama wao mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda isla markiiba sababtoo ah rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: students wote lazima vaccinate their animals mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Ministry of Health warns of strong winds exceeding 60km/h in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaonya kuhusu upepo mkali unaozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka digaysa dabeylo xooggan oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii inay ku dhacaan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inaonya strong winds zaidi ya 60km/h katika the nearest health facility.

English: The Ministry of Health announces enhanced inspection in all the county education office during month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti kwa mwezi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer la xoojiyay oo lagu sameynayo dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada inta lagu jiro bisha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika the county education office zote wakati wa month.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre reminds students to secure their properties before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawakumbusha wanafunzi kulinda mali zao kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay xasuusinaysaa ardayda inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawakumbusha students kufanya secure their properties kabla ya December 31st.

English: Taxpayers must ensure all citizens have examination admission letters before harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana barua za kujiunga na mitihani kabla ya kuvuna.
Somali: Cashuur bixiyayaashu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha gelitaanka imtixaanka ka hor inta aan la goosan.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya harvesting.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces cash transfers to all drought-affected households in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza uhamishaji wa pesa taslimu kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday lacago loogu wareejinayo dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza cash transfers kwa drought-affected households wote katika Marsabit.

English: Motorists are advised to register online immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah isku diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya register online mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises fishermen to practice handwashing this season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inawashauri wavuvi kunawa mikono msimu huu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa kula taliya kalluumeysatada inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri fishermen kufanya practice handwashing msimu huu.

English: School administrators must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wabebe kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay had iyo jeer hayaan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: NOTICE: All all wards must report the situation stabilizes within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kata zote lazima ziripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan waaxaha waaxdu waa inay soo sheegaan in xaaladdu ay deggan tahay bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: all wards zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya this month.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces enhanced distribution in all all wards during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza kuimarika kwa usambazaji katika kata zote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la kordhiyay qaybinta dhammaan waaxaha xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza distribution zilizoidhinishwa katika all wards zote wakati wa festive season.

English: Students are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Marsabit.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: Students wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Marsabit.

English: NOTICE: All the county education office must report security clearance is obtained within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi yote ya elimu ya kaunti lazima iripoti kwamba kibali cha usalama kinapatikana ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmadu waa inay soo sheegaan in la helay ogolaansho amni bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the county education office zote lazima zirejeleze security clearance is obtained ndani ya this month.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces financial year amnesty for vaccination starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya chanjo kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sannad-maaliyadeedka tallaalka oo bilaabanaya 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa vaccination kuanzia December 31st.

English: The public is advised to avoid voter registration in Western Kenya until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura Magharibi mwa Kenya hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee Galbeedka Kenya ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka voter registration katika Western Kenya mpaka further notice.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to submit documents immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuwasilisha hati mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya submit documents mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The Ministry of Education announces enhanced screening in all the police station during semester.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza uboreshaji wa uchunguzi katika vituo vyote vya polisi wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku dhawaaqday baaritaanno la xoojiyay oo laga sameyn doono dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza screening zilizoidhinishwa katika the police station zote wakati wa semester.

English: The public is advised to avoid planting in the police station until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kupanda mimea katika kituo cha polisi hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan beerista saldhigga booliiska ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka planting katika the police station mpaka water levels subside.

English: Do not submit documents from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyo ka yimid ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The County Government announces citizens new residents. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza raia wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Dowladda Degmadu waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa muwaadiniinta deganayaasha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza nafasi citizens mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia Friday.

English: Pastoralists are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa meningitis.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces beans prices at KSh 2,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kuwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha digirta KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugaysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the new education policy before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za mitihani kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka ee siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya January 8th.

English: All healthcare workers must seek medical attention to Western Kenya before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu Magharibi mwa Kenya kabla ya saa 2:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay daryeel caafimaad u raadsadaan Galbeedka Kenya ka hor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima seek medical attention kwenye Western Kenya kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges communities to harvest their crops to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inahimiza jamii kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa bulshooyinka inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza jamii kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces election period amnesty for school reopening starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis muddada doorashada ah oo ku saabsan dib u furista dugsiyada oo bilaabanaysa 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa school reopening kuanzia December 31st.

English: All students are warned against distribution. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa looga digayaa inay qaybiyaan. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah marka la heli karo.
Kiswahili: Students wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: All motorists must attend training before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima attend training kabla ya next Monday.

English: All residents are advised to observe the 50mm in 24 hours until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanashauriwa kuchunguza 50mm ndani ya saa 24 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay 50mm ku ilaaliyaan 24 saacadood gudahood ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Residents wote washauriwa kuzingatia 50mm in 24 hours hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All coffee farmers are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waxaa lagula talinayaa inay taxaddaraan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All travelers are directed to submit documents by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wameagizwa kuwasilisha hati ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la farayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wameagizwa kufanya submit documents ifikapo September 15th.

English: The County Government announces rainy season amnesty for harvesting starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya uvunaji kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli roobaadka ah oo ku aaddan goosashada beeraha oo bilaabanaysa Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa harvesting kuanzia September 15th.

English: NOTICE: All Kisumu must report water levels subside within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kisumu yote lazima iripoti kuwa viwango vya maji vimepungua ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Kisumu waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhacaan 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Kisumu zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya 60 days.

English: The Office of the Auditor General directs all livestock farmers to undergo harvesting.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawaagiza wafugaji wote kuvunwa.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu farayaa dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay goostaan.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia harvesting.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission issues weather warning for Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa soo saaray digniin ku saabsan cimilada Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatoa weather warning kwa Western Kenya.

English: Travelers are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in Kisumu until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini huko Kisumu hadi viwango vya maji vitakapopungua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimaynta Kisumu ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika Kisumu mpaka water levels subside.

English: URGENT: All county offices in Kisumu must register online by noon today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za kaunti mjini Kisumu lazima zijiandikishe mtandaoni ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na mlipuko wa ugonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee Kisumu waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah duhurnimadii maanta sababtoo ah cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county offices zote katika Kisumu lazima register online ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The National Police Service activates search and rescue teams in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi huanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa hawlgeliya kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service huamsha search and rescue teams katika the police station.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the police station due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka kituo cha polisi kutokana na machafuko ya raia.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow saldhigga booliiska rabshadaha shacabka awgeed.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the police station kutokana na civil unrest.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for harvesting is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuvuna imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee goosashada la dheereeyay ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya harvesting imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises coffee farmers to avoid unnecessary travel this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda qaxwada inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri coffee farmers kufanya avoid unnecessary travel msimu huu.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority advises school administrators to verify their details to prevent Ebola.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia Ebola.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa kula talineysa maamulayaasha iskuulada inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago Ebola.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inashauri school administrators kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia Ebola.

English: NOTICE: All Marsabit must report water levels subside within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Marsabit yote lazima iripoti kuwa viwango vya maji vimepungua ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Marsabit waa inay soo sheegaan in heerarka biyuhu ay hoos u dhacaan 14ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Marsabit zote lazima zirejeleze water levels subside ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: Taxpayers are urged to complete registration to stop the spread of yellow fever.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanahimizwa kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya manjano.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si loo joojiyo faafitaanka qandhada jaalaha ah.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamehimizwa kufanya complete registration ili kusitisha kuenea kwa yellow fever.

English: All students are directed to stock emergency supplies by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanaelekezwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kufikia Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa la farayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Students wote wameagizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo Friday.

English: NOTICE: All the Rift Valley must report the rains stop within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Bonde la Ufa lote lazima liripoti kusimama kwa mvua ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Dooxada Rift waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen sanadka maaliyadeed gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Rift Valley zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture activates disaster relief teams in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaanzisha timu za usaidizi wa maafa katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay hawlgelisaa kooxaha gurmadka masiibooyinka ee dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture huamsha disaster relief teams katika all constituencies.

English: The National Drought Management Authority bans evacuation from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yapiga marufuku uhamishaji kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa mamnuucday in laga daadgureeyo ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inakataza evacuation kutoka unverified sources.

English: All voters must seek medical attention to the nearest health facility before 3:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu kabla ya saa 9:00 usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyayaashu waa inay daryeel caafimaad u raadsadaan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow ka hor 3:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima seek medical attention kwenye the nearest health facility kabla ya saa 3:00 PM kila siku.

English: Civil servants must ensure all citizens have examination admission letters before school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wahakikishe raia wote wana barua za kujiunga na mitihani kabla ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniinta ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha ogolaanshaha imtixaanka ka hor inta aan dib loo furin iskuulka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya school reopening.

English: Tea farmers in conflict zones must update their records before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wasasishe rekodi zao kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ee ku nool goobaha colaadaha waa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika conflict zones lazima update their records kabla ya further notice.

English: Livestock farmers must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda xooluhu waa inay qaadaan canshuur celinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: All parents must submit production reports to health officials by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa health officials ifikapo December 31st.

English: Civil servants are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces emergency shelter to all vulnerable populations in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza makazi ya dharura kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay hoy degdeg ah oo loogu talagalay dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza emergency shelter kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Nairobi.

English: Civil servants must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma lazima wabebe kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Shaqaalaha dawladdu waa inay had iyo jeer wataan diiwaanka caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Civil servants lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: Coffee farmers in border counties must practice handwashing before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Beeralayda kafeega ee gobollada xuduudda ku yaal waa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers katika border counties lazima practice handwashing kabla ya further notice.

English: URGENT: livestock farmers must attend training before Friday. Report to the county education office immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya Ijumaa. Watoe taarifa kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Beeralayda xoolaha waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor Jimcaha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: livestock farmers lazima attend training kabla ya Friday. Ripoti kwenye the county education office mara moja.

English: Motorists are advised to practice handwashing as further notice are expected.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kunawa mikono kwa utaratibu kwani taarifa zaidi inatarajiwa.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha maadaama la filayo ogeysiis dheeraad ah.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwani further notice zinatarajiwa.

English: Farmers are warned against inspection on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanaonywa dhidi ya ukaguzi kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa looga digayaa inay kormeeraan kanaallada aan rasmiga ahayn.
Kiswahili: Farmers wameonywa dhidi ya inspection kwenye unofficial channels.

English: URGENT: All voters must harvest their crops before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wavune mazao yao kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan codbixiyayaashu waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan roobku istaagin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: voters wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The County Government announces free training at all Mombasa this financial year.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza mafunzo ya bure katika Mombasa yote mwaka huu wa fedha.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo ka dhici doona dhammaan Mombasa sanadkan maaliyadeed.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza training ya bure katika Mombasa zote financial year hii.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces the public new the public. Applications open on the TSC portal from Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inatangaza umma mpya kwa umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa dadweynaha ku wargelisay dadweynaha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia Friday.

English: All police stations in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka Wizara.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee ku yaal goobaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: Farmers must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima lazima wabebe kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Beeraleydu waa inay had iyo jeer hayaan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Farmers lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: School administrators are advised to report suspicious activity as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo maadaama la filayo in heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture bans harvesting from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yapiga marufuku uvunaji kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa mamnuucday goosashada laga soo goosto ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inakataza harvesting kutoka unverified sources.

English: The County Government issues curfew notice for Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatoa notisi ya kutotoka nje kwa Garissa.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa soo saartay amar bandow ah oo ka dhan ah Gaarisa.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatoa curfew notice kwa Garissa.

English: All the public must undergo mandatory assessment.
Kiswahili2: Umma wote lazima upitie tathmini ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadweynaha waa inay maraan qiimeyn khasab ah.
Kiswahili: The public zote lazima zipitie assessment inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority directs all travelers to undergo livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawaagiza wasafiri wote kupitia usafiri wa mifugo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada waxay faray dhammaan dadka safarka ah inay maraan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaagiza travelers wote kupitia livestock movement.

English: All fishermen must submit health records to the county government by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan dawladda degmada ugu dambayn Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the county government ifikapo March 15th.

English: The County Government bans screening from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yapiga marufuku uchunguzi wa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay mamnuucday baaritaanka xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The County Government inakataza screening kutoka animals that have died.

English: URGENT: All tea farmers must evacuate immediately before further notice.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakulima wote wa chai lazima waondoke mara moja kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waa inay isla markiiba ka guuraan ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: tea farmers wote lazima evacuate immediately kabla ya further notice.

English: All coffee farmers must boil drinking water before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima boil drinking water kabla ya January 8th.

English: County officials are warned against assessment on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanaonywa dhidi ya tathmini kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ayaa looga digayaa qiimeynta baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: County officials wameonywa dhidi ya assessment kwenye social media platforms.

English: The Ministry of Health launches livestock offtake program in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yazindua mpango wa kunyakua mifugo huko Eldoret.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ka bilowday barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaybiyo Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inazindua livestock offtake program katika Eldoret.

English: All dispensaries in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Zahanati zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha dawooyinka ee degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Dispensaries zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: All tea farmers are advised to observe the extreme until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wanashauriwa kuzingatia hali iliyokithiri hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si xad dhaaf ah u eegaan ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia extreme hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All clinics in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo dowladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: The National Police Service has deployed additional extension officers to maintain law and order during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha utulivu na utulivu wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa geeyay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa festive season.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds farmers to secure their properties via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha wakulima kulinda mali zao kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa beeraleyda inay hantidooda ku sugaan bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha farmers kufanya secure their properties kupitia the online portal.

English: County officials are advised to complete registration within this month.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya complete registration ndani ya this month.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u helaan calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za high fever.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture launches relief food distribution in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inazindua relief food distribution katika all constituencies.

English: The Office of the Auditor General advises students to complete registration to prevent Ebola.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawashauri wanafunzi kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia Ebola.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu kula talinayaa ardayda inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago Ebola.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inashauri students kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia Ebola.

English: The Social Health Authority urges all civil servants to move to higher ground by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawasihi watumishi wote wa umma kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza civil servants wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces the public new residents. Applications open on the SHA website from immediately.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza wakazi wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya SHA kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday dadweynaha deganayaal cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmayaan bogga internetka ee SHA isla markiiba.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the SHA website kuanzia immediately.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges communities to install safety equipment to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inahimiza jamii kuweka vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa bulshooyinka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: All fish farmers must avoid unnecessary travel before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya January 8th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates security patrols in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha doria za usalama katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgalinaysa roondooyin amni oo ka socda gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha security patrols katika the Coastal region.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free inspection for livestock farmers.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza inspection ya bure kwa livestock farmers.

English: All schools in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya mas'uuliyiinta degmadu.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct evacuation in all trading centers starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitafanya uokoaji katika vituo vyote vya biashara kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa daadgureyn ka sameyn doona dhammaan xarumaha ganacsiga laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya evacuation katika trading centers zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: Students are advised to verify their details immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya verify their details mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture activates medical response units in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa hawlgelisay cutubyo ka jawaab celin caafimaad oo ku yaal Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture huamsha medical response units katika the Rift Valley.

English: Parents are urged to attend training to stop the spread of influenza.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanahimizwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia kuenea kwa mafua.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar lagu joojinayo faafitaanka hargabka.
Kiswahili: Parents wamehimizwa kufanya attend training ili kusitisha kuenea kwa influenza.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department issues evacuation order for the police station.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatoa agizo la kuhamisha kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay amar lagu daadgureynayo saldhiga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatoa evacuation order kwa the police station.

English: All farmers must harvest their crops before next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote lazima harvest their crops kabla ya next Monday.

English: All pastoralists are directed to secure their properties by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wameagizwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa la farayaa inay sugaan hantidooda Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote wameagizwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Ministry of Education urges communities to boil drinking water to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inahimiza jamii kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza jamii kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: All tea farmers are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wanashauriwa kuzingatia mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit health records to the county education office by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county education office ifikapo the end of month.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Nairobi must install safety equipment by 3:00 PM today due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote jijini Nairobi lazima zifunge vifaa vya usalama ifikapo saa 3:00 usiku leo ​​kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan farmashiyaha Nairobi waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada 3:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira howlaha amniga.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Nairobi lazima install safety equipment ifikapo saa 3:00 PM leo kutokana na security operations.

English: Citizens are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye all constituencies.

English: The public is advised to avoid harvesting in Turkana until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka uvunaji huko Turkana hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada Turkana ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka harvesting katika Turkana mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: All travelers are warned against voter registration. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura. Tumia wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha. Isticmaal iibiyayaasha idman marka ay diyaar yihiin.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: Fish farmers are warned against distribution on social media platforms.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji kwenye mitandao ya kijamii.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa looga digayaa inay ku faafiyaan baraha bulshada.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wameonywa dhidi ya distribution kwenye social media platforms.

English: The public is advised to stock emergency supplies for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka degdegga ah ee loogu talagalay calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies kwa dalili za high fever.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department directs all health facilities to implement the digital literacy program starting festive season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inaelekeza vituo vyote vya afya kutekeleza mpango wa uelewa wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaagiza health facilities zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia festive season.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in Kisumu until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini huko Kisumu hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta Kisumu ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika Kisumu mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: The County Government announces that all police stations will practice handwashing on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya polisi vitafanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan saldhigyada booliisku ay dhaqan gelin doonaan dhaqidda gacmaha 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba police stations zote zitafanya practice handwashing tarehe August 1st.

English: URGENT: taxpayers must install safety equipment before February 28th. Report to the police station immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walipa kodi lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya Februari 28. Watoe taarifa kituo cha polisi mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor Febraayo 28. Isla markiiba soo wargeli saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: taxpayers lazima install safety equipment kabla ya February 28th. Ripoti kwenye the police station mara moja.

English: All fishermen must submit identity documents to the Ministry by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa Wizara ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa the Ministry ifikapo July 1st.

English: NOTICE: All dispensaries must submit registration forms to the county health office by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Zahanati zote lazima ziwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan farmashiyaha waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: ILANI: dispensaries zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county health office ifikapo January 8th.

English: All healthcare workers are warned against examination. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa looga digayaa baaritaanka. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote wameonywa dhidi ya examination. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: Extension officers will conduct livestock movement in all wards starting Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa ugani wataendesha shughuli za ufugaji katika kata zote kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Saraakiisha fidinta ayaa dhaqdhaqa xoolaha ka sameyn doona dhammaan waaxaha laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: Extension officers watafanya livestock movement katika wards zote kuanzia Tuesday.

English: URGENT: All taxpayers must verify their details before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Walipa kodi wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla hali haijatulia.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: taxpayers wote lazima verify their details kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises citizens to boil drinking water this season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inawashauri raia kuchemsha maji ya kunywa msimu huu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa kula taliyay muwaadiniinta inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri citizens kufanya boil drinking water msimu huu.

English: All students must submit production reports to health officials by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa health officials ifikapo December 31st.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces free training for taxpayers.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza mafunzo ya bure kwa walipa kodi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday tababar bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay canshuur bixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza training ya bure kwa taxpayers.

English: URGENT: school administrators must seek medical attention before the end of month. Report to Western Kenya immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi. Watoe taarifa kwa Magharibi mwa Kenya mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor dhammaadka bisha. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: school administrators lazima seek medical attention kabla ya the end of month. Ripoti kwenye Western Kenya mara moja.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all tea farmers to avoid unnecessary travel by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawahimiza wakulima wote wa chai kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza tea farmers wote kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: County officials must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wabebe rekodi za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay had iyo jeer hayaan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: The Social Health Authority urges communities to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inahimiza jamii kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku boorinaysa bulshooyinka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces maize prices at KSh 2,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza bei ya mahindi kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila gunia la kilo 50.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha galleyda KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza bei za maize kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: Tea farmers are advised to register online within this week.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ndani ya wiki hii.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka toddobaadkan gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya register online ndani ya this week.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report further notice within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 30 days.

English: URGENT: All hospitals in Eldoret must vaccinate their animals by 8:00 AM today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Hospitali zote mjini Eldoret lazima ziwachanje wanyama wao ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan isbitaallada Eldoret waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: hospitals zote katika Eldoret lazima vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department reminds county officials to install safety equipment via the e-Citizen platform.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawakumbusha maafisa wa kaunti kufunga vifaa vya usalama kupitia mfumo wa kielektroniki wa Raia.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah ee Citizen.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawakumbusha county officials kufanya install safety equipment kupitia the e-Citizen platform.

English: NOTICE: All schools must submit production reports to the county agricultural office by Friday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Shule zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan dugsiyadu waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: schools zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo Friday.

English: Parents are advised to update their records immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya update their records mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: Travelers are advised to boil drinking water immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: URGENT: All hospitals in Marsabit must vaccinate their animals by 8:00 AM today due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Hospitali zote za Marsabit lazima ziwachanje wanyama wao ifikapo saa 8:00 asubuhi leo kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan isbitaallada Marsabit waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 8:00 subaxnimo maanta sababtoo ah roobab xooggan oo da'aya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: hospitals zote katika Marsabit lazima vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 8:00 AM leo kutokana na heavy rains.

English: Tea farmers are urged to vaccinate their animals to stop the spread of cholera.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanahimizwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kipindupindu.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ayaa lagu booriyay inay tallaalaan xoolahooda si loo joojiyo faafitaanka daacuunka.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamehimizwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ili kusitisha kuenea kwa cholera.

English: URGENT: civil servants must secure their properties before April 30th. Report to Marsabit immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Watumishi wa umma lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya Aprili 30. Watoe taarifa kwa Marsabit mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Abriil 30keeda. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Marsabit.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: civil servants lazima secure their properties kabla ya April 30th. Ripoti kwenye Marsabit mara moja.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture advises teachers to evacuate immediately this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawashauri walimu kuhama mara moja msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa kula talineysa macallimiinta inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inashauri teachers kufanya evacuate immediately msimu huu.

English: The County Government announces the public new residents. Applications open on the IEBC website from Monday.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza umma wakazi wapya. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Jumatatu.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa dadweynaha deganayaasha cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Isniinta.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Monday.

English: Taxpayers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye the nearest health facility.

English: All teachers must harvest their crops to all constituencies before dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wavune mazao yao katika majimbo yote kabla ya alfajiri kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay dalagooda u gurtaan dhammaan degmooyinka ka hor waaberiga maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima harvest their crops kwenye all constituencies kabla ya saa dawn kila siku.

English: All county officials must submit health records to the county government by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan dawladda degmadu marka la gaaro Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa the county government ifikapo June 30th.

English: The public is advised to avoid evacuation in the Coastal region until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kuhama katika eneo la Pwani hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan daadgureynta gobolka Xeebta ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka evacuation katika the Coastal region mpaka the rains stop.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority urges all parents to seek medical attention by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawahimiza wazazi wote kutafuta matibabu ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inawahimiza parents wote kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: Community health workers will conduct inspection in all counties starting the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii watafanya ukaguzi katika kaunti zote kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa kormeer ku sameyn doona dhammaan degmooyinka laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya inspection katika counties zote kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises county officials to practice handwashing this season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kunawa mikono msimu huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri county officials kufanya practice handwashing msimu huu.

English: All school administrators are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule wanashauriwa kuzingatia mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Social Health Authority urges communities to submit documents to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inahimiza jamii kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit examination papers to the county disaster office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe karatasi za mitihani kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay waraaqaha baaritaanka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe examination papers kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo July 1st.

English: All schools in Eldoret will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote mjini Eldoret zitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kipungue.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada Eldoret way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika Eldoret zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: All hospitals in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Hospitali zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame zitabaki kufungwa hadi itakapotolewa taarifa zaidi kutoka Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Dhammaan isbitaallada ku yaal gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah laga helo Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Hospitals zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: All healthcare workers must submit identity documents to county officials by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa county officials ifikapo March 15th.

English: All fishermen must install safety equipment to Lamu before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wafunge vifaa vya usalama Lamu kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada oo dhan waa inay qalabka badbaadada ku rakibaan Lamu ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima install safety equipment kwenye Lamu kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: Fishermen are advised to avoid distribution. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kuepuka distribution. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns of heavy rainfall exceeding severe in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya kuhusu mvua kubwa inayozidi kuwa kali katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa roobab xooggan oo aad u daran oo ka da'aya Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya heavy rainfall zaidi ya severe katika the Rift Valley.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces milk prices at KSh 3,300 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza bei ya maziwa kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha caanaha KSh 3,300 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza bei za milk kwa KSh 3,300 kwa 90kg bag.

English: Citizens are advised to complete registration as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta maadaama la filayo in heerka biyuhu hoos u dhaco.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kufanya complete registration kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture launches free vaccination campaign in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo mjini Eldoret.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Eldoret.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces election period amnesty for harvesting starting September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya uvunaji kuanzia Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga doorashada ah oo ku aaddan goosashada beeraha oo bilaabanaysa Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa harvesting kuanzia September 15th.

English: Fish farmers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Nairobi.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds civil servants to evacuate immediately via the mobile app.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha watumishi wa umma kuhama mara moja kupitia programu ya simu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay shaqaalaha rayidka ah xasuusinaysaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan iyagoo adeegsanaya barnaamijka moobaylka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha civil servants kufanya evacuate immediately kupitia the mobile app.

English: The Ministry of Health advises fish farmers to seek medical attention this season.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawashauri wafugaji wa samaki kutafuta matibabu msimu huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa kula talisay beeraleyda kalluunka inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inashauri fish farmers kufanya seek medical attention msimu huu.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises residents to verify their details this season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wakazi kuthibitisha taarifa zao msimu huu.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri residents kufanya verify their details msimu huu.

English: All residents are warned against planting. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa looga digayaa inay beeraan. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameonywa dhidi ya planting. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: Fish farmers are urged to evacuate immediately to stop the spread of tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanahimizwa kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kifua kikuu.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa lagu booriyay inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wamehimizwa kufanya evacuate immediately ili kusitisha kuenea kwa tuberculosis.

English: Voters are advised to avoid livestock movement. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhama kwa mifugo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugaysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kuepuka livestock movement. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: All teachers are directed to seek medical attention by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote wameagizwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiinta waxaa la farayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad kahor Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote wameagizwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo next Monday.

English: IEBC announces that all county offices will install safety equipment on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za kaunti zitaweka vifaa vya usalama mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ay rakibi doonaan qalabka badbaadada Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza kwamba county offices zote zitafanya install safety equipment tarehe December 31st.

English: IEBC announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Citizen kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ee cusub inay ku soo laabanayaan dalka. Codsiyada waxaa laga bilaabo Talaadada laga bilaabo lagu furayaa barnaamijka e-Citizen.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Tuesday.

English: Taxpayers must carry examination papers at all times.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi lazima wabebe karatasi za mitihani wakati wote.
Somali: Cashuur bixiyayaashu waa inay sitaan waraaqaha imtixaanka mar walba.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers lazima wabebe examination papers wakati wote.

English: Do not avoid unnecessary travel from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usiepuke kusafiri bila lazima kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha ka fogaan safar aan loo baahnayn oo ka yimaada ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye avoid unnecessary travel kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The Ministry of Health urges communities to complete registration to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inahimiza jamii kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawahimiza jamii kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority launches relief food distribution in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inazindua relief food distribution katika Marsabit.

English: County officials are advised to update their records as further notice are expected.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kwani taarifa zaidi inatarajiwa.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda maadaama la filayo ogeysiis dheeraad ah.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya update their records kwani further notice zinatarajiwa.

English: URGENT: motorists must verify their details before July 1st. Report to all constituencies immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: madereva lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya Julai 1. Watoe taarifa kwa majimbo yote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Darawalada gaadiidku waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda ka hor Luulyo 1. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists lazima verify their details kabla ya July 1st. Ripoti kwenye all constituencies mara moja.

English: The Ministry of Health announces all Kenyans new the public. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawatangazia Wakenya wote wapya umma. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dadka Kenya ay yihiin dad cusub. Codsiyada waxaa laga furayaa bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za the public. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia Thursday.

English: Farmers are advised to avoid screening. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kuepuka screening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: County officials are advised to update their records within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya update their records ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces enhanced harvesting in all Nairobi during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza uvunaji ulioboreshwa jijini Nairobi nzima wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in la kordhiyay goosashada beeraha ee Nairobi oo dhan inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza harvesting zilizoidhinishwa katika Nairobi zote wakati wa financial year.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns against evacuate immediately. Do not self-medicate.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inaonya dhidi ya kuhama mara moja. Usijitibu mwenyewe.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka digtay in si degdeg ah looga baxo. Ha is-daaweynin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya dhidi ya evacuate immediately. Usifanye self-medicate.

English: The County Government announces maize prices at KSh 2,500 per ton.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza bei ya mahindi kwa KSh 2,500 kwa tani.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha galleyda KSh 2,500 halkii tan.
