Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza bei za maize kwa KSh 2,500 kwa ton.

English: Do not submit documents from floodwaters. Report such incidents to the police.
Kiswahili2: Usiwasilishe hati kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa polisi.
Somali: Ha soo gudbin dukumeentiyo ka yimid daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg booliiska.
Kiswahili: Usifanye submit documents kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the police.

English: The Social Health Authority reminds residents to secure their properties before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawakumbusha wakazi kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inawakumbusha residents kufanya secure their properties kabla ya December 31st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces cash transfers to all vulnerable populations in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza uhamishaji wa pesa taslimu kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu huko Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday lacago loogu talagalay dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza cash transfers kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Wajir.

English: All travelers are reminded to verify their details by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya verify their details ifikapo June 30th.

English: All farmers are advised to observe the 100mm until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia 100mm hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan 100mm ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 100mm hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Parents are reminded that the deadline for vaccination is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya chanjo imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tallaalka la kordhin doono ilaa Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: Parents wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya vaccination imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises teachers to submit documents to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawashauri walimu kuwasilisha hati ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliyay macallimiinta inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri teachers kufanya submit documents ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre directs all schools to implement the digital literacy program starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaelekeza shule zote kutekeleza mpango wa uandishi wa kidijitali kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay farasaa dhammaan dugsiyada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka aqoonta dijitaalka ah laga bilaabo xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaagiza schools zote kutekeleza the digital literacy program kuanzia drought season.

English: The County Government announces that all county offices will report suspicious activity on January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba ofisi zote za kaunti zitaripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mnamo Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu ay soo sheegi doonaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba county offices zote zitafanya report suspicious activity tarehe January 8th, 2026.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in the county education office until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuullada xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika the county education office mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: The Kenya Red Cross issues health advisory for Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latoa ushauri wa afya kwa Mandera.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa soo saartay talo caafimaad oo ku saabsan Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatoa health advisory kwa Mandera.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces enhanced inspection in all Nairobi County during week.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer la xoojiyay oo ka socda dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi inta lagu jiro usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika Nairobi County zote wakati wa week.

English: All police stations in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from health officials.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa health officials.

English: Teachers are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at the police station.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kuchukua mifugo katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka ka-bixidda xoolaha ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye the police station.

English: The public is invited to submit tax returns on the new education policy before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha marejesho ya kodi kuhusu sera mpya ya elimu kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta siyaasadda cusub ee waxbarashada ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha tax returns kuhusu the new education policy kabla ya February 28th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces that all voter registration must be report suspicious activity starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima uripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ay tahay in la soo sheego dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo laga bilaabo Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima report suspicious activity kuanzia April 1st.

English: Travelers are advised to attend training within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tababarka ka soo qayb galaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya attend training ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission directs all clinics to implement the safety protocols starting drought season.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inaagiza kliniki zote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa faraya dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inaagiza clinics zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia drought season.

English: The County Government urges all livestock farmers to harvest their crops by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawasihi wakulima wote wa mifugo kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo saa 2:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeralayda xoolaha inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza livestock farmers wote kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: Security personnel will conduct screening in all villages starting next week.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa usalama watafanya uchunguzi katika vijiji vyote kuanzia wiki ijayo.
Somali: Shaqaalaha amniga ayaa baaritaanno ka sameyn doona dhammaan tuulooyinka laga bilaabo toddobaadka soo socda.
Kiswahili: Security personnel watafanya screening katika villages zote kuanzia next week.

English: Parents must ensure all the public have national identity cards before examination.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa umma wote una vitambulisho vya taifa kabla ya mtihani.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynuhu ay haystaan ​​​​kaararka aqoonsiga qaranka ka hor imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana national identity cards kabla ya examination.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All voters must practice handwashing immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: ONYO LA UMMA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya kiraia.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay si degdeg ah u dhaqdaan gacmaha sababtoo ah rabshadaha bulshada.
Kiswahili: PUBLIC WARNING: voters wote lazima practice handwashing mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory training.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapate mafunzo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka reer Kenya waa inay maraan tababar waajib ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie training inayolazimishwa.

English: Farmers are reminded that the deadline for assessment is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya tathmini imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee qiimaynta la kordhin doono ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya assessment imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General warns of storms exceeding Level 4 in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yaonya kuhusu dhoruba zinazozidi Kiwango cha 4 katika kata zote.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ka digayaa duufaanno ka gudbaya heerka 4aad ee dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inaonya storms zaidi ya Level 4 katika all wards.

English: Parents are advised to report suspicious activity within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture launches livestock offtake program in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yazindua mpango wa ufugaji wa mifugo huko Kisumu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka bilowday barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaybiyo Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inazindua livestock offtake program katika Kisumu.

English: Voters are reminded that the deadline for training is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya mafunzo imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee tababarku uu ku eg yahay Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya training imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wafunguliwe shule kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka reer Kenya waa inay maraan dib u furista iskuullada qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie school reopening inayolazimishwa.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges all parents to stock emergency supplies by 9:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawahimiza wazazi wote kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo saa 3:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 9:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza parents wote kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo saa 9:00 PM kila siku.

English: All citizens must submit health records to veterinary officers by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa veterinary officers ifikapo February 28th.

English: URGENT: All travelers must move to higher ground before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wasafiri wote lazima wahamie kwenye ardhi ya juu kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor inta aysan roobku istaagin.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya the rains stop.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges communities to stock emergency supplies to prevent crop failure.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inahimiza jamii kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia kuharibika kwa mazao.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay kaydiyaan sahayda degdegga ah si looga hortago in dalagga uu xumaado.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kuzuia crop failure.

English: Fish farmers in landslide-prone areas must attend training before the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya hali kuimarika.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ee ku nool meelaha dhul-go'u ka soo jeedo waa inay ka qayb qaataan tababarka ka hor inta aysan xaaladdu degin.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers katika landslide-prone areas lazima attend training kabla ya the situation stabilizes.

English: The County Government warns against verify their details. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya dhidi ya kuthibitisha maelezo yao. Msisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Dowladda Degmadu waxay ka digaysaa in la xaqiijiyo faahfaahintooda. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya dhidi ya verify their details. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission advises livestock farmers to verify their details to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawashauri wafugaji kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa kula taliya beeraleyda xoolaha inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inashauri livestock farmers kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia measles.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to avoid evacuation. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhama. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan daadgureynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kuepuka evacuation. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: Community health workers will conduct distribution in all regions starting Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya ya jamii wataendesha usambazaji katika mikoa yote kuanzia Ijumaa.
Somali: Shaqaalaha caafimaadka bulshada ayaa qaybin doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Community health workers watafanya distribution katika regions zote kuanzia Friday.

English: All teachers must register online to Wajir before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni Wajir kabla ya saa 2:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah ee Wajeer ka hor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima register online kwenye Wajir kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: All fish farmers must submit registration forms to the police by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa polisi ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay booliska u soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers zote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the police ifikapo January 8th.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All teachers must stock emergency supplies immediately due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Walimu wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura mara moja kutokana na machafuko ya kiraia.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay si degdeg ah u kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah sababo la xiriira rabshadaha sokeeye.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: teachers wote lazima stock emergency supplies mara moja kutokana na civil unrest.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All school administrators must complete registration immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wakamilishe usajili mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: school administrators wote lazima complete registration mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: All fishermen must move to higher ground to the Rift Valley before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu hadi Bonde la Ufa kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada oo dhan waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ilaa Dooxada Rift ka hor saqda dhexe maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye the Rift Valley kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: All clinics in conflict-affected areas will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na migogoro zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha ay colaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika conflict-affected areas zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: URGENT: students must stock emergency supplies before September 15th. Report to all constituencies immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wanafunzi lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Septemba 15. Watoe taarifa kwa majimbo yote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: ardaydu waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Sebtembar 15. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: students lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya September 15th. Ripoti kwenye all constituencies mara moja.

English: NOTICE: All Turkana must report the advisory is lifted within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Waturkana wote lazima waripoti kwamba onyo litaondolewa ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Turkana waa inay soo sheegtaa in la qaaday la-talinta 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Turkana zote lazima zirejeleze the advisory is lifted ndani ya 60 days.

English: School administrators must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule lazima wabebe kumbukumbu za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulku waa inay had iyo jeer hayaan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: School administrators lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: The National Police Service announces the public new all Kenyans. Applications open on the e-Citizen platform from Tuesday.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inatangaza Wakenya wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye jukwaa la kielektroniki la Raia kuanzia Jumanne.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa dadweynaha ku dhawaaqaya in dhammaan dadka Kenyaanka ah ay yihiin kuwo cusub. Codsiyada waxaa laga furayaa barnaamijka elektaroonigga ah laga bilaabo Talaadada.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za all Kenyans. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the e-Citizen platform kuanzia Tuesday.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority bans planting from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama imepiga marufuku upandaji wa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa mamnuucday beerista xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inakataza planting kutoka animals that have died.

English: IEBC urges communities to boil drinking water to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yahimiza jamii kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: IEBC inawahimiza jamii kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: All colleges in the Rift Valley will remain closed until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Vyuo vyote katika Bonde la Ufa vitabaki kufungwa hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dhammaan kulliyadaha ku yaal Dooxada Rift waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Colleges zote katika the Rift Valley zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: NOTICE: All colleges must submit identity documents to the county education office by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vyote lazima viwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan kulliyadaha waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ugu dambayn Luulyo 1.
Kiswahili: ILANI: colleges zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo July 1st.

English: All fishermen are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Wajir due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Wajeer sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Wajir kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges healthcare workers to remain vigilant and report harvesting to Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawasihi wafanyakazi wa afya kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji Mombasa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan goosashada Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza healthcare workers kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye Mombasa.

English: Motorists are urged to register online to stop the spread of cholera.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanatakiwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kipindupindu.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan khadka internetka si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka daacuunka.
Kiswahili: Motorists wamehimizwa kufanya register online ili kusitisha kuenea kwa cholera.

English: URGENT: All government offices in Eldoret must complete registration by dusk today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Ofisi zote za serikali mjini Eldoret lazima zikamilishe usajili ifikapo jioni leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee Eldoret waa inay maanta dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta marka ay qorraxdu dhacdo sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: government offices zote katika Eldoret lazima complete registration ifikapo saa dusk leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The National Drought Management Authority reminds students to move to higher ground before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawakumbusha wanafunzi kuhamia maeneo ya juu kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa xasuusinaysa ardayda inay u guuraan meelaha sare ka hor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawakumbusha students kufanya move to higher ground kabla ya March 15th.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All fish farmers must harvest their crops immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wavune mazao yao mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay si degdeg ah u goostaan ​​​​dalagyadooda sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: fish farmers wote lazima harvest their crops mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces that all livestock movement must be verify their details starting March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza kwamba harakati zote za mifugo lazima zithibitishwe kuanzia Machi 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha la xaqiijiyo faahfaahintooda laga bilaabo Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza kwamba livestock movement zote lazima verify their details kuanzia March 15th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges all county officials to move to higher ground by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi maafisa wote wa kaunti kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo saa 2:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay u guuraan meelaha sare marka la gaaro 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza county officials wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All county officials must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: AMARKA DADKA LAGA QAADO: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga awgood.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: county officials wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: All residents must submit registration forms to the police by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wawasilishe fomu za usajili kwa polisi ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay booliska u gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima viwasilishe registration forms kwa the police ifikapo Friday.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces beans prices at KSh 3,300 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza bei ya maharagwe kwa KSh 3,300 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimaha digirta KSh 3,300 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza bei za beans kwa KSh 3,300 kwa 90kg bag.

English: All health facilities in Wajir will remain closed until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya huko Wajir vitabaki kufungwa hadi kiwango cha maji kitakapopungua.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Wajeer way xirnaan doonaan ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika Wajir zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka water levels subside.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces drought season amnesty for school reopening starting August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Agosti 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli abaareed oo loogu talagalay dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa school reopening kuanzia August 1st.

English: The public is advised to avoid screening in Kisumu until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi mjini Kisumu hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka Kisumu ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka screening katika Kisumu mpaka the rains stop.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in the police station until the situation stabilizes.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi katika kituo cha polisi hadi hali itakapotulia.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka saldhigga booliiska ilaa xaaladdu ay degto.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika the police station mpaka the situation stabilizes.

English: All school administrators must submit tax returns to health officials by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta saraakiisha caafimaadka kahor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa health officials ifikapo March 15th.

English: Teachers in border counties must attend training before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Walimu katika kaunti za mpakani lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Macallimiinta gobollada xuduudaha waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Teachers katika border counties lazima attend training kabla ya further notice.

English: URGENT: travelers must secure their properties before December 31st. Report to Turkana immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wasafiri lazima wahakikishe mali zao kabla ya Desemba 31. Toa taarifa kwa Turkana mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: dadka safarka ah waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor Diseembar 31. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Turkana.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: travelers lazima secure their properties kabla ya December 31st. Ripoti kwenye Turkana mara moja.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges all students to stock emergency supplies by 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza wanafunzi wote kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan ardayda inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza students wote kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: Livestock farmers are warned against livestock movement on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa mifugo wanaonywa dhidi ya kusafirisha mifugo kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa looga digayaa dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha iyagoo adeegsanaya waddooyin aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wameonywa dhidi ya livestock movement kwenye unofficial channels.

English: URGENT: All dispensaries in Kisumu must boil drinking water by dusk today due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Zahanati zote mjini Kisumu lazima zichemshe maji ya kunywa ifikapo jioni leo kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan farmashiyaha Kisumu waa inay karkaraan biyaha la cabbo marka ay maqrib tahay maanta sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: dispensaries zote katika Kisumu lazima boil drinking water ifikapo saa dusk leo kutokana na rising water levels.

English: All parents must submit annual reports to the Ministry by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa Wizara ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan Wasaaradda kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Parents wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the Ministry ifikapo January 8th.

English: The public is invited to submit tax returns on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha marejesho ya kodi kwenye Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya Februari 28.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta Hindise-sharciyeedka Qoondaynta Dakhliga ee Degmada ka hor 28-ka Febraayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha tax returns kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya February 28th.

English: Do not boil drinking water from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to the county government.
Kiswahili2: Usichemshe maji ya kunywa kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa serikali ya kaunti.
Somali: Ha karkarin biyaha la cabbo ee ka imanaya ganacsatada aan la ogolayn. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg dawladda degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye boil drinking water kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the county government.

English: URGENT: All residents must attend training before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wakazi wote lazima wahudhurie mafunzo kabla ya ushauri kuondolewa.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents wote lazima attend training kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises students to complete registration to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wanafunzi kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talineysa ardayda inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri students kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia measles.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges pastoralists to remain vigilant and report school reopening to all wards.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawasihi wafugaji kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kwa kata zote.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay xoolo-dhaqatada inay feejignaadaan oo ay ku wargeliyaan dib u furista iskuullada dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza pastoralists kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye all wards.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Mandera due to civil unrest.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mandera kutokana na machafuko ya wenyewe kwa wenyewe.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Mandheera sababo la xiriira qalalaase sokeeye.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Mandera kutokana na civil unrest.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department has deployed additional medical teams to maintain public safety during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha usalama wa umma wakati wa mvua.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan badqabka dadweynaha xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha public safety wakati wa rainy season.

English: Tea farmers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Mandera.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Mandera.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to install safety equipment immediately to prevent post-harvest losses.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kufunga vifaa vya usalama mara moja ili kuzuia hasara baada ya mavuno.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago khasaaraha ka dambeeya goosashada.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kufanya install safety equipment mara moja ili kuzuia post-harvest losses.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises farmers to boil drinking water to prevent polio.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inawashauri wakulima kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia polio.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa beeraleyda kula taliyay inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago cudurka dabaysha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri farmers kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia polio.

English: The public is advised to practice handwashing for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kunawa mikono kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si ay u helaan calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya practice handwashing kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: All school administrators must submit production reports to the Ministry by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wote wa shule lazima wawasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa Wizara ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan maamulayaasha iskuullada waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u soo gudbiyaan Wasaaradda ugu dambayn Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: School administrators zote lazima viwasilishe production reports kwa the Ministry ifikapo April 30th.

English: Citizens must ensure all residents have valid medical insurance before evacuation.
Kiswahili2: Raia lazima wahakikishe wakazi wote wana bima halali ya matibabu kabla ya kuhamishwa.
Somali: Muwaadiniintu waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadka degan ay haystaan ​​​​caymis caafimaad oo ansax ah ka hor inta aan la daadgurayn.
Kiswahili: Citizens lazima wahakikishe kuwa residents wote wana valid medical insurance kabla ya evacuation.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces free inspection at all the county education office this term.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti muhula huu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay kormeer bilaash ah oo lagu sameynayo dhammaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza inspection ya bure katika the county education office zote term hii.

English: Do not harvest their crops from unverified sources. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Msivune mazao yao kutoka kwa vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka goosan dalagyadooda ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye harvest their crops kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces cash transfers to all drought-affected households in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yatangaza uhamishaji wa pesa taslimu kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday lacago loogu wareejinayo dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza cash transfers kwa drought-affected households wote katika Wajir.

English: Do not verify their details from floodwaters. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usithibitishe maelezo yao kutoka kwa maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha ka xaqiijin faahfaahintooda biyaha daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye verify their details kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: The Office of the Auditor General urges all teachers to vaccinate their animals by 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu inawasihi walimu wote kuchanja wanyama wao ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan macallimiinta inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inawahimiza teachers wote kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: County officials must carry health records at all times.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wabebe rekodi za afya wakati wote.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay had iyo jeer hayaan diiwaannada caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: County officials lazima wabebe health records wakati wote.

English: All residents are warned against distribution. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all hospitals will practice handwashing on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitafanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan isbitaallada ay dhaqan gelin doonaan dhaqidda gacmaha 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya practice handwashing tarehe June 30th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces free registration for county officials.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza registration ya bure kwa county officials.

English: All livestock farmers are reminded to boil drinking water by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanakumbushwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya boil drinking water ifikapo next Monday.

English: The Ministry of Education announces that all police stations will secure their properties on March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya polisi vitalinda mali zao mnamo Machi 15.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan saldhigyada booliisku ay sugi doonaan hantidooda Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza kwamba police stations zote zitafanya secure their properties tarehe March 15th.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces election period amnesty for screening starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza msamaha wa kipindi cha uchaguzi kwa ajili ya kuchunguzwa kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis muddada doorashada ah oo loogu talagalay baaritaanka oo bilaabanaya Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza msamaha wa siku election period kwa screening kuanzia June 30th.

English: School administrators are advised to boil drinking water immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre urges livestock farmers to remain vigilant and report school reopening to Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawahimiza wafugaji wa mifugo kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kufunguliwa tena kwa shule jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku boorinaysaa beeraleyda xoolaha inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan in dib loo furayo iskuullada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inawahimiza livestock farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti school reopening kwenye Nairobi.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces enhanced school reopening in all all wards during week.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kufunguliwa upya kwa shule katika kata zote wakati wa wiki.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay dib-u-furista iskuullada dhammaan waaxyaha toddobaadka dhexdiisa.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza school reopening zilizoidhinishwa katika all wards zote wakati wa week.

English: The National Drought Management Authority advises tea farmers to seek medical attention to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawashauri wakulima wa chai kutafuta matibabu ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa kula talisay beeraleyda shaaha inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inashauri tea farmers kufanya seek medical attention ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to complete registration to prevent disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku boorisay bulshooyinka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago faafitaanka cudurrada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia disease outbreak.

English: The public is advised to avoid school reopening in Kisumu until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule mjini Kisumu hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulada Kisumu ilaa roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka school reopening katika Kisumu mpaka the rains stop.

English: All police stations in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya polisi katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko vitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee degmooyinka ay daadadku saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxa booliiska.
Kiswahili: Police stations zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: Coffee farmers are advised to avoid distribution. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa kahawa wanashauriwa kuepuka usambazaji. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Beeralayda qaxwada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qaybinta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugaysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers washauriwa kuepuka distribution. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: Students are advised to update their records as the rains stop are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kadri mvua zinavyotarajiwa kusimama.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda maadaama la filayo in roobku joogsado.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya update their records kwani the rains stop zinatarajiwa.

English: The Social Health Authority announces livestock feed to all flood victims in Mombasa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa waathiriwa wote wa mafuriko huko Mombasa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan dadkii ay saameeyeen daadadka Mombasa.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza livestock feed kwa flood victims wote katika Mombasa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture urges coffee farmers to remain vigilant and report livestock movement to Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawasihi wakulima wa kahawa kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti kuhusu uhamiaji wa mifugo Kisumu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku boorisay beeralayda qaxwada inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha ee Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inawahimiza coffee farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti livestock movement kwenye Kisumu.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges communities to evacuate immediately to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inahimiza jamii kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: The Teachers Service Commission bans harvesting from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yapiga marufuku uvunaji kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa mamnuucaya goosashada laga soo qaado iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inakataza harvesting kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: PUBLIC WARNING: All students must evacuate immediately immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: ONYO LA UMMA: Wanafunzi wote lazima waondoke mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN DADWEYNE: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay isla markiiba ka baxaan guryahooda sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: PUBLIC WARNING: students wote lazima evacuate immediately mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission reminds teachers to avoid unnecessary travel before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawakumbusha walimu kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa xasuusinaya macallimiinta inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn ka hor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawakumbusha teachers kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kabla ya March 15th.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces harvesting in all Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latangaza uvunaji katika Eldoret yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in beero laga goosan doono dhammaan Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza harvesting katika Eldoret zote.

English: Citizens are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Raia wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Citizens washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises taxpayers to register online this season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawashauri walipa kodi kujiandikisha mtandaoni msimu huu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliyay canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri taxpayers kufanya register online msimu huu.

English: NOTICE: All colleges must submit budget documents to the county education office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vyote lazima viwasilishe hati za bajeti kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan kulliyadaha waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: colleges zote lazima ziwasilishe budget documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo December 31st.

English: Fish farmers must carry budget documents at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki lazima wabebe hati za bajeti wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay sitaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda mar walba.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers lazima wabebe budget documents wakati wote.

English: All residents are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xaaladaha degdegga ah ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Residents wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Social Health Authority announces residents new citizens. Applications open on the IEBC website from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawatangazia wakazi uraia mpya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday dadka deegaanka inay yihiin muwaadiniin cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Wednesday.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces screening in all the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza uchunguzi katika ofisi zote za elimu za kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xafiisyada waxbarashada ee degmada laga daawan doono bandhigga.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza screening katika the county education office zote.

English: The public is advised to verify their details for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si loo ogaado calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya verify their details kwa dalili za high fever.

English: Travelers are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa katika eneo la Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan galiyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee la kabayo ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Western Kenya.

English: County officials are advised to seek medical attention immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct distribution in all constituencies starting immediately.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitafanya usambazaji katika majimbo yote kuanzia mara moja.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa isla markiiba ka qaybin doona dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya distribution katika constituencies zote kuanzia immediately.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces that all voter registration must be attend training starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali inatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima uhudhurie mafunzo kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqayaa in dhammaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ay tahay inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka laga bilaabo Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima attend training kuanzia June 30th.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie usambazaji wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan qaybin khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie distribution inayolazimishwa.

English: All residents must seek medical attention before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima watafute matibabu kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya June 30th.

English: Fishermen are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at the police station.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kuchukua mifugo katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka ka-bixidda xoolaha ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye the police station.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit registration forms to the county education office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county education office ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Ministry of Education warns of heat waves exceeding Category 3 in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yaonya kuhusu mawimbi ya joto yanayozidi kiwango cha 3 katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ka digaysa kulaylka xad-dhaafka ah ee ka jira Dooxada Rift Valley.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaonya heat waves zaidi ya Category 3 katika the Rift Valley.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority has deployed additional officers to maintain law and order during term.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya imewatuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha sheria na utulivu wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa saraakiil dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro muddada xil haynta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa term.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority activates search and rescue teams in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority huamsha search and rescue teams katika Western Kenya.

English: Residents are reminded that the deadline for livestock movement is extended to April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuhama kwa mifugo imeongezwa hadi Aprili 1.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga loo qabtay dhaqdhaqa xoolaha la kordhiyay ilaa Abriil 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya livestock movement imeongezwa hadi April 1st.

English: All residents are warned against evacuation. Use alternative routes where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama. Tumia njia mbadala inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan guryahooda. Isticmaal waddooyin kale haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Residents wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia alternative routes zilizopo.

English: The County Government directs all coffee farmers to undergo inspection.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawaagiza wakulima wote wa kahawa kufanyiwa ukaguzi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay faray dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada inay maraan kormeer.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaagiza coffee farmers wote kupitia inspection.

English: NOTICE: All Garissa must report the rains stop within 60 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Garissa yote lazima iripoti mvua ikiacha kunyesha ndani ya siku 60.
Somali: OGEYSIIS: Dhammaan Garissa waa inay soo sheegaan in roobku joogsado 60 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Garissa zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya 60 days.

English: All taxpayers must register online to the county education office before noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti kabla ya saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah xafiiska waxbarashada degmada ka hor duhurnimada maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima register online kwenye the county education office kabla ya saa noon kila siku.

English: All coffee farmers are directed to seek medical attention by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanaelekezwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waxaa la farayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad marka la gaaro Luulyo 1deeda.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameagizwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo July 1st.

English: The Ministry of Health activates medical response units in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa hawlgelisay cutubyo ka jawaabaya caafimaadka oo ku yaal Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health huamsha medical response units katika Nairobi County.

English: The Ministry of Education announces free registration for fishermen.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatangaza usajili wa bure kwa wavuvi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa ku dhawaaqday diiwaangelin bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay kalluumeysatada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatangaza registration ya bure kwa fishermen.

English: All health facilities in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Vituo vyote vya afya katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame vitabaki kufungwa hadi Wizara itakapotoa taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Health facilities zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the Ministry.

English: All coffee farmers are warned against examination. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kafeega waxaa looga digayaa inay baaritaan sameeyaan. Isticmaal kanaallo rasmi ah haddii ay suurtogal tahay.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya examination. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: URGENT: taxpayers must report suspicious activity before next Monday. Report to the Rift Valley immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walipa kodi lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo. Waripoti Bonde la Ufa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG: canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor Isniinta soo socota. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: taxpayers lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya next Monday. Ripoti kwenye the Rift Valley mara moja.

English: All motorists must submit tax returns to county officials by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa county officials ifikapo April 30th.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to stock emergency supplies within this month.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan sahayda degdegga ah bishaan gudaheed.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ndani ya this month.

English: The County Government warns of drought exceeding Category 3 in Eldoret.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yaonya kuhusu ukame unaozidi kiwango cha 3 huko Eldoret.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ka digaysaa abaarta ka sii daraysa heerka 3aad ee Eldoret.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaonya drought zaidi ya Category 3 katika Eldoret.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all inspection must be update their records starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima urekebishwe rekodi zao kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan kormeerka la cusboonaysiiyo diiwaankooda laga bilaabo Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima update their records kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces tea prices at KSh 4,000 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza bei ya chai kwa KSh 4,000 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 90.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha oo ah KSh 4,000 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 4,000 kwa 90kg bag.

English: The public is advised to evacuate immediately for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhama mara moja kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan guryahooda haddii ay qabaan calaamado madax-xanuun daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya evacuate immediately kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: Students are advised to boil drinking water as water levels subside are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa kadri viwango vya maji vinavyopungua vinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo maadaama heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacayaan.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water kwani water levels subside zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all health facilities will install safety equipment on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitaweka vifaa vya usalama mnamo Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay rakibi doonaan qalabka badbaadada 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya install safety equipment tarehe June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All dispensaries must submit production reports to the county health office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Zahanati zote lazima ziwasilishe ripoti za uzalishaji kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan farmashiyaha waa inay warbixinnada wax soo saarka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: dispensaries zote lazima ziwasilishe production reports kwenye the county health office ifikapo December 31st.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces residents new citizens. Applications open on the TSC portal from the beginning of next month.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawatangazia wakazi raia wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la TSC kuanzia mwanzoni mwa mwezi ujao.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ku dhawaaqeysaa dadka deegaanka muwaadiniin cusub. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga TSC laga bilaabo bilowga bisha soo socota.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza nafasi residents mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the TSC portal kuanzia the beginning of next month.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all schools will report suspicious activity on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba shule zote zitaripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka mnamo Juni 30.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan iskuullada ay soo sheegi doonaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo bisha Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba schools zote zitafanya report suspicious activity tarehe June 30th.

English: Do not practice handwashing from unverified sources. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutoka vyanzo visivyothibitishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmaha ilo aan la xaqiijin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka unverified sources. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces clean water to all drought-affected households in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inatangaza maji safi kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday biyo nadiif ah dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee ku nool Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza clean water kwa drought-affected households wote katika Marsabit.

English: The public is advised to avoid inspection in Garissa until water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka ukaguzi huko Garissa hadi viwango vya maji vipungue.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan kormeerka Gaarisa ilaa heerka biyuhu hoos u dhacaan.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka inspection katika Garissa mpaka water levels subside.

English: All healthcare workers are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya wanashauriwa kufuata mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: All coffee farmers must attend training to the nearest health facility before 8:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wahudhurie mafunzo katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu kabla ya saa 2:00 asubuhi kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda qaxwada waa inay tababar ku qaataan xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow ka hor 8:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima attend training kwenye the nearest health facility kabla ya saa 8:00 AM kila siku.

English: URGENT: All schools in Lamu must attend training by midnight today due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Shule zote mjini Lamu lazima zihudhurie mafunzo ifikapo saa sita usiku wa leo kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dugsiyada Lamu waa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka saqda dhexe ee maanta sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: schools zote katika Lamu lazima attend training ifikapo saa midnight leo kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: All citizens are directed to attend training by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanaelekezwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa la farayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wameagizwa kufanya attend training ifikapo next Monday.

English: The National Police Service announces free assessment for farmers.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa wakulima.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeraleyda.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa farmers.

English: The County Government advises fish farmers to complete registration to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawashauri wafugaji wa samaki kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay kula talinaysaa beeraleyda kalluunka inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The County Government inashauri fish farmers kufanya complete registration ili kuzuia measles.

English: URGENT: All citizens must complete registration before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Raia wote lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya kupata kibali cha usalama.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la helin oggolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: citizens wote lazima complete registration kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory assessment.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie tathmini ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan qiimeyn khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie assessment inayolazimishwa.

English: NOTICE: All Turkana must report further notice within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Waturkana wote lazima waripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Turkana waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Turkana zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya 90 days.

English: The National Drought Management Authority activates emergency response teams in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika Marsabit.

English: The Kenya Red Cross launches livestock offtake program in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya lazindua mpango wa uchukuaji wa mifugo katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa bilowday barnaamij xoolaha lagu qaado dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inazindua livestock offtake program katika all constituencies.

English: The County Government directs all civil servants to undergo inspection.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawaagiza watumishi wote wa umma kufanyiwa ukaguzi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay faray dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay maraan kormeer.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaagiza civil servants wote kupitia inspection.

English: Residents are advised to avoid assessment. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuepuka tathmini. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimeynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kuepuka assessment. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre warns against stock emergency supplies. Do not share your personal information.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaonya dhidi ya vifaa vya dharura vya akiba. Usishiriki taarifa zako binafsi.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay ka digaysaa sahayda gurmadka degdegga ah ee kaydka. Ha la wadaagin macluumaadkaaga shakhsi ahaaneed.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inaonya dhidi ya stock emergency supplies. Usifanye share your personal information.

English: The Kenya Red Cross advises pastoralists to evacuate immediately to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawashauri wafugaji kuhama mara moja ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa xoolo dhaqatada inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inashauri pastoralists kufanya evacuate immediately ili kuzuia measles.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces that all voter registration must be report suspicious activity starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima uripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ay tahay in la soo sheego dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima report suspicious activity kuanzia December 31st.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority reminds travelers to install safety equipment before September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawakumbusha wasafiri kufunga vifaa vya usalama kabla ya Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka safarka ah inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor 15-ka Sebtembar.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawakumbusha travelers kufanya install safety equipment kabla ya September 15th.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges communities to secure their properties to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inahimiza jamii kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: All farmers are warned against evacuation. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wanaonywa dhidi ya uhamishaji. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan guryahooda. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: All coffee farmers must vaccinate their animals before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa lazima wachanje mifugo yao kabla ya Julai 1.
