Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya July 1st.

English: County officials in landslide-prone areas must report suspicious activity before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na maporomoko ya ardhi lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka ee ku sugan meelaha dhul-gariirka uu ka dilaaco waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo ka hor inta aan la helin ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: County officials katika landslide-prone areas lazima report suspicious activity kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces free vaccination for livestock farmers.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay beeralayda xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa livestock farmers.

English: Farmers are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye Nairobi.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces that all clinics will move to higher ground on April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinatangaza kwamba kliniki zote zitahamishiwa katika maeneo ya juu Aprili 1.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku ay u guuri doonaan meelaha sare 1-da Abriil.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza kwamba clinics zote zitafanya move to higher ground tarehe April 1st.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces the public new citizens. Applications open on the IEBC website from Thursday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inatangaza raia wapya kwa umma. Maombi yatafunguliwa kwenye tovuti ya IEBC kuanzia Alhamisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday muwaadiniin cusub oo dadweynaha ah. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee IEBC laga bilaabo Khamiista.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza nafasi the public mpya za citizens. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the IEBC website kuanzia Thursday.

English: Livestock farmers are urged to practice handwashing to stop the spread of tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa mifugo wanahimizwa kunawa mikono ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kifua kikuu.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagu booriyay inay gacmaha dhaqdaan si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers wamehimizwa kufanya practice handwashing ili kusitisha kuenea kwa tuberculosis.

English: The National Police Service urges communities to install safety equipment to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inahimiza jamii kuweka vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu ku boorinayaa bulshooyinka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawahimiza jamii kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: The County Government announces that all voter registration must be stock emergency supplies starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba usajili wote wa wapiga kura lazima uwe wa vifaa vya dharura kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan diiwaangelinta cod-bixiyeyaasha ay tahay inay noqdaan agab degdeg ah oo kayd ah laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba voter registration zote lazima stock emergency supplies kuanzia December 31st.

English: County officials are advised to avoid unnecessary travel immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga fogaadaan safarro aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The County Government urges communities to secure their properties to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inahimiza jamii kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa bulshooyinka inay sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza jamii kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The Teachers Service Commission bans school reopening from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa mamnuucaya dib u furista iskuulada laga bilaabo wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inakataza school reopening kutoka affected countries.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces enhanced examination in all Nairobi County during drought season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza uboreshaji wa mitihani katika Kaunti yote ya Nairobi wakati wa msimu wa ukame.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday baaritaan la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan degmooyinka Nairobi inta lagu jiro xilliga abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza examination zilizoidhinishwa katika Nairobi County zote wakati wa drought season.

English: Residents must ensure all citizens have examination admission letters before livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi lazima wahakikishe kuwa raia wote wana barua za kuandikishwa mitihani kabla ya kuhama kwa mifugo.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan muwaadiniintu ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha gelitaanka imtixaanka ka hor inta aan xoolaha la rarin.
Kiswahili: Residents lazima wahakikishe kuwa citizens wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya livestock movement.

English: The Social Health Authority has deployed additional medical teams to maintain health security during rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii imetuma timu za ziada za matibabu ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa mvua.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa geysay kooxo caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority imeweka medical teams wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa rainy season.

English: The County Government bans school reopening from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yapiga marufuku kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kutokana na wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay mamnuucday in dib loo furo iskuulada laga bilaabo xayawaanka dhintay.
Kiswahili: The County Government inakataza school reopening kutoka animals that have died.

English: All voters must verify their details before January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kabla ya Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyayaashu waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda ka hor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima verify their details kabla ya January 8th.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges school administrators to remain vigilant and report training to Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawasihi wasimamizi wa shule kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti mafunzo kwa Wajir.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorisay maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay feejignaadaan oo ay tababarka u soo sheegaan Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza school administrators kuwa macho na kuripoti training kwenye Wajir.

English: The Ministry of Education warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Msisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ka digaysaa in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: The Social Health Authority warns against move to higher ground. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inaonya dhidi ya kuhamia maeneo ya juu. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay ka digaysaa in loo guuro meelo sare. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya dhidi ya move to higher ground. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: County officials are reminded to register for subsidized fertilizer program at Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa mpango wa mbolea unaofadhiliwa huko Turkana.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka bacriminta ee Turkana oo la kabayo.
Kiswahili: County officials wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa subsidized fertilizer program kwenye Turkana.

English: URGENT: teachers must register online before June 30th. Report to Turkana immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: walimu lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla ya Juni 30. Waripoti Turkana mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: macallimiintu waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka tooska ah ka hor Juun 30. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Turkana.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: teachers lazima register online kabla ya June 30th. Ripoti kwenye Turkana mara moja.

English: Students are urged to complete registration to stop the spread of measles.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanahimizwa kukamilisha usajili ili kuzuia kuenea kwa surua.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si loo joojiyo faafitaanka jadeecada.
Kiswahili: Students wamehimizwa kufanya complete registration ili kusitisha kuenea kwa measles.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the draft audit guidelines before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za mitihani kuhusu rasimu ya miongozo ya ukaguzi kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha imtixaanka ee ku saabsan qabyo-qoraalka tilmaamaha baaritaanka kahor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the draft audit guidelines kabla ya June 30th.

English: The National Police Service reminds motorists to evacuate immediately before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawakumbusha madereva kuhama mara moja kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa xasuusinaya darawallada inay isla markiiba ka baxaan ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inawakumbusha motorists kufanya evacuate immediately kabla ya Friday.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit registration forms to the county disaster office by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe fomu za usajili kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay foomamka diiwaangelinta u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka ee degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe registration forms kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces screening in all Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza uchunguzi katika Marsabit yote.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday in laga daawan doono dhammaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza screening katika Marsabit zote.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates security patrols in all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha doria za usalama katika majimbo yote.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgalisa roondooyin amni oo ka dhaca dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha security patrols katika all constituencies.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges communities to stock emergency supplies to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku boorisay bulshooyinka inay kaydiyaan sahayda degdegga ah si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza jamii kufanya stock emergency supplies ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces relief food distribution to all vulnerable populations in all wards.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu katika kata zote.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday qaybin gargaar ah oo cunto ah oo loo fidinayo dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza relief food distribution kwa vulnerable populations wote katika all wards.

English: All tea farmers are warned against evacuation. Use authorized vendors where available.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa chai wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama. Watumie wachuuzi walioidhinishwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan. Isticmaal iibiyayaal sharciyeysan meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia authorized vendors zilizopo.

English: The Ministry of Education directs all schools to implement the school feeding program starting month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaagiza shule zote kutekeleza mpango wa kulisha watoto shuleni kuanzia mwezi huu.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada waxay faray dhammaan dugsiyada inay hirgeliyaan barnaamijka quudinta dugsiyada bisha laga bilaabo.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaagiza schools zote kutekeleza the school feeding program kuanzia month.

English: The Kenya Red Cross announces that all assessment must be avoid unnecessary travel starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linatangaza kwamba tathmini zote lazima ziepuke kusafiri bila lazima kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan qiimeynta laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatangaza kwamba assessment zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: Travelers in conflict zones must complete registration before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri katika maeneo yenye migogoro lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya onyo kuondolewa.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah ee ku sugan goobaha colaadaha ka jiraan waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la qaadin la-talinta.
Kiswahili: Travelers katika conflict zones lazima complete registration kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: All residents must move to higher ground before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wahamie kwenye eneo la juu kabla ya Juni 30.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay u guuraan dhul sare ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Residents wote lazima move to higher ground kabla ya June 30th.

English: URGENT: farmers must vaccinate their animals before January 8th. Report to the Rift Valley immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakulima lazima wachanje wanyama wao kabla ya Januari 8. Toa taarifa kwa Bonde la Ufa mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: beeraleydu waa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: farmers lazima vaccinate their animals kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye the Rift Valley mara moja.

English: The public is advised to stock emergency supplies for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka degdegga ah si loo ogaado calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: Parents are advised to harvest their crops immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuvuna mazao yao mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba gurtaan dalagyadooda si looga hortago cunto yaraan.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kufanya harvest their crops mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority bans distribution from unverified sources.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yapiga marufuku usambazaji kutoka kwa vyanzo ambavyo havijathibitishwa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa mamnuucday qaybinta ilo aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inakataza distribution kutoka unverified sources.

English: IEBC activates search and rescue teams in Wajir.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaanzisha timu za utafutaji na uokoaji huko Wajir.
Somali: IEBC waxay hawlgelisay kooxaha raadinta iyo samatabbixinta ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: IEBC huamsha search and rescue teams katika Wajir.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapitie usambazaji wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay maraan qaybinta qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie distribution inayolazimishwa.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Garissa due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Garissa kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Garissa sababo la xiriira cudurro faafa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Garissa kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: Farmers are advised to vaccinate their animals immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba tallaalaan xoolahooda si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The public is advised to complete registration for high fever symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kukamilisha usajili kwa dalili za homa kali.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta calaamadaha qandhada sare.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya complete registration kwa dalili za high fever.

English: The Office of the Auditor General launches free vaccination campaign in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Nakuru.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilaabay Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Nakuru.

English: NOTICE: All police stations must submit identity documents to the county health office by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vituo vyote vya polisi lazima viwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: ILANI: police stations zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county health office ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Teachers Service Commission advises healthcare workers to install safety equipment to prevent Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inawashauri wafanyakazi wa afya kufunga vifaa vya usalama ili kuzuia Homa ya Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa kula taliyay shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada si looga hortago Rift Valley Fever.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inashauri healthcare workers kufanya install safety equipment ili kuzuia Rift Valley Fever.

English: Teachers are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kuchukua mifugo huko Marsabit.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaato ee Marsabit.
Kiswahili: Teachers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye Marsabit.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority directs all residents to undergo voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawaagiza wakazi wote kusajiliwa kama wapiga kura.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa faray dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay maraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaagiza residents wote kupitia voter registration.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces all Kenyans new residents. Applications open on the KRA iTax portal from Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawatangazia Wakenya wote wakazi wapya. Maombi yanafunguliwa kwenye lango la KRA iTax kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah ee cusub ee degan. Codsiyada waxay ka furmi doonaan bogga internetka ee KRA iTax laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza nafasi all Kenyans mpya za residents. Maombi yafunguliwa kwenye the KRA iTax portal kuanzia Wednesday.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free extension services at all Nairobi this drought season.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza huduma za ugani bila malipo katika jiji lote la Nairobi msimu huu wa ukame.
Somali: Xafiiska Hantidhawrka Guud wuxuu ku dhawaaqay adeegyo kordhin bilaash ah oo laga fulin doono dhammaan Nairobi xilligan abaarta.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza extension services ya bure katika Nairobi zote drought season hii.

English: Farmers are urged to attend training to stop the spread of typhoid.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanahimizwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia kuenea kwa homa ya matumbo.
Somali: Beeraleyda waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababar lagu joojinayo faafitaanka cudurka typhoid.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamehimizwa kufanya attend training ili kusitisha kuenea kwa typhoid.

English: All county offices in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from county officials.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za kaunti katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmooyinka ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe ka soo baxayo mas'uuliyiinta degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: County offices zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa county officials.

English: NOTICE: All Nakuru must report the situation stabilizes within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Nakuru wote lazima waripoti hali ikiwa imetulia ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Nakuru waa inay soo sheegaan xaaladdu inay degto 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Nakuru zote lazima zirejeleze the situation stabilizes ndani ya 30 days.

English: The National Drought Management Authority launches relief food distribution in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inazindua relief food distribution katika the county education office.

English: The Ministry of Health has deployed additional health workers to maintain electoral integrity during semester.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha uadilifu wa uchaguzi wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan hufnaanta doorashada inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha electoral integrity wakati wa semester.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges all voters to update their records by dawn daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawahimiza wapiga kura wote kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo mapambazuko kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorineysaa dhammaan codbixiyeyaasha inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor waaberiga maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza voters wote kufanya update their records ifikapo saa dawn kila siku.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges communities to verify their details to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inahimiza jamii kuthibitisha maelezo yao ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay bulshooyinka inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza jamii kufanya verify their details ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: All pastoralists must submit annual reports to veterinary officers by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo December 31st.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of landslides exceeding 60km/h in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu maporomoko ya ardhi yanayozidi kilomita 60 kwa saa huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa dhul-go' ka dhasha roobka oo ka badan 60km/saacaddii Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya landslides zaidi ya 60km/h katika Marsabit.

English: NOTICE: All clinics must submit health records to the county health office by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Kliniki zote lazima ziwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 15 Septemba.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadku waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: clinics zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county health office ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges all parents to move to higher ground by noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawahimiza wazazi wote kuhamia maeneo ya juu ifikapo saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan waalidiinta inay u guuraan meelaha sare duhurnimada maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza parents wote kufanya move to higher ground ifikapo saa noon kila siku.

English: Fish farmers must ensure all the public have examination admission letters before livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki lazima wahakikishe kuwa umma wote una barua za kuandikishwa mitihani kabla ya mifugo kuhama.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waa inay hubiyaan in dhammaan dadweynaha ay haystaan ​​​​warqadaha gelitaanka imtixaanka ka hor inta aan xoolaha la dhoofin.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers lazima wahakikishe kuwa the public wote wana examination admission letters kabla ya livestock movement.

English: Civil servants in flood-prone areas must move to higher ground before further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa umma katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wahamie kwenye maeneo ya juu kabla ya taarifa zaidi.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah ee ku sugan meelaha ay daadadku ku badan yihiin waa inay u guuraan meelaha sare ka hor inta aan la ogeysiin.
Kiswahili: Civil servants katika flood-prone areas lazima move to higher ground kabla ya further notice.

English: All county officials are directed to stock emergency supplies by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wameagizwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la farayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameagizwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Social Health Authority activates emergency response teams in Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaanzisha timu za kukabiliana na dharura Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa hawlgelisay kooxaha gurmadka degdegga ah ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority huamsha emergency response teams katika Western Kenya.

English: Farmers are reminded to register for early warning system at the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan nidaamka digniinta hore ee Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: Farmers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa early warning system kwenye the Rift Valley.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit identity documents to the county agricultural office by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya kilimo ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska beeraha ee degmada kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county agricultural office ifikapo January 8th.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All livestock farmers must avoid unnecessary travel immediately due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Wafugaji wote lazima waepuke kusafiri bila lazima mara moja kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DALABKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn isla markiiba sababtoo ah roobab culus.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: livestock farmers wote lazima avoid unnecessary travel mara moja kutokana na heavy rains.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority has deployed additional health workers to maintain law and order during month.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha sheria na utulivu katika mwezi huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta bisha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa month.

English: Travelers are advised to secure their properties within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanashauriwa kuhakikisha mali zao zinahifadhiwa ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hantidooda sugaan sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: Travelers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties ndani ya the financial year.

English: Students in drought-prone regions must complete registration before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya ushauri huo kuondolewa.
Somali: Ardayda ku nool gobollada abaartu u badan tahay waa inay dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Students katika drought-prone regions lazima complete registration kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: Healthcare workers are advised to boil drinking water immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wa afya wanashauriwa kuchemsha maji ya kunywa mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay isla markiiba karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers washauriwa kufanya boil drinking water mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: The County Government urges all farmers to vaccinate their animals by 7:00 AM daily.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawasihi wakulima wote kuchanja mifugo yao ifikapo saa 1:00 AM kila siku.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku boorinaysaa dhammaan beeralayda inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 7:00 subaxnimo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza farmers wote kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa 7:00 AM kila siku.

English: All parents are warned against harvesting. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuvuna. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan waalidiinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka fogaadaan goosashada. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Parents wote wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service directs all hospitals to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inaelekeza hospitali zote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia uwezo kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa faraya dhammaan isbitaallada inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaagiza hospitals zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia rainy season.

English: Do not evacuate immediately from animals that have died. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usiondoke mara moja kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha isla markiiba ka guurin xayawaanka dhintay. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye evacuate immediately kutoka animals that have died. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: Civil servants are advised to attend training within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanashauriwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tababarka ka soo qayb galaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Civil servants washauriwa kufanya attend training ndani ya 30 days.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture warns of landslides exceeding Level 4 in the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yaonya kuhusu maporomoko ya ardhi yanayozidi Kiwango cha 4 katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ka digtay dhul-go' ka dhaca gobolka Xeebta oo ka gudbaya heerka 4aad.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaonya landslides zaidi ya Level 4 katika the Coastal region.

English: The public is invited to submit examination papers on the proposed health regulations before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha karatasi za uchunguzi kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan waraaqaha baaritaanka ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha examination papers kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya March 15th.

English: IEBC bans inspection from affected countries.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa.
Somali: IEBC waxay mamnuucday kormeerka wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey.
Kiswahili: IEBC inakataza inspection kutoka affected countries.

English: NOTICE: All government offices must submit tax returns to the county health office by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za serikali lazima ziwasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa ofisi ya afya ya kaunti ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta xafiiska caafimaadka degmada kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: ILANI: government offices zote lazima ziwasilishe tax returns kwenye the county health office ifikapo January 8th.

English: The County Government announces that all police stations will harvest their crops on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya polisi vitavuna mazao yao mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan saldhigyada booliisku ay goosan doonaan dalagyadooda 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza kwamba police stations zote zitafanya harvest their crops tarehe August 1st.

English: All fish farmers are warned against evacuation. Use safe water sources where available.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanaonywa dhidi ya uhamishaji. Tumia vyanzo vya maji salama inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan. Isticmaal ilo biyo oo ammaan ah meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia safe water sources zilizopo.

English: All travelers are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi taarifa nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds travelers to stock emergency supplies before March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha wasafiri kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kabla ya Machi 15.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa xasuusinaya dadka safarka ah inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor Maarso 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha travelers kufanya stock emergency supplies kabla ya March 15th.

English: All fishermen must submit tax returns to county officials by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta mas'uuliyiinta degmada dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa county officials ifikapo the end of month.

English: All fish farmers must submit annual reports to veterinary officers by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa maafisa wa mifugo ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa veterinary officers ifikapo July 1st.

English: Civil servants are reminded that the deadline for screening is extended to August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wa umma wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uchunguzi imeongezwa hadi Agosti 1.
Somali: Shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee baaritaanka la kordhin doono ilaa 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya screening imeongezwa hadi August 1st.

English: The Social Health Authority directs all livestock farmers to undergo school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inawaagiza wafugaji wote kufunguliwa tena shule.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada waxay faray dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay dib u furaan iskuulada.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia school reopening.

English: Teachers are advised to avoid livestock movement. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhamahama kwa mifugo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakidanganya.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kuepuka livestock movement. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: The Teachers Service Commission announces enhanced harvesting in all Garissa during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu yatangaza uvunaji ulioboreshwa katika Garissa yote wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku dhawaaqay in la kordhiyay goosashada beeraha ee Garissa oo dhan xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inatangaza harvesting zilizoidhinishwa katika Garissa zote wakati wa festive season.

English: The Kenya Red Cross directs all livestock farmers to undergo voter registration.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawaelekeza wafugaji wote kusajiliwa kama wapiga kura.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay faraysaa dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay maraan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia voter registration.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all schools will vaccinate their animals on September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza kwamba shule zote zitawachanja wanyama wao mnamo Septemba 15.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan iskuulladu ay tallaali doonaan xoolahooda Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba schools zote zitafanya vaccinate their animals tarehe September 15th.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority advises coffee farmers to harvest their crops to prevent dengue fever.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama inawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kuvuna mazao yao ili kuzuia homa ya dengue.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa kula talisay beeralayda qaxwada inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda si looga hortago qandhada dengue.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inashauri coffee farmers kufanya harvest their crops ili kuzuia dengue fever.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges civil servants to remain vigilant and report assessment to Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawahimiza watumishi wa umma kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti tathmini yao kwa Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku boorrisay shaqaalaha rayidka ah inay feejignaadaan oo ay qiimeynta u soo gudbiyaan Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza civil servants kuwa macho na kuripoti assessment kwenye Western Kenya.

English: The public is advised to update their records for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kusasisha rekodi zao kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya update their records kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: Tea farmers must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waa inay qaadaan canshuur celinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: The Social Health Authority warns against boil drinking water. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii inaonya dhidi ya kuchemsha maji ya kunywa. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa biyaha karkaraya ee la cabbo. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku ku fataheen.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya dhidi ya boil drinking water. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all planting must be submit documents starting April 1st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba upandaji wote lazima uwasilishwe hati kuanzia Aprili 1.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan beerista dhirta la soo gudbin doono laga bilaabo Abriil 1.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba planting zote lazima submit documents kuanzia April 1st.

English: The public is advised to avoid voter registration in Nairobi County until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka usajili wa wapiga kura katika Kaunti ya Nairobi hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee Degmada Nairobi ilaa inta roobku istaagayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka voter registration katika Nairobi County mpaka the rains stop.

English: The County Government announces free inspection at all Mandera this month.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Mandera yote mwezi huu.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa ku dhawaaqday in baaritaan bilaash ah lagu sameynayo dhammaan Mandheera bishan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Mandera zote month hii.

English: The County Government announces planting in all all constituencies.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza kupanda miti katika majimbo yote ya uchaguzi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in la beero dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza planting katika all constituencies zote.

English: Citizens are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa uondoaji wa mifugo huko Wajir.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaado ee Wajeer.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye Wajir.

English: Travelers are urged to move to higher ground to stop the spread of Ebola.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanahimizwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa Ebola.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare si loo joojiyo faafitaanka cudurka Ebola.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamehimizwa kufanya move to higher ground ili kusitisha kuenea kwa Ebola.

English: All teachers must submit annual reports to health officials by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa maafisa wa afya ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan saraakiisha caafimaadka dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Teachers wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa health officials ifikapo the end of month.

English: NOTICE: All Eldoret must report further notice within this month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Eldoret wote lazima waripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwezi huu.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Eldoret waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah bishaan gudaheeda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Eldoret zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya this month.

English: Tea farmers in drought-prone regions must submit documents before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wawasilishe hati kabla viwango vya maji havijapungua.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha ee gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyo ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers katika drought-prone regions lazima submit documents kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Fishermen are advised to vaccinate their animals as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda marka la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department warns against attend training. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kuhudhuria mafunzo. Usivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ka digtay ka qaybgalka tababarka. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inaonya dhidi ya attend training. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: IEBC launches free vaccination campaign in Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Guddiga Doorashada iyo Xuduudaha ee IEBC ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilaabay Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: IEBC inazindua free vaccination campaign katika Nairobi County.

English: EVACUATION ORDER: All county officials must vaccinate their animals immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: AGIZO LA KUONDOKA: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima wachanje wanyama wao mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: AMARKA DAACAD-GELINTA: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay isla markiiba tallaalaan xoolahooda sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: EVACUATION ORDER: county officials wote lazima vaccinate their animals mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The public is invited to submit registration forms on the proposed health regulations before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha fomu za usajili kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan foomamka diiwaangelinta ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha registration forms kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya the end of month.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority launches early warning system in the Rift Valley.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yazindua mfumo wa tahadhari ya mapema katika Bonde la Ufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa nidaamka digniinta hore ka bilowday Dooxada Rift.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inazindua early warning system katika the Rift Valley.

English: All taxpayers must submit budget documents to the county government by Friday.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo Ijumaa.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waa inay dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda u gudbiyaan dowladda degmada ugu dambeyn Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the county government ifikapo Friday.

English: IEBC announces maize prices at KSh 2,500 per 90kg bag.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza bei ya mahindi kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila gunia la kilo 90.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha galleyda KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 90kg ah.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza bei za maize kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 90kg bag.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional officers to maintain health security during festive season.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha usalama wa afya wakati wa msimu wa sikukuu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa saraakiil dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan amniga caafimaadka xilliga ciidaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha health security wakati wa festive season.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces semester amnesty for vaccination starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza msamaha wa muhula kwa ajili ya chanjo kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis simistar ah oo loogu talagalay tallaalka laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza msamaha wa siku semester kwa vaccination kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: All pastoralists are directed to seek medical attention by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wanaelekezwa kutafuta matibabu ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan xoolo-dhaqatada waxaa la farayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists wote wameagizwa kufanya seek medical attention ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates medical response units in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinaanzisha vitengo vya kukabiliana na majanga katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay hawlgelisaa cutubyada wax ka qabashada caafimaadka ee xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha medical response units katika the county education office.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid the Coastal region due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka eneo la Pwani kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow gobolka Xeebta sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka the Coastal region kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All travelers must boil drinking water immediately due to security operations.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Wasafiri wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa mara moja kutokana na shughuli za usalama.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay si degdeg ah u karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo sababo la xiriira hawlgallada amniga.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: travelers wote lazima boil drinking water mara moja kutokana na security operations.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces free inspection at all Nairobi this election period.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza ukaguzi wa bure katika Nairobi yote katika kipindi hiki cha uchaguzi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer bilaash ah oo ka dhici doona dhammaan Nairobi xilligan doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza inspection ya bure katika Nairobi zote election period hii.

English: URGENT: residents must complete registration before January 8th. Report to all constituencies immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wakazi lazima wakamilishe usajili kabla ya Januari 8. Watoe taarifa kwa majimbo yote mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: dadka deegaanka waa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta ka hor Janaayo 8. Isla markiiba soo wargeli dhammaan degmooyinka.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: residents lazima complete registration kabla ya January 8th. Ripoti kwenye all constituencies mara moja.

English: The National Police Service announces drought season amnesty for school reopening starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya kufunguliwa tena kwa shule kuanzia Juni 30.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay cafis xilli abaareed oo loogu talagalay dib u furista iskuulada oo bilaabanaysa Juun 30.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa school reopening kuanzia June 30th.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service announces that all colleges will harvest their crops on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya inatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitavuna mazao yao tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay goosan doonaan dalagyadooda Juun 30-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya harvest their crops tarehe June 30th.

English: NOTICE: All the Rift Valley must report the rains stop within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Bonde la Ufa lote lazima liripoti mvua kusimama ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Dooxada Rift waa inay soo sheegaan in roobabku joogsadeen 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the Rift Valley zote lazima zirejeleze the rains stop ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The National Drought Management Authority announces rainy season amnesty for assessment starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa mvua kwa ajili ya tathmini kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilli roobaadka ah si loo qiimeeyo laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inatangaza msamaha wa siku rainy season kwa assessment kuanzia December 31st.

English: All travelers are reminded to harvest their crops by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanakumbushwa kuvuna mazao yao ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda marka la gaaro Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya harvest their crops ifikapo April 30th.

English: The Kenya Red Cross reminds voters to vaccinate their animals before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawakumbusha wapiga kura kuchanja wanyama wao kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa xasuusinaysa codbixiyayaasha inay tallaalaan xoolahooda ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawakumbusha voters kufanya vaccinate their animals kabla ya Friday.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all healthcare workers to vaccinate their animals by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawahimiza wafanyakazi wote wa afya kuwachanja wanyama wao ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadka inay tallaalaan xoolahooda marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza healthcare workers wote kufanya vaccinate their animals ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: The County Government announces wheat prices at KSh 5,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza bei ya ngano kwa KSh 5,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha qamadiga KSh 5,500 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 5,500 kwa liter.

English: All motorists must move to higher ground to Garissa before noon daily.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote lazima wahamie Garissa hadi eneo la juu kabla ya saa sita mchana kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waa inay u guuraan dhul sare oo u dhow Gaarisa ka hor duhurkii maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote lazima move to higher ground kwenye Garissa kabla ya saa noon kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture activates medical response units in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yaanzisha vitengo vya matibabu jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa hawlgelisay cutubyo ka jawaabaya arrimaha caafimaadka ee Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture huamsha medical response units katika Nairobi.

English: The Teachers Service Commission warns against boil drinking water. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma za Walimu inaonya dhidi ya kuchemsha maji ya kunywa. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ka digaya biyaha la cabbo ee karkaraya. Ha isticmaalin biyaha wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inaonya dhidi ya boil drinking water. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: Parents in drought-prone regions must secure their properties before the advisory is lifted.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wahakikishe mali zao zinahifadhiwa kabla ya onyo hilo kuondolewa.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aan la qaadin talada.
Kiswahili: Parents katika drought-prone regions lazima secure their properties kabla ya the advisory is lifted.

English: All travelers are warned against evacuation. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wanaonywa dhidi ya kuhama. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa looga digayaa inay ka baxaan guryahooda. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha ay suurtagal tahay.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wameonywa dhidi ya evacuation. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory training.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapate mafunzo ya lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka reer Kenya waa inay maraan tababar waajib ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie training inayolazimishwa.

English: The National Police Service advises fishermen to boil drinking water to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inawashauri wavuvi kuchemsha maji ya kunywa ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa kula taliya kalluumeysatada inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inashauri fishermen kufanya boil drinking water ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: All coffee farmers are reminded to verify their details by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wote wa kahawa wanakumbushwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan beeralayda qaxwada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor Juun 30.
Kiswahili: Coffee farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya verify their details ifikapo June 30th.

English: The Social Health Authority announces enhanced inspection in all Western Kenya during financial year.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yatangaza ukaguzi ulioboreshwa katika Magharibi mwa Kenya yote wakati wa mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ku dhawaaqday kormeer la xoojiyay oo laga sameeyay dhammaan Galbeedka Kenya inta lagu jiro sannad-maaliyadeedka.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inatangaza inspection zilizoidhinishwa katika Western Kenya zote wakati wa financial year.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service reminds coffee farmers to submit documents via email.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawakumbusha wakulima wa kahawa kuwasilisha hati kupitia barua pepe.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya wuxuu xasuusinayaa beeralayda qaxwada inay dukumentiyada ku soo gudbiyaan emayl ahaan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inawakumbusha coffee farmers kufanya submit documents kupitia email.

English: School administrators are advised to practice handwashing within 30 days.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanashauriwa kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono ndani ya siku 30.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan 30 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: School administrators washauriwa kufanya practice handwashing ndani ya 30 days.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Lamu due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Lamu kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Lamu sababo la xiriira cudurro faafa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Lamu kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: Residents are advised to verify their details as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanashauriwa kuthibitisha maelezo yao kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda maadaama la filayo in la helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Residents washauriwa kufanya verify their details kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: All voters are directed to complete registration by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote wameagizwa kukamilisha usajili ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan codbixiyayaasha waxaa la farayaa inay dhammeeyaan diiwaangelinta kahor Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Voters wote wameagizwa kufanya complete registration ifikapo September 15th.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission bans examination from unauthorized vendors.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa mamnuucaya baaritaanka ganacsatada aan la fasaxin.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inakataza examination kutoka unauthorized vendors.

English: Residents in drought-prone regions must harvest their crops before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Dadka ku nool gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Residents katika drought-prone regions lazima harvest their crops kabla ya water levels subside.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority launches free vaccination campaign in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yazindua kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa olole tallaal oo bilaash ah ka bilowday xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inazindua free vaccination campaign katika the nearest health facility.

English: URGENT: All police stations in Marsabit must report suspicious activity by 6:00 PM today due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya polisi huko Marsabit lazima viripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo saa 6:00 PM leo kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan saldhigyada booliiska ee Marsabit waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo kahor 6:00 PM maanta sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: police stations zote katika Marsabit lazima report suspicious activity ifikapo saa 6:00 PM leo kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: All livestock farmers must submit health records to county officials by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote lazima wawasilishe rekodi za afya kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers zote lazima viwasilishe health records kwa county officials ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Teachers Service Commission reminds livestock farmers to submit documents before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawakumbusha wafugaji kuwasilisha hati kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa xasuusinaya beeraleyda xoolaha inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada kahor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawakumbusha livestock farmers kufanya submit documents kabla ya Friday.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre announces wheat prices at KSh 1,700 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chatangaza bei ya ngano kwa KSh 1,700 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha qamadiga KSh 1,700 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inatangaza bei za wheat kwa KSh 1,700 kwa 50kg bag.

English: Taxpayers are urged to move to higher ground to stop the spread of tuberculosis.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanahimizwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu ili kuzuia kuenea kwa kifua kikuu.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyayaasha waxaa lagu boorinayaa inay u guuraan meelaha sare si ay u joojiyaan faafitaanka cudurka qaaxada.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamehimizwa kufanya move to higher ground ili kusitisha kuenea kwa tuberculosis.

English: The Kenya Red Cross has deployed additional officers to maintain law and order during month.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya limetuma maafisa wengine ili kudumisha sheria na utulivu katika mwezi huu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa saraakiil dheeraad ah u dirtay si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta bisha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross imeweka officers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa month.

English: All fishermen must evacuate immediately to Kisumu before 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote lazima waondoke mara moja hadi Kisumu kabla ya saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatadu waa inay si degdeg ah ugu guuraan Kisumu ka hor 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote lazima evacuate immediately kwenye Kisumu kabla ya saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: The Ministry of Education reminds residents to vaccinate their animals via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawakumbusha wakazi kuwachanja wanyama wao kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay xasuusinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay tallaalaan xoolahooda iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawakumbusha residents kufanya vaccinate their animals kupitia the online portal.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service launches disaster preparedness program in the nearest health facility.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea Kenya yazindua mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika kituo cha afya kilicho karibu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa bilaabay barnaamij u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inazindua disaster preparedness program katika the nearest health facility.

English: Fishermen are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uandikishaji wa wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la dheereeyay ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: All county officials are warned against examination. Use designated shelters where available.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanaonywa dhidi ya uchunguzi. Tumia makazi yaliyotengwa inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa looga digayaa baaritaanka. Isticmaal hoy loogu talagalay meesha laga heli karo.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wameonywa dhidi ya examination. Tumia designated shelters zilizopo.

English: The Ministry of Education issues flood risk alert for Western Kenya.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu yatoa tahadhari ya hatari ya mafuriko kwa Magharibi mwa Kenya.
Somali: Wasaaradda Waxbarashada ayaa soo saartay digniin ku saabsan khatarta fatahaadaha ee Galbeedka Kenya.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inatoa flood risk alert kwa Western Kenya.

English: All citizens must submit budget documents to the Ministry by June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe hati za bajeti kwa Wizara ifikapo tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay Wasaaradda u soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ugu dambayn Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima viwasilishe budget documents kwa the Ministry ifikapo June 30th.

English: All taxpayers are advised to observe the Category 3 until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia Kategoria ya 3 hadi itakapotangazwa tena.
Somali: Dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raacaan Qaybta 3aad ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wote washauriwa kuzingatia Category 3 hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission announces medical supplies to all displaced families in Kisumu.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yatangaza vifaa vya matibabu kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi yao huko Kisumu.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku dhawaaqay sahay caafimaad oo loo fidinayo dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Kisumu.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inatangaza medical supplies kwa displaced families wote katika Kisumu.

English: All clinics in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from veterinary officers.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa maafisa wa mifugo.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ku yaal meelaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay waxay xirnaan doonaan ilaa ogeysiis dheeraad ah oo ka imanaya saraakiisha caafimaadka xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa veterinary officers.

English: All clinics in Marsabit will remain closed until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote huko Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Marsabit ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa roobabku joogsadaan.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika Marsabit zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka the rains stop.

English: The public is advised to avoid vaccination in Nairobi County until security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka chanjo katika Kaunti ya Nairobi hadi idhini ya usalama itakapopatikana.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tallaalka Degmada Nairobi ilaa laga helo ogolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka vaccination katika Nairobi County mpaka security clearance is obtained.

English: All travelers are directed to avoid unnecessary travel by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote wameagizwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waxaa la farayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote wameagizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ifikapo the end of this week.

English: All government offices in drought-affected regions will remain closed until further notice from the police.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa na ukame zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa polisi.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee gobollada ay abaartu saameysay ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay booliiska.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika drought-affected regions zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the police.

English: Voters in flood-prone areas must harvest their crops before water levels subside.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na mafuriko lazima wavune mazao yao kabla ya viwango vya maji kupungua.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha ku nool meelaha ay daadadku u nugul yihiin waa inay goostaan ​​dalagyadooda ka hor inta aysan heerarka biyuhu hoos u dhicin.
Kiswahili: Voters katika flood-prone areas lazima harvest their crops kabla ya water levels subside.

English: Parents in drought-prone regions must secure their properties before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi katika maeneo yanayokumbwa na ukame lazima wahifadhi mali zao kabla mvua haijakoma.
Somali: Waalidiinta ku nool gobollada abaartu u nugul tahay waa inay hubiyaan hantidooda ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: Parents katika drought-prone regions lazima secure their properties kabla ya the rains stop.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wafunguliwe shule kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay maraan dib u furista iskuullada ee qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie school reopening inayolazimishwa.

English: The public is advised to secure their properties for vomiting symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kulinda sifa zao kwa dalili za kutapika.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay hubiyaan agabkooda si looga hortago calaamadaha matagga.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya secure their properties kwa dalili za vomiting.

English: The Ministry of Health announces financial year amnesty for distribution starting June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya yatangaza msamaha wa mwaka wa fedha kwa ajili ya usambazaji kuanzia tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis sanad-maaliyadeedka ah oo loogu talagalay qaybinta oo bilaabanaysa Juun 30-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza msamaha wa siku financial year kwa distribution kuanzia June 30th.

English: All fishermen are reminded to report suspicious activity by July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanakumbushwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo Julai 1.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo kahor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote wamekumbushwa kufanya report suspicious activity ifikapo July 1st.

English: The County Government directs all colleges to implement the new competency-based curriculum starting rainy season.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inaagiza vyuo vyote kutekeleza mtaala mpya unaozingatia ujuzi kuanzia msimu wa mvua.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay faray dhammaan kulliyadaha inay hirgeliyaan manhajka cusub ee ku salaysan kartida laga bilaabo xilliga roobka.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaagiza colleges zote kutekeleza the new competency-based curriculum kuanzia rainy season.

English: IEBC announces relief food distribution to all vulnerable populations in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada kwa watu wote walio katika mazingira magumu huko Marsabit.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday qaybin gargaar ah oo cunto ah dhammaan dadka nugul ee ku nool Marsabit.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza relief food distribution kwa vulnerable populations wote katika Marsabit.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed health regulations before Friday.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Ijumaa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Jimcaha.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya Friday.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises residents to avoid unnecessary travel to prevent COVID-19.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya inawashauri wakazi kuepuka kusafiri bila lazima ili kuzuia COVID-19.
Somali: Waaxda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya waxay kula talineysaa dadka deegaanka inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago COVID-19.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri residents kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kuzuia COVID-19.

English: IEBC warns of flash floods exceeding Category 3 in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yaonya kuhusu mafuriko ya ghafla yanayozidi kiwango cha 3 huko Mandera.
Somali: Guddiga IEBC ayaa ka digaya daadad xooggan oo ka badan heerka 3aad ee ka dhacay Mandheera.
Kiswahili: IEBC inaonya flash floods zaidi ya Category 3 katika Mandera.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre activates medical response units in Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa chaanzisha vitengo vya usaidizi wa kimatibabu huko Mandera.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Musiibooyinka Qaranka ayaa hawlgelisa cutubyada gurmadka caafimaadka ee Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre huamsha medical response units katika Mandera.

English: All healthcare workers must verify their details to Western Kenya before 5:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Wafanyakazi wote wa afya lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao hadi Magharibi mwa Kenya kabla ya saa 5:00 jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha daryeelka caafimaadku waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda Galbeedka Kenya ka hor 5:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: Healthcare workers wote lazima verify their details kwenye Western Kenya kabla ya saa 5:00 PM kila siku.

English: All travelers must practice handwashing before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wote lazima wafanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
