Somali: Dhammaan dadka safarka ah waa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: Travelers wote lazima practice handwashing kabla ya the end of month.

English: Travelers are reminded that the deadline for harvesting is extended to September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Wasafiri wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuvuna imeongezwa hadi Septemba 15.
Somali: Dadka safarka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee goosashada la dheereeyay ilaa Sebtembar 15.
Kiswahili: Travelers wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya harvesting imeongezwa hadi September 15th.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission directs all schools to implement the safety protocols starting week.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inaagiza shule zote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia wiki.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu farayaa dhammaan iskuulada inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo usbuuca.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inaagiza schools zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia week.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all inspection must be update their records starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba ukaguzi wote lazima urekebishwe rekodi zao kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan kormeerka la cusboonaysiiyo diiwaankooda laga bilaabo Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba inspection zote lazima update their records kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission advises parents to secure their properties to prevent bilharzia.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawashauri wazazi kulinda mali zao ili kuzuia kichocho.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa kula taliya waalidiinta inay hubiyaan hantidooda si looga hortago bilharzia.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inashauri parents kufanya secure their properties ili kuzuia bilharzia.

English: The National Drought Management Authority directs all parents to undergo livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawaagiza wazazi wote kuhamahama mifugo.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa faray dhammaan waalidiinta inay maraan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inaagiza parents wote kupitia livestock movement.

English: Do not complete registration from unauthorized vendors. Report such incidents to health officials.
Kiswahili2: Usikamilishe usajili kutoka kwa wachuuzi wasioidhinishwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa afya.
Somali: Ha buuxin diiwaangelinta ka timid iibiyayaasha aan la fasaxin. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg saraakiisha caafimaadka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye complete registration kutoka unauthorized vendors. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa health officials.

English: NOTICE: All universities must submit identity documents to the county education office by December 31st.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Vyuo vikuu vyote lazima viwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo Desemba 31.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan jaamacaduhu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmada kahor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: ILANI: universities zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo December 31st.

English: NOTICE: All Wajir must report further notice within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Wajir wote lazima waripoti taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan Wajeer waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: Wajir zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya the financial year.

English: Teachers are advised to seek medical attention immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Walimu wanashauriwa kutafuta matibabu mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Macallimiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Teachers washauriwa kufanya seek medical attention mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department activates security patrols in the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yaanzisha doria za usalama katika ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa hawlgelisa roondooyin amni oo ka socda xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department huamsha security patrols katika the county education office.

English: The Kenya Red Cross reminds school administrators to practice handwashing via the online portal.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linawakumbusha wasimamizi wa shule kufanya mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kupitia lango la mtandaoni.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay xasuusineysaa maamulayaasha iskuulada inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha iyagoo adeegsanaya bogga internetka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawakumbusha school administrators kufanya practice handwashing kupitia the online portal.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority advises county officials to practice handwashing to prevent measles.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawashauri maafisa wa kaunti kunawa mikono ili kuzuia surua.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay kula talinaysaa mas'uuliyiinta degmada inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago jadeecada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inashauri county officials kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia measles.

English: Tea farmers are advised to report suspicious activity within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wa chai wanashauriwa kuripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Beeralayda shaaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaq laga shakiyo 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Tea farmers washauriwa kufanya report suspicious activity ndani ya 90 days.

English: Parents are advised to avoid examination. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuepuka uchunguzi. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakiiga maafisa.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan baaritaanka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kuepuka examination. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: The County Government launches relief food distribution in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yazindua usambazaji wa chakula cha msaada huko Garissa.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose ayaa bilowday qaybinta cuntada gargaarka ah ee Garissa.
Kiswahili: The County Government inazindua relief food distribution katika Garissa.

English: All fish farmers are reminded to secure their properties by the end of this week.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wote wa samaki wanakumbushwa kulinda mali zao ifikapo mwisho wa wiki hii.
Somali: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay hubiyaan hantidooda dhammaadka toddobaadkan.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wote wamekumbushwa kufanya secure their properties ifikapo the end of this week.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service warns against vaccinate their animals. Do not cross flooded bridges.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya yaonya dhidi ya kuwachanja wanyama wao. Msivuke madaraja yaliyofurika.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa ka digaysa in la tallaalo xoolahooda. Ha ka gudbin buundooyinka daadadku saameeyeen.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inaonya dhidi ya vaccinate their animals. Usifanye cross flooded bridges.

English: The Ministry of Education warns against attend training. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inaonya dhidi ya kuhudhuria mafunzo. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ka digaysaa ka qaybgalka tababarka. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inaonya dhidi ya attend training. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nairobi County due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Epuka Kaunti ya Nairobi kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Degmada Nairobi sababo la xiriira cudurro faafa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nairobi County kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: All civil servants are reminded to stock emergency supplies by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Watumishi wote wa umma wanakumbushwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura ifikapo Februari 28.
Somali: Dhammaan shaqaalaha rayidka ah waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah marka la gaaro Febraayo 28.
Kiswahili: Civil servants wote wamekumbushwa kufanya stock emergency supplies ifikapo February 28th.

English: The County Government urges residents to remain vigilant and report training to Wajir.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawasihi wakazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti mafunzo kwa Wajir.
Somali: Dowladda Hoose waxay ku boorinaysaa dadka deegaanka inay feejignaadaan oo ay tababarrada u soo gudbiyaan Wajeer.
Kiswahili: The County Government inawahimiza residents kuwa macho na kuripoti training kwenye Wajir.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission bans screening from floodwaters.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka yapiga marufuku upimaji wa maji kutoka kwa mafuriko.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa mamnuucaya baaritaanka biyaha daadadka.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inakataza screening kutoka floodwaters.

English: The National Police Service announces that all colleges will report suspicious activity on August 1st.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza kwamba vyuo vyote vitaripoti shughuli za kutiliwa shaka mnamo Agosti 1.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan kulliyadaha ay soo sheegi doonaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo 1-da Agoosto.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza kwamba colleges zote zitafanya report suspicious activity tarehe August 1st.

English: Motorists are advised to avoid school reopening. Strict penalties await those caught impersonating officials.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wanashauriwa kuepuka kufunguliwa tena kwa shule. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakijifanya maafisa.
Somali: Darawalada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dib u furista iskuulka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo iska dhigaya mas'uuliyiin.
Kiswahili: Motorists washauriwa kuepuka school reopening. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya impersonating officials.

English: All citizens are warned against distribution. Use official channels where available.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote wanaonywa dhidi ya usambazaji. Tumia njia rasmi inapopatikana.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waxaa looga digayaa inay ka qayb qaataan. Isticmaal kanaallada rasmiga ah marka la heli karo.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote wameonywa dhidi ya distribution. Tumia official channels zilizopo.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces tea prices at KSh 2,500 per liter.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza bei ya chai kwa KSh 2,500 kwa lita.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday qiimaha shaaha oo ah KSh 2,500 halkii litir.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza bei za tea kwa KSh 2,500 kwa liter.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority warns of drought exceeding Category 3 in the police station.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yaonya kuhusu ukame unaozidi kiwango cha 3 katika kituo cha polisi.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ka digaysa abaarta ka gudubta Qaybta 3aad ee saldhigga booliiska.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inaonya drought zaidi ya Category 3 katika the police station.

English: IEBC announces rice prices at KSh 2,500 per 50kg bag.
Kiswahili2: IEBC yatangaza bei ya mchele kwa KSh 2,500 kwa kila mfuko wa kilo 50.
Somali: IEBC waxay ku dhawaaqday qiimaha bariiska KSh 2,500 halkii bac ee 50kg ah.
Kiswahili: IEBC inatangaza bei za rice kwa KSh 2,500 kwa 50kg bag.

English: The Kenya Red Cross warns against seek medical attention. Do not spread unverified information.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laonya dhidi ya kutafuta matibabu. Usisambaze taarifa ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya waxay ka digaysaa in la raadsado daryeel caafimaad. Ha faafin macluumaad aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaonya dhidi ya seek medical attention. Usifanye spread unverified information.

English: The National Disaster Operations Centre advises coffee farmers to evacuate immediately this season.
Kiswahili2: Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa kinawashauri wakulima wa kahawa kuhama mara moja msimu huu.
Somali: Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda qaxwada inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan xilligan.
Kiswahili: The National Disaster Operations Centre inashauri coffee farmers kufanya evacuate immediately msimu huu.

English: All voters must verify their details to all constituencies before midnight daily.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao kwa majimbo yote kabla ya saa sita usiku kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyayaashu waa inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda dhammaan degmooyinka ka hor saqda dhexe ee maalinta.
Kiswahili: Voters wote lazima verify their details kwenye all constituencies kabla ya saa midnight kila siku.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Eldoret due to heavy rains.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Eldoret kutokana na mvua kubwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Eldoret roobab mahiigaan ah awgood.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Eldoret kutokana na heavy rains.

English: Livestock farmers are advised to avoid unnecessary travel as the situation stabilizes are expected.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima kadri hali inavyotarajiwa kuwa tulivu.
Somali: Beeralayda xoolaha ayaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn maadaama xaaladdu ay deggan tahay.
Kiswahili: Livestock farmers washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel kwani the situation stabilizes zinatarajiwa.

English: Do not practice handwashing from floodwaters. Report such incidents to the Ministry.
Kiswahili2: Usifanye mazoezi ya kunawa mikono kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Wizara.
Somali: Ha ku dhaqin gacmahaaga daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg Wasaaradda.
Kiswahili: Usifanye practice handwashing kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the Ministry.

English: Residents are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at Lamu.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Lamu.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan ololaha tallaalka bilaashka ah ee Lamu.
Kiswahili: Residents wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye Lamu.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all fish farmers to undergo vaccination.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawaagiza wafugaji wote wa samaki kupata chanjo.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka inay maraan tallaalka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza fish farmers wote kupitia vaccination.

English: The National Drought Management Authority urges all voters to verify their details by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Usimamizi wa Ukame inawahimiza wapiga kura wote kuthibitisha taarifa zao ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Maareynta Abaaraha ayaa ku boorinaysa dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha inay xaqiijiyaan macluumaadkooda kahor makhribka.
Kiswahili: The National Drought Management Authority inawahimiza voters wote kufanya verify their details ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: Voters are reminded that the deadline for harvesting is extended to December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya kuvuna imeongezwa hadi Desemba 31.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee goosashada la kordhin doono ilaa Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Voters wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya harvesting imeongezwa hadi December 31st.

English: NOTICE: All the nearest health facility must report further notice within the financial year.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA: Kituo chote cha afya kilicho karibu lazima kitoe taarifa zaidi ndani ya mwaka wa fedha.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee ugu dhow waa inay soo sheegaan ogeysiis dheeraad ah sannad-maaliyadeedka gudahiisa.
Kiswahili: ILANI: the nearest health facility zote lazima zirejeleze further notice ndani ya the financial year.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission urges all residents to evacuate immediately by dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka inawasihi wakazi wote kuhama mara moja ifikapo jioni kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa ku boorriyay dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay si degdeg ah uga guuraan guryahooda marka qorraxdu dhacdo maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission inawahimiza residents wote kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo saa dusk kila siku.

English: The Office of the Auditor General issues flood risk alert for Nairobi County.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatoa tahadhari ya hatari ya mafuriko kwa Kaunti ya Nairobi.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa digniin ka soo saaray khatarta fatahaadaha ee Degmada Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatoa flood risk alert kwa Nairobi County.

English: Fishermen are warned against harvesting on fake news outlets.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wameonywa dhidi ya kuvuna kwenye vituo vya habari bandia.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa inay ka goostaan ​​​​wararka been abuurka ah.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wameonywa dhidi ya harvesting kwenye fake news outlets.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department announces drought season amnesty for screening starting December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya yatangaza msamaha wa msimu wa ukame kwa ajili ya uchunguzi kuanzia Desemba 31.
Somali: Waaxda Saadaasha Hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday cafis xilliga abaaraha ah oo loogu talagalay baaritaanka laga bilaabo Diseembar 31-keeda.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inatangaza msamaha wa siku drought season kwa screening kuanzia December 31st.

English: All schools in flood-affected counties will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Shule zote katika kaunti zilizoathiriwa na mafuriko zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan dugsiyada ku yaal degmooyinka ay fatahaaduhu saameeyeen ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay dowladda gobolka.
Kiswahili: Schools zote katika flood-affected counties zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service advises travelers to stock emergency supplies this season.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea ya Kenya inawashauri wasafiri kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura msimu huu.
Somali: Adeegga Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa kula taliya dadka safarka ah inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah xilligan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service inashauri travelers kufanya stock emergency supplies msimu huu.

English: School administrators are warned against planting on unverified websites.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanaonywa dhidi ya kupanda kwenye tovuti ambazo hazijathibitishwa.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulka waxaa looga digayaa inay ku beeraan mareegaha aan la xaqiijin.
Kiswahili: School administrators wameonywa dhidi ya planting kwenye unverified websites.

English: SECURITY ALERT: All teachers must harvest their crops immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA USALAMA: Walimu wote lazima wavune mazao yao mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay si degdeg ah u gurtaan dalagyadooda sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: SECURITY ALERT: teachers wote lazima harvest their crops mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Teachers Service Commission urges farmers to remain vigilant and report vaccination to the county education office.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Huduma kwa Walimu inawasihi wakulima kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti chanjo kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti.
Somali: Guddiga Adeegga Macallimiinta ayaa ku boorriyay beeraleyda inay feejignaadaan oo ay tallaalka u soo sheegaan xafiiska waxbarashada ee degmada.
Kiswahili: The Teachers Service Commission inawahimiza farmers kuwa macho na kuripoti vaccination kwenye the county education office.

English: Parents are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught carrying illegal items.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakibeba vitu haramu.
Somali: Waalidiinta waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo sita alaab sharci darro ah.
Kiswahili: Parents washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya carrying illegal items.

English: URGENT: fishermen must boil drinking water before March 15th. Report to the nearest health facility immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: wavuvi lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya Machi 15. Toa taarifa kwa kituo cha afya kilicho karibu mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: kalluumeysatadu waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor Maarso 15. Isla markiiba u sheeg xarunta caafimaadka ee ugu dhow.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fishermen lazima boil drinking water kabla ya March 15th. Ripoti kwenye the nearest health facility mara moja.

English: The Kenya Red Cross issues weather warning for all wards.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya latoa onyo la hali ya hewa kwa kata zote.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa digniin ka soo saartay cimilada dhammaan waaxyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inatoa weather warning kwa all wards.

English: The Kenya Red Cross urges communities to practice handwashing to prevent soil erosion.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya linahimiza jamii kunawa mikono ili kuzuia mmomonyoko wa udongo.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ku boorrisay bulshooyinka inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago nabaad-guurka carrada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inawahimiza jamii kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia soil erosion.

English: Do not report suspicious activity from floodwaters. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usiripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka kutokana na maji ya mafuriko. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha soo sheegin dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo oo ka imanaya daadadka. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye report suspicious activity kutoka floodwaters. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: All all Kenyans must undergo mandatory inspection.
Kiswahili2: Wakenya wote lazima wapitie ukaguzi wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka Kenyanka ah waa inay maraan baaritaan khasab ah.
Kiswahili: All Kenyans zote lazima zipitie inspection inayolazimishwa.

English: The Office of the Auditor General announces free vaccination for pastoralists.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi ya Mkaguzi Mkuu wa Hesabu za Serikali yatangaza chanjo ya bure kwa wafugaji.
Somali: Xafiiska Hanti-dhawrka Guud ayaa ku dhawaaqay tallaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay xoolo-dhaqatada.
Kiswahili: The Office of the Auditor General inatangaza vaccination ya bure kwa pastoralists.

English: Citizens are reminded that the deadline for voter registration is extended to June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wananchi wanakumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya uandikishaji wapiga kura imeongezwa hadi Juni 30.
Somali: Muwaadiniinta waxaa la xasuusinayaa in waqtiga kama dambaysta ah ee diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha la kordhiyay ilaa Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens wamekumbushwa kwamba tarehe ya mwisho ya voter registration imeongezwa hadi June 30th.

English: IEBC advises livestock farmers to attend training to prevent influenza.
Kiswahili2: IEBC inawashauri wafugaji kuhudhuria mafunzo ili kuzuia mafua.
Somali: IEBC waxay kula talinaysaa beeralayda xoolaha inay ka qayb qaataan tababar looga hortagayo hargabka.
Kiswahili: IEBC inashauri livestock farmers kufanya attend training ili kuzuia influenza.

English: Farmers are advised to secure their properties immediately to prevent property damage.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kulinda mali zao mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mali.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda si looga hortago burburka hantida.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya secure their properties mara moja ili kuzuia property damage.

English: County officials are reminded to register for livestock offtake program at the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa uondoaji wa mifugo katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka xoolaha lagu qaato ee gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: County officials wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa livestock offtake program kwenye the Coastal region.

English: Farmers are advised to vaccinate their animals within the next 14 days.
Kiswahili2: Wakulima wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ndani ya siku 14 zijazo.
Somali: Beeralayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay tallaalaan xoolahooda 14-ka maalmood ee soo socda.
Kiswahili: Farmers washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ndani ya the next 14 days.

English: The County Government announces free malaria screening for parents.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti yatangaza uchunguzi wa malaria bila malipo kwa wazazi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay ku dhawaaqday in waalidiinta ay u baahan yihiin baaritaan duumo oo bilaash ah.
Kiswahili: The County Government inatangaza malaria screening ya bure kwa parents.

English: Students are advised to avoid evacuation. Strict penalties await those caught sharing exam papers.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhamishwa. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakishiriki karatasi za mitihani.
Somali: Ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan daadgureynta. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo wadaagaya waraaqaha imtixaanka.
Kiswahili: Students washauriwa kuepuka evacuation. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya sharing exam papers.

English: The National Police Service directs all clinics to implement the safety protocols starting semester.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi inaagiza kliniki zote kutekeleza itifaki za usalama kuanzia muhula.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka wuxuu farayaa dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka inay hirgeliyaan habraacyada badbaadada laga bilaabo simistarka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inaagiza clinics zote kutekeleza the safety protocols kuanzia semester.

English: URGENT: All health facilities in the police station must report suspicious activity by noon today due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Vituo vyote vya afya katika kituo cha polisi lazima viripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka ifikapo saa sita mchana leo kutokana na mlipuko wa ugonjwa.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee saldhigga booliiska waa inay soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyo laga shakiyo maanta duhurkii sababo la xiriira cudurka oo faafay.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: health facilities zote katika the police station lazima report suspicious activity ifikapo saa noon leo kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service has deployed additional health workers to maintain law and order during election period.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Ukaguzi wa Afya ya Mimea nchini Kenya imewatuma wafanyakazi wa afya zaidi ili kudumisha utulivu na sheria wakati wa uchaguzi.
Somali: Hay'adda Kormeerka Caafimaadka Dhirta ee Kenya ayaa shaqaaleysiisay shaqaale caafimaad oo dheeraad ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta inta lagu jiro xilliga doorashada.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Plant Health Inspectorate Service imeweka health workers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa election period.

English: Pastoralists are advised to complete registration immediately to prevent crop damage.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili mara moja ili kuzuia uharibifu wa mazao.
Somali: Xoolo dhaqatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago waxyeelada dalagga.
Kiswahili: Pastoralists washauriwa kufanya complete registration mara moja ili kuzuia crop damage.

English: Fish farmers are advised to vaccinate their animals within 90 days.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wanashauriwa kuwachanja wanyama wao ndani ya siku 90.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay xoolahooda tallaalaan 90 maalmood gudahood.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers washauriwa kufanya vaccinate their animals ndani ya 90 days.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges all school administrators to evacuate immediately by 6:00 PM daily.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawasihi wasimamizi wote wa shule kuhama mara moja ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa wuxuu ku boorinayaa dhammaan maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay si degdeg ah uga baxaan 6:00 PM maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza school administrators wote kufanya evacuate immediately ifikapo saa 6:00 PM kila siku.

English: All students must submit tax returns to the county government by February 28th.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe marejesho ya kodi kwa serikali ya kaunti ifikapo tarehe 28 Februari.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay soo gudbiyaan canshuur celinta dawladda degmada ugu dambayn Febraayo 28keeda.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima viwasilishe tax returns kwa the county government ifikapo February 28th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority bans inspection from animals that have died.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yapiga marufuku ukaguzi kutoka kwa wanyama waliokufa.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa mamnuucday baaritaanka xoolaha dhintay.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inakataza inspection kutoka animals that have died.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission urges residents to remain vigilant and report inspection to Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa inawasihi wakazi kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti ukaguzi kwa Nakuru.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku boorriyay dadka deegaanka inay feejignaadaan oo ay kormeerkooda ku soo wargeliyaan Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inawahimiza residents kuwa macho na kuripoti inspection kwenye Nakuru.

English: Parents must carry production reports at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wazazi lazima wabebe ripoti za uzalishaji wakati wote.
Somali: Waalidiintu waa inay mar walba wataan warbixinnada wax soo saarka.
Kiswahili: Parents lazima wabebe production reports wakati wote.

English: The public is invited to submit budget documents on the proposed health regulations before December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za bajeti kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Desemba 31.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada miisaaniyadda ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Diseembar 31.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha budget documents kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya December 31st.

English: All fishermen are advised to observe the critical until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wote wanashauriwa kuzingatia sheria muhimu hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay fiiro gaar ah u yeeshaan xaaladda degdegga ah ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wote washauriwa kuzingatia critical hadi tangazo jipya.

English: The National Transport and Safety Authority announces school reopening in all Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Kitaifa ya Uchukuzi na Usalama yatangaza kufunguliwa tena kwa shule katika eneo lote la Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Qaranka ee Gaadiidka iyo Badbaadada ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dib loo furayo iskuullada dhammaan Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The National Transport and Safety Authority inatangaza school reopening katika Marsabit zote.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All livestock farmers must secure their properties immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wafugaji wote lazima walinde mali zao mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha waa inay si degdeg ah u sugaan hantidooda sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: livestock farmers wote lazima secure their properties mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: School administrators are urged to avoid unnecessary travel to stop the spread of HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili2: Wasimamizi wa shule wanahimizwa kuepuka usafiri usio wa lazima ili kuzuia kuenea kwa VVU/UKIMWI.
Somali: Maamulayaasha iskuulada ayaa lagu boorinayaa inay ka fogaadaan safarrada aan loo baahnayn si loo joojiyo faafitaanka HIV/AIDS.
Kiswahili: School administrators wamehimizwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel ili kusitisha kuenea kwa HIV/AIDS.

English: Fishermen are warned against planting on WhatsApp groups.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi waonywa dhidi ya kupanda kwenye vikundi vya WhatsApp.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa looga digayaa inay ku beeraan kooxaha WhatsApp-ka.
Kiswahili: Fishermen wameonywa dhidi ya planting kwenye WhatsApp groups.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All citizens must boil drinking water immediately due to terrorist threat.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Raia wote lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa mara moja kutokana na tishio la kigaidi.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay si degdeg ah u karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo sababo la xiriira khatarta argagixisada.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: citizens wote lazima boil drinking water mara moja kutokana na terrorist threat.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture announces livestock feed to all displaced families in Nairobi.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa familia zote zilizopoteza makazi jijini Nairobi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha ayaa ku dhawaaqday quudinta xoolaha dhammaan qoysaska barakacay ee ku nool Nairobi.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inatangaza livestock feed kwa displaced families wote katika Nairobi.

English: The public is advised to seek medical attention for severe headache symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kutafuta matibabu kwa dalili kali za maumivu ya kichwa.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad si ay u helaan calaamado madax-xanuun oo daran.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya seek medical attention kwa dalili za severe headache.

English: All students are advised to observe the 60km/h until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote wanashauriwa kufuatilia mwendo wa kilomita 60 kwa saa hadi taarifa zaidi itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan ardayda waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ilaaliyaan xawaaraha 60km/saacaddii ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Students wote washauriwa kuzingatia 60km/h hadi tangazo jipya.

English: Do not vaccinate their animals from affected countries. Report such incidents to the National Disaster Operations Centre.
Kiswahili2: Usiwachanje wanyama wao kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa Kituo cha Kitaifa cha Operesheni za Maafa.
Somali: Ha tallaalin xoolahooda wadamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg Xarunta Hawlgallada Masiibooyinka Qaranka.
Kiswahili: Usifanye vaccinate their animals kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa the National Disaster Operations Centre.

English: The public is invited to submit identity documents on the proposed health regulations before July 1st.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha hati za utambulisho kuhusu kanuni za afya zilizopendekezwa kabla ya Julai 1.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan dukumentiyada aqoonsiga ee ku saabsan xeerarka caafimaadka ee la soo jeediyay ka hor 1-da Luulyo.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha identity documents kuhusu the proposed health regulations kabla ya July 1st.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department advises school administrators to move to higher ground to prevent meningitis.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inawashauri wasimamizi wa shule kuhamia katika ngazi za juu ili kuzuia ugonjwa wa uti wa mgongo.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa kula talineysa maamulayaasha iskuulada inay u guuraan meelaha sare si looga hortago cudurka meningitis-ka.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inashauri school administrators kufanya move to higher ground ili kuzuia meningitis.

English: Disaster response teams will conduct livestock movement in all regions starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Timu za kukabiliana na maafa zitaendesha harakati za mifugo katika maeneo yote kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Kooxaha ka hortagga masiibooyinka ayaa dhaqdhaqa xoolaha ka sameyn doona dhammaan gobollada laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Disaster response teams watafanya livestock movement katika regions zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: The County Government directs all livestock farmers to undergo examination.
Kiswahili2: Serikali ya Kaunti inawaagiza wafugaji wote kufanyiwa uchunguzi.
Somali: Dowladda Gobolku waxay faray dhammaan beeraleyda xoolaha inay maraan baaritaan.
Kiswahili: The County Government inaagiza livestock farmers wote kupitia examination.

English: All motorists are directed to update their records by January 8th.
Kiswahili2: Madereva wote wanaagizwa kusasisha rekodi zao ifikapo Januari 8.
Somali: Dhammaan darawallada waxaa la farayaa inay cusbooneysiiyaan diiwaankooda kahor Janaayo 8.
Kiswahili: Motorists wote wameagizwa kufanya update their records ifikapo January 8th.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces that all health facilities will complete registration on June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza kwamba vituo vyote vya afya vitakamilisha usajili tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ay diiwaan gelin doonaan 30-ka Juun.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza kwamba health facilities zote zitafanya complete registration tarehe June 30th.

English: The Kenya Red Cross warns against update their records. Do not consume contaminated water.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laonya dhidi ya kusasisha rekodi zao. Usitumie maji machafu.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa ka digtay in la cusbooneysiiyo diiwaankooda. Ha isticmaalin biyo wasakhaysan.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross inaonya dhidi ya update their records. Usifanye consume contaminated water.

English: Do not attend training from affected countries. Report such incidents to county officials.
Kiswahili2: Usihudhurie mafunzo kutoka nchi zilizoathiriwa. Ripoti matukio kama hayo kwa maafisa wa kaunti.
Somali: Ha ka qayb gelin tababarrada ka imanaya waddamada ay dhibaatadu saameysey. Dhacdooyinka noocaas ah u soo sheeg mas'uuliyiinta degmada.
Kiswahili: Usifanye attend training kutoka affected countries. Ripoti tukio kama hilo kwa county officials.

English: The Kenya Red Cross activates security patrols in Marsabit.
Kiswahili2: Shirika la Msalaba Mwekundu la Kenya laanzisha doria za usalama huko Marsabit.
Somali: Hay'adda Laanqeyrta Cas ee Kenya ayaa hawlgalisay roondooyin amni oo ka dhacay Marsabit.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Red Cross huamsha security patrols katika Marsabit.

English: URGENT: motorists must install safety equipment before next Monday. Report to Turkana immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: madereva lazima wasakinishe vifaa vya usalama kabla ya Jumatatu ijayo. Toa taarifa kwa Turkana mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Darawalada baabuurtu waa inay rakibaan qalabka badbaadada ka hor Isniinta soo socota. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg Turkana.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: motorists lazima install safety equipment kabla ya next Monday. Ripoti kwenye Turkana mara moja.

English: Taxpayers are reminded to register for free vaccination campaign at Kilifi.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya kampeni ya chanjo bila malipo huko Kilifi.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan ololaha tallaalka bilaashka ah ee Kilifi.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa free vaccination campaign kwenye Kilifi.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority directs all taxpayers to undergo livestock movement.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawaagiza walipa kodi wote kuhamisha mifugo.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay faray dhammaan canshuur bixiyeyaasha inay maraan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inaagiza taxpayers wote kupitia livestock movement.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces that all hospitals will vaccinate their animals on December 31st.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza kwamba hospitali zote zitawachanja wanyama wao mnamo Desemba 31.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay in dhammaan isbitaallada ay tallaali doonaan xoolahooda 31-ka Diseembar.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza kwamba hospitals zote zitafanya vaccinate their animals tarehe December 31st.

English: Residents are reminded to register for disaster preparedness program at the Coastal region.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wanakumbushwa kujiandikisha kwa ajili ya mpango wa kujiandaa na maafa katika eneo la Pwani.
Somali: Dadka deegaanka waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan barnaamijka u diyaargarowga masiibooyinka ee gobolka Xeebta.
Kiswahili: Residents wamekumbushwa kujisajili kwa disaster preparedness program kwenye the Coastal region.

English: URGENT: All voters must stock emergency supplies before security clearance is obtained.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawe na vifaa vya dharura kabla ya kibali cha usalama kupatikana.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan cod-bixiyayaashu waa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah ka hor inta aan la helin oggolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: voters wote lazima stock emergency supplies kabla ya security clearance is obtained.

English: EMERGENCY ALERT: All teachers must stock emergency supplies immediately due to rising water levels.
Kiswahili2: TAARIFA YA DHARURA: Walimu wote lazima waweke vifaa vya dharura mara moja kutokana na kuongezeka kwa viwango vya maji.
Somali: DIGNIIN DEGDEG AH: Dhammaan macallimiintu waa inay isla markiiba kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah sababtoo ah heerarka biyaha oo kor u kacaya.
Kiswahili: EMERGENCY ALERT: teachers wote lazima stock emergency supplies mara moja kutokana na rising water levels.

English: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission has deployed additional extension officers to maintain law and order during month.
Kiswahili2: Tume Huru ya Uchaguzi na Mipaka imetuma maafisa wa ziada wa ugani ili kudumisha sheria na utulivu katika mwezi huo.
Somali: Guddiga Madaxa-bannaan ee Doorashooyinka iyo Xuduudaha ayaa hawlgeliyay saraakiil dheeraad ah oo kordhin ah si ay u ilaaliyaan sharciga iyo kala dambeynta bisha.
Kiswahili: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission imeweka extension officers wa ziada ili kudumisha law and order wakati wa month.

English: The Ministry of Health announces that all examination must be avoid unnecessary travel starting January 8th, 2026.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inatangaza kwamba uchunguzi wote lazima uepukwe kusafiri bila lazima kuanzia Januari 8, 2026.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka ayaa ku dhawaaqday in dhammaan baaritaannada laga fogaado safar aan loo baahnayn oo bilaabanaya Janaayo 8, 2026.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inatangaza kwamba examination zote lazima avoid unnecessary travel kuanzia January 8th, 2026.

English: URGENT: county officials must boil drinking water before the end of this week. Report to the county education office immediately.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Maafisa wa kaunti lazima wachemshe maji ya kunywa kabla ya mwisho wa wiki hii. Toa taarifa kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti mara moja.
Somali: DEGDEG AH: mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay karkariyaan biyaha la cabbo ka hor dhammaadka toddobaadkan. Isla markiiba u soo sheeg xafiiska waxbarashada degmada.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: county officials lazima boil drinking water kabla ya the end of this week. Ripoti kwenye the county education office mara moja.

English: The Ministry of Education urges school administrators to remain vigilant and report harvesting to Turkana.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Elimu inawasihi wasimamizi wa shule kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti uvunaji kwa Turkana.
Somali: Wasaaradda waxbarashadu waxay ku boorinaysaa maamulayaasha dugsiyada inay feejignaadaan oo ay Turkana u soo sheegaan goosashada.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Education inawahimiza school administrators kuwa macho na kuripoti harvesting kwenye Turkana.

English: Election officials will conduct livestock movement in all trading centers starting Wednesday.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa uchaguzi wataendesha harakati za mifugo katika vituo vyote vya biashara kuanzia Jumatano.
Somali: Saraakiisha doorashada ayaa dhaqdhaqa xoolaha ka sameyn doona dhammaan xarumaha ganacsiga laga bilaabo Arbacada.
Kiswahili: Election officials watafanya livestock movement katika trading centers zote kuanzia Wednesday.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit identity documents to the county education office by the end of month.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa ofisi ya elimu ya kaunti ifikapo mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan xafiiska waxbarashada degmadu dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe identity documents kwenye the county education office ifikapo the end of month.

English: The Social Health Authority warns of drought exceeding critical in Garissa.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Afya ya Jamii yaonya kuhusu ukame mkubwa zaidi huko Garissa.
Somali: Hay'adda Caafimaadka Bulshada ayaa ka digaysa abaar aad u daran oo ka jirta Garissa.
Kiswahili: The Social Health Authority inaonya drought zaidi ya critical katika Garissa.

English: Taxpayers are advised to stock emergency supplies as security clearance is obtained are expected.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuhifadhi vifaa vya dharura kadri kibali cha usalama kinavyopatikana kinavyotarajiwa.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay kaydiyaan agabka gurmadka degdegga ah maadaama la filayo in la helo oggolaansho amni.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kufanya stock emergency supplies kwani security clearance is obtained zinatarajiwa.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all residents to undergo training.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawaagiza wakazi wote kupata mafunzo.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay faray dhammaan dadka deegaanka inay tababar qaataan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza residents wote kupitia training.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory distribution.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wapitie usambazaji wa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka deegaanka waa inay maraan qaybinta qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie distribution inayolazimishwa.

English: All citizens must seek medical attention before April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima watafute huduma ya matibabu kabla ya Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay raadsadaan daryeel caafimaad ka hor Abriil 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens wote lazima seek medical attention kabla ya April 30th.

English: The Kenya Meteorological Department urges communities to practice handwashing to prevent water contamination.
Kiswahili2: Idara ya Hali ya Hewa ya Kenya inahimiza jamii kunawa mikono ili kuzuia uchafuzi wa maji.
Somali: Waaxda saadaasha hawada ee Kenya ayaa ku boorisay bulshooyinka inay ku dhaqmaan dhaqidda gacmaha si looga hortago wasakhowga biyaha.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Meteorological Department inawahimiza jamii kufanya practice handwashing ili kuzuia water contamination.

English: URGENT: All fish farmers must register online before the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: HARAKA: Wafugaji wote wa samaki lazima wajiandikishe mtandaoni kabla mvua haijaisha.
Somali: DEGDEG: Dhammaan beeraleyda kalluunka waa inay iska diiwaangeliyaan khadka internetka ka hor inta aysan roobabku joogsan.
Kiswahili: HARAKA: fish farmers wote lazima register online kabla ya the rains stop.

English: All county officials must report suspicious activity to Western Kenya before dusk daily.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti lazima waripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka Magharibi mwa Kenya kabla ya jioni kila siku.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmadu waa inay u soo sheegaan dhaqdhaqaaqyada laga shakiyo Galbeedka Kenya ka hor qorrax dhaca maalin kasta.
Kiswahili: County officials wote lazima report suspicious activity kwenye Western Kenya kabla ya saa dusk kila siku.

English: All residents must undergo mandatory school reopening.
Kiswahili2: Wakazi wote lazima wafunguliwe shule kwa lazima.
Somali: Dhammaan dadka degan waa inay maraan dib u furista iskuullada ee qasabka ah.
Kiswahili: Residents zote lazima zipitie school reopening inayolazimishwa.

English: Fish farmers are warned against voter registration on unofficial channels.
Kiswahili2: Wafugaji wa samaki wameonywa dhidi ya usajili wa wapiga kura kwenye njia zisizo rasmi.
Somali: Beeralayda kalluunka ayaa looga digayaa diiwaangelinta codbixiyeyaasha ee laga sameeyo kanaallo aan rasmi ahayn.
Kiswahili: Fish farmers wameonywa dhidi ya voter registration kwenye unofficial channels.

English: The public is advised to avoid assessment in Turkana until the rains stop.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka tathmini huko Turkana hadi mvua itakapokoma.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan qiimaynta Turkana ilaa inta roobku joogsanayo.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kuepuka assessment katika Turkana mpaka the rains stop.

English: The public is advised to move to higher ground for persistent cough symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kuhamia maeneo ya juu kwa dalili za kikohozi zinazoendelea.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay u guuraan meel sare si ay u helaan calaamadaha qufaca ee joogtada ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya move to higher ground kwa dalili za persistent cough.

English: All citizens must submit identity documents to county officials by September 15th.
Kiswahili2: Raia wote lazima wawasilishe hati za utambulisho kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Septemba 15.
Somali: Dhammaan muwaadiniinta waa inay dukumentiyada aqoonsiga u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada kahor Sebtembar 15keeda.
Kiswahili: Citizens zote lazima viwasilishe identity documents kwa county officials ifikapo September 15th.

English: Taxpayers are advised to avoid livestock movement. Strict penalties await those caught evading taxes.
Kiswahili2: Walipa kodi wanashauriwa kuepuka kuhama kwa mifugo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaokamatwa wakikwepa kodi.
Somali: Canshuur bixiyeyaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan dhaqdhaqaaqa xoolaha. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto iyagoo ka baxsanaya canshuuraha.
Kiswahili: Taxpayers washauriwa kuepuka livestock movement. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya evading taxes.

English: Voters are advised to avoid unnecessary travel immediately to prevent livestock deaths.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wanashauriwa kuepuka kusafiri bila sababu mara moja ili kuzuia vifo vya mifugo.
Somali: Codbixiyayaasha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah uga fogaadaan safar aan loo baahnayn si looga hortago dhimashada xoolaha.
Kiswahili: Voters washauriwa kufanya avoid unnecessary travel mara moja ili kuzuia livestock deaths.

English: The National Police Service announces enhanced assessment in all Lamu during semester.
Kiswahili2: Huduma ya Kitaifa ya Polisi yatangaza tathmini iliyoimarishwa katika Lamu nzima wakati wa muhula.
Somali: Adeegga Booliska Qaranka ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimeyn la xoojiyay oo ka socota dhammaan Lamu inta lagu jiro simistarka.
Kiswahili: The National Police Service inatangaza assessment zilizoidhinishwa katika Lamu zote wakati wa semester.

English: The public is invited to submit health records on the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill before June 30th.
Kiswahili2: Umma unaalikwa kuwasilisha rekodi za afya kuhusu Muswada wa Ugawaji wa Mapato wa Kaunti uliopendekezwa kabla ya tarehe 30 Juni.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagu martiqaadayaa inay soo gudbiyaan diiwaannada caafimaadka ee ku saabsan Hindise-sharciyeedka Qoondaynta Dakhliga Degmada ee la soo jeediyay ka hor Juun 30keeda.
Kiswahili: Umma unakaribishwa kuwasilisha health records kuhusu the proposed County Revenue Allocation Bill kabla ya June 30th.

English: Fishermen are advised to complete registration immediately to prevent food insecurity.
Kiswahili2: Wavuvi wanashauriwa kukamilisha usajili mara moja ili kuzuia uhaba wa chakula.
Somali: Kalluumeysatada waxaa lagula talinayaa inay si degdeg ah u dhammaystiraan diiwaangelinta si looga hortago cunto yaraanta.
Kiswahili: Fishermen washauriwa kufanya complete registration mara moja ili kuzuia food insecurity.

English: All clinics in Garissa will remain closed until further notice.
Kiswahili2: Kliniki zote huko Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa hadi ilani nyingine itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xarumaha caafimaadka ee Gaarisa ayaa xirnaan doona ilaa amar dambe.
Kiswahili: Clinics zote katika Garissa zitabaki zimefungwa mpaka further notice.

English: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission announces free assessment for citizens.
Kiswahili2: Tume ya Maadili na Kupambana na Rushwa yatangaza tathmini ya bure kwa raia.
Somali: Guddiga Anshaxa iyo La-dagaallanka Musuqmaasuqa ayaa ku dhawaaqay qiimeyn bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay muwaadiniinta.
Kiswahili: The Ethics and Anti-Corruption Commission inatangaza assessment ya bure kwa citizens.

English: Students must carry tax returns at all times.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi lazima wabebe marejesho ya kodi wakati wote.
Somali: Ardaydu waa inay sitaan canshuur celinta mar walba.
Kiswahili: Students lazima wabebe tax returns wakati wote.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority announces livestock feed to all drought-affected households in Nakuru.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya yatangaza chakula cha mifugo kwa kaya zote zilizoathiriwa na ukame huko Nakuru.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya ayaa ku dhawaaqday in xoolaha la quudinayo dhammaan qoysaska ay abaartu saameysay ee Nakuru.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inatangaza livestock feed kwa drought-affected households wote katika Nakuru.

English: The Kenya Revenue Authority urges citizens to remain vigilant and report planting to Mandera.
Kiswahili2: Mamlaka ya Mapato ya Kenya inawasihi raia kuendelea kuwa macho na kuripoti upandaji miti kwa Mandera.
Somali: Hay'adda Dakhliga Kenya waxay ku boorinaysaa muwaadiniinta inay feejignaadaan oo ay soo sheegaan beerashada Mandheera.
Kiswahili: The Kenya Revenue Authority inawahimiza citizens kuwa macho na kuripoti planting kwenye Mandera.

English: All voters must submit annual reports to the police by April 30th.
Kiswahili2: Wapiga kura wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za kila mwaka kwa polisi ifikapo Aprili 30.
Somali: Dhammaan cod-bixiyeyaasha waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan booliiska kahor Abriil 30-keeda.
Kiswahili: Voters zote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa the police ifikapo April 30th.

English: All county officials are reminded to attend training by March 15th.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wote wa kaunti wanakumbushwa kuhudhuria mafunzo ifikapo Machi 15.
Somali: Dhammaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada waxaa la xasuusinayaa inay ka soo qayb galaan tababarka kahor Maarso 15.
Kiswahili: County officials wote wamekumbushwa kufanya attend training ifikapo March 15th.

English: All government offices in disease outbreak zones will remain closed until further notice from the county government.
Kiswahili2: Ofisi zote za serikali katika maeneo ya mlipuko wa magonjwa zitabaki kufungwa hadi taarifa zaidi kutoka kwa serikali ya kaunti itakapotolewa.
Somali: Dhammaan xafiisyada dowladda ee ku yaal goobaha uu cudurku ka dillaacay way xirnaan doonaan ilaa amar dambe oo ka soo baxay dowladda hoose.
Kiswahili: Government offices zote katika disease outbreak zones zitabaki zimefungwa hadi tangazo jipya kutoka kwa the county government.

English: County officials are advised to avoid training. Strict penalties await those caught cheating.
Kiswahili2: Maafisa wa kaunti wanashauriwa kuepuka mafunzo. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaopatikana wakidanganya.
Somali: Mas'uuliyiinta gobolka waxaa lagula talinayaa inay ka fogaadaan tababarka. Ciqaab adag ayaa sugeysa kuwa lagu qabto inay khiyaameeyaan.
Kiswahili: County officials washauriwa kuepuka training. Adhabu kali zinawasubiri wale wanaobainika wakifanya cheating.

English: The Ministry of Agriculture directs all tea farmers to undergo planting.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Kilimo inawaagiza wakulima wote wa chai kupanda.
Somali: Wasaaradda Beeraha waxay faraysaa dhammaan beeraleyda shaaha inay beeraan.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Agriculture inaagiza tea farmers wote kupitia planting.

English: The Ministry of Health reminds parents to practice handwashing before the end of month.
Kiswahili2: Wizara ya Afya inawakumbusha wazazi kunawa mikono kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
Somali: Wasaaradda Caafimaadka waxay waalidiinta xasuusinaysaa inay gacmaha dhaqdaan ka hor dhammaadka bisha.
Kiswahili: The Ministry of Health inawakumbusha parents kufanya practice handwashing kabla ya the end of month.

English: The public is advised to register online for difficulty breathing symptoms.
Kiswahili2: Umma unashauriwa kujiandikisha mtandaoni kwa dalili za ugumu wa kupumua.
Somali: Dadweynaha waxaa lagula talinayaa inay iska diiwaan geliyaan khadka internetka si ay u ogaadaan calaamadaha neefsashada oo dhib ah.
Kiswahili: Umma unashauriwa kufanya register online kwa dalili za difficulty breathing.

English: SECURITY ALERT: Avoid Nakuru due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: DIGNIIN AMNIGA: Ka fogow Nakuru sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: TAHADHARI YA USALAMA: Epuka Nakuru kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: NOTICE: All county offices must submit health records to the county disaster office by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: TANGAZO: Ofisi zote za kaunti lazima ziwasilishe rekodi za afya kwa ofisi ya maafa ya kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: OGAYSIIS: Dhammaan xafiisyada degmadu waa inay diiwaannada caafimaadka u gudbiyaan xafiiska masiibooyinka ee degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: ILANI: county offices zote lazima ziwasilishe health records kwenye the county disaster office ifikapo next Monday.

English: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: All farmers must verify their details immediately due to disease outbreak.
Kiswahili2: MAELEKEZO YA LAZIMA: Wakulima wote lazima wahakikishe maelezo yao mara moja kutokana na mlipuko wa magonjwa.
Somali: TILMAAMAHA KHASABKA AH: Dhammaan beeraleyda waa inay si degdeg ah u xaqiijiyaan faahfaahintooda sababtoo ah cudurku wuu faafaa.
Kiswahili: MANDATORY DIRECTIVE: farmers wote lazima verify their details mara moja kutokana na disease outbreak.

English: All students must submit annual reports to county officials by next Monday.
Kiswahili2: Wanafunzi wote lazima wawasilishe ripoti za mwaka kwa maafisa wa kaunti ifikapo Jumatatu ijayo.
Somali: Dhammaan ardaydu waa inay warbixinnada sanadlaha ah u gudbiyaan mas'uuliyiinta degmada Isniinta soo socota.
Kiswahili: Students wote lazima viwasilishe annual reports kwa county officials ifikapo next Monday.
